VIEW.name: mon_g_barang_histori
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_g_barang_histori
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.[Kd_Divisi], dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Divisi, dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota AS [K.Nota], 
      dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.tanggal, dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.Transaksi, dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.no_transaksi, 
      dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang, dbo.m_barang.nama AS barang, dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.Debet, dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.Kredit,
       dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_satuan, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS satuan, dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.harga
FROM         dbo.m_satuan INNER JOIN
      dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail ON dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan = dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.[Kd_Divisi] = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang
ORDER BY dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi, dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.tanggal

VIEW.name: mon_g_barang_histori_client
VIEW.definition:
CREATE   VIEW dbo.mon_g_barang_histori_client
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.[Kd_Divisi], dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Divisi, dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota AS [K.Nota], 
      dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.tanggal, dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.Transaksi, dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.no_transaksi, 
      dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang, dbo.m_barang.nama AS barang, dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.Debet, dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.Kredit,
       dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_satuan, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS satuan
FROM         dbo.m_satuan INNER JOIN
      dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail ON dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan = dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.[Kd_Divisi] = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang
ORDER BY dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi, dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.tanggal

VIEW.name: mon_g_histori_kas_keluar
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_g_histori_kas_keluar
AS
SELECT     dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.tanggal, dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.transaksi, dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], 
                      dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.keterangan, dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.kredit, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No. Rekening], 
                      dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank
FROM         dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank
WHERE     (dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.kredit > 0)

VIEW.name: mon_g_histori_kas_masuk
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_g_histori_kas_masuk
AS
SELECT     dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.tanggal, dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.transaksi, dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], 
                      dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.keterangan, dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.debet, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No. Rekening], 
                      dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank
FROM         dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank
WHERE     (dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.debet > 0)

VIEW.name: mon_g_kas_akhir
VIEW.definition:
CREATE  VIEW dbo.mon_g_kas_akhir
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No. Rekening], dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, SUM(ISNULL(dbo.v_g_kas_histori.debet,0)) - SUM(ISNULL(dbo.v_g_kas_histori.kredit,0)) 
                      AS [Saldo Akhir]
FROM         dbo.v_g_kas_histori INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.v_g_kas_histori.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank
GROUP BY dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, dbo.m_bank.nama

VIEW.name: mon_g_kas_histori
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_g_kas_histori
AS
SELECT     dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.tanggal AS Tanggal, dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.transaksi AS Transaksi, 
                      dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.debet AS Debet, dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.kredit AS Kredit, 
                      dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No. Rekening], dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank
FROM         dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank

VIEW.name: mon_g_stok_barang_per_divisi
VIEW.definition:
CREATE  VIEW [dbo].[mon_g_stok_barang_per_divisi]
AS
SELECT     dbo.v_g_barang_histori.kd_divisi AS [Kode Divisi], dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.v_g_barang_histori.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], 
	dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dbo.m_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dbo.m_jenis_bahan.nama AS Jenis, 
	SUM(bs.jumlah * dbo.v_g_barang_histori.Debet) 
	- SUM(bs.jumlah * dbo.v_g_barang_histori.Kredit) AS [Stok Akhir], 
	dbo.ConvertBarang(dbo.v_g_barang_histori.kd_barang, SUM(bs.jumlah * dbo.v_g_barang_histori.Debet) - SUM(bs.jumlah * dbo.v_g_barang_histori.Kredit)) AS Konversi,
		(SELECT     TOP 1 m_supplier.nama
		FROM          m_supplier INNER JOIN
								m_barang_supplier ON m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier = m_supplier.kd_supplier
		WHERE      m_barang_supplier.kd_barang = v_g_barang_histori.kd_barang) AS Supplier, dv.status 
FROM         dbo.v_g_barang_histori INNER JOIN
	dbo.m_barang ON dbo.v_g_barang_histori.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
	dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.v_g_barang_histori.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
	dbo.m_jenis_bahan ON dbo.m_barang.kd_jenis_bahan = dbo.m_jenis_bahan.kd_jenis_bahan INNER JOIN
	dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori INNER JOIN
		m_barang_satuan bs ON v_g_barang_histori.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND v_g_barang_histori.kd_satuan =bs.kd_satuan INNER JOIN 
			m_barang_divisi dv ON  dbo.v_g_barang_histori.kd_divisi = dv.kd_divisi AND  dbo.v_g_barang_histori.kd_barang = dv.kd_barang
WHERE      (dbo.m_barang.status <> 0) 
GROUP BY dbo.v_g_barang_histori.kd_divisi, dbo.v_g_barang_histori.kd_barang, dbo.m_barang.nama, dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.m_jenis_bahan.nama, dbo.m_kategori.nama, dv.status

VIEW.name: mon_g_stok_barang_per_divisi_BACKUP
VIEW.definition:
CREATE   VIEW [dbo].[mon_g_stok_barang_per_divisi_BACKUP]
AS
SELECT     dbo.v_g_barang_histori.kd_divisi AS [Kode Divisi], dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.v_g_barang_histori.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], 
                      dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, 
					--dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, 
					SUM(bs.jumlah * dbo.v_g_barang_histori.Debet) - SUM(bs.jumlah * dbo.v_g_barang_histori.Kredit) AS [Stok Akhir], 
					dbo.ConvertBarang(dbo.v_g_barang_histori.kd_barang, 
                      SUM(bs.jumlah * dbo.v_g_barang_histori.Debet) - SUM(bs.jumlah * dbo.v_g_barang_histori.Kredit)) AS Konversi
FROM         dbo.v_g_barang_histori INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_satuan bs ON dbo.v_g_barang_histori.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON bs.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.v_g_barang_histori.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi 
                      /*INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_supplier ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier*/
                      
WHERE    (dbo.m_barang.status <> 0) -- AND bs.status <> 0 AND (dbo.m_barang_supplier.status <> 0)
GROUP BY dbo.v_g_barang_histori.kd_divisi, dbo.v_g_barang_histori.kd_barang, dbo.m_barang.nama, dbo.m_divisi.nama --, dbo.m_supplier.nama

VIEW.name: mon_g_stok_barang_per_divisi_new
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[mon_g_stok_barang_per_divisi_new]
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dbo.m_barang_satuan.harga_jual AS [Harga Jual], 
                      dbo.m_barang_stok_akhir.stok_akhir AS [Stok Akhir], dbo.m_satuan.nama AS Stn, dbo.ConvertBarang(dbo.m_barang_stok_akhir.kd_barang, 
                      dbo.m_barang_stok_akhir.stok_akhir) AS [Stok Konversi]
FROM         dbo.m_barang_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_stok_akhir ON dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_stok_akhir.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_barang_stok_akhir.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan
WHERE     (dbo.m_barang_satuan.jumlah = 0) AND (dbo.m_barang.status <> 0)
GROUP BY dbo.m_barang.nama, dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.m_kategori.status, dbo.m_barang_satuan.harga_jual, dbo.m_barang_stok_akhir.stok_akhir, 
                      dbo.m_satuan.nama, dbo.ConvertBarang(dbo.m_barang_stok_akhir.kd_barang, dbo.m_barang_stok_akhir.stok_akhir)
HAVING      (dbo.m_kategori.status <> 2)

VIEW.name: mon_g_stok_barang_per_divisi_vd
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[mon_g_stok_barang_per_divisi_vd] AS
SELECT m_barang.kd_barang AS kd_barang,barang ,m_barang.kd_divisi  AS kd_divisi,divisi AS divisi,ROUND(stok_awal+
IsNULL(penjualan.jual_qty*-1,0)+
IsNULL(penjualan_retur.jual_retur_qty,0)+
IsNULL(pembelian.beli_qty,0)+
IsNULL(pembelian_retur.beli_retur_qty*-1,0)+
IsNULL(opname.qty_opname,0)+
IsNULL(mutasi_keluar.mutasi_qty*-1,0)+
IsNULL(mutasi_masuk.mutasi_qty,0),7)
 AS stok_akhir
FROM (
SELECT brg.kd_barang,brg.nama AS barang,m_div.kd_divisi,m_div.divisi,m_div.stok_awal FROM 
(SELECT kd_kategori FROM m_kategori WHERE status<>2) kategori
INNER JOIN
(SELECT kd_kategori,kd_barang,m_barang.nama FROM m_barang WHERE m_barang.status<>0 AND (m_barang.kd_barang LIKE '%%' OR m_barang.nama LIKE '%%')) brg
ON kategori.kd_kategori=brg.kd_kategori
INNER JOIN (
SELECT kd_barang,m_divisi.kd_divisi,nama AS divisi,stok_awal FROM m_barang_divisi 
INNER JOIN m_divisi ON m_divisi.kd_divisi=m_barang_divisi.kd_divisi
WHERE m_divisi.nama LIKE '%%'
)
m_div ON m_div.kd_barang=brg.kd_barang
) m_barang 
LEFT JOIN 
(SELECT mbs.kd_barang,kd_divisi,SUM(jual_item_div.jual_qty*mbs.jumlah) AS jual_qty FROM
(
	SELECT kd_barang,kd_satuan,kd_divisi,SUM(qty) AS jual_qty FROM t_penjualan_detail jual_dt 
	INNER JOIN (
		SELECT no_transaksi,kd_divisi FROM t_penjualan WHERE tanggal >(SELECT MAX(tanggal) FROM g_tutup_buku)
	) jual 
	ON jual.no_transaksi=jual_dt.no_transaksi 
	GROUP BY kd_barang,kd_satuan,kd_divisi
) jual_item_div
INNER JOIN 
(
	SELECT kd_barang,kd_satuan,jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang LIKE '%%'
) mbs ON mbs.kd_barang=jual_item_div.kd_barang AND mbs.kd_satuan=jual_item_div.kd_satuan
GROUP BY mbs.kd_barang,kd_divisi) penjualan
ON m_barang.kd_barang=penjualan.kd_barang AND m_barang.kd_divisi=penjualan.kd_divisi
LEFT JOIN
(SELECT mbs.kd_barang,kd_divisi,SUM(jual_item_div.jual_qty*mbs.jumlah) AS jual_retur_qty FROM
(
	SELECT kd_barang,kd_satuan,kd_divisi,SUM(qty) AS jual_qty FROM t_penjualan_retur_detail jual_dt 
	INNER JOIN (
		SELECT no_retur,kd_divisi FROM t_penjualan_retur WHERE tanggal >(SELECT MAX(tanggal) FROM g_tutup_buku)
	) jual 
	ON jual.no_retur=jual_dt.no_retur
	GROUP BY kd_barang,kd_satuan,kd_divisi
) jual_item_div
INNER JOIN 
(
	SELECT kd_barang,kd_satuan,jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang LIKE '%%'
) mbs ON mbs.kd_barang=jual_item_div.kd_barang AND mbs.kd_satuan=jual_item_div.kd_satuan
GROUP BY mbs.kd_barang,kd_divisi) penjualan_retur
ON m_barang.kd_barang=penjualan_retur.kd_barang AND m_barang.kd_divisi=penjualan_retur.kd_divisi
LEFT JOIN
(SELECT mbs.kd_barang,kd_divisi,SUM(beli_item_div.beli_qty*mbs.jumlah) AS beli_qty FROM
(
	SELECT kd_barang,kd_satuan,kd_divisi,SUM(qty) AS beli_qty FROM t_pembelian_detail beli_dt 
	INNER JOIN (
		SELECT no_transaksi,kd_divisi FROM t_pembelian WHERE tanggal >(SELECT MAX(tanggal) FROM g_tutup_buku)
	) beli 
	ON beli.no_transaksi=beli_dt.no_transaksi 
	GROUP BY kd_barang,kd_satuan,kd_divisi
) beli_item_div
INNER JOIN 
(
	SELECT kd_barang,kd_satuan,jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang LIKE '%%'
) mbs ON mbs.kd_barang=beli_item_div.kd_barang AND mbs.kd_satuan=beli_item_div.kd_satuan
GROUP BY mbs.kd_barang,kd_divisi) pembelian
ON m_barang.kd_barang=pembelian.kd_barang AND m_barang.kd_divisi=pembelian.kd_divisi
LEFT JOIN

(SELECT mbs.kd_barang,kd_divisi,SUM(beli_item_div.beli_qty*mbs.jumlah) AS beli_retur_qty FROM
(
	SELECT kd_barang,kd_satuan,kd_divisi,SUM(qty) AS beli_qty FROM t_pembelian_retur_detail beli_dt 
	INNER JOIN (
		SELECT no_retur,kd_divisi FROM t_pembelian_retur WHERE tanggal >(SELECT MAX(tanggal) FROM g_tutup_buku)
	) beli 
	ON beli.no_retur=beli_dt.no_retur 
	GROUP BY kd_barang,kd_satuan,kd_divisi
) beli_item_div
INNER JOIN 
(
	SELECT kd_barang,kd_satuan,jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang LIKE '%%'
) mbs ON mbs.kd_barang=beli_item_div.kd_barang AND mbs.kd_satuan=beli_item_div.kd_satuan
GROUP BY mbs.kd_barang,kd_divisi) pembelian_retur
ON m_barang.kd_barang=pembelian_retur.kd_barang AND m_barang.kd_divisi=pembelian_retur.kd_divisi
LEFT JOIN
(SELECT mbs.kd_barang,kd_divisi,(jumlah*qty) AS qty_opname FROM
(
	SELECT kd_barang,kd_satuan,kd_divisi,SUM(qty) AS qty FROM
	(
		SELECT kd_barang,kd_satuan,kd_divisi,
		CASE WHEN status<>2 AND qty>0 THEN (qty*-1)	ELSE qty END AS qty
		FROM t_opname_stok WHERE tanggal>(SELECT MAX(tanggal) FROM g_tutup_buku)
	) op_stat
GROUP BY kd_barang,kd_satuan,kd_divisi
) op
INNER JOIN
(
	SELECT kd_barang,kd_satuan,jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang LIKE '%%'
) mbs ON mbs.kd_barang=op.kd_barang AND mbs.kd_satuan=op.kd_satuan) opname
ON m_barang.kd_barang=opname.kd_barang AND m_barang.kd_divisi=opname.kd_divisi
LEFT JOIN
(SELECT mbs.kd_barang,kd_divisi_asal AS kd_divisi,SUM(mutasi_item_div.mutasi_qty*mbs.jumlah) AS mutasi_qty FROM
(
	SELECT kd_barang,kd_satuan,kd_divisi_asal ,SUM(qty) AS mutasi_qty FROM t_mutasi_stok_detail mutasi_dt 
	INNER JOIN (
		SELECT no_transaksi,kd_divisi_asal FROM t_mutasi_stok WHERE tanggal >(SELECT MAX(tanggal) FROM g_tutup_buku)
	) mutasi 
	ON mutasi.no_transaksi=mutasi_dt.no_transaksi 
	GROUP BY kd_barang,kd_satuan,kd_divisi_asal
) mutasi_item_div
INNER JOIN 
(
	SELECT kd_barang,kd_satuan,jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang LIKE '%%'
) mbs ON mbs.kd_barang=mutasi_item_div.kd_barang AND mbs.kd_satuan=mutasi_item_div.kd_satuan
GROUP BY mbs.kd_barang,kd_divisi_asal) mutasi_keluar
ON m_barang.kd_barang=mutasi_keluar.kd_barang AND m_barang.kd_divisi=mutasi_keluar.kd_divisi
LEFT JOIN
(SELECT mbs.kd_barang,kd_divisi_tujuan AS kd_divisi,SUM(mutasi_item_div.mutasi_qty*mbs.jumlah) AS mutasi_qty FROM
(
	SELECT kd_barang,kd_satuan,kd_divisi_tujuan ,SUM(qty) AS mutasi_qty FROM t_mutasi_stok_detail mutasi_dt 
	INNER JOIN (
		SELECT no_transaksi,kd_divisi_tujuan FROM t_mutasi_stok WHERE tanggal >(SELECT MAX(tanggal) FROM g_tutup_buku)
	) mutasi 
	ON mutasi.no_transaksi=mutasi_dt.no_transaksi 
	GROUP BY kd_barang,kd_satuan,kd_divisi_tujuan
) mutasi_item_div
INNER JOIN 
(
	SELECT kd_barang,kd_satuan,jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang LIKE '%%'
) mbs ON mbs.kd_barang=mutasi_item_div.kd_barang AND mbs.kd_satuan=mutasi_item_div.kd_satuan
GROUP BY mbs.kd_barang,kd_divisi_tujuan) mutasi_masuk
ON m_barang.kd_barang=mutasi_masuk.kd_barang AND m_barang.kd_divisi=mutasi_masuk.kd_divisi

VIEW.name: mon_m_aset_detail
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW mon_m_aset_detail AS
SELECT a.kd_aset, a.kd_index, a.kd_supplier, a.kd_divisi, a.kd_kategori_aset, a.nama as aset, a.keterangan, a.status,
	s.nama as supplier, d.nama as divisi, d.keterangan as keterangan_divisi, ak.nama as kategori_aset, j.nama as akun,
	dbo.GetFormatTanggal(a.tanggal_beli) AS tanggal_beli, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(a.tanggal_habis_garansi) AS tanggal_habis_garansi,
	a.harga_beli, a.penyusutan, a.nilai_residu,
	DATEDIFF(YEAR, a.tanggal_beli, GetDate()) AS [umur(tahun)],
	DATEDIFF(MONTH, a.tanggal_beli, GetDate()) AS [umur(bulan)],
	(a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) * (a.penyusutan / 100) AS [dasar_penyusutan(tahun)],
	(a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) * a.penyusutan / (12 * 100) AS [dasar_penyusutan(bulan)],	
	(a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) * a.penyusutan / (365 * 100) AS [dasar_penyusutan(hari)],
	akm_penyusutan =
		CASE a.penyusutan 
		WHEN 0 THEN
			0
		ELSE
			CASE
			WHEN ((a.harga_beli * (a.penyusutan / (365 * 100))) * DATEDIFF(DAY, a.tanggal_beli, GetDate())) > (a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) THEN
				a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu
			ELSE
				(((a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) * (a.penyusutan / (365 * 100))) * DATEDIFF(DAY, a.tanggal_beli, GetDate()))
			END
		END,
	nilai_buku =
		CASE a.penyusutan 
		WHEN 0 THEN
			a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu
		ELSE
			CASE
			WHEN ((a.harga_beli * (a.penyusutan / (365 * 100))) * DATEDIFF(DAY, a.tanggal_beli, GetDate())) > (a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) THEN
				a.nilai_residu
			ELSE
				a.harga_beli - (((a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) * (a.penyusutan / (365 * 100))) * DATEDIFF(DAY, a.tanggal_beli, GetDate()))
			END
		END,
	[Akm. Penyusutan Periode Aktif] = 
		case
		when ((a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) * (a.penyusutan / (365 * 100))) * DATEDIFF(DAY, a.tanggal_beli, GetDate()) > (a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) THEN
			0
		else
			((a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) * (a.penyusutan / (365 * 100))) * DATEDIFF(DAY, a.tanggal_beli, GetDate()) 
		end
		-
		case
		when ((a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) * (a.penyusutan / (365 * 100))) * DATEDIFF(DAY, a.tanggal_beli, GetDate()) > (a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) THEN
			0
		else			
			((a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) * (a.penyusutan / (365 * 100))) * DATEDIFF(DAY, a.tanggal_beli, dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku())
		end

FROM m_aset a, m_aset_kategori ak, m_supplier s, m_divisi d, m_jurnal j
WHERE a.kd_kategori_aset = ak.kd_kategori_aset AND a.kd_supplier = s.kd_supplier AND a.kd_divisi = d.kd_divisi AND a.kd_index = j.kd_index 
	AND a.status <>0

VIEW.name: mon_m_barang_barcode
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_m_barang_barcode
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_barang.kd_barang AS Kode, dbo.m_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dbo.m_merk.nama AS Merk, dbo.m_model.nama AS Model, 
                      dbo.m_warna.nama AS Warna, dbo.m_jenis_bahan.nama AS Bata, dbo.m_barang.ukuran AS Ukuran, dbo.m_barang_satuan.harga_jual AS Harga, 
                      dbo.m_satuan.nama
FROM         dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_merk ON dbo.m_barang.kd_merk = dbo.m_merk.kd_merk INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_model ON dbo.m_barang.kd_model = dbo.m_model.kd_model INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_warna ON dbo.m_barang.kd_warna = dbo.m_warna.kd_warna INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bahan ON dbo.m_barang.kd_jenis_bahan = dbo.m_jenis_bahan.kd_jenis_bahan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_satuan ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan

VIEW.name: mon_m_barang_daftar_harga
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_m_barang_daftar_harga
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, dbo.m_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, 
                      dbo.m_barang.kd_barang AS Kode, dbo.GetUrutanSatuan(dbo.m_barang.kd_barang) + ' ' +
                          (SELECT     TOP 1 m_satuan.nama
                            FROM          m_barang_satuan INNER JOIN
                                                   m_satuan ON m_barang_satuan.kd_satuan = m_satuan.kd_satuan AND m_barang_satuan.status <> 0
                            WHERE      m_barang_satuan.kd_barang = m_barang.kd_barang
                            ORDER BY m_barang_satuan.jumlah DESC) AS Isi,
                          (SELECT     TOP 1 harga_jual
                            FROM          m_barang_satuan
                            WHERE      m_barang_satuan.kd_barang = m_barang.kd_barang AND m_barang_satuan.status <> 0
                            ORDER BY m_barang_satuan.jumlah DESC) AS [Harga Jual]
FROM         dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_supplier ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier
WHERE     (dbo.m_barang_supplier.status <> 0) AND (dbo.m_barang.status <> 0)
ORDER BY dbo.m_supplier.nama, dbo.m_kategori.nama, dbo.m_barang.nama

VIEW.name: mon_m_barang_divisi
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_m_barang_divisi
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_barang_divisi.kd_divisi AS [Kode Divisi], dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi, dbo.m_barang.nama AS barang, 
                      dbo.GetStokAkhir(dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi, dbo.m_barang.kd_barang) AS [Stok Akhir]
FROM         dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_divisi ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_divisi.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_barang_divisi.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori
WHERE     (dbo.m_kategori.status <> 2)

VIEW.name: mon_m_barang_jumlah_transaksi
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_m_barang_jumlah_transaksi
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang AS Kode, dbo.m_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dbo.m_merk.nama AS Merk, 
                      dbo.m_model.nama AS Model, dbo.m_warna.nama AS Warna, dbo.m_barang.ukuran AS Ukuran, COUNT(*) AS Transaksi
FROM         dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_merk ON dbo.m_barang.kd_merk = dbo.m_merk.kd_merk INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_model ON dbo.m_barang.kd_model = dbo.m_model.kd_model INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_warna ON dbo.m_barang.kd_warna = dbo.m_warna.kd_warna INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori
GROUP BY dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang, dbo.m_kategori.nama, dbo.m_merk.nama, dbo.m_model.nama, dbo.m_warna.nama, 
                      dbo.m_barang.ukuran

VIEW.name: mon_m_barang_stok_per_ukuran
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_m_barang_stok_per_ukuran
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier AS [Kode Supplier], dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, dbo.m_merk.nama AS Merk, 
                      dbo.m_model.nama AS Model, dbo.m_warna.nama AS Warna, dbo.GetStokPerUkuran(dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier, 
                      dbo.m_barang_divisi.kd_divisi, dbo.m_barang.kd_merk, dbo.m_barang.kd_model, dbo.m_barang.kd_warna) AS ket_stok
FROM         dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_merk ON dbo.m_barang.kd_merk = dbo.m_merk.kd_merk INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_model ON dbo.m_barang.kd_model = dbo.m_model.kd_model INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_warna ON dbo.m_barang.kd_warna = dbo.m_warna.kd_warna INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_supplier ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_divisi ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_divisi.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_barang_divisi.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori
WHERE     (dbo.m_barang_supplier.status <> 0)
GROUP BY dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.m_merk.nama, dbo.m_model.nama, dbo.m_warna.nama, dbo.m_supplier.nama, dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier, 
                      dbo.m_barang.kd_merk, dbo.m_barang.kd_model, dbo.m_barang.kd_warna, dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi, dbo.m_barang_divisi.kd_divisi, 
                      dbo.m_kategori.status
HAVING      (dbo.m_kategori.status <> 2)

VIEW.name: mon_m_barang_stok_per_ukuran_new
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_m_barang_stok_per_ukuran_new
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier AS [Kode Supplier], dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, dbo.m_merk.nama AS Merk, dbo.m_model.nama AS Model, 
                      dbo.m_warna.nama AS Warna, dbo.GetStokPerUkuranNew(dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier, dbo.m_barang.kd_merk, dbo.m_barang.kd_model, 
                      dbo.m_barang.kd_warna) AS [Ket. Stok]
FROM         dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_merk ON dbo.m_barang.kd_merk = dbo.m_merk.kd_merk INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_model ON dbo.m_barang.kd_model = dbo.m_model.kd_model INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_warna ON dbo.m_barang.kd_warna = dbo.m_warna.kd_warna INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_supplier ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori
WHERE     (dbo.m_barang_supplier.status <> 0)
GROUP BY dbo.m_merk.nama, dbo.m_model.nama, dbo.m_warna.nama, dbo.m_supplier.nama, dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier, dbo.m_barang.kd_merk, 
                      dbo.m_barang.kd_model, dbo.m_barang.kd_warna, dbo.m_kategori.status, dbo.GetStokPerUkuranNew(dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier, 
                      dbo.m_barang.kd_merk, dbo.m_barang.kd_model, dbo.m_barang.kd_warna)
HAVING      (dbo.m_kategori.status <> 2)

VIEW.name: mon_m_biaya
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW mon_m_biaya 
AS
SELECT  TOP 100 PERCENT    Jenis = (CASE b.status WHEN 1 THEN 'Operasional (Penjualan)' WHEN 2 THEN 'Operasional (Adm. dan Umum)' WHEN 3 THEN 'Produksi (Biaya Langsung)'
                       WHEN 4 THEN 'Produksi (Biaya Tak Langsung)' END), b.nama AS Biaya, j.kd_akun AS [Kode Akun], b.Keterangan
FROM         m_biaya b, m_jurnal j
WHERE     b.kd_index = j.kd_index AND b.status <> 0
ORDER BY b.status, b.nama

VIEW.name: mon_m_customer
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_m_customer
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_customer.kd_customer AS Kode, dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_kota.nama AS Kota, dbo.m_customer.alamat AS Alamat, 
                      '(' + dbo.m_kota.kd_telp + ') ' + dbo.m_customer.telepon AS Telepon, '(' + dbo.m_kota.kd_telp + ') ' + dbo.m_customer.fax AS Fax, 
                      dbo.m_customer.kontak AS Kontak, dbo.m_customer.hp AS HP, dbo.m_customer.email AS Email, dbo.m_customer.point AS Point, 
                      dbo.m_customer.limit_kredit AS [Limit Kredit], dbo.m_customer.disc AS Disc, dbo.m_customer.status AS Status, 
                      dbo.m_customer.keterangan AS Keterangan
FROM         dbo.m_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_customer.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota

VIEW.name: mon_m_divisi
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_m_divisi
AS
SELECT     kd_divisi, kepala_nota, keterangan, nama
FROM         dbo.m_divisi
WHERE     (status <> 0)

VIEW.name: mon_m_jasa
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_m_jasa
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa AS [Kode Jasa], dbo.m_jasa_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dbo.m_jasa.nama AS Jasa, dbo.m_jasa.harga AS Harga, 
                      dbo.m_jasa.diskon AS Diskon, dbo.m_jasa.tanggal_daftar AS [Tanggal Daftar]
FROM         dbo.m_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa_kategori ON dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = dbo.m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori
WHERE     (dbo.m_jasa_kategori.status = '1')

VIEW.name: mon_m_supplier
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_m_supplier
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier AS Kode, dbo.m_kota.nama AS Kota, dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, dbo.m_supplier.alamat, dbo.m_supplier.telepon, 
                      dbo.m_supplier.fax, dbo.m_supplier.kontak, dbo.m_supplier.hp, dbo.m_supplier.email, dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, dbo.m_supplier.rekening, 
                       

	case(dbo.m_supplier.jenis)
	when 1 then 'Supplier Barang'
	when 2 then 'Supplier Aset'
	end as Status

FROM         dbo.m_supplier INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_supplier.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_supplier.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota
WHERE     (dbo.m_supplier.jenis <> 0) AND (dbo.m_kota.status <> 0) AND (dbo.m_bank.status <> 0)

VIEW.name: mon_rl_biaya_adm_dan_umum
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_rl_biaya_adm_dan_umum
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_jurnal.nama AS Akun, dbo.t_biaya_operasional.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_divisi AS [Kode Divisi], 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Divisi, dbo.t_biaya_operasional.keterangan AS Keterangan, dbo.t_biaya_operasional.tanggal AS Tanggal, 
                      dbo.t_biaya_operasional.nominal AS Nominal
FROM         dbo.t_biaya_operasional INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_biaya ON dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_biaya = dbo.m_biaya.kd_biaya INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jurnal ON dbo.m_biaya.kd_index = dbo.m_jurnal.kd_index
WHERE     (dbo.m_biaya.status = 2)

VIEW.name: mon_rl_biaya_penjualan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_rl_biaya_penjualan
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_jurnal.nama AS Akun, dbo.t_biaya_operasional.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_divisi AS [Kode Divisi], 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Divisi, dbo.t_biaya_operasional.keterangan AS Keterangan, dbo.t_biaya_operasional.tanggal AS Tanggal, 
                      dbo.t_biaya_operasional.nominal AS Nominal
FROM         dbo.t_biaya_operasional INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_biaya ON dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_biaya = dbo.m_biaya.kd_biaya INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jurnal ON dbo.m_biaya.kd_index = dbo.m_jurnal.kd_index
WHERE     (dbo.m_biaya.status = 1)

VIEW.name: mon_rl_laporan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE            VIEW mon_rl_laporan
AS

SELECT dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() as Awal, GetDate() AS Akhir, 1 as Parent, 1 as Nomor, 'PENJUALAN' AS 'Keterangan', ISNULL(SUM(harga_jual * qty), 0) AS total
FROM t_penjualan j, t_penjualan_detail d
WHERE d.no_transaksi = j.no_transaksi AND j.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()

UNION ALL

SELECT     dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AS Awal, GetDate() AS Akhir, 1, 2, 'RETUR PENJUALAN' AS 'Keterangan', 
                      - ISNULL(SUM(Detil.qty * dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(detil.harga_jual, Detil.diskon1, Detil.diskon2, Detil.diskon3, Detil.diskon4, 0, 0), jual_retur.diskon1, jual_retur.diskon2, jual_retur.diskon3, jual_retur.diskon4, jual_retur.pajak, 0)), 0)
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_retur Jual_retur INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail Detil ON Jual_retur.no_retur = Detil.no_retur 
WHERE     (jual_retur.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku())

UNION ALL

SELECT dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() as Awal, GetDate() AS Akhir, 1, 4, 'POTONGAN PENJUALAN' AS 'Keterangan', 
- (ISNULL(SUM(d.harga_jual - dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga_jual, d.diskon1, d.diskon2, d.diskon3, d.diskon4, 0, 0), j.diskon1, j.diskon2, j.diskon3, j.diskon4, 0, 0)*d.qty), 0)) 
	+ (SELECT SUM(jual.diskon_uang) FROM t_penjualan jual) AS total
FROM t_penjualan j, t_penjualan_detail d
WHERE d.no_transaksi = j.no_transaksi AND j.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() 
	AND (d.diskon1 <> 0 OR d.diskon2 <> 0 OR d.diskon3 <> 0 OR d.diskon4 <> 0 OR j.diskon1 <> 0 OR j.diskon2 <> 0 OR j.diskon3 <> 0 OR j.diskon4 <> 0 OR j.diskon_uang <> 0)

--GROUP BY j.diskon_uang

UNION ALL

SELECT dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() as Awal, GetDate() AS Akhir, 1, 5, 'PPN' AS 'Keterangan', ISNULL(SUM((d.harga_jual - dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga_jual, d.diskon1, d.diskon2, d.diskon3, d.diskon4, 0, 0), j.diskon1, j.diskon2, j.diskon3, j.diskon4, 0, 0)) * j.pajak), 0) AS total
FROM t_penjualan j, t_penjualan_detail d
WHERE d.no_transaksi = j.no_transaksi AND j.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() 
	AND (j.pajak <> 0 OR d.harga_jual <> 0)

UNION ALL

SELECT dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() as Awal, GetDate() AS Akhir, 2, 1, 'PERSEDIAAN AWAL' AS Keterangan, - ISNULL(SUM(stok_awal * harga_beli_awal), 0) AS Total
FROM m_barang_divisi bd, m_barang b
WHERE bd.kd_barang = b.kd_barang AND bd.stok_awal > 0 AND b.status <> 0

UNION ALL

SELECT dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() as Awal, GetDate() AS Akhir, 2, 4, 'PEMBELIAN ' AS Keterangan, - ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetTotalPembelian(b.no_transaksi)), 0) AS Total
FROM t_pembelian b, t_pembelian_detail d, m_barang brg
WHERE d.no_transaksi = b.no_transaksi AND d.kd_barang = brg.kd_barang AND tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() 
	AND brg.status <> 0

UNION ALL

SELECT dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() as Awal, GetDate() AS Akhir, 3, 1, 'PERSEDIAAN AKHIR',  ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(bh.kd_barang, bh.kd_satuan) *  (bh.Debet - bh.Kredit) * bj.harga), 0) 
FROM dbo.v_g_barang_histori bh INNER JOIN
	dbo.m_barang brg ON bh.kd_barang = brg.kd_barang INNER JOIN dbo.GetHargaAverageBarang('') bj ON bh.kd_barang = bj.kd_barang
WHERE brg.status <> 0

UNION ALL

SELECT dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() as Awal, GetDate() AS Akhir, 4, 1, 'BIAYA OPERASIONAL' AS Keterangan, - ISNULL(SUM(t.nominal), 0)
FROM t_biaya_operasional t, m_biaya b
WHERE t.kd_biaya = b.kd_biaya AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND (b.status = 1 OR b.status = 0)

UNION ALL

SELECT dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() as Awal, GetDate() AS Akhir, 4, 2, 'BIAYA DILUAR USAHA' AS Keterangan, - ISNULL(SUM(t.nominal), 0)
FROM t_biaya_operasional t, m_biaya b
WHERE t.kd_biaya = b.kd_biaya AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND (b.status = 2 OR b.status = 0)

UNION ALL

SELECT dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() as Awal, GetDate() AS Akhir, 5, j.kd_index, j.nama AS Keterangan, ISNULL(SUM(p.nominal), 0) AS Total
FROM t_pendapatan p, m_pendapatan m, m_jurnal j
WHERE p.kd_pendapatan = m.kd_pendapatan AND m.kd_index = j.kd_index AND p.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
GROUP BY j.nama, j.kd_index

VIEW.name: mon_rl_pembelian
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_rl_pembelian
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_barang.nama AS [Nama Barang], SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(dbo.t_pembelian_detail.kd_barang, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.kd_satuan) 
                      * dbo.t_pembelian_detail.qty) AS Kwantum, dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_pembelian_detail.harga_beli, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon2, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.diskon1, dbo.t_pembelian.diskon2, dbo.t_pembelian.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian.diskon4, dbo.t_pembelian.pajak, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.ppnbm) * dbo.t_pembelian_detail.qty AS Nilai
FROM         dbo.t_pembelian INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_detail ON dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi = dbo.t_pembelian_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_pembelian_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang
GROUP BY dbo.m_barang.nama, dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_pembelian_detail.harga_beli, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon1, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon2, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_pembelian.diskon1, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.diskon2, dbo.t_pembelian.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian.diskon4, dbo.t_pembelian.pajak, dbo.t_pembelian.ppnbm) 
                      * dbo.t_pembelian_detail.qty

VIEW.name: mon_rl_penjualan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_rl_penjualan
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal) AS Tanggal, 
                      dbo.GetConvertStatus(dbo.t_penjualan.status) AS Status, SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4, dbo.t_penjualan.pajak, 0) 
                      * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty) - SUM(dbo.t_penjualan.diskon_uang) - SUM(dbo.m_voucher.nominal) AS [Total Bersih Penjualan], 
                      SUM(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty) AS [Total Kotor Penjualan], 
                      SUM((dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual - dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4, 0, 0)) * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty) + SUM(dbo.t_penjualan.diskon_uang) 
                      AS [Total Diskon], SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4, 0, 0) * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty * dbo.t_penjualan.pajak) 
                      AS [Total Pajak], SUM(dbo.m_voucher.nominal) AS [Total Voucher]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_voucher ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_voucher = dbo.m_voucher.kd_voucher
GROUP BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal), dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.GetConvertStatus(dbo.t_penjualan.status)
HAVING      (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal) > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku())
ORDER BY dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal), dbo.GetConvertStatus(dbo.t_penjualan.status)

VIEW.name: mon_rl_persediaan_akhir
VIEW.definition:
/*MENCARI HARGA AVERAGE
	0 	=> 	stok awal					[v] harga = sesuai harga
	3 	=> 	opname masuk					[v] harga = 0
	5	=> 	pembelian - retur 				[v] harga = sesuai harga	
DECLARE  @tanggal DATETIME
DECLARE @tabel_harga_barang TABLE (kd_barang VARCHAR(20), stok FLOAT, harga MONEY)
masukkan semua barang yang ada di perusahaan ke tabel harga barang*/
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_rl_persediaan_akhir
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.m_kategori.nama AS Kategori, brg.nama AS Barang, dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.ConvertBarang(brg.kd_barang, 
                      SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(bh.kd_barang, bh.kd_satuan) * (bh.Debet - bh.Kredit))) AS [Info Stok], 
                      SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(bh.kd_barang, bh.kd_satuan) * (bh.Debet - bh.Kredit)) AS [Stok Akhir], bj.harga AS [Harga Average], 
                      ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(bh.kd_barang, bh.kd_satuan) * (bh.Debet - bh.Kredit) * bj.harga), 0) AS Total
FROM         dbo.v_g_barang_histori bh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang brg ON bh.kd_barang = brg.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.GetHargaAverageBarang(NULL) bj ON bh.kd_barang = bj.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON brg.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON bh.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi
WHERE     (brg.status <> 0)
GROUP BY dbo.m_kategori.nama, brg.nama, bj.harga, brg.kd_barang, dbo.m_divisi.nama
ORDER BY dbo.m_kategori.nama, brg.nama, dbo.m_divisi.nama

VIEW.name: mon_rl_persediaan_awal
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_rl_persediaan_awal
AS
SELECT     bd.kd_divisi AS [Kode Divisi], d.nama AS Divisi, bd.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], b.nama AS Barang, bd.stok_awal AS [Persediaan Awal], 
                      bd.harga_beli_awal AS Harga, bd.stok_awal * bd.harga_beli_awal AS Nilai
FROM         dbo.m_barang_divisi bd INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi d ON bd.kd_divisi = d.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang b ON bd.kd_barang = b.kd_barang
WHERE     (bd.stok_awal <> 0)

VIEW.name: mon_t_absensi_pegawai
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_absensi_pegawai
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_absensi.masuk) AS Tanggal, dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai AS Kode, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, 
                      dbo.GetFormatJam(dbo.t_absensi.masuk) AS Masuk, dbo.GetFormatJam(dbo.t_absensi.keluar) AS Pulang, ROUND(DATEDIFF(SECOND, 
                      dbo.t_absensi.masuk, dbo.t_absensi.keluar) / 3600, 2) AS [Jam Kerja]
FROM         dbo.t_absensi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai
ORDER BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_absensi.masuk), dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai, dbo.GetFormatJam(dbo.t_absensi.masuk)

VIEW.name: mon_t_absensi_pegawai3
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_absensi_pegawai3
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_absensi.masuk) AS Tanggal, dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai AS Kode, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, 
                      MIN(dbo.GetFormatJam(dbo.t_absensi.masuk)) AS Masuk, MAX(dbo.GetFormatJam(dbo.t_absensi.keluar)) AS Pulang, 
                      SUM(ROUND(ISNULL(DATEDIFF(SECOND, dbo.t_absensi.masuk, dbo.t_absensi.keluar) / 3600, 0), 2)) AS [Jam Kerja]
FROM         dbo.t_absensi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai
GROUP BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_absensi.masuk), dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama
ORDER BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_absensi.masuk), dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai, MIN(dbo.GetFormatJam(dbo.t_absensi.masuk))

VIEW.name: mon_t_absensi_ringkasan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_absensi_ringkasan
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT CAST(MONTH(dbo.t_absensi.masuk) AS VARCHAR(20)) + '/' + CAST(YEAR(dbo.t_absensi.masuk) AS VARCHAR(20)) AS Bulan, 
                      dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai AS Kode, dbo.m_pegawai.nama, dbo.m_pegawai.kelompok, SUM(CAST(ISNULL(DATEDIFF(SECOND, dbo.t_absensi.masuk, 
                      dbo.t_absensi.keluar), 0) AS FLOAT)) / 3600 AS [Total Jam]
FROM         dbo.t_absensi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai
GROUP BY dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai, CAST(MONTH(dbo.t_absensi.masuk) AS VARCHAR(20)) + '/' + CAST(YEAR(dbo.t_absensi.masuk) AS VARCHAR(20)), 
                      dbo.m_pegawai.nama, dbo.m_pegawai.kelompok
ORDER BY CAST(MONTH(dbo.t_absensi.masuk) AS VARCHAR(20)) + '/' + CAST(YEAR(dbo.t_absensi.masuk) AS VARCHAR(20)), dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai

VIEW.name: mon_t_awal_kerja
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_awal_kerja
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Nama, dbo.m_pegawai.tgl_masuk AS [Tanggal Masuk], dbo.GetLamaKerja(dbo.m_pegawai.tgl_masuk, GETDATE()) 
                      AS [Lama Kerja], dbo.m_pegawai.tanggal_lahir AS [Tanggal Lahir], dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi
FROM         dbo.m_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi

where (dbo.m_pegawai.status <> 0)

VIEW.name: mon_t_biaya_angkut
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_biaya_angkut
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_nota AS [No Nota], dbo.t_pembelian.tanggal, dbo.m_ekspedisi.nama AS Ekspedisi, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.nominal AS [Total Biaya]
FROM         dbo.m_ekspedisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut ON dbo.m_ekspedisi.kd_ekspedisi = dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.kd_ekspedisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian ON dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_transaksi = dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi

VIEW.name: mon_t_biaya_angkut_edit
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_biaya_angkut_edit
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_nota AS [No Nota], dbo.t_pembelian.tanggal, dbo.m_ekspedisi.nama AS Ekspedisi, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.nominal AS [Total Biaya]
FROM         dbo.m_ekspedisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut ON dbo.m_ekspedisi.kd_ekspedisi = dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.kd_ekspedisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian ON dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_transaksi = dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi
WHERE     (dbo.t_pembelian.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku())

VIEW.name: mon_t_biaya_operasional
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_biaya_operasional
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_biaya_operasional.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_biaya_operasional.tanggal, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Divisi, 
                      dbo.m_biaya.nama AS Biaya, dbo.GetConverttStatusBiaya(dbo.m_biaya.status) AS Status, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS Pembayaran, 
                      dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No. Rekening], dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, dbo.m_bank.keterangan AS [Ket. Bank], dbo.t_biaya_operasional.nominal, 
                      dbo.t_biaya_operasional.no_bukti AS [No. Bukti], dbo.t_biaya_operasional.keterangan, dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas, 
                      dbo.t_biaya_operasional.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server]
FROM         dbo.t_biaya_operasional INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_biaya ON dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_biaya = dbo.m_biaya.kd_biaya INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank

VIEW.name: mon_t_biaya_operasional_edit
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_biaya_operasional_edit
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_biaya_operasional.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_biaya_operasional.tanggal, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Divisi, 
                      dbo.m_biaya.nama AS Biaya, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS Pembayaran, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No. Rekening], dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, 
                      dbo.m_bank.keterangan AS [Ket. Bank], dbo.t_biaya_operasional.nominal, dbo.t_biaya_operasional.no_bukti AS [No. Bukti], 
                      dbo.t_biaya_operasional.keterangan, dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas, dbo.t_biaya_operasional.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server]
FROM         dbo.t_biaya_operasional INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_biaya ON dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_biaya = dbo.m_biaya.kd_biaya INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank
WHERE     (dbo.t_biaya_operasional.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku())

VIEW.name: mon_t_customer_pasif
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_customer_pasif
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi, dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan, 
                      dbo.m_customer.nama AS customer, MAX(dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal) AS [Tanggal Terakhir]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi
WHERE     (dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal < GETDATE() - 15)
GROUP BY dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer, dbo.m_customer.nama, dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota
ORDER BY dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.m_customer.nama

VIEW.name: mon_t_customer_pasif_6
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_customer_pasif_6
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi, dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan, 
                      dbo.m_customer.nama AS customer, MAX(dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal) AS [Tanggal Terakhir]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi
WHERE     (dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal < GETDATE() - 6)
GROUP BY dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer, dbo.m_customer.nama, dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota
ORDER BY dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.m_customer.nama

VIEW.name: mon_t_hutang_aktif
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_hutang_aktif
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_pembelian.no_order AS [No. Order], dbo.t_pembelian.tanggal AS Tanggal, 
                      dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, SUM(dbo.GetTotalPembelian(dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi)) AS [Total Pembelian], 
                      dbo.GetCicilanHutang(dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi) AS [Total Cicilan], dbo.GetTotalPembelian(dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi) 
                      - dbo.GetCicilanHutang(dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi) AS [Sisa Hutang]
FROM         dbo.t_pembelian LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_supplier.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota ON dbo.t_pembelian.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier
GROUP BY dbo.m_supplier.nama, dbo.t_pembelian.no_order, dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi, dbo.t_pembelian.status, 
                      dbo.GetCicilanHutang(dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi), dbo.GetTotalPembelian(dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi) 
                      - dbo.GetCicilanHutang(dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi), dbo.t_pembelian.tanggal
HAVING      (dbo.t_pembelian.status = 0) AND (dbo.GetTotalPembelian(dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi) - dbo.GetCicilanHutang(dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi) <> 0)

VIEW.name: mon_t_hutang_aset_cicilan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_hutang_aset_cicilan
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.no_cicilan AS [No. Cicilan], dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.tanggal AS Tanggal, dbo.m_aset.nama AS Aset, 
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS [Jenis Bayar], dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No. Rekening], dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, 
                      dbo.m_bank.keterangan AS [Ket. Bank], dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.nominal AS Nominal, dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.no_bukti AS [No. Bukti], 
                      dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.keterangan AS Keterangan, dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server], 
                      dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas
FROM         dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_aset ON dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.kd_aset = dbo.m_aset.kd_aset INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank

VIEW.name: mon_t_hutang_aset_cicilan_edit
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_hutang_aset_cicilan_edit
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.no_cicilan AS [No. Cicilan], dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.tanggal, dbo.m_aset.nama AS Aset, 
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS [Jenis Bayar], dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No. Rekening], dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, 
                      dbo.m_bank.keterangan AS [Ket. Bank], dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.nominal, dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.no_bukti AS [No. Bukti], 
                      dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.keterangan, dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server], dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas
FROM         dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_aset ON dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.kd_aset = dbo.m_aset.kd_aset INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank
WHERE     (dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku())

VIEW.name: mon_t_hutang_biaya_angkut
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_hutang_biaya_angkut
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_nota, dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi, dbo.t_pembelian_order.no_order, dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, 
                      dbo.m_ekspedisi.nama AS Ekspedisi, dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.nominal, dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.tanggal_jatuh_tempo
FROM         dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian ON dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_transaksi = dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order ON dbo.t_pembelian.no_order = dbo.t_pembelian_order.no_order INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_ekspedisi ON dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.kd_ekspedisi = dbo.m_ekspedisi.kd_ekspedisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.t_pembelian_order.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier
WHERE     (dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_nota NOT IN
                          (SELECT     NO_NOTA
                            FROM          t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan))

VIEW.name: mon_t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.no_cicilan AS [No. Cicilan], dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.tanggal AS [Tanggal Cicilan], 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_nota AS [No Nota], dbo.m_ekspedisi.nama AS Ekspedisi, dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.nominal AS Cicilan, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_pembelian_order.no_pp_order AS [No. PP], dbo.t_pembelian_order.tanggal AS [Tanggal Order], 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order.tanggal_terima AS [Tanggal Terima], dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.nominal AS [Total Biaya], 
                      dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.no_bukti AS [No Bukti]
FROM         dbo.m_ekspedisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut ON dbo.m_ekspedisi.kd_ekspedisi = dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.kd_ekspedisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian ON dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_transaksi = dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order ON dbo.t_pembelian.no_order = dbo.t_pembelian_order.no_order INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan ON dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_nota = dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.no_nota

VIEW.name: mon_t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan_edit
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan_edit
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.no_cicilan AS [No. Cicilan], dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.tanggal AS [Tanggal Cicilan], 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_nota AS [No Nota], dbo.m_ekspedisi.nama AS Ekspedisi, dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.nominal AS Cicilan, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_pembelian_order.no_pp_order AS [No. PP], dbo.t_pembelian_order.tanggal AS [Tanggal Order], 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order.tanggal_terima AS [Tanggal Terima], dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.nominal AS [Total Biaya], 
                      dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.no_bukti AS [No Bukti]
FROM         dbo.m_ekspedisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut ON dbo.m_ekspedisi.kd_ekspedisi = dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.kd_ekspedisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian ON dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_transaksi = dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order ON dbo.t_pembelian.no_order = dbo.t_pembelian_order.no_order INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan ON dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_nota = dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.no_nota

VIEW.name: mon_t_hutang_cicilan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE  VIEW dbo.mon_t_hutang_cicilan
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, dbo.t_pembelian.tanggal, dbo.t_pembelian.no_order AS [No. Order], 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.no_bukti AS [No. Bukti], dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.no_cicilan AS [No. Cicilan], 
                      dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.nominal, dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.tanggal AS [Tanggal Bayar], dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS Pembayaran, dbo.t_pembelian.diskon1, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.diskon2, dbo.t_pembelian.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian.diskon4, dbo.t_pembelian.pajak AS PPN, dbo.t_pembelian.ppnbm
FROM         dbo.m_jenis_bayar INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_hutang_cicilan ON dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis = dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian ON dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.t_pembelian.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier

VIEW.name: mon_t_hutang_cicilan_edit
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_hutang_cicilan_edit
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.no_cicilan AS [No. Cicilan], dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.tanggal AS [Tanggal Bayar], dbo.t_pembelian.no_order AS [No. Order], 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.tanggal, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.no_bukti AS [No. Bukti], 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_detail.harga_beli AS Harga, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.qty, dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.nominal, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS Pembayaran, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.ppnbm, dbo.t_pembelian.diskon1, dbo.t_pembelian.diskon4, dbo.t_pembelian.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.pajak
FROM         dbo.m_jenis_bayar INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_hutang_cicilan ON dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis = dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian ON dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_detail ON dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi = dbo.t_pembelian_detail.no_transaksi
WHERE     (dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku())

VIEW.name: mon_t_hutang_pegawai
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_hutang_pegawai
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.tanggal AS Tanggal, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Divisi, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS Pembayaran, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No. Rekening], dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.no_bukti AS [No. Bukti], dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.nominal AS Nominal, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.keterangan AS Keterangan, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server], dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas
FROM         dbo.t_hutang_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi

VIEW.name: mon_t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.no_cicilan AS [No. Cicilan], dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.tanggal, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Divisi, 
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS Pembayaran, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No. Rekening], dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, 
                      dbo.m_bank.keterangan AS [Ket. Bank], dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.no_bukti AS [No. Bukti], dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.nominal, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.keterangan, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server], dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas
FROM         dbo.m_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.no_transaksi ON 
                      dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_pegawai

VIEW.name: mon_t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan_edit
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan_edit
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.no_cicilan AS [No. Cicilan], dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.tanggal, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Divisi, 
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS Pembayaran, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No. Rekening], dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, 
                      dbo.m_bank.keterangan AS [Ket. Bank], dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.no_bukti AS [No. Bukti], dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.nominal, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.keterangan, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server], dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas
FROM         dbo.m_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.no_transaksi ON 
                      dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_pegawai

VIEW.name: mon_t_hutang_pegawai_detail
VIEW.definition:
create view mon_t_hutang_pegawai_detail as 

SELECT  TOP 100 PERCENT
	dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.no_transaksi,   
	dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai, 
	dbo.m_pegawai.nama, 	
	dbo.m_kas.no_rekening,
	dbo.m_bank.nama as Bank,
	dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.nominal as Hutang,	
	(
		select ISNULL(sum(nominal),0) from t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan
		where no_transaksi = dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.no_transaksi
	) as Cicilan,
	(dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.nominal -
	(
		select ISNULL(sum(nominal),0) from t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan
		where no_transaksi = dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.no_transaksi
	)) as [Sisa Hutang],
	dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama as pembayaran,
	case WHEN (dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.nominal -
		(
		select ISNULL(sum(nominal),0) from t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan
		where no_transaksi = dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.no_transaksi
	)) <= 0 then 'Lunas' ELSE 'Belum Lunas' END as [Keterangan]

FROM         
	dbo.m_pegawai INNER JOIN                      
	dbo.t_hutang_pegawai ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN 
	dbo.m_jenis_bayar on dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN 
	dbo.m_kas on ( dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas) INNER JOIN 
	dbo.m_bank  on (dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank)
	
WHERE     
	(dbo.m_pegawai.status <> 0) 

ORDER BY 	dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai


--select * from t_hutang_pegawai where kd_pegawai = 'PAA062'
--select * from t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan where no_transaksi = 'HAA00000006' 
--select * from t_hutang_pegawai
--select * from m_kas

VIEW.name: mon_t_hutang_pegawai_edit
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_hutang_pegawai_edit
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.tanggal, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS pegawai, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Divisi, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS Pembayaran, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No. Rekening], dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.no_bukti AS [No. Bukti], dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.nominal, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.keterangan, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server], dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas
FROM         dbo.t_hutang_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi

VIEW.name: mon_t_kas_biaya
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_kas_biaya
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT MONTH(tanggal) AS Bulan, Biaya, Bank, SUM(nominal) AS Nominal
FROM         dbo.mon_t_biaya_operasional
GROUP BY Biaya, Bank, MONTH(tanggal)
ORDER BY MONTH(tanggal), Bank, Biaya

VIEW.name: mon_t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.no_STNK, dbo.m_kendaraan.jenis, dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.tanggal, dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.BBM,
                       dbo.GetKendaraanJarakTempuh(dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.no_STNK,  dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.tanggal)) AS [Jarak Tempuh], 
                      dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.keterangan, dbo.m_userx.nama AS [User], dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.tanggal_server
FROM         dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kendaraan ON dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.no_STNK = dbo.m_kendaraan.no_STNK
WHERE     (dbo.m_kendaraan.status <> 0) AND (dbo.m_userx.status <> 0)

VIEW.name: mon_t_kendaraan_rata_rata
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_kendaraan_rata_rata
AS
SELECT     no_STNK, jenis, km as [Jarak Tempuh ( KM )], bbm as [BBM (LITER)], Hari ,CASE bbm WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE KM / BBM END AS [Jarak Tempuh Per Liter ( KM )], 
                      CASE km WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE BBM / KM END AS [Konsumsi BBM Per Kilometer ( LITER )], 
                      CASE hari WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE km / hari END AS [Jarak Tempuh Per Hari ( KM )], 
                      CASE hari WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE bbm / hari END AS [Konsumsi BBM per Hari ( LITER )]
FROM         dbo.v_t_kendaraan_rata_rata

VIEW.name: mon_t_kode_user
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_kode_user
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi, dbo.t_pembelian.tanggal_server, dbo.m_userx.nama
FROM         dbo.t_pembelian INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_detail ON dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi = dbo.t_pembelian_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_pembelian.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user

VIEW.name: mon_t_monitoring_tanggal
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW mon_t_monitoring_tanggal
AS
SELECT 'Biaya Operasional' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_transaksi AS VARCHAR(20)) AS [Nomor], Tanggal 
FROM t_biaya_operasional
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Cicilan Hutang Aset' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_cicilan AS VARCHAR(20)) AS [Nomor], Tanggal 
FROM t_hutang_aset_cicilan
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Cicilan Biaya Angkut Pembelian' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_cicilan AS VARCHAR(20)) AS [Nomor], Tanggal
