VIEW.name: mon_t_mutasi_kas
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_mutasi_kas
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_mutasi_kas.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_mutasi_kas.tanggal AS Tanggal, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [Rek. Pengirim], 
                      dbo.m_bank.nama AS [Bank Pengirim], dbo.m_bank.keterangan AS [Ket. Bank Pengirim], m_kas_1.no_rekening AS [Rek. Tujuan], 
                      m_bank_1.nama AS [Bank Tujuan], m_bank_1.keterangan AS [Ket. Bank Tujuan], dbo.t_mutasi_kas.nominal AS Nominal, 
                      dbo.t_mutasi_kas.no_bukti_sumber AS [No. Bukti Sumber], dbo.t_mutasi_kas.no_bukti_tujuan AS [No. Bukti Tujuan], 
                      dbo.t_mutasi_kas.keterangan AS Keterangan, dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas, dbo.t_mutasi_kas.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server]
FROM         dbo.t_mutasi_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_mutasi_kas.kd_kas_sumber = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_mutasi_kas.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas m_kas_1 ON dbo.t_mutasi_kas.kd_kas_tujuan = m_kas_1.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank m_bank_1 ON m_kas_1.kd_bank = m_bank_1.kd_bank

VIEW.name: mon_t_mutasi_kas_edit
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_mutasi_kas_edit
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_mutasi_kas.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_mutasi_kas.tanggal, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [Rek. Pengirim], 
                      dbo.m_bank.nama AS [Bank Pengirim], dbo.m_bank.keterangan AS [Ket. Bank Pengirim], m_kas_1.no_rekening AS [Rek. Tujuan], 
                      m_bank_1.nama AS [Bank Tujuan], m_bank_1.keterangan AS [Ket. Bank Tujuan], dbo.t_mutasi_kas.nominal, 
                      dbo.t_mutasi_kas.no_bukti_sumber AS [No. Bukti Sumber], dbo.t_mutasi_kas.no_bukti_tujuan AS [No. Bukti Tujuan], dbo.t_mutasi_kas.keterangan, 
                      dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas, dbo.t_mutasi_kas.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server]
FROM         dbo.t_mutasi_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_mutasi_kas.kd_kas_sumber = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_mutasi_kas.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas m_kas_1 ON dbo.t_mutasi_kas.kd_kas_tujuan = m_kas_1.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank m_bank_1 ON m_kas_1.kd_bank = m_bank_1.kd_bank
WHERE     (dbo.t_mutasi_kas.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku())

VIEW.name: mon_t_mutasi_stok
VIEW.definition:
CREATE   VIEW dbo.mon_t_mutasi_stok
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.t_mutasi_stok.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_mutasi_stok.tanggal, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Pengirim, 
      m_divisi_1.keterangan AS Penerima, dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], dbo.GetInfoBarang(dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_barang) 
      AS Barang, dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.qty AS Jumlah, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS Satuan, dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas, 
      dbo.t_mutasi_stok.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server], dbo.t_mutasi_stok.keterangan AS [Ket.], dbo.m_barang_satuan.harga_jual,
        (SELECT TOP 1 harga_beli / bs.jumlah 
            FROM t_pembelian_detail pd INNER JOIN m_barang_satuan bs ON pd.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND pd.kd_satuan = bs.kd_satuan 
            WHERE pd.kd_barang = t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_barang AND harga_beli > 0 
            ORDER BY no_transaksi DESC) as [Harga Beli]
FROM         dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
      dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_barang INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
      dbo.t_mutasi_stok ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.no_transaksi = dbo.t_mutasi_stok.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok.kd_divisi_asal = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_divisi m_divisi_1 ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok.kd_divisi_tujuan = m_divisi_1.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_barang_satuan ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_barang AND 
      dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_satuan
ORDER BY dbo.t_mutasi_stok.no_transaksi, dbo.GetInfoBarang(dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_barang)

VIEW.name: mon_t_mutasi_stok_edit
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_mutasi_stok_edit
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.t_mutasi_stok.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_mutasi_stok.tanggal, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Pengirim, 
                      m_divisi_1.keterangan AS Penerima, dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], dbo.GetInfoBarang(dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_barang) 
                      AS Barang, dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.qty AS Jumlah, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS Satuan
FROM         dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_mutasi_stok ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.no_transaksi = dbo.t_mutasi_stok.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok.kd_divisi_asal = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi m_divisi_1 ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok.kd_divisi_tujuan = m_divisi_1.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user
WHERE     (dbo.t_mutasi_stok.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku())
ORDER BY dbo.t_mutasi_stok.no_transaksi, dbo.GetInfoBarang(dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_barang)

VIEW.name: mon_t_mutasi_stok_per_nota
VIEW.definition:
CREATE   VIEW dbo.mon_t_mutasi_stok_per_nota
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.t_mutasi_stok.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_mutasi_stok.tanggal, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Pengirim, 
      m_divisi_1.keterangan AS Penerima, dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], dbo.GetInfoBarang(dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_barang) 
      AS Barang, dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.qty AS Jumlah, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS Satuan, dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas, 
      dbo.t_mutasi_stok.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server], dbo.t_mutasi_stok.keterangan AS [Ket.], dbo.m_barang_satuan.harga_jual,
        (SELECT TOP 1 harga_beli / bs.jumlah 
            FROM t_pembelian_detail pd INNER JOIN m_barang_satuan bs ON pd.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND pd.kd_satuan = bs.kd_satuan 
            WHERE pd.kd_barang = t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_barang AND harga_beli > 0 
            ORDER BY no_transaksi DESC) as [Harga Beli]
FROM         dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
      dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_barang INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
      dbo.t_mutasi_stok ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.no_transaksi = dbo.t_mutasi_stok.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok.kd_divisi_asal = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_divisi m_divisi_1 ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok.kd_divisi_tujuan = m_divisi_1.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_barang_satuan ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_barang AND 
      dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_satuan
ORDER BY dbo.t_mutasi_stok.no_transaksi, dbo.GetInfoBarang(dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_barang)

VIEW.name: mon_t_opname_stok
VIEW.definition:
CREATE  VIEW dbo.mon_t_opname_stok
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_opname_stok.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Divisi, dbo.t_opname_stok.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], 
                      dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS Satuan, dbo.t_opname_stok.tanggal AS Tanggal, dbo.t_opname_stok.qty AS Qty, 
                      dbo.t_opname_stok.keterangan AS Keterangan, dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas, 
                      status = (CASE dbo.t_opname_stok.status WHEN 0 THEN 'Hilang' WHEN 1 THEN 'Rusak' WHEN '2' THEN 'Lain-Lain(+)' WHEN 3 THEN 'Lain-Lain (-)' END),
                       dbo.t_opname_stok.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server]
FROM         dbo.t_opname_stok INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_opname_stok.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_opname_stok.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_opname_stok.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_opname_stok.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user
WHERE     dbo.t_opname_stok.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()

VIEW.name: mon_t_opname_stok_edit
VIEW.definition:
CREATE  VIEW dbo.mon_t_opname_stok_edit
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_opname_stok.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Divisi, dbo.t_opname_stok.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], 
                      dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS Satuan, dbo.t_opname_stok.tanggal AS Tanggal, dbo.t_opname_stok.qty AS Qty, 
                      dbo.t_opname_stok.keterangan AS Keterangan, dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas, 
                      status = (CASE dbo.t_opname_stok.status WHEN 0 THEN 'Hilang' WHEN 1 THEN 'Rusak' WHEN '2' THEN 'Lain-Lain(+)' WHEN 3 THEN 'Lain-Lain (-)' END),
                       dbo.t_opname_stok.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server]
FROM         dbo.t_opname_stok INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_opname_stok.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_opname_stok.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_opname_stok.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_opname_stok.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user
WHERE     dbo.t_opname_stok.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()

VIEW.name: mon_t_pegawai_absen
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_pegawai_absen
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_pegawai.nama, dbo.t_pegawai_izin.awal, dbo.t_pegawai_izin.akhir, dbo.t_pegawai_izin.keterangan, 
                      dbo.m_jenis_izin.nama AS info_jenis_ijin
FROM         dbo.m_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pegawai_izin ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = dbo.t_pegawai_izin.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_izin ON dbo.t_pegawai_izin.kd_izin = dbo.m_jenis_izin.kd_izin

VIEW.name: mon_t_pegawai_data_pribadi
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_pegawai_data_pribadi
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai AS Kode, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, 
                      dbo.m_pegawai.tempat_lahir AS [Tempat Lahir], dbo.m_pegawai.tanggal_lahir AS [Tanggal Lahir], CAST(DAY(dbo.m_pegawai.tanggal_lahir) 
                      AS VARCHAR(2)) + ' ' + CAST(DATENAME(MONTH, dbo.m_pegawai.tanggal_lahir) AS VARCHAR(15)) AS [Ulang Tahun], YEAR(GETDATE()) 
                      - YEAR(dbo.m_pegawai.tanggal_lahir) AS Umur, dbo.m_pegawai.alamat AS Alamat, 
                      (CASE dbo.m_pegawai.kelamin WHEN 0 THEN 'Wanita' WHEN 1 THEN 'Pria' END) AS [Jenis Kelamin], 
                      (CASE dbo.m_pegawai.status_kawin WHEN 0 THEN 'Lajang' WHEN 1 THEN 'Kawin' WHEN 2 THEN 'Duda' WHEN 3 THEN 'Janda' END) 
                      AS [Status Perkawinan]
FROM         dbo.m_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi
WHERE     (dbo.m_pegawai.status <> 0)

VIEW.name: mon_t_pegawai_izin
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_pegawai_izin
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pegawai_izin.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_pegawai_izin.tanggal, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Divisi, dbo.m_jenis_izin.nama AS [Jenis Izin], dbo.t_pegawai_izin.awal AS Dari, dbo.t_pegawai_izin.akhir AS Sampai, 
                      dbo.t_pegawai_izin.status AS [Status Izin], dbo.t_pegawai_izin.keterangan, dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas, 
                      dbo.t_pegawai_izin.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server]
FROM         dbo.t_pegawai_izin INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_pegawai_izin.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_izin ON dbo.t_pegawai_izin.kd_izin = dbo.m_jenis_izin.kd_izin INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_pegawai_izin.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user
WHERE     (dbo.t_pegawai_izin.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku())
