                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Divisi, dbo.m_jenis_izin.nama AS [Jenis Izin], dbo.t_pegawai_izin.awal AS Dari, dbo.t_pegawai_izin.akhir AS Sampai, 
                      dbo.t_pegawai_izin.status AS [Status Izin], dbo.t_pegawai_izin.keterangan AS Keterangan, dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas, 
                      dbo.t_pegawai_izin.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server]
FROM         dbo.t_pegawai_izin INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_pegawai_izin.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_izin ON dbo.t_pegawai_izin.kd_izin = dbo.m_jenis_izin.kd_izin INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_pegawai_izin.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user

VIEW.name: mon_t_pegawai_resign
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_pegawai_resign
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai AS Kode, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, dbo.m_jabatan.nama AS Jabatan, 
                      dbo.m_pegawai_jenis.nama AS [Jenis Pegawai], dbo.m_kota.nama AS Kota, dbo.m_agama.nama AS Agama, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS [Nama Lain Divisi], dbo.m_jam_kerja.nama AS Shift
FROM         dbo.m_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jabatan ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_jabatan = dbo.m_jabatan.kd_jabatan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai_jenis ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_jenis = dbo.m_pegawai_jenis.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_agama ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_agama = dbo.m_agama.kd_agama INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jam_kerja ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_shift = dbo.m_jam_kerja.kd_shift
WHERE     (dbo.m_pegawai.status = 0) AND (dbo.m_divisi.status <> 0) AND (dbo.m_agama.status <> 0) AND (dbo.m_kota.status <> 0) AND 
                      (dbo.m_pegawai_jenis.status <> 0) AND (dbo.m_jabatan.status <> 0) AND (dbo.m_jam_kerja.status <> 0)

VIEW.name: mon_t_pegawai_sisa_cuti
VIEW.definition:
/*	DECLARE @awal DATETIME, @akhir DATETIME, @tmp DATETIME	
	SELECT @awal = DBO.GetFormatTanggal(MIN(masuk)), @akhir = DBO.GetFormatTanggal(MAX(masuk)) FROM t_absensi
	SET @tmp = @awal


*/
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_pegawai_sisa_cuti
AS
SELECT     GetAbsenSemuaPegawai.kd_pegawai AS Kode, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, 
                      COUNT(GetAbsenSemuaPegawai.kd_pegawai) AS [Tidak Absensi], dbo.GetTotalIzinYangTidakMemotongCuti(GetAbsenSemuaPegawai.kd_pegawai) 
                      AS [Izin Tidak Mengurangi Cuti], dbo.GetTotalIzinYangMemotongCuti(GetAbsenSemuaPegawai.kd_pegawai, 0) AS [Izin Memotong Cuti (0)], 
                      dbo.GetTotalIzinYangMemotongCuti(GetAbsenSemuaPegawai.kd_pegawai, 1) AS [Izin Memotong Cuti (1)], dbo.GetPegawaiAwalCuti(1) 
                      - (COUNT(GetAbsenSemuaPegawai.kd_pegawai) + dbo.GetTotalIzinYangTidakMemotongCuti(GetAbsenSemuaPegawai.kd_pegawai) 
                      - dbo.GetTotalIzinYangMemotongCuti(GetAbsenSemuaPegawai.kd_pegawai, 0) 
                      + dbo.GetTotalIzinYangMemotongCuti(GetAbsenSemuaPegawai.kd_pegawai, 1)) AS [Sisa Cuti], dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota AS [Kepala Nota], 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan
FROM         dbo.GetAbsenSemuaPegawai() GetAbsenSemuaPegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi ON 
                      GetAbsenSemuaPegawai.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_izin INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pegawai_izin ON dbo.m_jenis_izin.kd_izin = dbo.t_pegawai_izin.kd_izin ON 
                      GetAbsenSemuaPegawai.kd_pegawai = dbo.t_pegawai_izin.kd_pegawai AND 
                      GetAbsenSemuaPegawai.tanggal = dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_pegawai_izin.tanggal)
WHERE     (GetAbsenSemuaPegawai.alasan IS NULL)
GROUP BY GetAbsenSemuaPegawai.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama, dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan

VIEW.name: mon_t_pegawai_sp
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_pegawai_sp
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.no_sp AS [No. SP], dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.tanggal AS Tanggal, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Divisi, dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.keterangan AS Keterangan, dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.status AS Status, 
                      dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas, dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server]
FROM         dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user

VIEW.name: mon_t_pegawai_sp_edit
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_pegawai_sp_edit
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.no_sp AS [No. SP], dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.tanggal AS Tanggal, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Divisi, dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.keterangan AS Keterangan, dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.status AS Status, 
                      dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas, dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server]
FROM         dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user

VIEW.name: mon_t_pegawai_status
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_pegawai_status
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai AS Kode, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Nama, dbo.m_pegawai.tgl_masuk as [Tanggal Masuk] , dbo.m_jabatan.nama AS Jabatan, 
                      (CASE dbo.m_pegawai.kelamin WHEN 0 THEN 'Wanita' WHEN 1 THEN 'Pria' END) AS [Jenis Kelamin], J.nama AS Jenis, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota AS [Kepala Nota], dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Keterangan, dbo.m_agama.nama AS Agama
FROM         dbo.m_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai_jenis J ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_jenis = J.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_agama ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_agama = dbo.m_agama.kd_agama INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jabatan ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_jabatan = dbo.m_jabatan.kd_jabatan
WHERE     (dbo.m_pegawai.status <> 0)

VIEW.name: mon_t_pegawai_uang_makan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_pegawai_uang_makan
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai AS Kode, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_absensi.masuk) AS Tanggal, 
                      dbo.GetFormatJam(MIN(dbo.t_absensi.masuk)) AS Masuk, dbo.GetFormatJam(MAX(dbo.t_absensi.keluar)) AS Keluar, dbo.m_jabatan.nama AS Jabatan, 
                      dbo.m_jabatan.uang_makan AS [Uang Makan], dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota AS [Kep.], dbo.m_divisi.keterangan
FROM         dbo.m_jabatan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.m_jabatan.kd_jabatan = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_jabatan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.t_absensi ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai
GROUP BY dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama, dbo.m_jabatan.nama, dbo.m_jabatan.uang_makan, dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_absensi.masuk)
HAVING      (MAX(dbo.t_absensi.keluar) IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai

VIEW.name: mon_t_pembelian
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_pembelian
AS
SELECT     beli.no_transaksi AS [No Transaksi], beli.no_order AS [No Order], beli.tanggal, dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.GetConvertStatus(beli.status) AS Pembayaran, 
                      beli.tanggal_jatuh_tempo AS [Jatuh Tempo], beli.keterangan AS Note, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No Rekening], dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, dbo.m_kas.cabang AS [Cabang Bank], 
                      SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_beli, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), beli.diskon1, beli.diskon2, beli.diskon3, beli.diskon4, beli.pajak, beli.ppnbm) 
                      * dtl.qty) AS [Total Pembelian], beli.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server]
FROM         dbo.t_pembelian AS beli INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON beli.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON beli.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_detail AS dtl ON beli.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON beli.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier
GROUP BY beli.no_transaksi, beli.no_order, beli.tanggal, beli.tanggal_jatuh_tempo, beli.keterangan, beli.tanggal_server, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, dbo.m_bank.nama, dbo.m_divisi.nama, 
                      dbo.m_supplier.nama, dbo.m_kas.cabang, dbo.GetConvertStatus(beli.status)

VIEW.name: mon_t_pembelian_detail
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_pembelian_detail
AS
SELECT     beli.no_transaksi AS [No Transaksi], beli.no_order AS [No Order], beli.tanggal, dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, beli.keterangan AS Note, dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dtl.qty AS Jumlah, 
                      dbo.m_satuan.nama AS Satuan, dtl.harga_beli AS [Harga Beli], dtl.diskon1 AS [Diskon Item 1], dtl.diskon2 AS [Diskon Item 2], dtl.diskon3 AS [Diskon Item 3], dtl.diskon4 AS [Diskon Item 4], 
                      beli.diskon1 AS [Diskon Total 1], beli.diskon2 AS [Diskon Total 2], beli.diskon3 AS [Diskon Total 3], beli.diskon4 AS [Diskon Total 4], beli.pajak, beli.ppnbm, 
                      dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_beli, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), beli.diskon1, beli.diskon2, beli.diskon3, beli.diskon4, beli.pajak, beli.ppnbm) 
                      * dtl.qty AS [Sub Total], dtl.kd_barang
FROM         dbo.t_pembelian AS beli INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON beli.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON beli.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_detail AS dtl ON beli.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON beli.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dtl.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dtl.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON beli.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier

VIEW.name: mon_t_pembelian_edit
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_pembelian_edit
AS
SELECT     beli.no_transaksi AS [No Transaksi], beli.no_order AS [No Order], beli.tanggal, dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, 
                      dbo.GetConvertStatus(beli.status) AS Pembayaran, beli.tanggal_jatuh_tempo AS [Jatuh Tempo], beli.keterangan AS Note, 
                      dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No Rekening], dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, dbo.m_kas.cabang AS [Cabang Bank], 
                      SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_beli, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), beli.diskon1, beli.diskon2, 
                      beli.diskon3, beli.diskon4, beli.pajak, beli.ppnbm) * dtl.qty) AS [Total Pembelian], beli.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server]
FROM         dbo.t_pembelian beli INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON beli.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON beli.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_detail dtl ON beli.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON beli.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier
GROUP BY beli.no_transaksi, beli.no_order, beli.tanggal, beli.tanggal_jatuh_tempo, beli.keterangan, beli.tanggal_server, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, 
                      dbo.m_bank.nama, dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.m_supplier.nama, dbo.m_kas.cabang, dbo.GetConvertStatus(beli.status)
HAVING      (beli.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku())

VIEW.name: mon_t_pembelian_order_edit
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_pembelian_order_edit
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pembelian_order.no_order AS [No. Order], dbo.t_pembelian_order.no_pp_order AS [No. PP Order], dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.t_pembelian_order.tanggal AS Tanggal, dbo.t_pembelian_order.tanggal_terima AS Penerimaan, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order.status AS Status, dbo.t_pembelian_order.jaminan AS [Jaminan / U.M.], dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS Pembayaran, 
                      dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS Kas
FROM         dbo.t_pembelian_order INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.t_pembelian_order.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_pembelian_order.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_pembelian_order.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_pembelian_order.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_pembelian_order.kd_jenis_bayar = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis

VIEW.name: mon_t_pembelian_retur
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_pembelian_retur
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pembelian_retur.no_retur AS [No. Retur], dbo.t_pembelian_retur.tanggal, dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Divisi, 
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS Pembayaran, dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No. Rekening], dbo.t_pembelian_retur.no_bukti AS [No. Bukti], 
                      dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas, dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.harga, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.qty, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS Satuan, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.keterangan
FROM         dbo.m_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_retur INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur.no_retur = dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.no_retur ON 
                      dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi = dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier

VIEW.name: mon_t_pembelian_retur_edit
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_pembelian_retur_edit
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pembelian_retur.no_retur AS [No. Retur], dbo.t_pembelian_retur.tanggal, dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Divisi, 
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS Pembayaran, dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No. Rekening], dbo.t_pembelian_retur.no_bukti AS [No. Bukti], 
                      dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas, dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.harga, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.qty, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS Satuan, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.keterangan
FROM         dbo.m_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_retur INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur.no_retur = dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.no_retur ON 
                      dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi = dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier
WHERE     (dbo.t_pembelian_retur.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku())

VIEW.name: mon_t_pendapatan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_pendapatan
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pendapatan.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_pendapatan.tanggal AS Tanggal, dbo.m_pendapatan.nama AS Pendapatan, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Divisi, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS Pembayaran, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No. Rekening], dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, 
                      dbo.m_bank.keterangan AS [Ket. Bank], dbo.t_pendapatan.nominal AS Nominal, dbo.t_pendapatan.no_bukti AS [No. Bukti], 
                      dbo.t_pendapatan.keterangan AS Keterangan, dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas, dbo.t_pendapatan.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server]
FROM         dbo.t_pendapatan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_pendapatan.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_pendapatan.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_pendapatan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_pendapatan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pendapatan ON dbo.t_pendapatan.kd_pendapatan = dbo.m_pendapatan.kd_pendapatan

VIEW.name: mon_t_pendapatan_edit
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_pendapatan_edit
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pendapatan.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_pendapatan.tanggal, dbo.m_pendapatan.nama AS Pendapatan, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Divisi, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS Pembayaran, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No. Rekening], dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, 
                      dbo.m_bank.keterangan AS [Ket. Bank], dbo.t_pendapatan.nominal, dbo.t_pendapatan.no_bukti AS [No. Bukti], dbo.t_pendapatan.keterangan, 
                      dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas, dbo.t_pendapatan.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server]
FROM         dbo.t_pendapatan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_pendapatan.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_pendapatan.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_pendapatan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_pendapatan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pendapatan ON dbo.t_pendapatan.kd_pendapatan = dbo.m_pendapatan.kd_pendapatan
WHERE     (dbo.t_pendapatan.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku())

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_all
VIEW.definition:
/*===========================================================
===========================================================
===========================================================
===========================================================*/
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_all
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, 
                      dbo.m_kota.nama AS Kota, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal_jatuh_tempo AS [Jth. Tempo], dbo.GetConvertStatus(dbo.t_penjualan.status) AS Status, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.keterangan AS [Ket.], dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, 
                      dbo.m_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Sales, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS Stn, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual AS Harga, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1 AS DD1, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2 AS DD2, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3 AS DD3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4 AS DD4, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1 AS DT1, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2 AS DT2, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3 AS DT3, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4 AS DT4, dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4, dbo.t_penjualan.pajak, 0) AS [Harga Bersih], 
                      dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4, dbo.t_penjualan.pajak, 0) * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty AS Total, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_customer.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_buku_penerimaan_tunai
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_buku_penerimaan_tunai
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT jual.tanggal, dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, jual.no_transaksi AS [No. Nota], 
                      dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, 
                      jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty AS [Total Penjualan]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail dtl ON jual.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON jual.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer
WHERE     (jual.status = 1) AND (dtl.kd_barang <> 'GKNAM')
GROUP BY jual.tanggal, dbo.m_customer.nama, jual.no_transaksi, dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, 
                      dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty
ORDER BY jual.tanggal, dbo.m_customer.nama, jual.no_transaksi

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_cek_harga_jual
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_cek_harga_jual
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Sales, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AS Kode, dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dbo.m_merk.nama AS Merk, dbo.m_model.nama AS Model, 
                      dbo.m_warna.nama AS Warna, dbo.m_kategori.nama AS Kategori, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual / dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan) 
                      AS [Harga Kotor], dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4, dbo.t_penjualan.pajak, 0) 
                      / dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan) AS [Harga Bersih],
                          (SELECT     TOP 1 (dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_pembelian_detail.harga_beli, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon1, 
                                                   dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon2, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_pembelian.diskon1, 
                                                   dbo.t_pembelian.diskon2, dbo.t_pembelian.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian.diskon4, dbo.t_pembelian.pajak, dbo.t_pembelian.ppnbm)) 
                                                   / dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(kd_barang, kd_satuan)
                            FROM          t_pembelian INNER JOIN
                                                   t_pembelian_detail ON t_pembelian.no_transaksi = t_pembelian_detail.no_transaksi
                            WHERE      kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AND t_pembelian.tanggal <= t_penjualan.tanggal
			    ORDER BY t_pembelian.tanggal DESC ) AS [Harga Beli AKhir]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_detail INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_merk ON dbo.m_barang.kd_merk = dbo.m_merk.kd_merk INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_model ON dbo.m_barang.kd_model = dbo.m_model.kd_model INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_warna ON dbo.m_barang.kd_warna = dbo.m_warna.kd_warna INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori
WHERE     (dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4, dbo.t_penjualan.pajak, 0) / dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan) <=
                          (SELECT   TOP 1  (dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_pembelian_detail.harga_beli, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon1, 
                                                   dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon2, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_pembelian.diskon1, 
                                                   dbo.t_pembelian.diskon2, dbo.t_pembelian.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian.diskon4, dbo.t_pembelian.pajak, dbo.t_pembelian.ppnbm)) 
                                                   / dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(kd_barang, kd_satuan)
                            FROM          t_pembelian INNER JOIN
                                                   t_pembelian_detail ON t_pembelian.no_transaksi = t_pembelian_detail.no_transaksi
                            WHERE      kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AND t_pembelian.tanggal <= t_penjualan.tanggal
			    ORDER BY t_pembelian.tanggal DESC))

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_cek_margin
VIEW.definition:
CREATE  VIEW mon_t_penjualan_cek_margin
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal AS Tanggal, 
      dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_kota.nama AS Kota, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AS Kode, m_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, m_pegawai.nama as Sales,
      dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, 
      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3, 
      dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4, dbo.t_penjualan.pajak, 0) AS [Harga Jual Bersih], t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual AS [Harga Jual Kotor],
    CASE 
    WHEN (SELECT MAX(dtl.no_transaksi)
        FROM t_pembelian_detail dtl INNER JOIN t_pembelian beli ON dtl.no_transaksi = beli.no_transaksi 
        WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) <= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_penjualan.tanggal) AND kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang) IS NULL THEN 
        
        (SELECT harga_beli_awal FROM m_barang_divisi WHERE kd_divisi = t_penjualan.kd_divisi AND kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang) * (SELECT jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AND kd_satuan = t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan)
    ELSE
        (SELECT TOP 1 
            dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_beli, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), beli.diskon1, beli.diskon2, beli.diskon3, 
                  beli.diskon4, beli.pajak, beli.ppnbm) / 
            (SELECT jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang = dtl.kd_barang AND kd_satuan = dtl.kd_satuan) *
            (SELECT jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AND kd_satuan = t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan)
        FROM t_pembelian_detail dtl INNER JOIN t_pembelian beli ON dtl.no_transaksi = beli.no_transaksi 
        WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) <= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_penjualan.tanggal) AND kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang
        ORDER BY tanggal DESC) 
    END
    AS [Harga Beli Terakhir],

    (dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4, dbo.t_penjualan.pajak, 0) -
    CASE 
    WHEN (SELECT MAX(dtl.no_transaksi)
        FROM t_pembelian_detail dtl INNER JOIN t_pembelian beli ON dtl.no_transaksi = beli.no_transaksi 
        WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) <= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_penjualan.tanggal) AND kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang) IS NULL THEN 
        
        (SELECT harga_beli_awal FROM m_barang_divisi WHERE kd_divisi = t_penjualan.kd_divisi AND kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang) * (SELECT jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AND kd_satuan = t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan)
    ELSE
        (SELECT TOP 1 
            dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_beli, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), beli.diskon1, beli.diskon2, beli.diskon3, 
                  beli.diskon4, beli.pajak, beli.ppnbm) / 
            (SELECT jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang = dtl.kd_barang AND kd_satuan = dtl.kd_satuan) *
            (SELECT jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AND kd_satuan = t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan)
        FROM t_pembelian_detail dtl INNER JOIN t_pembelian beli ON dtl.no_transaksi = beli.no_transaksi 
        WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) <= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_penjualan.tanggal) AND kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang
        ORDER BY tanggal DESC) 
    END) AS [Margin Bersih(Rp)],
    CAST (
        (dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, 
                          dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3, 
                          dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4, dbo.t_penjualan.pajak, 0) -
        CASE 
        WHEN (SELECT MAX(dtl.no_transaksi)
            FROM t_pembelian_detail dtl INNER JOIN t_pembelian beli ON dtl.no_transaksi = beli.no_transaksi 
            WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) <= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_penjualan.tanggal) AND kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang) IS NULL THEN 
            
            (SELECT harga_beli_awal FROM m_barang_divisi WHERE kd_divisi = t_penjualan.kd_divisi AND kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang) * (SELECT jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AND kd_satuan = t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan)
        ELSE
            (SELECT TOP 1 
                dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_beli, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), beli.diskon1, beli.diskon2, beli.diskon3, 
                      beli.diskon4, beli.pajak, beli.ppnbm) / 
                (SELECT jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang = dtl.kd_barang AND kd_satuan = dtl.kd_satuan) *
                (SELECT jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AND kd_satuan = t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan)
            FROM t_pembelian_detail dtl INNER JOIN t_pembelian beli ON dtl.no_transaksi = beli.no_transaksi 
            WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) <= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_penjualan.tanggal) AND kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang
            ORDER BY tanggal DESC) 
        END) /
        CASE 
        WHEN (
            CASE 
            WHEN (SELECT MAX(dtl.no_transaksi)
                FROM t_pembelian_detail dtl INNER JOIN t_pembelian beli ON dtl.no_transaksi = beli.no_transaksi 
                WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) <= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_penjualan.tanggal) AND kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang) IS NULL THEN 
                
                (SELECT harga_beli_awal FROM m_barang_divisi WHERE kd_divisi = t_penjualan.kd_divisi AND kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang) * (SELECT jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AND kd_satuan = t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan)
            ELSE
                (SELECT TOP 1 
                    dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_beli, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), beli.diskon1, beli.diskon2, beli.diskon3, 
                          beli.diskon4, beli.pajak, beli.ppnbm) / 
                    (SELECT jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang = dtl.kd_barang AND kd_satuan = dtl.kd_satuan) *
                    (SELECT jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AND kd_satuan = t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan)
                FROM t_pembelian_detail dtl INNER JOIN t_pembelian beli ON dtl.no_transaksi = beli.no_transaksi 
                WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) <= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_penjualan.tanggal) AND kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang
                ORDER BY tanggal DESC) 
            END
         ) = 0 THEN 1
    
        ELSE
        (
                
            CASE 
            WHEN (SELECT MAX(dtl.no_transaksi)
                FROM t_pembelian_detail dtl INNER JOIN t_pembelian beli ON dtl.no_transaksi = beli.no_transaksi 
                WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) <= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_penjualan.tanggal) AND kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang) IS NULL THEN 
                
                (SELECT harga_beli_awal FROM m_barang_divisi WHERE kd_divisi = t_penjualan.kd_divisi AND kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang) * (SELECT jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AND kd_satuan = t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan)
            ELSE
                (SELECT TOP 1 
                    dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_beli, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), beli.diskon1, beli.diskon2, beli.diskon3, 
                          beli.diskon4, beli.pajak, beli.ppnbm) / 
                    (SELECT jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang = dtl.kd_barang AND kd_satuan = dtl.kd_satuan) *
                    (SELECT jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AND kd_satuan = t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan)
                FROM t_pembelian_detail dtl INNER JOIN t_pembelian beli ON dtl.no_transaksi = beli.no_transaksi 
                WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) <= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_penjualan.tanggal) AND kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang
                ORDER BY tanggal DESC) 
            END 
        )
        END * 100 AS BIGINT)
    AS [Margin Bersih(%)],

    (dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4, dbo.t_penjualan.pajak, 0) -
    CASE 
    WHEN (SELECT MAX(dtl.no_transaksi)
        FROM t_pembelian_detail dtl INNER JOIN t_pembelian beli ON dtl.no_transaksi = beli.no_transaksi 
        WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) <= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_penjualan.tanggal) AND kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang) IS NULL THEN 
        
        (SELECT harga_beli_awal FROM m_barang_divisi WHERE kd_divisi = t_penjualan.kd_divisi AND kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang) * (SELECT jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AND kd_satuan = t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan)
    ELSE
        (SELECT TOP 1 
            dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_beli, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), beli.diskon1, beli.diskon2, beli.diskon3, 
                  beli.diskon4, beli.pajak, beli.ppnbm) / 
            (SELECT jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang = dtl.kd_barang AND kd_satuan = dtl.kd_satuan) *
            (SELECT jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AND kd_satuan = t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan)
        FROM t_pembelian_detail dtl INNER JOIN t_pembelian beli ON dtl.no_transaksi = beli.no_transaksi 
        WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) <= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_penjualan.tanggal) AND kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang
        ORDER BY tanggal DESC) 
    END)  * t_penjualan_detail.qty as [Total Margin],  t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual * t_penjualan_detail.qty  AS [Total Penjualan Bersih],
    t_penjualan_detail.qty AS Qty, m_satuan.nama as Satuan, m_userx.nama AS Petugas

FROM  dbo.t_penjualan_detail INNER JOIN
      dbo.t_penjualan ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_customer.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_satuan ON t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan = m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_pegawai ON t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai = m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_kategori ON m_barang.kd_kategori = m_kategori.kd_kategori INNER JOIN
      dbo.m_userx ON t_penjualan.kd_user = m_userx.kd_user

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_edit
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_edit
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT jual.no_transaksi AS [No Nota], jual.tanggal, dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS [Keterangan Divisi], dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota AS [Kepala Nota], SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, 
                      dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty) AS [Total Bersih], 
                      dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas, jual.status
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON jual.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON jual.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON jual.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail dtl ON jual.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi
GROUP BY jual.no_transaksi, dbo.m_customer.nama, dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan, jual.tanggal, jual.keterangan, dbo.GetConvertStatus(jual.status), 
                      dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota, dbo.m_userx.nama, jual.status
ORDER BY jual.no_transaksi

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_jasa
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_jasa
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi AS [No Transaksi], dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.tanggal_pesan AS Tanggal, dbo.m_jasa.nama AS Item, 
                      dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa = dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa_kategori ON dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = dbo.m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi
WHERE     (dbo.m_jasa_kategori.status = '2')

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_jasa_perbulan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_jasa_perbulan
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT DATENAME(month, jual.tanggal_pesan) + ' ' + DATENAME(year, jual.tanggal_pesan) AS Bulan, 
                      SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(jual.no_transaksi)) AS [Total Bersih]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_jasa jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail ON jual.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa = dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa_kategori ON dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = dbo.m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori
WHERE     (jual.tanggal_pesan > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()) AND (dbo.m_jasa_kategori.status = '2')
GROUP BY DATEPART(month, jual.tanggal_pesan), DATENAME(month, jual.tanggal_pesan) + ' ' + DATENAME(year, jual.tanggal_pesan)
ORDER BY DATEPART(month, jual.tanggal_pesan)

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_jasa_percustomer
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_jasa_percustomer
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal_pesan) AS Tanggal, dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, COUNT(jual.no_transaksi) 
                      AS [Jumlah Nota], SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(jual.no_transaksi)) AS [Total Bersih]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_jasa jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON jual.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail ON jual.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa = dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa_kategori ON dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = dbo.m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori
WHERE     (dbo.m_jasa_kategori.status = '2')
GROUP BY dbo.m_customer.nama, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal_pesan)

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_jasa_perhari
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_jasa_perhari
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal_pesan) AS Tanggal, dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_jasa.nama AS Jasa, 
                      SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga, dtl.diskon, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0), jual.diskon, 0, 0, 0, jual.pajak, jual.other) * dtl.qty) 
                      AS [Total Penjualan Bersih], SUM(dtl.harga * dtl.qty) AS [Total Penjualan Kotor], SUM((dtl.harga - dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga, 
                      dtl.diskon, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0), jual.diskon, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0)) * dtl.qty) AS [Total Diskon Penjualan], dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga, dtl.diskon, 
                      0, 0, 0, 0, 0), jual.diskon, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0) * jual.pajak * dtl.qty AS [Total Pajak Penjualan]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_jasa jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail dtl ON jual.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa ON dtl.kd_jasa = dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON jual.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa_kategori ON dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = dbo.m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori
WHERE     (dbo.m_jasa_kategori.status = '2')
GROUP BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal_pesan), dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0), jual.diskon, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0) 
                      * jual.pajak * dtl.qty, dbo.m_customer.nama, dbo.m_jasa.nama
ORDER BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal_pesan)

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_koin_gudang
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_koin_gudang
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal) AS Tanggal, 'LANTAI ' + CAST(LEFT(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, 1) 
                      AS VARCHAR(1)) AS Gudang, SUM(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty) AS Qty, SUM(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.point2) AS Total
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi
WHERE     (dbo.t_penjualan_detail.point2 <> 0) AND (LEFT(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, 1) IN ('1', '2', '3'))
GROUP BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal), 'LANTAI ' + CAST(LEFT(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, 1) AS VARCHAR(1))
ORDER BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal)

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_koin_pegawai
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_koin_pegawai
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.point2
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai
WHERE     (dbo.t_penjualan_detail.point2 <> 0)
ORDER BY dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_komisi_pegawai
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_komisi_pegawai
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal AS Tanggal, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], 
                      dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dbo.m_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dbo.m_merk.nama AS Merk, dbo.m_model.nama AS Model, 
                      dbo.m_warna.nama AS Warna, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.point2 AS Komisi, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty AS Jumlah, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.point2 * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty AS [Total Komisi]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_merk ON dbo.m_barang.kd_merk = dbo.m_merk.kd_merk INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_model ON dbo.m_barang.kd_model = dbo.m_model.kd_model INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_warna ON dbo.m_barang.kd_warna = dbo.m_warna.kd_warna INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_komisi_pegawai_per_barang
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_komisi_pegawai_per_barang
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT jual.no_transaksi AS [No Transaksi], dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal) AS Tanggal, dtl.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], 
                      dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dtl.kd_pegawai AS [Kode Pegawai], dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, dtl.harga_jual * dtl.qty AS [Total Kotor], 
                      dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, 
                      jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty AS [Total Bersih], dbo.GetMaxSatuan(dtl.kd_barang, dtl.kd_satuan, dtl.qty) AS Kuantum
FROM         dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail dtl ON jual.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dtl.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dtl.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai
ORDER BY jual.no_transaksi

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_komisi_pegawai_total_per_hari
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_komisi_pegawai_total_per_hari
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal) AS Tanggal, dtl.kd_pegawai AS [Kode Pegawai], dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, 
                      SUM(dtl.harga_jual * dtl.qty) AS [Total Kotor], SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, 
                      dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty) AS [Total Bersih]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail dtl ON jual.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dtl.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai
GROUP BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal), dtl.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama
ORDER BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal)

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_komisi_per_pegawai
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW mon_t_penjualan_komisi_per_pegawai
AS
SELECT t_penjualan.no_transaksi as [No. Transaksi], t_penjualan.tanggal as Tanggal, m_pegawai.nama as Pegawai, 'Tunai' as Status,
	dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(t_penjualan.no_transaksi) as total
FROM t_penjualan INNER JOIN t_penjualan_detail ON t_penjualan.no_transaksi = t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi 
	INNER JOIN m_pegawai ON t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai = m_pegawai.kd_pegawai
WHERE t_penjualan.status <> 0

UNION ALL

SELECT t_penjualan.no_transaksi, t_penjualan.tanggal, m_pegawai.nama as pegawai, 'Lunas' as Status,
	dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(t_penjualan.no_transaksi) as total
FROM t_penjualan INNER JOIN t_penjualan_detail ON t_penjualan.no_transaksi = t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi 
	INNER JOIN m_pegawai ON t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai = m_pegawai.kd_pegawai
WHERE t_penjualan.status = 0 AND dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(t_penjualan.no_transaksi) - dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(t_penjualan.no_transaksi, 0) <= 1

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_kuantum_per_periode
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_kuantum_per_periode
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, 
                      SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan) * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty) 
                      AS Jumlah
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori
GROUP BY dbo.m_customer.nama, dbo.m_barang.nama, dbo.m_kategori.nama

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_order_edit
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[mon_t_penjualan_order_edit]
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan_order.no_order AS [No. Order], dbo.t_penjualan_order.tanggal AS Tanggal, dbo.t_penjualan_order.tanggal_terima AS Diterima, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_order.kd_customer AS [Kode Customer], dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_customer.alamat AS Alamat, 
                      dbo.m_customer.telepon AS [Telp.], dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, 
                      dbo.m_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dbo.t_penjualan_order.status AS Stats, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.qty AS Jumlah, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.harga_jual AS Harga
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_order INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan_order.no_order = dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.no_order INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan_order.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_per_barang
VIEW.definition:
/*
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal) AS Tanggal, dtl.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dtl.harga_jual * dtl.qty AS [Total Kotor], 
  dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) 
  * dtl.qty AS [Total Bersih], 
  --dbo.GetMaxSatuan(dtl.kd_barang, dtl.kd_satuan, dtl.qty) AS Kuantum, 
  dtl.qty * bs.jumlah AS Kuantum,
  dbo.mon_m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.m_customer.nama, dbo.m_model.nama AS Keterang, 
  dbo.m_userx.nama AS [User]
FROM         dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
  dbo.t_penjualan AS jual INNER JOIN
  dbo.t_penjualan_detail AS dtl ON jual.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dtl.kd_barang INNER JOIN
  dbo.m_divisi ON jual.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
  dbo.mon_m_divisi ON dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi = dbo.mon_m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
  dbo.m_customer ON jual.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
  dbo.m_model ON dbo.m_barang.kd_model = dbo.m_model.kd_model INNER JOIN
  dbo.m_userx ON jual.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
  m_barang_satuan bs ON dtl.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND dtl.kd_satuan = bs.kd_satuan
/*GROUP BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal), dtl.kd_barang, dbo.m_barang.nama, dtl.harga_jual * dtl.qty, dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, 
  dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty, dbo.GetMaxSatuan(dtl.kd_barang, dtl.kd_satuan, dtl.qty), dbo.mon_m_divisi.nama, 
  dbo.m_customer.nama, dbo.m_model.nama, dbo.m_userx.nama*/
*/
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_per_barang
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT jual.tanggal, dtl.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dtl.harga_jual * dtl.qty AS [Total Kotor], 
                      dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, 
                      jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty AS [Total Bersih], dtl.qty * bs.jumlah AS Kuantum, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.m_model.nama AS keterangan, dbo.m_userx.nama
FROM         dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan AS jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail AS dtl ON jual.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dtl.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON jual.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_satuan AS bs ON dtl.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND dtl.kd_satuan = bs.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_model ON dbo.m_model.kd_model = dbo.m_barang.kd_model INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON jual.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user
GROUP BY jual.tanggal, dtl.kd_barang, dbo.m_barang.nama, dtl.harga_jual * dtl.qty, dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, 
                      dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty, dtl.qty * bs.jumlah, dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.m_model.nama, 
                      dbo.m_userx.nama

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_per_barang_harga_pokok
VIEW.definition:
CREATE         VIEW [dbo].[mon_t_penjualan_per_barang_harga_pokok]
AS
SELECT dtl.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal) AS Tanggal, dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, 
	dbo.m_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dtl.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, 
	
	(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), 
		jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) ) / bst.jumlah AS [Harga], 

	isnull(tmp.harga, bdiv.harga_beli) as [harga pokok],
	
	(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), 
		jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty) AS [Total Bersih], 
	isnull(tmp.harga, bdiv.harga_beli) * dtl.qty * bst.jumlah as [Total harga pokok],

	(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), 
		jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty) - 
	(isnull(tmp.harga, bdiv.harga_beli) * dtl.qty * bst.jumlah) as Laba, 

	((dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), 
	jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty) - 
	(isnull(tmp.harga, bdiv.harga_beli) * dtl.qty * bst.jumlah)) / 
	((CASE WHEN (isnull(tmp.harga, bdiv.harga_beli) * dtl.qty * bst.jumlah)= 0 THEN 1 ELSE (isnull(tmp.harga, bdiv.harga_beli) * dtl.qty * bst.jumlah)END)) * 100 as Margin,
	
	dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas
FROM     dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
	dbo.t_penjualan AS jual INNER JOIN
	dbo.t_penjualan_detail AS dtl ON jual.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dtl.kd_barang INNER JOIN
	dbo.m_customer ON jual.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
	dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori INNER JOIN
	dbo.m_userx ON jual.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
	dbo.m_barang_satuan ON dtl.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_barang AND dtl.kd_satuan = dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
	dbo.m_divisi ON jual.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi
	INNER JOIN
	m_barang_satuan bst ON bst.kd_barang = dtl.kd_barang AND bst.kd_satuan = dtl.kd_satuan
	INNER JOIN (SELECT kd_barang,MAX(harga_beli_awal) as harga_beli FROM m_barang_divisi GROUP BY kd_barang) bdiv ON bdiv.kd_barang=m_barang.kd_barang
	LEFT JOIN
		(
			/*
		SELECT dtl.kd_barang as kd_barang, 
			dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_beli, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), 
				bl.diskon1, bl.diskon2, bl.diskon3, bl.diskon4, bl.pajak, bl.ppnbm) / brg.jumlah  AS harga
		FROM 
				(SELECT kd_barang, MAX(no_transaksi) as nomor
				FROM t_pembelian_detail dt 
				WHERE harga_beli > 0 AND no_transaksi LIKE 'GP%'
				GROUP BY kd_barang) AS akhir 
	
			INNER JOIN t_pembelian_detail dtl ON akhir.kd_barang = dtl.kd_barang 
				AND dtl.no_transaksi = akhir.nomor 
			INNER JOIN m_barang_satuan brg ON brg.kd_barang = dtl.kd_barang AND brg.kd_satuan = dtl.kd_satuan
			INNER JOIN t_pembelian bl ON dtl.no_transaksi = bl.no_transaksi
		WHERE dtl.harga_beli > 0 */
		
		SELECT  dtl.kd_barang AS kd_barang, 
			dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_beli, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), bl.diskon1, 
				bl.diskon2, bl.diskon3, bl.diskon4, bl.pajak, bl.ppnbm) / brg.jumlah AS harga 
		FROM
			t_pembelian bl INNER JOIN t_pembelian_detail dtl ON  bl.no_transaksi=dtl.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
			(
				SELECT dt.kd_barang, MAX(tanggal) as last_date_purchase 
				FROM t_pembelian beli INNER JOIN t_pembelian_detail dt 
				ON dt.no_transaksi = beli.no_transaksi
				GROUP BY dt.kd_barang
			) last_tr ON last_tr.kd_barang=dtl.kd_barang AND last_tr.last_date_purchase=bl.tanggal
			INNER JOIN m_barang_satuan brg ON brg.kd_barang = dtl.kd_barang AND brg.kd_satuan = dtl.kd_satuan
		WHERE dtl.harga_beli>0
		) AS tmp 
			ON dtl.kd_barang = tmp.kd_barang
		
		/*
		UNION 

		SELECT kd_barang, MAX(harga_beli_awal) 
		FROM m_barang_divisi
		GROUP BY kd_barang) AS tmp 
			ON tmp.kd_barang = dtl.kd_barang
		*/

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_per_barang_req_1
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_per_barang_req_1
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, dbo.m_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dbo.m_kota.nama AS Kota, dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, 
                      dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan) 
                      * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty) AS Kwantum, SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, 
                      jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty) AS [Total (Rp)]
FROM         dbo.m_barang LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_supplier INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier ON 
                      dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_barang RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON jual.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail ON jual.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi ON dbo.m_kota.kd_kota = dbo.m_customer.kd_kota ON 
                      dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang
GROUP BY dbo.m_supplier.nama, dbo.m_kategori.nama, dbo.m_kota.nama, dbo.m_barang.nama, dbo.m_customer.nama

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_per_barang_req_2
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_per_barang_req_2
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, 
                      SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan) * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty) AS Kwantum, 
                      SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4, dbo.t_penjualan.pajak, 0) * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty) AS [Total (Rp)]
FROM         dbo.m_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi ON 
                      dbo.m_kota.kd_kota = dbo.m_customer.kd_kota ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_supplier INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier ON 
                      dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_barang ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang
GROUP BY dbo.m_supplier.nama, dbo.m_barang.nama, dbo.m_pegawai.nama

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_per_bulan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_per_bulan
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT DATENAME(month, tanggal) + ' ' + DATENAME(year, tanggal) AS Bulan, SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(no_transaksi)) 
                      AS [Total Bersih]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan jual
WHERE     (tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku())
GROUP BY DATEPART(month, tanggal), DATENAME(month, tanggal) + ' ' + DATENAME(year, tanggal)
ORDER BY DATEPART(month, tanggal)

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_per_bulan_dan_barang
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_per_bulan_dan_barang
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal AS Tanggal, dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AS Kode, 
                      dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, SUM(dbo.GetMaxSatuan(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty)) AS Jumlah,
                          (SELECT     TOP 1 m_satuan.nama
                            FROM          m_barang_satuan INNER JOIN
                                                   m_satuan ON m_barang_satuan.kd_satuan = m_satuan.kd_satuan
                            WHERE      m_barang_satuan.kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AND m_barang_satuan.status = 1
                            ORDER BY m_barang_satuan.jumlah DESC) AS Satuan
FROM         dbo.m_barang_supplier INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi ON 
                      dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang
GROUP BY dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, dbo.m_barang.nama, dbo.m_supplier.nama, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal
ORDER BY dbo.m_barang.nama

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_per_bulan_per_divisi
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_per_bulan_per_divisi
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT DATENAME(month, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal) + ' ' + DATENAME(year, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal) AS Bulan, dbo.m_divisi.nama, 
                      SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi)) AS [Total Bersih]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi
WHERE     (dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku())
GROUP BY DATEPART(month, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal), DATENAME(month, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal) + ' ' + DATENAME(year, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal), 
                      dbo.m_divisi.nama
ORDER BY DATEPART(month, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal)

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_per_bulan_per_divisi1
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_per_bulan_per_divisi1
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT DATENAME(month, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal) + ' ' + DATENAME(year, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal) AS Bulan, dbo.m_divisi.nama, 
                      SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi)) AS [Total Bersih]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi
WHERE     (dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku())
GROUP BY DATEPART(month, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal), DATENAME(month, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal) + ' ' + DATENAME(year, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal), 
                      dbo.m_divisi.nama
ORDER BY DATEPART(month, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal)

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_per_customer
VIEW.definition:
/*===========================================================
===========================================================*/
CREATE  VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_per_customer
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal) AS Tanggal, dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, 
                      CAST(COUNT(jual.no_transaksi) AS VARCHAR(20)) + ' Nota' AS [Jumlah Nota], SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(jual.no_transaksi)) AS [Total Bersih], 
                      dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi, jual.no_transaksi, COUNT(*) AS Expr1, dbo.m_customer.kd_customer
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON jual.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON jual.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi
GROUP BY dbo.m_customer.nama, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal), dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi, jual.no_transaksi, 
                      dbo.m_customer.kd_customer

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_per_divisi
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[mon_t_penjualan_per_divisi]
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS [Keterangan Divisi], dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota AS [Kepala Nota], 
          SUM(dtl.harga_jual * dtl.qty) AS [Total Kotor], dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal) AS Tanggal, 
          SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, 
          jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty) - jual.diskon_uang AS [Total Bersih]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON jual.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail dtl ON jual.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi
GROUP BY dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan, dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal), jual.diskon_uang
ORDER BY dbo.m_divisi.keterangan

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_per_hari
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[mon_t_penjualan_per_hari]
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal) AS Tanggal, 
	SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, 
	  dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty) - jual.diskon_uang AS [Total Penjualan Bersih], 
	  SUM(dtl.harga_jual * dtl.qty) AS [Total Penjualan Kotor], 
	  SUM((dtl.harga_jual - dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, 
	  dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, 0, 0)) * dtl.qty) AS [Total Diskon Penjualan], 
	  dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, 
	  jual.diskon4, 0, 0) * jual.pajak * dtl.qty AS [Total Pajak Penjualan]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail dtl ON jual.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi
GROUP BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal), dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), 
                      jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, 0, 0) * jual.pajak * dtl.qty,  jual.diskon_uang
ORDER BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal)

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_per_hari_divisi
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[mon_t_penjualan_per_hari_divisi]
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal) AS Tanggal, 
	m_divisi.nama as divisi,
	(SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, 
	dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, 
		jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty) - SUM(DISTINCT jual.diskon_uang)) * 0.25 AS [Total Penjualan Bersih]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail dtl ON jual.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
	m_divisi ON jual.kd_divisi = m_divisi.kd_divisi
GROUP BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal), m_divisi.nama

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_per_hari_divisi_001
VIEW.definition:
/*DAA001	SUKSES CROWN PUSAT
DAA013	SCT PAGESANGAN
DAA014	SCT RUMAK
DAA012	SUKSES CROWN KA
*/


CREATE  VIEW [dbo].[mon_t_penjualan_per_hari_divisi_001]
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal) AS Tanggal, 
	m_divisi.nama as divisi,
	(SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, 
	dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, 
		jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty)- jual.diskon_uang) * 0.25 AS [Total Penjualan Bersih]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail dtl ON jual.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
	m_divisi ON jual.kd_divisi = m_divisi.kd_divisi
WHERE JUAL.kd_divisi = 'DAA001'
GROUP BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal), m_divisi.nama ,  jual.diskon_uang

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_per_hari_divisi_1
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_per_hari_divisi_1
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal) AS Tanggal, 
	m_divisi.nama as divisi,
	SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, 
	dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, 
		jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty) * 0.5 AS [Total Penjualan Bersih]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail dtl ON jual.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
	m_divisi ON jual.kd_divisi = m_divisi.kd_divisi
GROUP BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal), m_divisi.nama

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_per_nota
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[mon_t_penjualan_per_nota]
AS
SELECT     TOP (100) PERCENT jual.no_transaksi AS [ NO Nota ], jual.tanggal, dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_kota.nama AS Kota, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, SUM(dtl.harga_jual * dtl.qty) 
                      AS [ Total Kotor ], SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, 
                      jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty) - SUM(DISTINCT jual.diskon_uang) AS [ Total Bersih ], SUM((dtl.harga_jual - dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, 
                      dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, 0, 0)) * dtl.qty) + SUM(DISTINCT jual.diskon_uang) AS Potongan, dbo.m_voucher.nominal AS Voucher, 
                      SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty) 
                      - SUM(DISTINCT jual.diskon_uang) - dbo.m_voucher.nominal AS [Total Setelah Voucher], SUM((dtl.harga_jual - dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, 
                      dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0)) * dtl.qty) - SUM((dtl.harga_jual - dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, 
                      dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, 0, 0)) * dtl.qty) AS [ Total Pajak ], 
                      SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty) 
                      - SUM(dtl.harga_jual * dtl.qty) + SUM((dtl.harga_jual - dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, 
                      jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, 0, 0)) * dtl.qty) AS [ Total Pajak2 ], dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan AS jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON jual.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON jual.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON jual.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail AS dtl ON jual.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_customer.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_voucher ON jual.kd_voucher = dbo.m_voucher.kd_voucher
GROUP BY jual.no_transaksi, dbo.m_customer.nama, dbo.m_divisi.nama, jual.tanggal, jual.keterangan, dbo.GetConvertStatus(jual.status), dbo.m_userx.nama, dbo.m_kota.nama, 
                      dbo.m_voucher.nominal
ORDER BY [ NO Nota ]

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_per_pegawai_per_jenis
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_per_pegawai_per_jenis
AS
