SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi AS [No Transaksi], dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal AS Tanggal, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Sales, 
                      dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dbo.m_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dbo.m_merk.nama AS Merk, 
                      dbo.m_model.nama AS Model, dbo.m_jenis_bahan.nama AS Jenis, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual AS Harga, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty AS Qty, 
                      dbo.m_satuan.nama AS Stn, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty AS Nominal
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bahan ON dbo.m_barang.kd_jenis_bahan = dbo.m_jenis_bahan.kd_jenis_bahan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_model ON dbo.m_barang.kd_model = dbo.m_model.kd_model INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_merk ON dbo.m_barang.kd_merk = dbo.m_merk.kd_merk INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_per_user
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[mon_t_penjualan_per_user]
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan.No_transaksi AS [No Transaksi], dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal AS Tanggal, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, 
                      [Status Transaksi] = CASE dbo.t_penjualan.status WHEN 0 THEN 'KREDIT' WHEN 1 THEN 'TUNAI' END, dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, 
                      dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.No_transaksi) AS Nominal, dbo.m_userx.nama AS [User]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_total ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_total.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank
WHERE     (dbo.t_penjualan.status = 1)

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_retur
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW mon_t_penjualan_retur
AS
SELECT     Jual_retur.no_retur AS [No. Retur], Jual_retur.tanggal AS [Tanggal Retur], Jual_retur.no_bukti AS [No. Bukti], dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS [Keterangan Divisi], dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota AS [Kepala Nota], dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, 
                      dbo.m_satuan.nama AS Satuan, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS [Jenis Bayar], dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No. Rekening], dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, 
                      Detil.harga_jual, Detil.qty, Detil.harga_jual * Detil.qty AS Total, dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Sales
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_retur Jual_retur INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail Detil ON Jual_retur.no_retur = Detil.no_retur INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON Jual_retur.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON Jual_retur.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON Jual_retur.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON Detil.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON Detil.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON Jual_retur.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON Detil.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_retur_edit
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_retur_edit
AS
SELECT     Jual_retur.no_retur AS [No. Retur], Jual_retur.tanggal AS [Tanggal Retur], Jual_retur.no_bukti AS [No. Bukti], dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS [Keterangan Divisi], dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota AS [Kepala Nota], dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, 
                      dbo.m_satuan.nama AS Satuan, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS [Jenis Bayar], dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No. Rekening], 
                      dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_retur Jual_retur INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail Detil ON Jual_retur.no_retur = Detil.no_retur INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON Jual_retur.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON Jual_retur.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON Jual_retur.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON Detil.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON Detil.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_retur_test
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_retur_test
AS
SELECT     Jual_retur.no_retur AS [No. Retur], Jual_retur.tanggal AS [Tanggal Retur], Jual_retur.no_bukti AS [No. Bukti], dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS [Keterangan Divisi], dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota AS [Kepala Nota], dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, 
                      dbo.m_satuan.nama AS Satuan, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS [Jenis Bayar], dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No. Rekening], dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, 
                      Detil.harga_jual, Detil.qty, Detil.harga_jual * Detil.qty AS Total, dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Sales
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_retur Jual_retur INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail Detil ON Jual_retur.no_retur = Detil.no_retur INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON Jual_retur.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON Jual_retur.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON Jual_retur.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON Detil.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON Detil.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON Jual_retur.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON Detil.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_status
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_status
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal AS Tanggal, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, 
                      dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_kota.nama AS Kota, 
                      dbo.GetConvertStatus(CASE dbo.t_penjualan.status WHEN 1 THEN dbo.t_penjualan.status WHEN 0 THEN CASE WHEN dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(t_penjualan.no_transaksi)
                       - dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(t_penjualan.no_transaksi, 0) <= 0 THEN 2 ELSE 0 END END) AS Status, dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(no_transaksi) as [Total Penjualan]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_customer.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota

VIEW.name: mon_t_penjualan_total_per_barang_per_customer
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_penjualan_total_per_barang_per_customer
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_kota.nama AS Kota, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], 
                      dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan) 
                      * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty) AS Kwantum, SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, 
                      jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty) AS [Total (Rp)]
FROM         dbo.m_barang LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_supplier INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier ON 
                      dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_barang RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON jual.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail ON jual.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi ON dbo.m_kota.kd_kota = dbo.m_customer.kd_kota ON 
                      dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang
GROUP BY dbo.m_kota.nama, dbo.m_barang.nama, dbo.m_customer.nama, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang

VIEW.name: mon_t_persewaan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_persewaan
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi AS [No Transaksi], dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.tanggal_pesan AS Tanggal, dbo.m_jasa.nama AS Jasa, 
                      dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.awal AS [Cek In], 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.akhir AS [Cek Out]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa = dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa_kategori ON dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = dbo.m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi
WHERE     (dbo.m_jasa_kategori.status = '1')

VIEW.name: mon_t_persewaan_data_pengunjung
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_persewaan_data_pengunjung
AS
SELECT     dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.tanggal_pesan) AS Tanggal, dbo.m_jasa_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dbo.m_jasa.nama AS Jasa, 
                      dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa = dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa_kategori ON dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = dbo.m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer
WHERE     (dbo.m_jasa_kategori.status = '1')

VIEW.name: mon_t_persewaan_data_pengunjung_guest_in
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_persewaan_data_pengunjung_guest_in
AS
SELECT     dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.tanggal_pesan) AS Tanggal, dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_kota.nama AS Kota, 
                      dbo.m_jasa_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dbo.m_jasa.nama AS Jasa, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.awal) AS Masuk, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.akhir AS Keluar, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.qty AS Qty, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.harga AS Harga, 
                      dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi) AS [Sub Total], dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi) 
                      * 0.1 AS Pajak, dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi) * 0.05 AS Servis, 
                      dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi) + dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi) 
                      * 0.1 + dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi) * 0.05 AS [Grand Total], dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS Keterangan
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa = dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa_kategori ON dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = dbo.m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_customer.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis
WHERE     (dbo.m_jasa_kategori.status = '1')

VIEW.name: mon_t_persewaan_jasa_percustomer
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_persewaan_jasa_percustomer
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal_pesan) AS Tanggal, dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, COUNT(jual.no_transaksi) 
                      AS [Jumlah Nota], SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(jual.no_transaksi)) AS [Total Bersih]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_jasa jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON jual.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail ON jual.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa = dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa_kategori ON dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = dbo.m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori
WHERE     (dbo.m_jasa_kategori.status = '1')
GROUP BY dbo.m_customer.nama, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal_pesan)

VIEW.name: mon_t_persewaan_jasa_perhari
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_persewaan_jasa_perhari
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_jasa.nama AS Jasa, dbo.m_jasa_kategori.nama AS Kategori, 
                      dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.awal) AS Masuk, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.akhir) AS Keluar, SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga, 
                      dtl.diskon, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0), jual.diskon, 0, 0, 0, jual.pajak, jual.other) * dtl.qty) AS [Total Penjualan Bersih], SUM(dtl.harga * dtl.qty) 
                      AS [Total Penjualan Kotor], SUM((dtl.harga - dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga, dtl.diskon, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0), jual.diskon, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0)) 
                      * dtl.qty) AS [Total Diskon Penjualan], dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga, dtl.diskon, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0), jual.diskon, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0) 
                      * jual.pajak * dtl.qty AS [Total Pajak Penjualan]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_jasa jual LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail dtl ON jual.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa ON dtl.kd_jasa = dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON jual.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa_kategori ON dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = dbo.m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori
WHERE     (dbo.m_jasa_kategori.status = '1')
GROUP BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.awal), dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.akhir), dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0), jual.diskon, 
                      0, 0, 0, 0, 0) * jual.pajak * dtl.qty, dbo.m_customer.nama, dbo.m_jasa.nama, dbo.m_jasa_kategori.nama
ORDER BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.awal)

VIEW.name: mon_t_persewaan_perbulan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_persewaan_perbulan
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT DATENAME(month, jual.tanggal_pesan) + ' ' + DATENAME(year, jual.tanggal_pesan) AS Bulan, 
                      SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(jual.no_transaksi)) AS [Total Bersih]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_jasa jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail ON jual.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa = dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa_kategori ON dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = dbo.m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori
WHERE     (jual.tanggal_pesan > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()) AND (dbo.m_jasa_kategori.status = '1')
GROUP BY DATEPART(month, jual.tanggal_pesan), DATENAME(month, jual.tanggal_pesan) + ' ' + DATENAME(year, jual.tanggal_pesan)
ORDER BY DATEPART(month, jual.tanggal_pesan)

VIEW.name: mon_t_persewaan_status_jasa
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_persewaan_status_jasa
AS
SELECT     dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.tanggal_pesan) AS Tanggal, dbo.m_jasa_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dbo.m_jasa.nama AS Jasa, 
                      dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.status AS Status
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa = dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa_kategori ON dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = dbo.m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer
WHERE     (dbo.m_jasa_kategori.status = '1') AND (dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.status <> '3')

VIEW.name: mon_t_piutang_aktif
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_piutang_aktif
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi AS [No Nota], dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal AS [Tanggal Nota], 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal_jatuh_tempo AS [Jatuh Tempo], dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) AS [Total Penjualan], 
                      dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.status) AS Cicilan, dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) 
                      - dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.status) AS [Sisa Piutang]
FROM         dbo.m_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan ON dbo.m_customer.kd_customer = dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer
WHERE     (dbo.t_penjualan.status = 0) AND (dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) - dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.status) > 0)

VIEW.name: mon_t_piutang_aktif_sum
VIEW.definition:
/*
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.m_customer.kd_customer, dbo.m_customer.nama, SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi)) 
                      AS [Total Penjualan], SUM(dbo.GetTotalReturPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi)) AS [Total Retur Penjualan], 
                      SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi)) - SUM(dbo.GetTotalReturPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi)) 
                      AS [Total Penjualan Bersih], SUM(dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.status)) AS [Total Cicilan Piutang], 
                      SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi)) - SUM(dbo.GetTotalReturPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi)) 
                      - SUM(dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.status)) AS [Sisa Piutang]
FROM         dbo.m_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan ON dbo.m_customer.kd_customer = dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer
GROUP BY dbo.m_customer.kd_customer, dbo.m_customer.nama

*/
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_piutang_aktif_sum
AS
SELECT     Customer, SUM([Total Penjualan]) AS [Total Penjualan], SUM(Cicilan) AS Cicilan, SUM([Sisa Piutang]) AS [Sisa Piutang]
FROM         dbo.mon_t_piutang_aktif
GROUP BY Customer

VIEW.name: mon_t_piutang_aktif_total
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_piutang_aktif_total
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT jual.kd_customer AS Kode, dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(jual.no_transaksi)) 
                      AS [Total Penjualan],
                          (SELECT     SUM(nominal)
                            FROM          t_piutang_cicilan c, t_penjualan j
                            WHERE      c.no_transaksi = j.no_transaksi AND j.kd_customer = jual.kd_Customer) AS [Total Cicilan], SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(jual.no_transaksi)) 
                      -
                          (SELECT     SUM(nominal)
                            FROM          t_piutang_cicilan c, t_penjualan j
                            WHERE      c.no_transaksi = j.no_transaksi AND j.kd_customer = jual.kd_Customer) AS [Sisa Piutang]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON jual.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer
WHERE     (jual.status = 0)
GROUP BY jual.kd_customer, dbo.m_customer.nama
HAVING      (SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(jual.no_transaksi)) -
                          (SELECT     SUM(nominal)
                            FROM          t_piutang_cicilan c, t_penjualan j
                            WHERE      c.no_transaksi = j.no_transaksi AND j.kd_customer = jual.kd_Customer) <> 0)
ORDER BY jual.kd_customer

VIEW.name: mon_t_piutang_cicilan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_piutang_cicilan
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, jual.tanggal AS [Tanggal Nota], jual.no_transaksi AS [No Nota], SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(jual.no_transaksi)) 
                      AS [Total Penjualan], dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.tanggal AS [Tanggal Cicilan], dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_cicilan AS [No Cicilan], 
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS [Jenis Pembayaran], dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.kd_kas AS [No. Bukti], dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_bukti AS [No Bukti], 
                      dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.nominal AS Cicilan, dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(jual.no_transaksi) - dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(jual.no_transaksi, jual.status) 
                      AS [Sisa Piutang], dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Penagih, dbo.m_userx.nama AS [Nama User], dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.keterangan
FROM         dbo.m_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan jual ON dbo.m_customer.kd_customer = jual.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON jual.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.t_piutang_cicilan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai ON jual.no_transaksi = dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_transaksi
WHERE     (jual.status = 0)
GROUP BY jual.no_transaksi, dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota, jual.tanggal, dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan, dbo.m_customer.nama, 
                      dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_cicilan, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.tanggal, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_bukti, 
                      dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.nominal, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.keterangan, dbo.m_userx.nama, dbo.m_pegawai.nama, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.kd_kas, 
                      dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.keterangan, dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(jual.no_transaksi) - dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(jual.no_transaksi, jual.status)

VIEW.name: mon_t_piutang_cicilan_edit
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_piutang_cicilan_edit
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_cicilan AS [No Cicilan], dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_transaksi AS [No Nota], dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota AS [Kepala Nota], 
                      jual.tanggal AS [Tanggal Nota], dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS [Keterangan Divisi], dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, 
                      dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.tanggal, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS [Jenis Pembayaran], dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_bukti AS [No Bukti], 
                      dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.nominal, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.keterangan, dbo.m_userx.nama AS [Nama User]
FROM         dbo.m_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan jual ON dbo.m_customer.kd_customer = jual.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON jual.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_piutang_cicilan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai ON jual.no_transaksi = dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_transaksi
WHERE     (dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku())

VIEW.name: mon_t_piutang_form
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_piutang_form
AS 
	SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT j.tanggal, j.tanggal_jatuh_tempo AS [Jatuh Tempo], c.nama AS Customer, j.no_transaksi AS [No.Nota], 
	                      dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(j.no_transaksi) - dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(j.no_transaksi, j.status) AS [Sisa Piutang], dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(j.no_transaksi, j.status) 
	                      AS [Total Cicilan]
	FROM         dbo.t_penjualan j INNER JOIN
	                      dbo.m_customer c ON j.kd_customer = c.kd_customer
	WHERE     (j.status = 0) AND (j.tanggal_jatuh_tempo <= GETDATE()) AND (dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(j.no_transaksi) - dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(j.no_transaksi, j.status) 
	                      > 0)
	ORDER BY j.tanggal, c.nama, j.no_transaksi

VIEW.name: mon_t_piutang_rekap_union
VIEW.definition: CREATE VIEW mon_t_piutang_rekap_union AS ( SELECT dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.tanggal_server, dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi) AS Total_penjualan, ISNULL(SUM(dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.nominal), 0) AS total_cicilan, dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi) - ISNULL(SUM(dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.nominal), 0) AS sisa_piutang, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.status, dbo.m_customer.kd_customer, dbo.m_customer.nama FROM dbo.t_penjualan_jasa LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.no_transaksi INNER JOIN dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.no_transaksi WHERE (dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.status = 0) GROUP BY dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.tanggal_server, dbo.m_customer.nama, dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi), dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.status, m_customer.kd_customer, dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.awal HAVING (dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi) - ISNULL(SUM(dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.nominal), 0) > 0) UNION ALL SELECT dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal_server, dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) AS Total_penjualan, ISNULL(SUM(dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.nominal), 0) AS total_cicilan, dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) - ISNULL(SUM(dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.nominal), 0) AS sisa_piutang, dbo.t_penjualan.status, dbo.m_customer.kd_customer, dbo.m_customer.nama FROM dbo.t_penjualan LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.t_piutang_cicilan ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_transaksi INNER JOIN dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN dbo.t_penjualan_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi WHERE (dbo.t_penjualan.status = 0) GROUP BY dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal_server, dbo.m_customer.nama, dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi), dbo.t_penjualan.status, dbo.m_customer.kd_customer, dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal_server HAVING (dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) - ISNULL(SUM(dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.nominal), 0) > 0) )

VIEW.name: mon_t_piutang_rekap_union_1
VIEW.definition: CREATE VIEW mon_t_piutang_rekap_union_1 AS ( SELECT DISTINCT dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi AS [No Transaksi], dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi) AS Total, dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.no_cicilan AS [No Cicilan], dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.nominal AS Cicilan, 'ROOM' AS Kategori, dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer FROM dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan INNER JOIN dbo.t_penjualan_jasa ON dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi INNER JOIN dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN dbo.m_jasa ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa = dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa INNER JOIN dbo.m_jasa_kategori ON dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = dbo.m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori WHERE (dbo.m_jasa_kategori.status = 1) UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi, dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi) AS Total, dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.no_cicilan, dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.nominal, 'SERVICES' AS Kategori, dbo.m_customer.nama FROM dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan INNER JOIN dbo.t_penjualan_jasa ON dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi INNER JOIN dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN dbo.m_jasa ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa = dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa INNER JOIN dbo.m_jasa_kategori ON dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = dbo.m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori WHERE (dbo.m_jasa_kategori.status = 2) UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) AS Total, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_cicilan, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.nominal, 'RESTAURANT' AS Kategori, dbo.m_customer.nama FROM dbo.t_piutang_cicilan INNER JOIN dbo.t_penjualan ON dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi INNER JOIN dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN dbo.t_penjualan_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori WHERE (dbo.m_kategori.status LIKE '%restaurant%') )

VIEW.name: mon_t_tagihan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_tagihan
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_tagihan AS [No Tagihan], dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_cicilan AS [No Cicilan], 
                      dbo.t_tagihan.keluar, dbo.t_tagihan.kembali, dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_transaksi AS [No Transaksi], dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal AS [Tanggal Transaksi], 
                      dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_customer.parent, dbo.m_kota.nama AS Kota, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS [Jenis Bayar], 
                      dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.nominal, dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) 
                      - dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.status) AS [Sisa Piutang], dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_bukti AS [No Bukti]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_piutang_cicilan ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_customer.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.t_tagihan_detail INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_tagihan ON dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_tagihan = dbo.t_tagihan.no_tagihan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_tagihan.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai ON 
                      dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_transaksi AND dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.tanggal = dbo.t_tagihan_detail.kembali
WHERE     (dbo.t_tagihan_detail.status = 2)

VIEW.name: mon_t_tagihan_edit
VIEW.definition: CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_tagihan_edit AS SELECT dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_tagihan AS [No Tagihan], dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_cicilan AS [No Cicilan], dbo.t_tagihan.kembali AS [Tanggal Cicilan], dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_transaksi AS [No Transaksi], dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal AS [Tanggal Transaksi], dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_customer.parent, dbo.m_kota.nama AS Kota, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS [Jenis Bayar], dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.nominal, dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) - dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.status) AS [Sisa Piutang], dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_bukti AS [No Bukti] FROM dbo.t_tagihan_detail INNER JOIN dbo.t_tagihan ON dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_tagihan = dbo.t_tagihan.no_tagihan INNER JOIN dbo.t_piutang_cicilan ON dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_transaksi = dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_transaksi AND dbo.t_tagihan_detail.kembali = dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.tanggal INNER JOIN dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_tagihan.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN dbo.t_penjualan ON dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi INNER JOIN dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_customer.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota INNER JOIN dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank WHERE (dbo.t_tagihan_detail.status = 2)

VIEW.name: mon_t_tagihan_kembali
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_tagihan_kembali
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.t_tagihan.no_tagihan AS [No. Tagihan], dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, dbo.t_tagihan.keluar AS Keluar, 
                      dbo.t_tagihan_detail.kembali AS Kembali, dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal AS [Tanggal Transaksi], 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal_jatuh_tempo AS [Jatuh Tempo], SUM(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty) AS [Jumlah Penjualan], 
                      dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_kota.nama AS Kota, 
                      Status = CASE dbo.t_tagihan_detail.status WHEN 0 THEN 'SEDANG DITAGIH' WHEN 1 THEN 'KEMBALI' ELSE 'TERBAYAR' END, 
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS [Jenis Bayar], dbo.m_bank.nama AS Kas, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.nominal AS Nominal, 
                      dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_bukti AS [No. Bukti], dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) 
                      - dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.status) AS [Sisa Piutang], 
                      [Status Cicilan] = CASE WHEN ((dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) - dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.status)) > 0) THEN 'CICIL' ELSE 'LUNAS' END
FROM         dbo.t_tagihan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_tagihan_detail ON dbo.t_tagihan.no_tagihan = dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_tagihan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_tagihan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan ON dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_tagihan.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_customer.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_piutang_cicilan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.m_bank.kd_bank = dbo.m_kas.kd_bank ON dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas ON 
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis = dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.kd_jenis ON dbo.t_tagihan_detail.kembali = dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.tanggal AND 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_transaksi
GROUP BY dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_transaksi, dbo.t_tagihan_detail.status, dbo.t_tagihan.no_tagihan, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal_jatuh_tempo, 
                      dbo.m_pegawai.nama, dbo.m_customer.nama, dbo.m_kota.nama, dbo.t_tagihan_detail.kembali, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama, dbo.m_bank.nama, 
                      dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_bukti, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.nominal, dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) 
                      - dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.status), dbo.t_tagihan.keluar, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal
ORDER BY dbo.t_tagihan_detail.status DESC

VIEW.name: mon_t_tagihan_pergi
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.mon_t_tagihan_pergi
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.t_tagihan.no_tagihan AS [No. Tagihan], dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, dbo.t_tagihan.keluar AS Keluar, 
                      dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal_jatuh_tempo) AS [Tanggal Transaksi], 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal_jatuh_tempo AS [Jatuh Tempo], SUM(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty) AS [Jumlah Penjualan], 
                      dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_kota.nama AS Kota, dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) 
                      - dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.status) AS sisa_piutang
FROM         dbo.m_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_tagihan ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = dbo.t_tagihan.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_tagihan_detail ON dbo.t_tagihan.no_tagihan = dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_tagihan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan ON dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_customer.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_tagihan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi
WHERE     (dbo.t_tagihan_detail.status = 0)
GROUP BY dbo.t_tagihan.no_tagihan, dbo.m_pegawai.nama, dbo.t_tagihan.keluar, dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal_jatuh_tempo, 
                      dbo.m_customer.nama, dbo.m_kota.nama, dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) - dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi,
                       dbo.t_penjualan.status)
ORDER BY dbo.m_pegawai.nama

VIEW.name: sams_m_barang
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.sams_m_barang
AS
SELECT     kd_barang, nama AS barang, 'PCS' AS satuan
FROM         dbo.m_barang
WHERE     (kd_barang IN
                          (SELECT     kd_barang
                            FROM          m_barang_supplier
                            WHERE      kd_supplier = 'SAA017'))

VIEW.name: sams_m_customer
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.sams_m_customer
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_customer.kd_customer, dbo.m_customer.nama AS customer, dbo.m_customer.alamat AS alamat, dbo.m_kota.nama AS kota, 
                      dbo.m_customer.telepon
FROM         dbo.m_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_customer.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota

VIEW.name: sams_m_pegawai
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.sams_m_pegawai
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS pegawai, dbo.m_jabatan.nama AS jabatan, dbo.m_pegawai.hp
FROM         dbo.m_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jabatan ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_jabatan = dbo.m_jabatan.kd_jabatan

VIEW.name: sams_t_penjualan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.sams_t_penjualan
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai AS kd_pegawai, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi
WHERE     (dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang IN
                          (SELECT     kd_barang
                            FROM          m_barang_supplier
                            WHERE      kd_supplier = 'SAA017'))

VIEW.name: sams_t_penjualan_detail
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.sams_t_penjualan_detail
AS
SELECT     no_transaksi, kd_barang, dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(kd_barang, kd_satuan) * qty AS qty, 'PCS' AS satuan
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_detail
WHERE     (kd_barang IN
                          (SELECT     kd_barang
                            FROM          m_barang_supplier
                            WHERE      kd_supplier = 'SAA017'))

VIEW.name: sams_t_penjualan_per_barang
VIEW.definition:
CREATE  VIEW dbo.sams_t_penjualan_per_barang
AS
SELECT     dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.sams_t_penjualan.tanggal) AS Tanggal, dbo.sams_t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], 
                      dbo.sams_m_barang.barang, SUM(dbo.sams_t_penjualan_detail.qty) AS Jumlah, dbo.sams_t_penjualan_detail.satuan AS Stn
FROM         dbo.sams_t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sams_t_penjualan_detail ON dbo.sams_t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.sams_t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.sams_m_barang ON dbo.sams_t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang = dbo.sams_m_barang.kd_barang
GROUP BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.sams_t_penjualan.tanggal), dbo.sams_t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, dbo.sams_t_penjualan_detail.satuan, 
                      dbo.sams_m_barang.barang

VIEW.name: sams_t_penjualan_retur
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.sams_t_penjualan_retur
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan_retur.no_retur, dbo.t_penjualan_retur.tanggal, dbo.t_penjualan_retur.kd_customer, 'PAA001' AS kd_pegawai
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_retur INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan_retur.no_retur = dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail.no_retur
WHERE     (dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail.kd_barang IN
                          (SELECT     kd_barang
                            FROM          m_barang_supplier
                            WHERE      kd_supplier = 'SAA017'))

VIEW.name: sams_t_penjualan_retur_detail
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.sams_t_penjualan_retur_detail
AS
SELECT     no_retur, kd_barang, dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(kd_barang, kd_satuan) * qty AS qty, 'PCS' AS satuan
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail
WHERE     (kd_barang IN
                          (SELECT     kd_barang
                            FROM          m_barang_supplier
                            WHERE      kd_supplier = 'SAA017'))

VIEW.name: t_hutang_pegawai_edit
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_edit
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.tanggal AS Tanggal, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Divisi, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS Pembayaran, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No. Rekening], dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.no_bukti AS [No. Bukti], dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.nominal AS Nominal, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.keterangan AS Keterangan, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server], dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas
FROM         dbo.t_hutang_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi

VIEW.name: v_g_barang_divisi
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[v_g_barang_divisi]  AS  
SELECT bh.kd_divisi, bh.kd_barang, br.nama AS Barang,  SUM(bs2.jumlah * bh.Debet) - SUM(bs2.jumlah * bh.Kredit) AS stok  
FROM     v_g_barang_histori AS bh INNER JOIN m_barang_satuan AS bs ON bh.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang INNER JOIN  m_barang AS br ON bs.kd_barang = br.kd_barang 
 INNER JOIN m_barang_satuan AS bs2 ON bh.kd_barang = bs2.kd_barang AND bh.kd_satuan = bs2.kd_satuan  
Where (bs.jumlah = 1) And (br.Status <> 0) And (bs.Status <> 0)     GROUP BY bh.kd_divisi, bh.kd_barang, br.nama
UNION
SELECT bd.kd_divisi, br.kd_barang, br.nama AS Barang,  0 AS stok  
FROM     m_barang_satuan AS bs INNER JOIN  m_barang AS br ON bs.kd_barang = br.kd_barang 
 INNER JOIN m_barang_divisi bd ON bd.kd_barang = br.kd_barang 
 INNER JOIN m_kategori kt ON br.kd_kategori = kt.kd_kategori 
Where (bs.jumlah = 1) And (br.Status <>0) And (bs.Status <> 0)     AND kt.status = 2
GROUP BY bd.kd_divisi, br.kd_barang, br.nama

VIEW.name: v_g_barang_histori
VIEW.definition:
CREATE              VIEW v_g_barang_histori
AS
--purpose	: query ini dugunakan untuk mengumpulan seluruth transaksi dari barang
--		dimana kegiatan akan disimpan dan akan digunakan untuk mencari stok akhir dari barang per divisi
--created by	: roy [06 nop 2007]

--stok awal dari barang divisi
SELECT bd.kd_barang, bd.kd_divisi AS kd_divisi, bd.stok_awal AS Debet, 0 AS Kredit, bs.kd_satuan
FROM m_barang_divisi bd, m_barang_satuan bs, m_barang b, m_kategori k
WHERE bd.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND bs.jumlah = 1 
	AND bd.kd_barang = b.kd_barang AND b.kd_kategori = k.kd_kategori AND k.status <> 2
UNION ALL

--pengirim mutasi stok 
SELECT d.kd_barang, t.kd_divisi_asal, 0 AS Debet, SUM(d.qty) AS Kredit, d.kd_satuan
FROM t_mutasi_stok_detail d, t_mutasi_stok t
WHERE d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
GROUP BY d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan, t.kd_divisi_asal

UNION ALL 

--penerima mutasi stok
SELECT d.kd_barang, t.kd_divisi_tujuan, SUM(d.qty) AS DEBET, 0 AS KREDIT, d.kd_satuan
FROM t_mutasi_stok_detail d, t_mutasi_stok t
WHERE d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
GROUP BY d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan, t.kd_divisi_tujuan

UNION ALL

--opname stok yang menambahkan stok
SELECT kd_barang, kd_divisi, SUM(QTY) AS DEBET, 0 AS KREDIT, kd_satuan
FROM t_opname_stok
WHERE status = 2 AND tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
GROUP BY kd_barang, kd_satuan, kd_divisi

UNION ALL

--opname stok yang mengurangkan stok dibedakan dari status
SELECT kd_barang, kd_divisi, 0 AS DEBET, SUM(qty) AS KREDIT, kd_satuan
FROM t_opname_stok
WHERE status <> 2 AND tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
GROUP BY kd_barang, kd_satuan, kd_divisi

UNION ALL

--pembelian barang
SELECT d.kd_barang, t.kd_divisi, SUM(d.qty) AS DEBET, 0 AS KREDIT, d.kd_satuan
FROM t_pembelian_detail d, t_pembelian t
WHERE d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
GROUP BY d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan, t.kd_divisi

UNION ALL

--retur pembelian, mengurangi stok
SELECT d.kd_barang, t.kd_divisi, 0 AS DEBET, SUM(d.qty) AS KREDIT, d.kd_satuan
FROM t_pembelian_retur_detail d, t_pembelian_retur t
WHERE d.no_retur = t.no_retur AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
GROUP BY d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan, t.kd_divisi

UNION ALL

--penjualan, mengurangi stok
SELECT d.kd_barang, t.kd_divisi, 0 AS DEBET, SUM(d.qty) AS KREDIT, d.kd_satuan
FROM t_penjualan_detail d, t_penjualan t, m_barang b, m_kategori k
WHERE d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
	AND d.kd_barang = b.kd_barang AND b.kd_kategori = k.kd_kategori AND k.status <> 2
GROUP BY d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan, t.kd_divisi

UNION ALL

--retur penjualan barang, menambah stok 
SELECT d.kd_barang, t.kd_divisi, SUM(d.qty) AS DEBET, 0 AS KREDIT, d.kd_satuan
FROM t_penjualan_retur_detail d, t_penjualan_retur t
WHERE d.no_retur = t.no_retur AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
GROUP BY d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan, t.kd_divisi

/*
UNION ALL

--retur penjualan barang, menambah stok 
SELECT kd_barang, kd_divisi, SUM(qty) AS DEBET, 0 AS KREDIT, kd_satuan
FROM t_penjualan_retur_tunai 
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
GROUP BY kd_barang, kd_satuan, kd_divisi

UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.kd_barang, dbo.t_produksi.kd_divisi, SUM(dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.jumlah - dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.selamat) AS Debet,
	0 AS Kredit, dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.kd_satuan
FROM         dbo.t_produksi INNER JOIN
	dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang ON dbo.t_produksi.no_transaksi = dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.no_transaksi
WHERE     (dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.jenis = 0) AND dbo.t_produksi.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
GROUP BY dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.kd_barang, dbo.t_produksi.kd_divisi, dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.kd_satuan

UNION ALL

SELECT     dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.kd_barang, dbo.t_produksi.kd_divisi, 0 AS Debet, 
	SUM(dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.jumlah) AS Kredit, dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.kd_satuan
FROM         dbo.t_produksi INNER JOIN
	dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang ON dbo.t_produksi.no_transaksi = dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.no_transaksi
WHERE     (dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.jenis <> 0) AND dbo.t_produksi.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
GROUP BY dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.kd_barang, dbo.t_produksi.kd_divisi, dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.kd_satuan

UNION ALL

SELECT     dbo.m_jenis_reject_detail.kd_barang, dbo.t_produksi.kd_divisi, 0 AS Debet, 
	SUM(dbo.m_jenis_reject_detail.perlakuan_qty * dbo.t_produksi_reject.jumlah) AS Kredit, dbo.m_jenis_reject_detail.kd_satuan
FROM         dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang INNER JOIN
	dbo.t_produksi ON dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.no_transaksi = dbo.t_produksi.no_transaksi RIGHT OUTER JOIN
	dbo.t_produksi_reject INNER JOIN
	dbo.m_jenis_reject ON dbo.t_produksi_reject.kd_reject = dbo.m_jenis_reject.kd_reject INNER JOIN
	dbo.m_jenis_reject_detail ON dbo.m_jenis_reject.kd_reject = dbo.m_jenis_reject_detail.kd_reject ON 
	dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.kd_satuan = dbo.m_jenis_reject_detail.kd_satuan AND 
	dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_jenis_reject_detail.kd_barang AND 
	dbo.t_produksi.no_transaksi = dbo.t_produksi_reject.no_transaksi
WHERE     (dbo.t_produksi.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()) AND (dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.jenis <> 0)
GROUP BY dbo.m_jenis_reject_detail.kd_barang, dbo.t_produksi.kd_divisi, dbo.m_jenis_reject_detail.kd_satuan

UNION ALL

SELECT     kd_barang, kd_divisi, 0 AS Debet, SUM(qty) AS Kredit, kd_satuan
FROM         dbo.t_produksi_bahan_penolong
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
GROUP BY kd_barang, kd_satuan, kd_divisi

*/

VIEW.name: v_g_barang_histori_detail
VIEW.definition:
CREATE                  VIEW [v_g_barang_histori_detail]
AS
--purpose	: query ini dugunakan untuk mengumpulan seluruh transaksi dari barang
--		dimana kegiatan akan disimpan dan akan digunakan untuk mencari stok akhir dari barang per divisi
--created by	: roy [06 nop 2007]

--keterangan : field [jenis]
--	0 	=> 	stok awal						[v] harga = sesuai harga
--	1 	=> 		mutasi keluar				[x] harga	= ??
--	2	=> 	mutasi masuk					[x] harga = ??
--	3 	=> 	opname masuk					[v] harga = 0
--	4	=> 		opname keluar				[x] harga = ??
--	5	=> 	pembelian						[v] harga = sesuai harga	
--	6	=> 		retur pembelian			[v] harga = sesuai harga
--	7	=> 		penjualan					[x] harga = ??
--	8	=>	retur penjualan dengan nota		[x] harga = ??
--	9	=>	retur penjualan tanpa nota		[v] harga = ??
--	10	=> 	hasil produksi					[x] harga = ??
--	11	=> 		bahan baku produksi			[x] harga = ??
--	12	=>		reject produksi			[x] harga = ??
--	13	=>		pemakaian bahan baku		[x] harga = ??

--stok awal dari barang divisi
SELECT bd.kd_divisi AS kd_divisi, dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AS tanggal, '0' AS no_transaksi, 'Stok Awal' AS Transaksi, bd.kd_barang, 
	bd.stok_awal AS Debet, 0 AS Kredit, bs.kd_satuan, bd.harga_beli_awal as harga, '01/01/2007' as tanggal_server, 0 as jenis
FROM m_barang_divisi bd, m_barang_satuan bs, m_barang b, m_kategori k
WHERE  bd.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND bs.jumlah = 1
	AND bd.kd_barang = b.kd_barang AND b.kd_kategori = k.kd_kategori AND k.status <> 2

UNION ALL
--pengirim mutasi stok 
SELECT t.kd_divisi_asal AS [Kd Divisi], t.tanggal, d.no_transaksi AS Nomor, 'Mutasi Keluar' AS Transaksi , d.kd_barang,  0 AS Debet, 
	d.qty AS Kredit, d.kd_satuan, 0 AS harga, t.tanggal_server, 1 as jenis
FROM t_mutasi_stok_detail d, t_mutasi_stok t
WHERE d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
--GROUP BY d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan, t.kd_divisi_asal

UNION ALL 

--penerima mutasi stok
SELECT t.kd_divisi_tujuan AS [Kd Divisi] ,t.tanggal, d.no_transaksi AS Nomor, 'Mutasi Masuk' AS Transaksi , d.kd_barang,  d.qty AS DEBET, 
	0 AS KREDIT, d.kd_satuan, 0 AS harga, t.tanggal_server, 2 as jenis
FROM t_mutasi_stok_detail d, t_mutasi_stok t
WHERE d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
--GROUP BY d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan, t.kd_divisi_tujuan

UNION ALL

--opname stok yang menambahkan stok
SELECT kd_divisi AS [Kd Divisi], tanggal, no_transaksi AS Nomor, 'Opname Masuk' AS Transaksi , kd_barang,  QTY AS DEBET, 0 AS KREDIT, 
	kd_satuan, 0 AS harga, tanggal_server, 3 as jenis
FROM t_opname_stok
WHERE status = 2 AND tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
--GROUP BY kd_barang, kd_satuan, kd_divisi

UNION ALL

--opname stok yang mengurangkan stok dibedakan dari status
SELECT kd_divisi AS [Kd Divisi],tanggal, no_transaksi AS Nomor, 'Opname Keluar' AS Transaksi , kd_barang,  0 AS DEBET, qty AS KREDIT, 
	kd_satuan, 0 AS harga, tanggal_server, 4 as jenis
FROM t_opname_stok
WHERE status <> 2 AND tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
--GROUP BY kd_barang, kd_satuan, kd_divisi

UNION ALL

--pembelian barang
SELECT t.kd_divisi AS [Kd Divisi],t.tanggal, d.no_transaksi AS Nomor, 'Pembelian' AS Transaksi , d.kd_barang,  d.qty AS DEBET, 0 AS KREDIT, 
	d.kd_satuan, d.harga_beli AS harga, t.tanggal_server, 5 as jenis
FROM t_pembelian_detail d, t_pembelian t
WHERE d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND t.status IN (0, 1)
--GROUP BY d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan, t.kd_divisi

UNION ALL

--retur pembelian, mengurangi stok
SELECT t.kd_divisi AS [Kd Divisi],t.tanggal, d.no_retur AS Nomor, 'Retur Pembelian' AS Transaksi , d.kd_barang,  0 AS DEBET, d.qty AS KREDIT, 
	d.kd_satuan, d.harga AS harga, t.tanggal_server, 6 as jenis
FROM t_pembelian_retur_detail d, t_pembelian_retur t
WHERE d.no_retur = t.no_retur AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
--GROUP BY d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan, t.kd_divisi

UNION ALL

--penjualan, mengurangi stok
SELECT t.kd_divisi AS [Kd Divisi],t.tanggal, d.no_transaksi AS Nomor, 'Penjualan' AS Transaksi , d.kd_barang,  0 AS DEBET, d.qty AS KREDIT, d.kd_satuan, 
	d.harga_jual AS harga, t.tanggal_server, 7 as jenis
FROM t_penjualan_detail d, t_penjualan t, m_barang b, m_kategori k
WHERE d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() 
	AND d.kd_barang = b.kd_barang AND b.kd_kategori = k.kd_kategori AND k.status <> 2
--GROUP BY d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan, t.kd_divisi

UNION ALL

--retur penjualan barang, menambah stok 
SELECT t.kd_divisi AS [Kd Divisi],t.tanggal, d.no_retur AS Nomor, 'Retur Penjualan Dengan Nota' AS Transaksi , d.kd_barang,  d.qty AS DEBET, 0 AS KREDIT, 
	d.kd_satuan, d.harga_jual AS harga, t.tanggal_server, 8 as jenis
FROM t_penjualan_retur_detail d, t_penjualan_retur t
WHERE d.no_retur = t.no_retur AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
--GROUP BY d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan, t.kd_divisi

/*
UNION ALL

--retur penjualan barang, menambah stok 
SELECT kd_divisi AS [Kd Divisi], tanggal, no_retur AS Nomor, 'Retur Penjualan Tanpa Nota'  AS Transaksi , kd_barang,  qty AS DEBET, 0 AS KREDIT, kd_satuan, 
	harga AS harga, tanggal_server, 9 as jenis
FROM t_penjualan_retur_tunai 
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
--GROUP BY kd_barang, kd_satuan, kd_divisi
UNION ALL

SELECT     dbo.t_produksi.kd_divisi, dbo.t_produksi.tanggal, dbo.t_produksi.no_transaksi, 'Output Produksi' AS Transaksi, 
	dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.kd_barang, dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.jumlah AS Debet, 0 AS Kredit, dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.kd_satuan, 
	0 AS Harga, dbo.t_produksi.tanggal_server, 10 as jenis
FROM         dbo.t_produksi INNER JOIN
	dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang ON dbo.t_produksi.no_transaksi = dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.no_transaksi
WHERE     (dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.jenis = 0) AND dbo.t_produksi.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()

UNION ALL

SELECT     dbo.t_produksi.kd_divisi, dbo.t_produksi.tanggal, dbo.t_produksi.no_transaksi, 'Bahan Baku Produksi' AS Transaksi, 
	dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.kd_barang, 0 AS Debet, dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.jumlah - dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.selamat  AS Kredit, dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.kd_satuan, 
	0 AS Harga, dbo.t_produksi.tanggal_server, 11 as jenis
FROM         dbo.t_produksi INNER JOIN
	dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang ON dbo.t_produksi.no_transaksi = dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.no_transaksi
WHERE     (dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.jenis <> 0) AND dbo.t_produksi.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()

UNION ALL

SELECT     dbo.t_produksi.kd_divisi, dbo.t_produksi.tanggal, dbo.t_produksi_reject.no_transaksi, 'Reject Bahan Baku Produksi' AS Transaksi, 
       dbo.m_jenis_reject_detail.kd_barang, 0 AS Debet, dbo.m_jenis_reject_detail.perlakuan_qty * dbo.t_produksi_reject.jumlah AS Kredit, 
       dbo.m_jenis_reject_detail.kd_satuan, 0 AS Harga, dbo.t_produksi.tanggal_server, 12 as jenis
FROM         dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang INNER JOIN
       dbo.t_produksi ON dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.no_transaksi = dbo.t_produksi.no_transaksi RIGHT OUTER JOIN
       dbo.t_produksi_reject INNER JOIN
       dbo.m_jenis_reject ON dbo.t_produksi_reject.kd_reject = dbo.m_jenis_reject.kd_reject INNER JOIN
       dbo.m_jenis_reject_detail ON dbo.m_jenis_reject.kd_reject = dbo.m_jenis_reject_detail.kd_reject ON 
       dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.kd_satuan = dbo.m_jenis_reject_detail.kd_satuan AND 
       dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_jenis_reject_detail.kd_barang AND 
       dbo.t_produksi.no_transaksi = dbo.t_produksi_reject.no_transaksi
WHERE     (dbo.t_produksi.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()) AND (dbo.t_produksi_detail_barang.jenis <> 0)

UNION ALL

SELECT     kd_divisi, tanggal, no_transaksi, 'Penggunaan Bahan Penolong' AS Transaksi, kd_barang, 0 AS Debet, qty AS Kredit, kd_satuan, 0 AS Harga, 
	tanggal_server, 13 as jenis
FROM         dbo.t_produksi_bahan_penolong
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()


--UNION ALL
--select * from dbo.GetCounterProduksi()
*/

VIEW.name: v_g_barang_stok_akhir
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_g_barang_stok_akhir
AS
SELECT     bh.kd_divisi, bh.kd_barang, bd.stok_awal, SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(bh.kd_barang, bh.kd_satuan) * bh.Debet) 
                      - SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(bh.kd_barang, bh.kd_satuan) * bh.Kredit) AS stok_akhir
FROM         dbo.v_g_barang_histori bh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_divisi bd ON bh.kd_divisi = bd.kd_divisi AND bh.kd_barang = bd.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON bd.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori
GROUP BY bh.kd_divisi, bh.kd_barang, bd.stok_awal, dbo.m_kategori.status
HAVING      (dbo.m_kategori.status <> 2)

VIEW.name: v_g_barang_stok_awal_average
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_g_barang_stok_awal_average
AS
SELECT     kd_barang, SUM(stok_awal) AS jumlah_stok_awal, SUM(harga_beli_awal * stok_awal) / CASE SUM(stok_awal) WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE SUM(stok_awal) 
                      END AS harga_average
FROM         dbo.m_barang_divisi
GROUP BY kd_barang

VIEW.name: v_g_generate_inserts
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_g_generate_inserts
AS
SELECT     'EXEC sp_generate_inserts ' + '[' + name + ']' + ',@owner = ' + '[' + RTRIM(USER_NAME(uid)) 
                      + '],' + '@ommit_images = 1, @disable_constraints = 1' AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.sysobjects
WHERE     (type = 'U') AND (OBJECTPROPERTY(id, 'ismsshipped') = 0)

VIEW.name: v_g_kas_histori
VIEW.definition:
CREATE      VIEW v_g_kas_histori
AS
--SALDO AWAL KAS
SELECT kd_kas, 'SALDO AWAL' as transaksi, saldo_awal as debet, 0 AS kredit
FROM m_kas

UNION ALL

--BIAYA OPERASIONAL
SELECT kd_kas, 'BIAYA OPERASIONAL' as transaksi, 0 AS debet, SUM(nominal) as kredit
FROM t_biaya_operasional
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
(
	SELECT no_surat_berharga
	FROM t_surat_berharga
)
GROUP BY kd_kas
UNION ALL

--CICILAN HUTANG ASET
SELECT kd_kas, 'CICILAN HUTANG ASET' as transaksi, 0 AS debet, SUM(nominal) AS kredit
FROM t_hutang_aset_cicilan
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
(
	SELECT no_surat_berharga
	FROM t_surat_berharga
)
GROUP BY kd_kas
UNION ALL

--CICILAN HUTANG BIAYA ANGKUT
SELECT kd_kas, 'CICILAN HUTANG BIAYA ANGKUT' as transaksi, 0 AS debet, SUM(nominal) AS kredit
FROM t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
(
	SELECT no_surat_berharga
	FROM t_surat_berharga
)
GROUP BY kd_kas

UNION ALL

--CICILAN HUTANG PEMBELIAN
SELECT kd_kas, 'CICILAN HUTANG PEMBELIAN' as transaksi,  0 AS debet, SUM(nominal) AS kredit
FROM t_hutang_cicilan
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
(
	SELECT no_surat_berharga
	FROM t_surat_berharga
)
GROUP BY kd_kas

UNION ALL

--CICILAN HUTANG PEGAWAI  masuk ke debet (cp)
SELECT kd_kas, 'CICILAN HUTANG PEGAWAI' as transaksi, SUM(nominal) AS debet, 0 AS kredit
FROM t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
(
	SELECT no_surat_berharga
	FROM t_surat_berharga
)
GROUP BY kd_kas

UNION ALL

--HUTANG PEGAWAI
SELECT kd_kas, 'HUTANG PEGAWAI' as transaksi, 0 AS DEBET, SUM(nominal) AS kredit
FROM t_hutang_pegawai
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
(
	SELECT no_surat_berharga
	FROM t_surat_berharga
)

GROUP BY kd_kas

UNION ALL

--MUTASI KAS (DARI KAS PENGIRIM)
SELECT kd_kas_sumber, 'MUTASI KAS (PENGIRIM)' as transaksi, 0 AS debet, SUM(nominal) AS kredit
FROM t_mutasi_kas
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
GROUP BY kd_kas_sumber

UNION ALL

--MUTASI KAS (KE KAS TUJUAN)
SELECT kd_kas_tujuan, 'MUTASI KAS (PENERIMA)' as transaksi, SUM(nominal) AS debet, 0 AS kredit
FROM t_mutasi_kas
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
GROUP BY kd_kas_tujuan

UNION ALL

--PEMBELIAN BARANG (TUNAI)
SELECT b.kd_kas, 'PEMBELIAN BARANG' as transaksi, 0 AS debet, 
	SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga_beli, d.diskon1, d.diskon2, d.diskon3, d.diskon4, 0, 0), b.diskon1, b.diskon2, b.diskon3, b.diskon4, b.pajak, b.ppnbm) * d.qty) AS kredit
FROM t_pembelian b, t_pembelian_detail d
WHERE d.no_transaksi = b.no_transaksi AND b.status = 1 AND b.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
GROUP BY b.kd_kas

UNION ALL

--BIAYA ANGKUT PEMBELIAN (TUNAI)
SELECT ba.kd_kas, 'BIAYA ANGKUT PEMBELIAN' as transaksi, 0 AS debet, SUM(ba.nominal) AS kredit
FROM t_pembelian_biaya_angkut ba, t_pembelian b
WHERE ba.no_transaksi = b.no_transaksi AND ba.status = 1 AND b.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
GROUP BY ba.kd_kas

UNION ALL

--RETUR PEMBELIAN
SELECT r.kd_kas, 'RETUR PEMBELIAN' as transaksi, 	
	SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(rd.harga, rd.diskon1, rd.diskon2, rd.diskon3, rd.diskon4, 0, 0), r.diskon1, r.diskon2, r.diskon3, r.diskon4, r.pajak, r.ppnbm) * rd.qty) AS debet, 0 AS kredit
FROM t_pembelian_retur r, t_pembelian_retur_detail rd
WHERE rd.no_retur = r.no_retur AND r.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND 
	r.no_bukti NOT IN 
	(
		SELECT no_surat_berharga
		FROM t_surat_berharga
	)
GROUP BY r.kd_kas

UNION ALL

--PENDAPATAN LAIN-LAIN
SELECT kd_kas, 'PENDAPATAN LAIN-LAIN' as transaksi, SUM(nominal) AS debet, 0 AS kredit
FROM t_pendapatan
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
(
	SELECT no_surat_berharga
	FROM t_surat_berharga
)
GROUP BY kd_kas
UNION ALL

--PENJUALAN BARANG
SELECT t.kd_kas, 'PENJUALAN BARANG' as transaksi, 
	SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga_jual, d.diskon1, d.diskon2, d.diskon3, d.diskon4, 0, 0), t.diskon1, t.diskon2, t.diskon3, t.diskon4, t.pajak, 0) * d.qty) AS debet, 0 AS kredit
FROM t_penjualan t, t_penjualan_detail d
WHERE d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND t.status = 1 AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() 
GROUP BY t.kd_kas

UNION ALL

--RETUR PENJUALAN PER NOTA
SELECT r.kd_kas, 'RETUR PENJUALAN' as transaksi, 0 AS debet, 
	SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(rd.harga_jual, rd.diskon1, rd.diskon2, rd.diskon3, rd.diskon4, 0, 0), r.diskon1, r.diskon2, r.diskon3, r.diskon4, r.pajak, 0) * rd.qty) AS kredit
FROM t_penjualan_retur r, t_penjualan_retur_detail rd
WHERE rd.no_retur = r.no_retur AND r.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND 
	r.no_bukti NOT IN 
	(
		SELECT no_surat_berharga
		FROM t_surat_berharga
	)
GROUP BY r.kd_kas

UNION ALL

--CICILAN PIUTANG PENJUALAN BARANG
SELECT kd_kas, 'CICILAN PIUTANG' as transaksi, SUM(nominal) AS debet, 0 AS kredit
FROM t_piutang_cicilan
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
(
	SELECT no_surat_berharga
	FROM t_surat_berharga
)
GROUP BY kd_kas

UNION ALL

--PENDAPATAN KARTU KREDIT DARI PIUTANG BARANG
SELECT kd_kas, 'CICILAN PIUTANG' as transaksi, SUM(nominal *  other) AS debet, 0 AS kredit
FROM t_piutang_cicilan
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
(
	SELECT no_surat_berharga
	FROM t_surat_berharga
)
GROUP BY kd_kas

UNION ALL

--PENCAIRAN SURAT BERHARGA (KELUAR DARI PERUSAHAAN KE PIHAK LAIN)
SELECT kd_kas_setor, 'SURAT BERHARGA (KELUAR)' as transaksi, 0 AS debet, SUM(nominal) AS kredit
FROM t_surat_berharga
WHERE (tanggal_cair > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()) AND (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_cair) >= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_setor)) 
	AND status_blong = 0 AND
	status_asal = 0
GROUP BY kd_kas_setor

UNION ALL

--PENCAIRAN SURAT BERHARGA (MASUK KE PERUSAHAAN DARI PIHAK LAIN)
SELECT kd_kas_setor, 'SURAT BERHARGA (MASUK)' as transaksi, SUM(nominal) AS debet, 0 AS kredit
FROM t_surat_berharga
WHERE (tanggal_cair > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()) AND (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_cair) >= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_setor)) 
	AND status_blong = 0 AND
	status_asal = 1
GROUP BY kd_kas_setor

UNION ALL

--PENAMBAHAN MODAL
SELECT kd_kas, 'PENAMBAHAN MODAL' AS Transaksi, SUM(nominal) as debet, 0 as kredit
FROM t_penambahan_kas
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
GROUP BY kd_kas

UNION ALL

--PRIVE
SELECT kd_kas, 'PRIVE' AS Transaksi,  0 as debet, SUM(nominal) as kredit
FROM t_prive
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
GROUP BY kd_kas

UNION ALL

--PENJUALAN ASET
SELECT kd_kas, 'PENJUALAN ASET', SUM(harga_beli - dbo.GetPenyusutanAset(kd_aset, tanggal_beli, tanggal_jual)) as debet, 0 as kredit
FROM m_aset
WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_jual) >= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_beli) AND tanggal_jual > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND tanggal_jual > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()  AND
	tanggal_jual > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
	(
		SELECT no_surat_berharga
		FROM t_surat_berharga
	)
GROUP BY kd_kas

UNION ALL

--PENJUALAN JASA
SELECT t.kd_kas, 'PENJUALAN JASA' as transaksi, 
	SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga, d.diskon, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0), t.diskon, 0, 0, 0, t.pajak, 0) * d.qty) AS debet, 0 AS kredit
FROM t_penjualan_jasa t, t_penjualan_jasa_detail d, m_jasa m, m_jasa_kategori k
WHERE d.kd_jasa = m.kd_jasa AND m.kd_jasa_kategori = k.kd_jasa_kategori AND d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND k.status = 2 AND t.status = 1 AND t.tanggal_pesan > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() 
GROUP BY t.kd_kas

UNION ALL

--PENDAPATAN KARTU KREDIT DARI PENJUALAN JASA
SELECT t.kd_kas, 'PENDAPATAN KARTU KREDIT PENJUALAN JASA' as transaksi, 
	SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga, d.diskon, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0), t.diskon, 0, 0, 0, t.pajak, 0) * d.qty * t.other) AS debet, 0 AS kredit
FROM t_penjualan_jasa t, t_penjualan_jasa_detail d, m_jasa m, m_jasa_kategori k
WHERE d.kd_jasa = m.kd_jasa AND m.kd_jasa_kategori = k.kd_jasa_kategori AND d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND k.status = 2 AND t.status = 1 AND t.tanggal_pesan > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() 
GROUP BY t.kd_kas

UNION ALL

--PENJUALAN PERSEWAAN
SELECT t.kd_kas, 'PERSEWAAN' as transaksi, 
	SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga, d.diskon, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0), t.diskon, 0, 0, 0, t.pajak, 0) * d.qty) AS debet, 0 AS kredit
FROM t_penjualan_jasa t, t_penjualan_jasa_detail d, m_jasa m, m_jasa_kategori k
WHERE d.kd_jasa = m.kd_jasa AND m.kd_jasa_kategori = k.kd_jasa_kategori AND d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND k.status = 1 AND t.status = 1 AND t.tanggal_pesan > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() 
GROUP BY t.kd_kas

UNION ALL

--PENDAPATAN KARTU KREDIT DARI PERSEWAAN
SELECT t.kd_kas, 'PENDAPATAN KARTU KREDIT PERSEWAAN' as transaksi, 
	SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga, d.diskon, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0), t.diskon, 0, 0, 0, t.pajak, 0) * d.qty * t.other ) AS debet, 0 AS kredit
FROM t_penjualan_jasa t, t_penjualan_jasa_detail d, m_jasa m, m_jasa_kategori k
WHERE d.kd_jasa = m.kd_jasa AND m.kd_jasa_kategori = k.kd_jasa_kategori AND d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND k.status = 1 AND t.status = 1 AND t.tanggal_pesan > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() 
GROUP BY t.kd_kas

UNION ALL

--CICILAN PIUTANG JASA
SELECT kd_kas, 'CICILAN PIUTANG JASA' as transaksi, SUM(nominal) AS debet, 0 AS kredit
FROM t_piutang_jasa_cicilan
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
(
	SELECT no_surat_berharga
	FROM t_surat_berharga
)
GROUP BY kd_kas

VIEW.name: v_g_kas_histori_detail
VIEW.definition:
CREATE      VIEW v_g_kas_histori_detail
AS
--SALDO AWAL KAS
SELECT kd_kas, dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AS tanggal, 'SALDO AWAL' as transaksi, '0' as no_transaksi, saldo_awal as debet, 0 AS kredit, '' as keterangan
FROM m_kas

UNION ALL

--BIAYA OPERASIONAL
SELECT kd_kas, tanggal, 'BIAYA OPERASIONAL' as transaksi, no_transaksi, 0 AS debet, nominal as kredit, keterangan 
FROM t_biaya_operasional
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
(
	SELECT no_surat_berharga
	FROM t_surat_berharga
)
UNION ALL

--CICILAN HUTANG ASET
SELECT kd_kas, tanggal, 'CICILAN HUTANG ASET' as transaksi, CAST(no_cicilan AS VARCHAR(20)) AS no_transaksi, 0 AS debet, nominal AS kredit, keterangan
FROM t_hutang_aset_cicilan
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
(
	SELECT no_surat_berharga
	FROM t_surat_berharga
)
UNION ALL

--CICILAN HUTANG BIAYA ANGKUT
SELECT kd_kas, tanggal, 'CICILAN HUTANG BIAYA ANGKUT' as transaksi, no_cicilan as no_transaksi, 0 AS debet, nominal AS kredit, keterangan
FROM t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
(
	SELECT no_surat_berharga
	FROM t_surat_berharga
)
UNION ALL

--CICILAN HUTANG PEMBELIAN
SELECT kd_kas, tanggal, 'CICILAN HUTANG PEMBELIAN' as transaksi, no_cicilan as no_transaksi, 0 AS debet, nominal AS kredit, keterangan
FROM t_hutang_cicilan
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
(
	SELECT no_surat_berharga
	FROM t_surat_berharga
)
UNION ALL

--CICILAN HUTANG PEGAWAI
SELECT kd_kas, tanggal, 'CICILAN HUTANG PEGAWAI' as transaksi, CAST(no_cicilan AS VARCHAR(20)) AS no_transaksi, nominal AS DEBET, 0 AS kredit, keterangan
FROM t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
(
	SELECT no_surat_berharga
	FROM t_surat_berharga
)

UNION ALL

--HUTANG PEGAWAI
SELECT kd_kas, tanggal, 'HUTANG PEGAWAI' as transaksi, no_transaksi, 0 AS debet, nominal AS kredit, keterangan
FROM t_hutang_pegawai
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
(
	SELECT no_surat_berharga
	FROM t_surat_berharga
)

UNION ALL


--MUTASI KAS (DARI KAS PENGIRIM)
SELECT kd_kas_sumber, tanggal, 'MUTASI KAS (KELUAR)' as transaksi, no_transaksi, 0 AS debet, nominal AS kredit, keterangan
FROM t_mutasi_kas
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()

UNION ALL

--MUTASI KAS (KE KAS TUJUAN)
SELECT kd_kas_tujuan, tanggal, 'MUTASI KAS (MASUK)' as transaksi, no_transaksi, nominal AS debet, 0 AS kredit, keterangan
FROM t_mutasi_kas
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
UNION ALL

--PEMBELIAN BARANG (TUNAI)
SELECT b.kd_kas, b.tanggal, 'PEMBELIAN BARANG' as transaksi, b.no_transaksi, 0 AS debet, 
	SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga_beli, d.diskon1, d.diskon2, d.diskon3, d.diskon4, 0, 0), b.diskon1, b.diskon2, b.diskon3, b.diskon4, b.pajak, b.ppnbm) * d.qty) AS kredit, b.keterangan
FROM t_pembelian b, t_pembelian_detail d
WHERE d.no_transaksi = b.no_transaksi AND b.status = 1 AND b.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
GROUP BY b.kd_kas, b.tanggal, b.no_transaksi, b.keterangan

UNION ALL

--BIAYA ANGKUT PEMBELIAN (TUNAI)
SELECT ba.kd_kas, b.tanggal, 'BIAYA ANGKUT PEMBELIAN' as transaksi, ba.no_nota, 0 AS debet, ba.nominal AS kredit, keterangan
FROM t_pembelian_biaya_angkut ba, t_pembelian b
WHERE ba.no_transaksi = b.no_transaksi AND ba.status = 1 AND b.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
UNION ALL

--RETUR PEMBELIAN
SELECT R.kd_kas, r.tanggal, 'RETUR PEMBELIAN' as transaksi, r.no_retur as no_transaksi, 
	SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(rd.harga, rd.diskon1, rd.diskon2, rd.diskon3, rd.diskon4, 0, 0), r.diskon1, r.diskon2, r.diskon3, r.diskon4, r.pajak, r.ppnbm) * rd.qty) AS debet, 0 AS kredit, r.keterangan
FROM t_pembelian_retur r, t_pembelian_retur_detail rd
WHERE rd.no_retur = r.no_retur AND r.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND 
	r.no_bukti NOT IN 
	(
		SELECT no_surat_berharga
		FROM t_surat_berharga
	)
GROUP BY r.kd_kas, r.tanggal, r.no_retur, r.keterangan
UNION ALL

--PENDAPATAN LAIN-LAIN
SELECT kd_kas, tanggal, 'PENDAPATAN LAIN-LAIN' as transaksi, no_transaksi, nominal AS debet, 0 AS kredit, keterangan
FROM t_pendapatan
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
(
	SELECT no_surat_berharga
	FROM t_surat_berharga
)
UNION ALL

--PENJUALAN BARANG
SELECT t.kd_kas, t.tanggal, 'PENJUALAN BARANG' as transaksi, t.no_transaksi, 
	SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga_jual, d.diskon1, d.diskon2, d.diskon3, d.diskon4, 0, 0), t.diskon1, t.diskon2, t.diskon3, t.diskon4, t.pajak, 0) * d.qty) AS debet, 0 AS kredit, t.keterangan
FROM t_penjualan t, t_penjualan_detail d
WHERE d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND t.status = 1 AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() 
GROUP BY t.kd_kas, t.tanggal, t.no_transaksi, t.keterangan

UNION ALL

--RETUR PENJUALAN PER NOTA
SELECT r.kd_kas, r.tanggal, 'RETUR PENJUALAN' as transaksi, r.no_retur as no_transaksi, 0 AS debet, 
	SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(rd.harga_jual, rd.diskon1, rd.diskon2, rd.diskon3, rd.diskon4, 0, 0), r.diskon1, r.diskon2, r.diskon3, r.diskon4, r.pajak, 0) * rd.qty) AS kredit, r.keterangan
FROM t_penjualan_retur r, t_penjualan_retur_detail rd
WHERE rd.no_retur = r.no_retur AND r.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND 
	r.no_bukti NOT IN 
	(
		SELECT no_surat_berharga
		FROM t_surat_berharga
	)
GROUP BY r.kd_kas, r.tanggal, r.no_retur, r.keterangan

UNION ALL

--CICILAN PIUTANG PENJUALAN BARANG
SELECT kd_kas, tanggal, 'CICILAN PIUTANG' as transaksi, no_cicilan as no_transaksi, nominal AS debet, 0 AS kredit, keterangan
FROM t_piutang_cicilan
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
(
	SELECT no_surat_berharga
	FROM t_surat_berharga
)

UNION ALL

--PENDATAPAN KARTU KREDIT DARI PIUTANG BARANG
SELECT kd_kas, tanggal, 'CICILAN PIUTANG' as transaksi, no_cicilan as no_transaksi, nominal * other AS debet, 0 AS kredit, keterangan
FROM t_piutang_cicilan
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
(
	SELECT no_surat_berharga
	FROM t_surat_berharga
)

UNION ALL

--PENCAIRAN SURAT BERHARGA (KELUAR DARI PERUSAHAAN KE PIHAK LAIN)
SELECT kd_kas_setor, tanggal_cair, 'SURAT BERHARGA (KELUAR)' as transaksi, no_surat_berharga as no_transaksi, 0 AS debet, nominal AS kredit, keterangan
FROM t_surat_berharga
WHERE (tanggal_cair > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()) AND (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_cair) >= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_setor)) AND 
	status_blong = 0 AND
	status_asal = 0
UNION ALL
