--PENCAIRAN SURAT BERHARGA (MASUK KE PERUSAHAAN DARI PIHAK LAIN)
SELECT kd_kas_setor, tanggal_cair, 'SURAT BERHARGA (MASUK)' as transaksi, no_surat_berharga as no_transaksi, nominal AS debet, 0 AS kredit, keterangan
FROM t_surat_berharga
WHERE (tanggal_cair > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()) AND (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_cair) >= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_setor)) AND 
	status_blong = 0 AND
	status_asal = 1

UNION ALL

--PENAMBAHAN MODAL
SELECT kd_kas, tanggal, 'PENAMBAHAN MODAL' AS Transaksi, no_transaksi, nominal as debet, 0 as kredit, keterangan
FROM t_penambahan_kas
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()

UNION ALL

--PRIVE
SELECT kd_kas, tanggal, 'PRIVE' AS Transaksi, no_transaksi, 0 as debet, nominal as kredit, keterangan
FROM t_prive
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()

UNION ALL
--PENJUALAN ASET
SELECT kd_kas, tanggal_jual, 'PENJUALAN ASET', 'PA-' + kd_aset, harga_beli - dbo.GetPenyusutanAset(kd_aset, tanggal_beli, tanggal_jual) as debet, 0 as kredit, 'PENJUALAN ' + nama as Keterangan
FROM m_aset
WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_jual) >= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_beli) AND tanggal_jual > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()  AND
	tanggal_jual > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
	(
		SELECT no_surat_berharga
		FROM t_surat_berharga
	)

UNION ALL

--PENJUALAN JASA
SELECT t.kd_kas, t.tanggal_pesan, 'PENJUALAN JASA' as transaksi, t.no_transaksi, 
	SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga, d.diskon, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0), t.diskon, 0, 0, 0, t.pajak, 0) * d.qty) AS debet, 0 AS kredit, t.keterangan
FROM t_penjualan_jasa t, t_penjualan_jasa_detail d, m_jasa m, m_jasa_kategori k
WHERE d.kd_jasa = m.kd_jasa AND m.kd_jasa_kategori = k.kd_jasa_kategori AND d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND k.status = 2 AND t.status = 1 AND t.tanggal_pesan > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() 
GROUP BY t.kd_kas, t.tanggal_pesan, t.no_transaksi, t.keterangan

UNION ALL

--PENDAPATAN KARTU KREDIT DARI PENJUALAN JASA
SELECT t.kd_kas, t.tanggal_pesan, 'PENDAPATAN KARTU KREDIT PENJUALAN JASA' as transaksi, t.no_transaksi, 
	SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga, d.diskon, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0), t.diskon, 0, 0, 0, t.pajak, 0) * d.qty * t.other ) AS debet, 0 AS kredit, t.keterangan
FROM t_penjualan_jasa t, t_penjualan_jasa_detail d, m_jasa m, m_jasa_kategori k
WHERE d.kd_jasa = m.kd_jasa AND m.kd_jasa_kategori = k.kd_jasa_kategori AND d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND k.status = 2 AND t.status = 1 AND t.tanggal_pesan > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() 
GROUP BY t.kd_kas, t.tanggal_pesan, t.no_transaksi, t.keterangan

UNION ALL

--PENJUALAN PERSEWAAN
SELECT t.kd_kas, t.awal, 'PERSEWAAN' as transaksi, t.no_transaksi, 
	SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga, d.diskon, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0), t.diskon, 0, 0, 0, t.pajak, 0) * d.qty) AS debet, 0 AS kredit, t.keterangan
FROM t_penjualan_jasa t, t_penjualan_jasa_detail d, m_jasa m, m_jasa_kategori k
WHERE d.kd_jasa = m.kd_jasa AND m.kd_jasa_kategori = k.kd_jasa_kategori AND d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND k.status = 1 AND t.status = 1 AND t.tanggal_pesan > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() 
GROUP BY t.kd_kas, t.awal, t.no_transaksi, t.keterangan

UNION ALL

--PENDAPATAN KARTU KREDIT DARI PERSEWAAN
SELECT t.kd_kas, t.awal, 'PENDAPATAN KARTU KREDIT PERSEWAAN' as transaksi, t.no_transaksi, 
	SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga, d.diskon, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0), t.diskon, 0, 0, 0, t.pajak, 0) * d.qty * t.other)  AS debet, 0 AS kredit, t.keterangan
FROM t_penjualan_jasa t, t_penjualan_jasa_detail d, m_jasa m, m_jasa_kategori k
WHERE d.kd_jasa = m.kd_jasa AND m.kd_jasa_kategori = k.kd_jasa_kategori AND d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND k.status = 1 AND t.status = 1 AND t.tanggal_pesan > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() 
GROUP BY t.kd_kas, t.awal, t.no_transaksi, t.keterangan

UNION ALL

--CICILAN PIUTANG JASA
SELECT kd_kas, tanggal, 'CICILAN PIUTANG JASA' as transaksi, no_cicilan as no_transaksi, nominal  AS debet, 0 AS kredit, keterangan
FROM t_piutang_jasa_cicilan
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
(
	SELECT no_surat_berharga
	FROM t_surat_berharga
)
UNION ALL

--PENDAPATAN KARTU KREDIT DARI PIUTANG JASA
SELECT kd_kas, tanggal, 'CICILAN PIUTANG JASA' as transaksi, no_cicilan as no_transaksi, nominal * other  AS debet, 0 AS kredit, keterangan
FROM t_piutang_jasa_cicilan
WHERE tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND no_bukti NOT IN 
(
	SELECT no_surat_berharga
	FROM t_surat_berharga
)

VIEW.name: v_g_kas_saldo_akhir
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW v_g_kas_saldo_akhir
AS
SELECT bh.kd_kas, k.saldo_awal, (SUM(debet) - SUM(kredit)) AS saldo_akhir
FROM v_g_kas_histori bh, m_kas k
WHERE bh.kd_kas = k.kd_kas
GROUP BY bh.kd_kas, k.saldo_awal

VIEW.name: v_g_kolom
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_g_kolom
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT name AS objek
FROM         dbo.sysobjects
WHERE     (xtype = 'U') OR
                      (xtype = 'V')
GROUP BY name
ORDER BY name

VIEW.name: v_g_log_kegiatan_transaksi
VIEW.definition:
CREATE  VIEW v_g_log_kegiatan_transaksi
AS
SELECT 'ABSENSI PEGAWAI LAIN' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_transaKsi AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM t_absensi_pegawai_lain
UNION ALL

SELECT 'BIAYA OPERASIONAL' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_transaKsi AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM t_biaya_operasional
UNION ALL

SELECT 'CICILAN HUTANG ASET' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_cicilan AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan
UNION ALL

SELECT 'CICILAN HUTANG BIAYA ANGKUT' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_cicilan AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan
UNION ALL

SELECT 'CICILAN HUTANG DAGANG' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_transaKsi AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_hutang_cicilan
UNION ALL

SELECT 'HUTANG (KAS / BON) PEGAWAI' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_transaKsi AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_hutang_pegawai
UNION ALL

SELECT 'CICILAN HUTANG PEGAWAI' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_transaKsi AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan
UNION ALL

SELECT 'JARAK TEMPUH KENDARAAN' AS Keterangan, CAST(kd_jarak_tempuh AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh
UNION ALL

SELECT 'PENGISIAN BBM KENDARAAN' AS Keterangan, CAST(kd_pengisian_bbm AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm
UNION ALL

SELECT 'PERAWATAN KENDARAAN' AS Keterangan, CAST(kd_jenis_perawatan AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_kendaraan_perawatan
UNION ALL

SELECT 'PERGANTIAN TANGGUNG JAWAB SOPIR' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_stnk AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_kendaraan_tanggung_jawab
UNION ALL

SELECT 'MUTASI ANTAR KAS' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_transaKsi AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_mutasi_kas
UNION ALL

SELECT 'MUTASI STOK' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_transaKsi AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_mutasi_stok
UNION ALL

SELECT 'OPNAME STOK' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_transaKsi AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_opname_stok
UNION ALL

SELECT 'IZIN PEGAWAI' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_transaKsi AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_pegawai_izin
UNION ALL

SELECT 'DAFTAR LEMBUR PEGAWAI' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_transaKsi AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_pegawai_lembur
UNION ALL

SELECT 'SURAT PERINGATAN' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_sp AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan
UNION ALL

SELECT 'PEMBELIAN BAHAN BAKU' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_transaKsi AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_pembelian
UNION ALL

SELECT 'ORDER PEMBELIAN' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_order AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_pembelian_order
UNION ALL

SELECT 'RETUR PEMBELIAN' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_retur AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_pembelian_retur
UNION ALL

SELECT 'PENDAPATAN LAIN-LAIN' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_transaKsi AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_pendapatan
UNION ALL

SELECT 'PENJUALAN' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_transaKsi AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_penjualan
UNION ALL

SELECT 'DAFTAR NOTA BATAL' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_transaKsi AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_penjualan_nota_kosong
UNION ALL

SELECT 'RETUR PENJUALAN PER NOTA' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_retur AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_penjualan_retur
UNION ALL

SELECT 'CICILAN PIUTANG' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_cicilan AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_piutang_cicilan
UNION ALL

SELECT 'SURAT BERHARGA' AS Keterangan, CAST(no_surat_berharga AS VARCHAR) AS Nomor, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM dbo.t_surat_berharga

VIEW.name: v_g_log_login
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_g_log_login
AS
SELECT     dbo.g_log_login.kd_user, dbo.g_log_login.komputer, dbo.g_log_login.ip, dbo.g_log_login.tanggal, dbo.g_log_login.status, dbo.m_userx.nama
FROM         dbo.g_log_login INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.g_log_login.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user

VIEW.name: v_l_faktur_penjualan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_l_faktur_penjualan
AS
SELECT     jual.no_transaksi AS no_transaksi, LEFT(jual.no_transaksi, 6) + ' - ' + RIGHT(jual.no_transaksi, 6) AS [No. Faktur], 
                      jual.tanggal_jatuh_tempo AS [Jth. Tempo], jual.tanggal, cust.nama AS Customer, cust.alamat, jual.keterangan AS NB, u.nama AS Petugas, 
                      pgw.nama AS Pgw, brg.nama AS Barang, dtl.qty, dtl.harga_jual AS Harga, dtl.diskon1 AS [Disk. Barang 1], dtl.diskon2 AS [Disk. Barang 2], 
                      dtl.diskon3 AS [Disk. Barang 3], dtl.diskon4 AS [Disk. Barang 4], jual.diskon1 AS [Disk. Total 1], jual.diskon2 AS [Disk. Total 2], 
                      jual.diskon3 AS [Disk. Total 3], jual.diskon4 AS [Disk. Total 4], jual.diskon_uang AS [Disk. Uang], jual.pajak, dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, 
                      dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0) * dtl.qty AS [Sub Total], jual.status
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail dtl ON jual.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang brg ON dtl.kd_barang = brg.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi div ON jual.kd_divisi = div.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan stn ON dtl.kd_satuan = stn.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx u ON jual.kd_user = u.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer cust ON jual.kd_customer = cust.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai pgw ON div.kd_divisi = pgw.kd_divisi

VIEW.name: v_m_agama
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_agama
AS
SELECT     kd_agama, nama
FROM         dbo.m_agama

VIEW.name: v_m_aset
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_aset
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_aset.kd_aset, dbo.m_aset.nama AS aset, dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, dbo.m_aset_kategori.nama AS Aset_Kategori, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.m_aset.kd_index, dbo.m_jurnal.nama AS [index], dbo.m_aset.tanggal_beli, dbo.m_aset.tanggal_habis_garansi, 
                      dbo.m_aset.harga_beli, dbo.m_aset.penyusutan, dbo.m_aset.nilai_residu, dbo.m_aset.keterangan, dbo.m_aset.status, dbo.m_jurnal.kd_akun
FROM         dbo.m_aset INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jurnal ON dbo.m_aset.kd_index = dbo.m_jurnal.kd_index INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.m_aset.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_aset.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_aset_kategori ON dbo.m_aset.kd_kategori_aset = dbo.m_aset_kategori.kd_kategori_aset

VIEW.name: v_m_aset_detail
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW v_m_aset_detail AS
SELECT a.kd_aset, a.kd_index, a.kd_supplier, a.kd_divisi, a.kd_kategori_aset, a.nama as aset, a.keterangan, a.status,
	s.nama as supplier, d.nama as divisi, d.keterangan as keterangan_divisi, ak.nama as kategori_aset, j.nama as akun,
	dbo.GetFormatTanggal(a.tanggal_beli) AS tanggal_beli, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(a.tanggal_habis_garansi) AS tanggal_habis_garansi,
	a.harga_beli, a.penyusutan, a.nilai_residu,
	DATEDIFF(YEAR, a.tanggal_beli, GetDate()) AS [umur(tahun)],
	DATEDIFF(MONTH, a.tanggal_beli, GetDate()) AS [umur(bulan)],
	(a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) * (a.penyusutan / 100) AS [dasar_penyusutan(tahun)],
	(a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) * a.penyusutan / (12 * 100) AS [dasar_penyusutan(bulan)],	
	(a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) * a.penyusutan / (365 * 100) AS [dasar_penyusutan(hari)],
	akm_penyusutan =
		CASE a.penyusutan 
		WHEN 0 THEN
			0
		ELSE
			CASE
			WHEN ((a.harga_beli * (a.penyusutan / (365 * 100))) * DATEDIFF(DAY, a.tanggal_beli, GetDate())) > (a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) THEN
				a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu
			ELSE
				(((a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) * (a.penyusutan / (365 * 100))) * DATEDIFF(DAY, a.tanggal_beli, GetDate()))
			END
		END,
	nilai_buku =
		CASE a.penyusutan 
		WHEN 0 THEN
			a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu
		ELSE
			CASE
			WHEN ((a.harga_beli * (a.penyusutan / (365 * 100))) * DATEDIFF(DAY, a.tanggal_beli, GetDate())) > (a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) THEN
				a.nilai_residu
			ELSE
				a.harga_beli - (((a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) * (a.penyusutan / (365 * 100))) * DATEDIFF(DAY, a.tanggal_beli, GetDate()))
			END
		END,
	[Akm.By. Penyusutan Periode Aktif] = 
		case
		when ((a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) * (a.penyusutan / (365 * 100))) * DATEDIFF(DAY, a.tanggal_beli, GetDate()) > (a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) THEN
			0
		else
			((a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) * (a.penyusutan / (365 * 100))) * DATEDIFF(DAY, a.tanggal_beli, GetDate()) 
		end
		-
		case
		when ((a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) * (a.penyusutan / (365 * 100))) * DATEDIFF(DAY, a.tanggal_beli, GetDate()) > (a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) THEN
			0
		else			
			((a.harga_beli - a.nilai_residu) * (a.penyusutan / (365 * 100))) * DATEDIFF(DAY, a.tanggal_beli, dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku())
		end



FROM m_aset a, m_aset_kategori ak, m_supplier s, m_divisi d, m_jurnal j
WHERE a.kd_kategori_aset = ak.kd_kategori_aset AND a.kd_supplier = s.kd_supplier AND a.kd_divisi = d.kd_divisi AND a.kd_index = j.kd_index 
	AND a.status = 0

VIEW.name: v_m_barang
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_barang
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_barang.kd_jenis_bahan, dbo.m_jenis_bahan.nama AS jenis_bahan, dbo.m_barang.kd_barang, dbo.m_barang.nama AS barang, 
                      dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori, dbo.m_kategori.nama AS kategori, dbo.m_barang.kd_merk, dbo.m_merk.nama AS merk, dbo.m_barang.kd_model, 
                      dbo.m_model.nama AS model, dbo.m_barang.kd_warna, dbo.m_warna.nama AS warna, dbo.m_barang.ukuran, dbo.m_barang.keterangan, 
                      dbo.m_barang.status_pinjam, dbo.m_barang.pabrik, dbo.m_barang.status, dbo.m_barang.tanggal_daftar
FROM         dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bahan ON dbo.m_barang.kd_jenis_bahan = dbo.m_jenis_bahan.kd_jenis_bahan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_merk ON dbo.m_barang.kd_merk = dbo.m_merk.kd_merk INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_model ON dbo.m_barang.kd_model = dbo.m_model.kd_model INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_warna ON dbo.m_barang.kd_warna = dbo.m_warna.kd_warna

VIEW.name: v_m_barang_divisi
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_barang_divisi
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_barang_divisi.kd_divisi, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi, dbo.m_barang_divisi.kd_barang, dbo.m_barang.nama AS barang, 
                      dbo.m_barang_divisi.stok_awal, dbo.m_barang_divisi.harga_beli_awal, dbo.m_barang_divisi.stok_min, dbo.m_barang_divisi.status, 
                      dbo.m_barang.keterangan, dbo.m_barang.status_pinjam, dbo.m_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dbo.m_merk.nama AS Merk, dbo.m_model.nama AS Model,
                       dbo.m_warna.nama AS Warna, dbo.m_barang.ukuran AS Ukuran
FROM         dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_divisi ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_divisi.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_barang_divisi.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_merk ON dbo.m_barang.kd_merk = dbo.m_merk.kd_merk INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_model ON dbo.m_barang.kd_model = dbo.m_model.kd_model INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_warna ON dbo.m_barang.kd_warna = dbo.m_warna.kd_warna

VIEW.name: v_m_barang_divisi_diskon
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_barang_divisi_diskon
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_barang_divisi_diskon.kd_divisi, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi, dbo.m_barang_divisi_diskon.kd_barang, dbo.m_barang.nama AS barang, 
                      dbo.m_barang_divisi_diskon.kd_satuan, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS satuan, dbo.m_barang_divisi_diskon.diskon1, dbo.m_barang_divisi_diskon.diskon2, 
                      dbo.m_barang_divisi_diskon.diskon3, dbo.m_barang_divisi_diskon.diskon4, dbo.m_barang_divisi_diskon.qty_minim, 
                      dbo.m_barang.ukuran AS Ukuran, dbo.m_merk.nama AS Merk, dbo.m_model.nama AS Model, dbo.m_warna.nama AS Warna
FROM         dbo.m_barang_divisi_diskon INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_barang_divisi_diskon.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.m_barang_divisi_diskon.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.m_barang_divisi_diskon.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_merk ON dbo.m_barang.kd_merk = dbo.m_merk.kd_merk INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_model ON dbo.m_barang.kd_model = dbo.m_model.kd_model INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_warna ON dbo.m_barang.kd_warna = dbo.m_warna.kd_warna

VIEW.name: v_m_barang_divisi_supplier
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_barang_divisi_supplier
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_barang_divisi.kd_divisi, dbo.m_barang_divisi.kd_barang, dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier, dbo.m_barang.kd_jenis_bahan, 
                      dbo.m_barang.nama AS barang, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS keterangan_divisi, dbo.m_supplier.nama AS supplier, 
                      dbo.m_barang_divisi.status AS status_barang_divisi, dbo.m_barang_supplier.status AS status_barang_supplier, 
                      dbo.m_barang.status AS status_barang
FROM         dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_divisi ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_divisi.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_supplier ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_barang_divisi.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi
WHERE     (dbo.m_barang_divisi.status <> 0) AND (dbo.m_barang.status <> 0) AND (dbo.m_barang_supplier.status <> 0)

VIEW.name: v_m_barang_formula
VIEW.definition: CREATE VIEW v_m_barang_formula  AS  SELECT     dbo.m_barang_formula.nomor AS kd_output, m_barang_1.nama AS output, dbo.m_barang_formula.kd_barang AS kd_barang,  dbo.m_barang.nama AS barang, dbo.m_barang_formula.kd_satuan AS kd_satuan, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS satuan, dbo.m_barang_formula.qty,  dbo.m_barang_formula.Keterangan  FROM         dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN  dbo.m_barang_formula ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_formula.kd_barang INNER JOIN  dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.m_barang_formula.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN  dbo.m_barang m_barang_1 ON dbo.m_barang_formula.nomor = m_barang_1.kd_barang

VIEW.name: v_m_barang_satuan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_barang_satuan
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_barang, dbo.m_barang.nama AS barang, dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_satuan, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS satuan, 
                      dbo.m_barang_satuan.jumlah, dbo.m_barang_satuan.harga_jual, dbo.m_barang_satuan.status
FROM         dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_satuan ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan

VIEW.name: v_m_barang_supplier
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_barang_supplier
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier, dbo.m_supplier.nama AS supplier, dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_barang, dbo.m_barang.nama AS barang, 
                      dbo.m_barang_supplier.status, dbo.m_merk.nama AS merk, dbo.m_model.nama AS model, dbo.m_warna.nama AS warna, dbo.m_barang.ukuran
FROM         dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_supplier ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_merk ON dbo.m_barang.kd_merk = dbo.m_merk.kd_merk INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_model ON dbo.m_barang.kd_model = dbo.m_model.kd_model INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_warna ON dbo.m_barang.kd_warna = dbo.m_warna.kd_warna

VIEW.name: v_m_biaya
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_biaya
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_biaya.kd_biaya, dbo.m_biaya.nama AS biaya, dbo.m_biaya.kd_index, dbo.m_jurnal.nama AS akun, dbo.m_biaya.keterangan, 
                      dbo.m_biaya.status, dbo.m_jurnal.kd_akun
FROM         dbo.m_biaya INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jurnal ON dbo.m_biaya.kd_index = dbo.m_jurnal.kd_index

VIEW.name: v_m_ekspedisi
VIEW.definition:
create view v_m_ekspedisi as

SELECT     dbo.m_ekspedisi.kd_ekspedisi, dbo.m_ekspedisi.nama AS ekspedisi, dbo.m_ekspedisi.kontak, dbo.m_ekspedisi.kd_bank, dbo.m_bank.nama AS bank, 
                      dbo.m_ekspedisi.rekening, dbo.m_ekspedisi.kd_kota, dbo.m_kota.nama AS kota, dbo.m_ekspedisi.alamat, dbo.m_ekspedisi.telepon, dbo.m_ekspedisi.fax, 
                      dbo.m_ekspedisi.hp, dbo.m_ekspedisi.email, dbo.m_ekspedisi.status
FROM         dbo.m_ekspedisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_ekspedisi.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_ekspedisi.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank

VIEW.name: v_m_hari_libur_agama
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_hari_libur_agama
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_hari_libur_agama.kd_agama, dbo.m_agama.nama AS agama, dbo.m_hari_libur.tanggal, dbo.m_hari_libur.keterangan, 
                      dbo.m_hari_libur_agama.status, dbo.m_hari_libur_agama.kd_hari_libur
FROM         dbo.m_hari_libur_agama INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_agama ON dbo.m_hari_libur_agama.kd_agama = dbo.m_agama.kd_agama INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_hari_libur ON dbo.m_hari_libur_agama.kd_hari_libur = dbo.m_hari_libur.kd_hari_libur

VIEW.name: v_m_jabatan_gaji
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_jabatan_gaji
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_jabatan_detail.kd_jabatan, dbo.m_jabatan.nama AS jabatan, dbo.m_jabatan_detail.kd_gaji, dbo.m_jabatan_gaji.nama AS gaji, 
                      dbo.m_jabatan_gaji.gaji_pokok, dbo.m_jabatan_gaji.tunjangan, dbo.m_jabatan_gaji.lain_lain, dbo.m_jabatan_detail.status
FROM         dbo.m_jabatan_detail INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jabatan ON dbo.m_jabatan_detail.kd_jabatan = dbo.m_jabatan.kd_jabatan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jabatan_gaji ON dbo.m_jabatan_detail.kd_gaji = dbo.m_jabatan_gaji.kd_gaji

VIEW.name: v_m_jasa
VIEW.definition: CREATE VIEW v_m_jasa AS SELECT dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa, dbo.m_jasa_kategori.status AS status_kategori, dbo.m_jasa_kategori.nama AS kategori, dbo.m_jasa.nama AS jasa, dbo.m_jasa.harga, dbo.m_jasa.diskon AS diskon_jasa, dbo.m_jasa.keterangan AS keterangan_jasa, dbo.m_jasa.status AS status_jasa, dbo.m_jasa.tanggal_daftar FROM dbo.m_jasa INNER JOIN dbo.m_jasa_kategori ON dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = dbo.m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori

VIEW.name: v_m_jasa_detail
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_jasa_detail
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_jasa_detail.kd_jasa, dbo.m_jasa.nama AS jasa, dbo.m_jasa_detail.kd_barang, dbo.m_barang.nama AS barang, dbo.m_jasa_detail.kd_satuan, 
                      dbo.m_satuan.nama AS satuan, dbo.m_jasa_detail.qty, dbo.m_jasa_detail.status
FROM         dbo.m_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa_detail ON dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa = dbo.m_jasa_detail.kd_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.m_jasa_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.m_jasa_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan

VIEW.name: v_m_kas
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_kas
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_kas.kd_kas, dbo.m_kas.kd_bank, dbo.m_bank.nama AS bank, dbo.m_kas.kd_index, dbo.m_jurnal.nama AS akun, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, 
                      dbo.m_kas.kd_kota, dbo.m_kota.nama AS kota, dbo.m_kas.telepon, dbo.m_kas.kontak, dbo.m_kas.cabang, dbo.m_kas.saldo_awal, 
                      dbo.m_kas.keterangan, dbo.m_kas.status, dbo.m_jurnal.kd_akun, dbo.m_bank.keterangan AS ket_bank
FROM         dbo.m_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jurnal ON dbo.m_kas.kd_index = dbo.m_jurnal.kd_index INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_kas.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota

VIEW.name: v_m_kota
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_kota
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_kota.kd_kota, dbo.m_kota.nama AS kota, dbo.m_kota.kd_negara, dbo.m_negara.nama AS negara, dbo.m_kota.kd_telp, dbo.m_kota.status
FROM         dbo.m_kota INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_negara ON dbo.m_kota.kd_negara = dbo.m_negara.kd_negara

VIEW.name: v_m_pegawai
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_pegawai
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.kd_jabatan, dbo.m_pegawai.kd_jenis, dbo.m_pegawai.kd_kota, dbo.m_pegawai.kd_agama, 
                      dbo.m_pegawai.kd_shift, dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.tempat_lahir, dbo.m_pegawai.tanggal_lahir, 
                      dbo.m_pegawai.alamat, dbo.m_pegawai.telepon, dbo.m_pegawai.hp, dbo.m_pegawai.ktp, dbo.m_pegawai.tgl_masuk, dbo.m_pegawai.kelamin, 
                      dbo.m_pegawai.foto, dbo.m_pegawai.keterangan, dbo.m_pegawai.status_kawin, dbo.m_pegawai.status, dbo.m_pegawai.status_lembur, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi, dbo.m_kota.nama AS kota, dbo.m_agama.nama AS agama, dbo.m_jabatan.nama AS jabatan, 
                      dbo.m_pegawai_jenis.nama AS pegawai_jenis, dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS keterangan_divisi
FROM         dbo.m_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_agama ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_agama = dbo.m_agama.kd_agama INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jabatan ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_jabatan = dbo.m_jabatan.kd_jabatan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jam_kerja ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_shift = dbo.m_jam_kerja.kd_shift INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai_jenis ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_jenis = dbo.m_pegawai_jenis.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota

VIEW.name: v_m_pegawai_finger_print
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_pegawai_finger_print
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_pegawai_finger_print.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai_finger_print.kd_finger, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS pegawai, 
                      dbo.m_pegawai_finger_print.keterangan, dbo.m_pegawai_finger_print.status
FROM         dbo.m_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai_finger_print ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai_finger_print.kd_pegawai

VIEW.name: v_m_pegawai_komisi
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_pegawai_komisi
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_pegawai_komisi.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai_komisi.kd_barang, dbo.m_barang.nama AS barang, dbo.m_pegawai_komisi.kd_satuan, 
                      dbo.m_satuan.nama AS satuan, dbo.m_pegawai_komisi.komisi, dbo.m_pegawai_komisi.status
FROM         dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai_komisi ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_pegawai_komisi.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.m_pegawai_komisi.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.m_pegawai_komisi.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan

VIEW.name: v_m_pendapatan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_pendapatan
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_pendapatan.kd_pendapatan, dbo.m_pendapatan.nama AS pendapatan, dbo.m_pendapatan.kd_index, dbo.m_jurnal.nama AS akun, 
                      dbo.m_pendapatan.keterangan, dbo.m_pendapatan.status, dbo.m_jurnal.kd_akun
FROM         dbo.m_pendapatan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jurnal ON dbo.m_pendapatan.kd_index = dbo.m_jurnal.kd_index

VIEW.name: v_m_pihak_lain
VIEW.definition:
CREATE  VIEW v_m_pihak_lain
AS
SELECT     kd_customer AS kd_pihak_lain, nama, kontak, 1 AS status
FROM         m_customer
WHERE     status <> 0
UNION ALL
SELECT     kd_supplier AS kd_pihak_lain, nama, kontak, 1
FROM         m_supplier
WHERE     jenis <> 0
UNION ALL
SELECT     '1', 'UMUM', '-', 1
UNION ALL
SELECT     '0', 'PERUSAHAAN SENDIRI', '-', 0

VIEW.name: v_m_supplier
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_supplier
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier, dbo.m_supplier.nama AS supplier, dbo.m_supplier.kontak, dbo.m_supplier.kd_bank, dbo.m_bank.nama AS bank, 
                      dbo.m_supplier.rekening, dbo.m_supplier.kd_kota, dbo.m_kota.nama AS kota, dbo.m_supplier.alamat, dbo.m_supplier.telepon, dbo.m_supplier.fax, 
                      dbo.m_supplier.hp, dbo.m_supplier.email, dbo.m_supplier.jenis
FROM         dbo.m_supplier INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_supplier.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_supplier.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank

VIEW.name: v_m_surat
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_surat
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_surat.kd_surat, dbo.m_jenis_surat.nama, dbo.m_surat.prihal, dbo.m_surat.lampiran, dbo.m_surat.tanggal_buat, 
                      dbo.m_surat.tanggal_perpanjangan, dbo.m_surat.instansi, dbo.m_surat.biaya, dbo.m_surat.keterangan, dbo.m_userx.nama AS [User], 
                      dbo.m_surat.tanggal_server, dbo.m_userx.kd_group
FROM         dbo.m_surat INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_surat ON dbo.m_surat.kd_jenis_surat = dbo.m_jenis_surat.kd_jenis_surat INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.m_surat.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user
WHERE     (dbo.m_jenis_surat.status <> 0) AND (dbo.m_surat.status <> 0)

VIEW.name: v_m_user_group_menu
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_user_group_menu
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_user_group_menu.kd_group, dbo.m_user_group.nama AS nama_group, dbo.m_user_group_menu.keymenu, dbo.m_user_all_menu.parent, 
                      dbo.m_user_all_menu.nama AS nama_menu, dbo.m_user_all_menu.visible, dbo.m_user_all_menu.no_parent, dbo.m_user_all_menu.no_menu, 
                      dbo.m_user_all_menu.released
FROM         dbo.m_user_all_menu INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_user_group_menu ON dbo.m_user_all_menu.keymenu = dbo.m_user_group_menu.keymenu INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_user_group ON dbo.m_user_group_menu.kd_group = dbo.m_user_group.kd_group

VIEW.name: v_m_user_menu
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_user_menu
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_user_all_menu.parent, dbo.m_user_menu.keymenu, dbo.m_user_all_menu.mapid, dbo.m_user_all_menu.nama, dbo.m_user_all_menu.picture, 
                      dbo.m_user_all_menu.keymask, dbo.m_user_all_menu.keycode, dbo.m_user_all_menu.checked, dbo.m_user_all_menu.enable, 
                      dbo.m_user_all_menu.visible, dbo.m_user_all_menu.no_parent, dbo.m_user_all_menu.no_menu, dbo.m_user_all_menu.released, 
                      dbo.m_user_menu.kd_user, dbo.m_userx.nama AS nama_user, dbo.m_user_all_menu.group_line
FROM         dbo.m_user_all_menu INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_user_menu ON dbo.m_user_all_menu.keymenu = dbo.m_user_menu.keymenu INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.m_user_menu.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user

VIEW.name: v_m_userx
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_m_userx
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_userx.kd_user, dbo.m_userx.kd_group, dbo.m_userx.nama AS nama_user, dbo.m_user_group.nama AS nama_group, dbo.m_userx.passwd, 
                      dbo.m_userx.keterangan, dbo.m_userx.status
FROM         dbo.m_userx INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_user_group ON dbo.m_userx.kd_group = dbo.m_user_group.kd_group

VIEW.name: v_t_absensi
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_absensi
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.t_absensi.id, dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS pegawai, dbo.m_jabatan.nama AS jabatan, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.nama AS no_plat, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS divisi, dbo.t_absensi.masuk AS tanggal, dbo.t_absensi.masuk, dbo.t_absensi.keluar
FROM         dbo.t_absensi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jabatan ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_jabatan = dbo.m_jabatan.kd_jabatan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi
ORDER BY dbo.m_pegawai.nama, dbo.t_absensi.masuk

VIEW.name: v_t_absensi_2
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_absensi_2
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS pegawai, dbo.m_jabatan.nama AS jabatan, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS keterangan_divisi, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_absensi.masuk) AS Tanggal, MIN(dbo.t_absensi.masuk) AS jam_masuk, 
                      MAX(dbo.t_absensi.keluar) AS jam_pulang, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi
FROM         dbo.m_jabatan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.m_jabatan.kd_jabatan = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_jabatan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_absensi ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai
GROUP BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_absensi.masuk), dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama, dbo.m_jabatan.nama, dbo.m_divisi.nama, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan
ORDER BY dbo.m_pegawai.nama, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_absensi.masuk)

VIEW.name: v_t_absensi_histori
VIEW.definition:
CREATE  VIEW v_t_absensi_histori AS 
	SELECT     a.kd_pegawai, p.nama, masuk AS jam, '1' AS status
FROM         m_pegawai p, t_absensi a
WHERE     a.kd_pegawai = p.kd_pegawai
UNION ALL
SELECT     a.kd_pegawai, p.nama, keluar AS jam, '0' status
FROM         m_pegawai p, t_absensi a
WHERE     a.kd_pegawai = p.kd_pegawai AND keluar IS NOT NULL

VIEW.name: v_t_absensi_istirahat
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_absensi_istirahat
AS
SELECT     kd_pegawai, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(masuk) AS Tanggal, dbo.GetFormatJam(MIN(keluar)) AS mulai, dbo.GetFormatJam(MAX(masuk)) AS selesai
FROM         dbo.t_absensi
GROUP BY kd_pegawai, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(masuk)
HAVING      (dbo.GetFormatJam(MIN(keluar)) IS NOT NULL) AND (CAST(SUBSTRING(dbo.GetFormatJam(MAX(masuk)), 1, 2) AS int) 
                      > CAST(SUBSTRING(dbo.GetFormatJam(MIN(keluar)), 1, 2) AS int))

VIEW.name: v_t_absensi_kantor_union
VIEW.definition:
CREATE view v_t_absensi_kantor_union as

SELECT     kd_pegawai, dbo.getformattanggal(masuk) AS tanggal, dbo.converttoDetik(dbo.getformatjam(masuk)) AS detik
FROM       t_absensi
WHERE      masuk is not null
UNION 	   ALL	
SELECT     kd_pegawai, dbo.getformattanggal(keluar) AS tanggal, dbo.converttoDetik(dbo.getformatjam(keluar)) AS detik
FROM       t_absensi
WHERE      keluar is not null

VIEW.name: v_t_absensi_masuk_keluar
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_absensi_masuk_keluar
AS
SELECT     kd_pegawai, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(masuk) AS Tanggal, dbo.GetFormatJam(MIN(masuk)) AS masuk, dbo.GetFormatJam(MAX(keluar)) AS keluar
FROM         dbo.t_absensi
GROUP BY kd_pegawai, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(masuk)

VIEW.name: v_t_absensi_pegawai_lain
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_absensi_pegawai_lain
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_absensi_pegawai_lain.no_transaksi, dbo.t_absensi_pegawai_lain.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, 
                      dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_absensi_pegawai_lain.tanggal) AS Tanggal, dbo.GetFormatJam(dbo.t_absensi_pegawai_lain.tanggal) AS Jam, 
                      case(dbo.t_absensi_pegawai_lain.jenis) when 0 then 'Keluar' Else 'Masuk' end as jenis, 
dbo.t_absensi_pegawai_lain.keterangan, dbo.m_userx.nama as [user], dbo.t_absensi_pegawai_lain.tanggal_server
FROM         dbo.t_absensi_pegawai_lain INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_absensi_pegawai_lain.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_absensi_pegawai_lain.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user
WHERE     (dbo.m_pegawai.status <> 0)

VIEW.name: v_t_absensi_ringkasan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_absensi_ringkasan
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT kd_pegawai AS kd_pegawai, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(masuk) AS Tanggal
FROM         dbo.t_absensi
GROUP BY kd_pegawai, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(masuk)
ORDER BY kd_pegawai, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(masuk)

VIEW.name: v_t_barang_satuan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_barang_satuan
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_barang, dbo.m_satuan.nama, dbo.m_barang_satuan.jumlah, dbo.m_barang_satuan.harga_jual, 
                      dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan
FROM         dbo.m_barang_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan
WHERE     (dbo.m_satuan.status <> 0) AND (dbo.m_barang_satuan.status <> 0)

VIEW.name: v_t_biaya_operasional
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_biaya_operasional
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_biaya_operasional.no_transaksi, dbo.t_biaya_operasional.no_bukti, dbo.t_biaya_operasional.tanggal, dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_divisi, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi, dbo.m_biaya.kd_index, dbo.m_jurnal.nama AS akun, dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_biaya, dbo.m_biaya.nama AS biaya, 
                      dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_jenis, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS jenis_bayar, dbo.t_biaya_operasional.nominal, dbo.t_biaya_operasional.keterangan, 
                      dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_user, dbo.t_biaya_operasional.tanggal_server, dbo.m_userx.nama AS [user]
FROM         dbo.t_biaya_operasional INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_biaya ON dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_biaya = dbo.m_biaya.kd_biaya INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jurnal ON dbo.m_biaya.kd_index = dbo.m_jurnal.kd_index INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_biaya_operasional.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user

VIEW.name: v_t_bukti_pembayaran
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_bukti_pembayaran
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi, dbo.m_customer.nama AS customer, dbo.m_negara.nama AS negara, dbo.m_jasa.nama AS [order], 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.qty, dbo.m_userx.nama AS petugas
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa = dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_customer.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_negara ON dbo.m_kota.kd_negara = dbo.m_negara.kd_negara INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user

VIEW.name: v_t_cek_proses_pembelian
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_cek_proses_pembelian
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pembelian_order.no_order, dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi, dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_nota, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.no_cicilan AS no_cicilan_angkut, dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.no_cicilan AS no_cicilan_beli, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.status AS status_pembelian, dbo.t_pembelian_order.status AS status_order, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.status AS status_angkut
FROM         dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut ON dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.no_nota = dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_nota RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_detail INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian ON dbo.t_pembelian_detail.no_transaksi = dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order ON dbo.t_pembelian.no_order = dbo.t_pembelian_order.no_order ON 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_transaksi = dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.t_hutang_cicilan ON dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi = dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.no_transaksi

VIEW.name: v_t_hutang_aset_cicilan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_hutang_aset_cicilan
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_aset.kd_aset, dbo.m_aset.kd_supplier, dbo.m_supplier.nama AS supplier, dbo.m_aset.nama AS aset, 
                      ISNULL(SUM(dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.nominal), 0) AS total_cicilan, dbo.m_aset.harga_beli, dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.no_cicilan, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.kd_jenis, dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.kd_kas, dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.nominal, dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.tanggal, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.no_bukti, dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.keterangan, dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.kd_user, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.tanggal_server, dbo.m_userx.nama AS nama_user, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, dbo.m_bank.nama AS bank, 
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS jenis_bayar
FROM         dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_aset ON dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier = dbo.m_aset.kd_supplier ON dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.kd_aset = dbo.m_aset.kd_aset
GROUP BY dbo.m_aset.kd_aset, dbo.m_aset.kd_supplier, dbo.m_supplier.nama, dbo.m_aset.nama, dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.no_cicilan, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.kd_jenis, dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.kd_kas, dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.nominal, dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.tanggal, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.no_bukti, dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.keterangan, dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.kd_user, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_aset_cicilan.tanggal_server, dbo.m_userx.nama, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, dbo.m_bank.nama, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama, 
                      dbo.m_aset.harga_beli

VIEW.name: v_t_hutang_cicilan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_hutang_cicilan
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.no_cicilan AS [No Cicilan], dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.no_transaksi AS [No Transaksi], dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.kd_jenis AS [Kode Jenis], 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.no_order AS [No Order], dbo.t_pembelian.kd_supplier AS [Kode Supplier], dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS [Jenis Pembayaran], 
                      dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.kd_kas AS [Kode Kas], dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No Rekening], dbo.m_kas.cabang AS [Cabang Bank], 
                      dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.nominal AS Cicilan, dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.tanggal, dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.no_bukti AS [No Bukti], 
                      dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.keterangan, dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.kd_user AS [Kode User], dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server], 
                      dbo.m_userx.nama AS [User], dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier
FROM         dbo.t_hutang_cicilan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian ON dbo.t_hutang_cicilan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.t_pembelian.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier

VIEW.name: v_t_hutang_cicilan_biaya_angkut_pembelian
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_hutang_cicilan_biaya_angkut_pembelian
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.no_cicilan, dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.no_nota, dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.tanggal, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.nominal, dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.kd_jenis, dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.kd_kas, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.no_bukti, dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.keterangan, dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.kd_user, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.tanggal_server, dbo.v_m_kas.bank, dbo.v_m_kas.no_rekening, dbo.v_m_kas.cabang, 
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS jenis_bayar, dbo.m_supplier.nama AS supplier
FROM         dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.v_m_kas ON dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.kd_kas = dbo.v_m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut ON dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.no_nota = dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_nota INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian ON dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_transaksi = dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order ON dbo.t_pembelian.no_order = dbo.t_pembelian_order.no_order INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.t_pembelian_order.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier

VIEW.name: v_t_hutang_pegawai
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_hutang_pegawai
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.no_transaksi, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_pegawai, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.tanggal, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_jenis, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_kas, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.nominal, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.keterangan, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_user, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.tanggal_server, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS pegawai, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS jenis_bayar, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, 
                      dbo.m_kas.cabang, dbo.m_bank.nama AS bank, dbo.m_userx.nama AS [user], ISNULL(SUM(dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.nominal), 0) AS total_cicilan, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.nominal - ISNULL(SUM(dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.nominal), 0) AS sisa_hutang
FROM         dbo.t_hutang_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.no_transaksi = dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.no_transaksi
GROUP BY dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.no_transaksi, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_pegawai, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.tanggal, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_jenis, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_kas, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.nominal, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.keterangan, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_user, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.tanggal_server, dbo.m_pegawai.nama, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, dbo.m_kas.cabang, 
                      dbo.m_bank.nama, dbo.m_userx.nama

VIEW.name: v_t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.no_cicilan, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.no_transaksi, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.kd_jenis, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.kd_kas, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.tanggal, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.keterangan, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.nominal AS total_hutang, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.nominal, dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.kd_user, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.tanggal_server, dbo.m_userx.nama, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS pegawai, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS jenis_bayar
FROM         dbo.m_jenis_bayar INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user ON 
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis = dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.kd_pegawai ON 
                      dbo.t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_hutang_pegawai.no_transaksi

VIEW.name: v_t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.kd_jarak_tempuh, dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.tanggal AS tanggal_km, dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.KM, 
                      dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.keterangan, dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.kd_user, dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.tanggal_server, 
                      dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.kd_pengisian_bbm, dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.tanggal AS tanggal_bbm, 
                      dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.BBM, dbo.m_kendaraan.no_STNK, dbo.m_kendaraan.jenis, dbo.m_kendaraan.nomor_KIR, 
                      dbo.m_kendaraan.tahun
FROM         dbo.m_kendaraan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm ON dbo.m_kendaraan.no_STNK = dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.no_STNK RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh ON dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.kd_pengisian_bbm = dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.kd_pengisian_bbm
WHERE     (dbo.m_kendaraan.status <> 0)

VIEW.name: v_t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh_bbm
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh_bbm
AS
SELECT     MIN(kd_jarak_tempuh) AS kd_jarak_tempuh, kd_pengisian_bbm
FROM         dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh
GROUP BY kd_pengisian_bbm

VIEW.name: v_t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.kd_pengisian_bbm, dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.no_STNK, dbo.m_kendaraan.jenis, 
                      dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.tanggal, dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.BBM, dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.KM, 
                      dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.keterangan, dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.kd_user, dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.tanggal_server, 
                      dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.kd_jarak_tempuh
FROM         dbo.v_t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh_bbm INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm ON 
                      dbo.v_t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh_bbm.kd_pengisian_bbm = dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.kd_pengisian_bbm INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh ON 
                      dbo.v_t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh_bbm.kd_jarak_tempuh = dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.kd_jarak_tempuh INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kendaraan ON dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.no_STNK = dbo.m_kendaraan.no_STNK

VIEW.name: v_t_kendaraan_perawatan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_kendaraan_perawatan
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_kendaraan.no_STNK, dbo.m_kendaraan.jenis, dbo.m_kendaraan.nomor_KIR, dbo.m_kendaraan.tahun, 
                      dbo.m_jenis_perawatan.kd_jenis_perawatan, dbo.m_jenis_perawatan.jenis_perawatan, dbo.t_kendaraan_perawatan.tanggal, 
                      dbo.t_kendaraan_perawatan.KM, dbo.t_kendaraan_perawatan.keterangan, dbo.t_kendaraan_perawatan.kd_user, 
                      dbo.t_kendaraan_perawatan.tanggal_server
FROM         dbo.t_kendaraan_perawatan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kendaraan ON dbo.t_kendaraan_perawatan.no_STNK = dbo.m_kendaraan.no_STNK INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_perawatan ON dbo.t_kendaraan_perawatan.kd_jenis_perawatan = dbo.m_jenis_perawatan.kd_jenis_perawatan
WHERE     (dbo.m_jenis_perawatan.status <> 0) AND (dbo.m_kendaraan.status <> 0)

VIEW.name: v_t_kendaraan_rata_rata
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_kendaraan_rata_rata
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_kendaraan.no_STNK, dbo.m_kendaraan.jenis, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.tanggal) AS Tanggal, 
                      MAX(dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.KM) - MIN(dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.KM) AS KM, DAY(MAX(dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.tanggal) 
                      - MIN(dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.tanggal)) AS Hari, SUM(dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.BBM) AS BBM
FROM         dbo.m_kendaraan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm ON dbo.m_kendaraan.no_STNK = dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.no_STNK INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh ON dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.kd_pengisian_bbm = dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.kd_pengisian_bbm
GROUP BY dbo.m_kendaraan.no_STNK, dbo.m_kendaraan.status, dbo.m_kendaraan.jenis, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.tanggal)
HAVING      (dbo.m_kendaraan.status <> 0)

VIEW.name: v_t_kendaraan_tanggung_jawab
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_kendaraan_tanggung_jawab
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_kendaraan.no_STNK, dbo.m_kendaraan.jenis, dbo.m_kendaraan.nomor_KIR, dbo.m_kendaraan.tahun, dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai, 
                      dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, dbo.m_jabatan.nama AS Jabatan, dbo.t_kendaraan_tanggung_jawab.tanggal, 
                      dbo.t_kendaraan_tanggung_jawab.keterangan, dbo.t_kendaraan_tanggung_jawab.kd_user, dbo.t_kendaraan_tanggung_jawab.Tanggal_server, 
                      dbo.m_jabatan.status
FROM         dbo.m_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_kendaraan_tanggung_jawab ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = dbo.t_kendaraan_tanggung_jawab.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kendaraan ON dbo.t_kendaraan_tanggung_jawab.no_STNK = dbo.m_kendaraan.no_STNK INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jabatan ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_jabatan = dbo.m_jabatan.kd_jabatan
WHERE     (dbo.m_pegawai.status <> 0) AND (dbo.m_kendaraan.status <> 0) AND (dbo.m_jabatan.status <> 0)

VIEW.name: v_t_mutasi_kas
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_mutasi_kas
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_mutasi_kas.no_transaksi, dbo.t_mutasi_kas.tanggal, dbo.t_mutasi_kas.kd_kas_sumber, m_kas_1.no_rekening AS no_rekening_sumber, 
                      dbo.m_bank.nama AS bank_sumber, dbo.t_mutasi_kas.kd_kas_tujuan, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS no_rekening_tujuan, 
                      m_bank_1.nama AS bank_tujuan, dbo.t_mutasi_kas.nominal, dbo.t_mutasi_kas.no_bukti_sumber, dbo.t_mutasi_kas.no_bukti_tujuan, 
                      dbo.t_mutasi_kas.keterangan, dbo.t_mutasi_kas.kd_user, dbo.m_userx.nama AS [user]
FROM         dbo.t_mutasi_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas m_kas_1 ON dbo.t_mutasi_kas.kd_kas_sumber = m_kas_1.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_mutasi_kas.kd_kas_tujuan = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON m_kas_1.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank m_bank_1 ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = m_bank_1.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_mutasi_kas.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user

VIEW.name: v_t_mutasi_stok
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_mutasi_stok
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_mutasi_stok.no_transaksi, dbo.t_mutasi_stok.tanggal, dbo.t_mutasi_stok.kd_divisi_asal, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi_asal, 
                      dbo.t_mutasi_stok.kd_divisi_tujuan, m_divisi_1.nama AS divisi_tujuan, dbo.t_mutasi_stok.keterangan, dbo.t_mutasi_stok.kd_user, 
                      dbo.t_mutasi_stok.tanggal_server, m_divisi_1.keterangan AS keterangan_divisi_tujuan, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS keterangan_divisi_asal, 
                      dbo.m_userx.nama AS petugas
FROM         dbo.t_mutasi_stok INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok.kd_divisi_asal = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi m_divisi_1 ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok.kd_divisi_tujuan = m_divisi_1.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user

VIEW.name: v_t_mutasi_stok_detail
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_mutasi_stok_detail
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.t_mutasi_stok.no_transaksi, dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_barang, dbo.GetInfoBarang(dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_barang) AS barang, 
                      dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.qty, dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_satuan, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS satuan, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.harga_beli
FROM         dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_mutasi_stok ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.no_transaksi = dbo.t_mutasi_stok.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_mutasi_stok_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_detail ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.t_pembelian_detail.kd_barang AND dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan = dbo.t_pembelian_detail.kd_satuan
ORDER BY dbo.m_barang.keterangan

VIEW.name: v_t_ongkos_kendaraan_kwantum
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_ongkos_kendaraan_kwantum
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pembelian.no_order, dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_nota, dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.no_cicilan, 
                      dbo.m_ekspedisi.nama AS ekspedisi, dbo.m_supplier.nama AS supplier, dbo.t_pembelian_order.keterangan, dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.nominal, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_transaksi, dbo.m_ekspedisi.kontak, dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS Satuan, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_detail.qty
FROM         dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_detail ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.t_pembelian_detail.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_pembelian_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian ON dbo.t_pembelian_detail.no_transaksi = dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_ekspedisi ON dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.kd_ekspedisi = dbo.m_ekspedisi.kd_ekspedisi ON 
                      dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.no_nota = dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_nota ON 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi = dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order ON dbo.t_pembelian.no_order = dbo.t_pembelian_order.no_order INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_pembelian.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.t_pembelian_order.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier
GROUP BY dbo.t_pembelian.no_order, dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_nota, dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.no_cicilan, dbo.m_ekspedisi.nama, 
                      dbo.m_supplier.nama, dbo.t_pembelian_order.keterangan, dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.nominal, dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_transaksi, 
                      dbo.m_ekspedisi.kontak, dbo.m_barang.nama, dbo.m_satuan.nama, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.qty

VIEW.name: v_t_opname_stok
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_opname_stok
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_opname_stok.no_transaksi, dbo.t_opname_stok.kd_divisi, dbo.t_opname_stok.kd_barang, dbo.t_opname_stok.kd_satuan, 
                      dbo.m_barang.nama AS barang, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS satuan, dbo.t_opname_stok.tanggal, dbo.t_opname_stok.qty, 
                      dbo.t_opname_stok.keterangan, dbo.t_opname_stok.kd_user, dbo.t_opname_stok.status, dbo.t_opname_stok.tanggal_server, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS keterangan_divisi
FROM         dbo.t_opname_stok INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_opname_stok.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_opname_stok.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_opname_stok.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan

VIEW.name: v_t_pegawai_ganti_shift
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_pegawai_ganti_shift
AS
SELECT     TOP 1 no_transaksi, tanggal, keterangan, kd_user, tanggal_server
FROM         dbo.t_pegawai_ganti_shift
ORDER BY tanggal DESC

VIEW.name: v_t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, dbo.m_jabatan.nama AS Jabatan, dbo.m_pegawai_jenis.nama AS Jenis, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.GetKodeShiftPegawai(dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai, 0) AS kd_shift, 
                      dbo.GetKodeShiftPegawai(dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai, 1) AS Shift
FROM         dbo.m_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jabatan ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_jabatan = dbo.m_jabatan.kd_jabatan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai_jenis ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_jenis = dbo.m_pegawai_jenis.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jam_kerja ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_shift = dbo.m_jam_kerja.kd_shift INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi
WHERE     (dbo.m_jabatan.status <> 0) AND (dbo.m_pegawai_jenis.status <> 0) AND (dbo.m_jam_kerja.status <> 0) AND (dbo.m_divisi.status <> 0) AND 
                      (dbo.m_pegawai.status <> 0)

VIEW.name: v_t_pegawai_izin
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_pegawai_izin
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pegawai_izin.no_transaksi, dbo.t_pegawai_izin.kd_pegawai, dbo.t_pegawai_izin.kd_izin, dbo.t_pegawai_izin.tanggal, dbo.t_pegawai_izin.awal, 
                      dbo.t_pegawai_izin.akhir, dbo.t_pegawai_izin.status, dbo.t_pegawai_izin.kd_user, dbo.t_pegawai_izin.tanggal_server, 
                      dbo.m_jenis_izin.nama AS jenis_izin, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS pegawai, dbo.t_pegawai_izin.keterangan
FROM         dbo.m_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pegawai_izin ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = dbo.t_pegawai_izin.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_izin ON dbo.t_pegawai_izin.kd_izin = dbo.m_jenis_izin.kd_izin
WHERE     (dbo.t_pegawai_izin.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku())

VIEW.name: v_t_pegawai_masuk_kantor
VIEW.definition:
CREATE view v_t_pegawai_masuk_kantor as

select kd_pegawai, tanggal,min(detik) as detik 
from v_t_absensi_kantor_union
--where kd_pegawai = 'paa059' --and tanggal = '2007/12/13'
group by kd_pegawai, tanggal

VIEW.name: v_t_pegawai_surat_peringatan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_pegawai_surat_peringatan
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.no_sp, dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.kd_pegawai, dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.tanggal, 
                      dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.keterangan, dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.status, dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.kd_user, 
                      dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.tanggal_server, dbo.m_userx.nama AS nama_user, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS pegawai, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS keterangan_divisi
FROM         dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_pegawai_surat_peringatan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi

VIEW.name: v_t_pegawai_yang_absen
VIEW.definition:
/*	DECLARE @awal DATETIME, @akhir DATETIME, @tmp DATETIME	
	SELECT @awal = DBO.GetFormatTanggal(MIN(masuk)), @akhir = DBO.GetFormatTanggal(MAX(masuk)) FROM t_absensi
	SET @tmp = @awal







*/
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_pegawai_yang_absen
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.GetNamaHari(GetAbsenSemuaPegawai.tanggal) AS Hari, GetAbsenSemuaPegawai.tanggal, 
                      GetAbsenSemuaPegawai.kd_pegawai AS [Kode Pegawai], dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.m_divisi.kepala_nota, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan, dbo.GetPegawaiAlasanTidakMasuk(GetAbsenSemuaPegawai.tanggal, GetAbsenSemuaPegawai.kd_pegawai) AS Alasan
FROM         dbo.m_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.GetAbsenSemuaPegawai() GetAbsenSemuaPegawai ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = GetAbsenSemuaPegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi

VIEW.name: v_t_pembelian
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_pembelian
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi AS [No Transaksi], dbo.t_pembelian.kd_divisi AS [Kode Divisi], dbo.t_pembelian.no_order AS [No Order], 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.kd_jenis AS [Kode Jenis], dbo.t_pembelian.kd_kas AS [Kode Kas], dbo.t_pembelian.tanggal, 
                      dbo.GetConvertStatus(dbo.t_pembelian.status) AS Pembayaran, dbo.t_pembelian.tanggal_jatuh_tempo AS [Jatuh Tempo], 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.diskon1 AS [Disc. 1], dbo.t_pembelian.diskon2 AS [Disc. 2], dbo.t_pembelian.diskon3 AS [Disc. 3], 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.diskon4 AS [Disc. 4], dbo.t_pembelian.pajak, dbo.t_pembelian.ppnbm, dbo.t_pembelian.keterangan AS Note, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.kd_user AS [Kode User], dbo.t_pembelian.tanggal_server AS [Tanggal Server], dbo.m_kas.no_rekening AS [No. Rekening], 
                      dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, dbo.GetTotalPembelian(dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi) 
                      AS [Grand Total Bersih], dbo.m_kas.cabang AS [Cabang Bank], dbo.t_pembelian.kd_supplier AS [Kode Supplier], dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas, 
                      dbo.GetTotalPajakPembelian(dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi) AS [Total Pajak]
FROM         dbo.t_pembelian INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_pembelian.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_pembelian.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.t_pembelian.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_pembelian.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user
GROUP BY dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi, dbo.t_pembelian.kd_divisi, dbo.t_pembelian.no_order, dbo.t_pembelian.kd_jenis, dbo.t_pembelian.kd_kas, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.tanggal, dbo.t_pembelian.tanggal_jatuh_tempo, dbo.t_pembelian.status, dbo.t_pembelian.diskon1, dbo.t_pembelian.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian.diskon4, dbo.t_pembelian.pajak, dbo.t_pembelian.ppnbm, dbo.t_pembelian.keterangan, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.kd_user, dbo.t_pembelian.tanggal_server, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, dbo.m_bank.nama, dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.m_supplier.nama, 
                      dbo.m_kas.cabang, dbo.t_pembelian.kd_supplier, dbo.m_userx.nama, dbo.GetConvertStatus(dbo.t_pembelian.status), 
                      dbo.GetTotalPajakPembelian(dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi)

VIEW.name: v_t_pembelian_biaya_angkut
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_pembelian_biaya_angkut
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_nota, dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_transaksi, dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.kd_ekspedisi, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.nominal, dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.status, dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.kd_kas, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.kd_jenis, dbo.m_ekspedisi.nama AS ekspedisi, dbo.m_ekspedisi.kontak, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.tanggal_jatuh_tempo, dbo.GetCicilanHutangBiayaAngkutPembelian(dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_nota) 
                      AS total_cicilan, dbo.t_pembelian_order.no_pp_order, dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS Satuan, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.qty, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_detail.harga_beli, dbo.m_ekspedisi.email AS NoKendaraan, dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.keterangan, 
                      dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.no_cicilan, dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.nominal AS Nominal_cicilan, dbo.v_t_pembelian.[No Transaksi], 
                      dbo.v_t_pembelian.Divisi, dbo.v_t_pembelian.Supplier, dbo.v_t_pembelian.[Grand Total Bersih], dbo.v_t_pembelian.[No Order], 
                      dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.tanggal AS Tanggal_cicilan, dbo.v_t_pembelian.tanggal AS tanggal_nota, dbo.t_pembelian_order.diskon1 AS Expr1,
                       dbo.t_pembelian_order.diskon2, dbo.t_pembelian_order.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian_order.diskon4
FROM         dbo.t_pembelian_order INNER JOIN
                      dbo.v_t_pembelian INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_detail ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.t_pembelian_detail.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_pembelian_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan ON 
                      dbo.v_t_pembelian.[No Transaksi] = dbo.t_pembelian_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_ekspedisi ON dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.kd_ekspedisi = dbo.m_ekspedisi.kd_ekspedisi ON 
                      dbo.v_t_pembelian.[No Transaksi] = dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_transaksi ON 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order.no_order = dbo.v_t_pembelian.[No Order] LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan ON dbo.t_pembelian_biaya_angkut.no_nota = dbo.t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan.no_nota

VIEW.name: v_t_pembelian_detail
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_pembelian_detail
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pembelian_detail.no_transaksi, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.kd_barang, dbo.GetInfoBarang(dbo.t_pembelian_detail.kd_barang) AS barang, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_detail.qty, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.kd_satuan, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS satuan, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.harga_beli, 
                      dbo.GetHargaKotorDetail(dbo.t_pembelian_detail.harga_beli, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.qty) AS total_kotor, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon1, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon2, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon4, 
                      dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_pembelian_detail.harga_beli, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_pembelian.diskon1, dbo.t_pembelian.diskon2, dbo.t_pembelian.diskon3, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian.diskon4, dbo.t_pembelian.pajak, dbo.t_pembelian.ppnbm) * dbo.t_pembelian_detail.qty AS subtotal, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_detail.jenis
FROM         dbo.t_pembelian INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_detail ON dbo.t_pembelian.no_transaksi = dbo.t_pembelian_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_pembelian_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_pembelian_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_pembelian.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi

VIEW.name: v_t_pembelian_order
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_pembelian_order
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pembelian_order.no_order, dbo.t_pembelian_order.kd_divisi, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi, dbo.t_pembelian_order.no_pp_order, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order.kd_supplier, dbo.m_supplier.nama AS supplier, dbo.t_pembelian_order.tanggal, dbo.t_pembelian_order.tanggal_terima, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order.keterangan, dbo.t_pembelian_order.status, dbo.t_pembelian_order.diskon1, dbo.t_pembelian_order.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian_order.diskon4, dbo.t_pembelian_order.jaminan, dbo.t_pembelian_order.pajak, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order.ppnbm, dbo.t_pembelian_order.kd_user, dbo.t_pembelian_order.tanggal_server, dbo.m_userx.nama AS [user], 
                      dbo.m_kota.nama AS kota
FROM         dbo.t_pembelian_order INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_pembelian_order.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.t_pembelian_order.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_pembelian_order.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_supplier.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota

VIEW.name: v_t_pembelian_order_detail
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_pembelian_order_detail
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.no_order, dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.kd_barang, dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.kd_satuan, 
                      dbo.m_barang.nama AS barang, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS satuan, dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.qty, dbo.m_barang_satuan.jumlah, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.harga_beli, dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.diskon4, 
                      dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.harga_beli, dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.diskon1, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.diskon2, dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order.diskon1, dbo.t_pembelian_order.diskon2, dbo.t_pembelian_order.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian_order.diskon4, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order.pajak, dbo.t_pembelian_order.ppnbm) AS subtotal, dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.jenis
FROM         dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_satuan ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_barang AND 
                      dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan = dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order ON dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.no_order = dbo.t_pembelian_order.no_order
GROUP BY dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.no_order, dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.kd_barang, dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.kd_satuan, dbo.m_barang.nama, 
                      dbo.m_satuan.nama, dbo.m_barang_satuan.jumlah, dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.qty, dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.harga_beli, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.diskon2, dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.diskon3, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.diskon4, dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.harga_beli, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.diskon2, dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.diskon3, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_pembelian_order.diskon1, dbo.t_pembelian_order.diskon2, dbo.t_pembelian_order.diskon3, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order.diskon4, dbo.t_pembelian_order.pajak, dbo.t_pembelian_order.ppnbm), dbo.t_pembelian_order_detail.jenis

VIEW.name: v_t_pembelian_order_spare_part
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_pembelian_order_spare_part
AS
SELECT     ord.no_order, ord.kd_divisi, ord.no_pp_order, ord.kd_supplier, ord.tanggal, ord.tanggal_terima, ord.status, ord.keterangan, 
                      ord.diskon AS diskon_master, ord.pajak, ord.ppnbm, ord.kd_user, ord.tanggal_server, userx.nama, detail.barang, detail.qty, detail.harga_beli, 
                      detail.diskon AS diskon_detail, supplier.nama AS supplier, divisi.nama AS divisi, supplier.alamat, supplier.fax, supplier.kontak, 
                      dbo.GetHargaBersih(detail.harga_beli, detail.diskon, ord.diskon, 0, 0, ord.pajak, ord.ppnbm) AS harga_bersih, dbo.GetHargaBersih(detail.harga_beli, 
                      detail.diskon, ord.diskon, 0, 0, ord.pajak, ord.ppnbm) * detail.qty AS sub_total
FROM         dbo.t_pembelian_order_spare_part ord INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_order_spare_part_detail detail ON ord.no_order = detail.no_order INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi divisi ON ord.kd_divisi = divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier supplier ON ord.kd_supplier = supplier.kd_supplier INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx userx ON ord.kd_user = userx.kd_user

VIEW.name: v_t_pembelian_retur
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_pembelian_retur
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pembelian_retur.no_retur, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_divisi, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_supplier, dbo.m_supplier.nama AS supplier, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_jenis, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS pembayaran, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_kas, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, dbo.m_kas.cabang, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_retur.pajak, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.ppnbm, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.tanggal, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.no_bukti, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.keterangan, 
                      SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.harga, dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_pembelian_retur.diskon1, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.diskon2,
