                      dbo.t_pembelian_retur.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.diskon4, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.pajak, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.ppnbm) * dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.qty) 
                      AS total, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_user, dbo.m_userx.nama AS petugas, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.tanggal_server
FROM         dbo.t_pembelian_retur INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur.no_retur = dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.no_retur INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user
GROUP BY dbo.t_pembelian_retur.no_retur, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_divisi, dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_jenis, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_kas, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, dbo.m_kas.cabang, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.pajak, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.ppnbm, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_retur.tanggal, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.no_bukti, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_supplier, dbo.m_supplier.nama, dbo.m_userx.nama, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_retur.kd_user, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.tanggal_server, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.keterangan

VIEW.name: v_t_pembelian_retur_detail
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_pembelian_retur_detail
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.no_retur, dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.kd_barang, dbo.GetInfoBarang(dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.kd_barang) AS barang, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.kd_satuan, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS Satuan, dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.qty, dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.harga, 
                      dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.harga, dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_pembelian_retur.diskon1, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_retur.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.diskon4, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.pajak, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.ppnbm) AS harga_bersih, 
                      dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.harga, dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_pembelian_retur.diskon1, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_pembelian_retur.diskon3, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.diskon4, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.pajak, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.ppnbm) 
                      * dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.qty AS subtotal, dbo.t_pembelian_retur.keterangan
FROM         dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pembelian_retur ON dbo.t_pembelian_retur_detail.no_retur = dbo.t_pembelian_retur.no_retur

VIEW.name: v_t_penambahan_kas
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_penambahan_kas
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penambahan_kas.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penambahan_kas.tanggal, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, dbo.m_bank.nama, dbo.t_penambahan_kas.nominal, 
                      dbo.t_penambahan_kas.keterangan
FROM         dbo.t_penambahan_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_penambahan_kas.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank

VIEW.name: v_t_pendapatan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_pendapatan
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_pendapatan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_pendapatan.no_bukti, dbo.t_pendapatan.tanggal, dbo.t_pendapatan.kd_divisi, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS divisi, m_pendapatan_1.kd_index, dbo.m_jurnal.nama AS akun, dbo.t_pendapatan.kd_pendapatan, 
                      m_pendapatan_1.nama AS pendapatan, dbo.t_pendapatan.kd_jenis, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS jenis_bayar, dbo.t_pendapatan.nominal, 
                      dbo.t_pendapatan.keterangan, dbo.t_pendapatan.kd_user, dbo.t_pendapatan.tanggal_server
FROM         dbo.m_jurnal INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pendapatan m_pendapatan_1 ON dbo.m_jurnal.kd_index = m_pendapatan_1.kd_index INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_pendapatan ON m_pendapatan_1.kd_pendapatan = dbo.t_pendapatan.kd_pendapatan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_pendapatan.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_pendapatan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis

VIEW.name: v_t_penjualan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_penjualan
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer, dbo.m_customer.nama AS customer, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS keterangan_divisi, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_kas, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal_jatuh_tempo, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_jenis, 
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS pembayaran, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_voucher, dbo.m_voucher.nama AS voucher, dbo.t_penjualan.no_bukti, dbo.t_penjualan.status, dbo.t_penjualan.pajak, 
                      dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.status) AS total_cicilan, dbo.t_penjualan.keterangan, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_user, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal_server, 
                      dbo.m_userx.nama AS petugas, dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) AS grand_total, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon_uang, dbo.GetTotalPajakPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) AS total_pajak, dbo.m_kota.nama AS kota, 
                      dbo.m_voucher.nominal AS nominal_voucher,
                          (SELECT     ISNULL(SUM(nominal), 0) AS Expr1
                            FROM          dbo.t_piutang_cicilan
                            WHERE      (no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi)) AS [Total Cicilan]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_voucher ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_voucher = dbo.m_voucher.kd_voucher INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_customer.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota
WHERE     (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal) > DATEADD(week, - 1, GETDATE()))

VIEW.name: v_t_penjualan_1
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_penjualan_1
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer, dbo.m_customer.nama AS customer, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS keterangan_divisi, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_kas, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal_jatuh_tempo, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_jenis, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS pembayaran, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.kd_voucher, dbo.m_voucher.nama AS voucher, dbo.t_penjualan.no_bukti, dbo.t_penjualan.status, dbo.t_penjualan.pajak, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.keterangan, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_user, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal_server, dbo.m_userx.nama AS petugas, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_total.total AS grand_total, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.diskon_uang, 0 AS total_pajak, dbo.m_kota.nama AS kota, dbo.m_voucher.nominal AS nominal_voucher
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_voucher ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_voucher = dbo.m_voucher.kd_voucher INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_customer.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_total ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_total.no_transaksi
WHERE     (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal) = dbo.GetFormatTanggal(GETDATE()))

VIEW.name: v_t_penjualan_5
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_penjualan_5
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer, dbo.m_customer.nama AS customer, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS keterangan_divisi, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_kas, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal_jatuh_tempo, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_jenis, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS pembayaran, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.kd_voucher, dbo.m_voucher.nama AS voucher, dbo.t_penjualan.no_bukti, dbo.t_penjualan.status, dbo.t_penjualan.pajak, 
                      dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.status) AS total_cicilan, dbo.t_penjualan.keterangan, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_user, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal_server, dbo.m_userx.nama AS petugas, dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) AS grand_total, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon_uang, 
                      dbo.GetTotalPajakPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) AS total_pajak, dbo.m_kota.nama AS kota, dbo.m_voucher.nominal AS nominal_voucher,
                          (SELECT     ISNULL(SUM(nominal), 0)
                            FROM          t_piutang_cicilan
                            WHERE      no_transaksi = t_penjualan.no_transaksi) AS [Total Cicilan]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_voucher ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_voucher = dbo.m_voucher.kd_voucher INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_customer.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota
WHERE     (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal) > DATEADD(day, - 1, GETDATE()))

VIEW.name: v_t_penjualan_detail
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_penjualan_detail
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, dbo.GetInfoBarang(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang) 
                      AS barang, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS pegawai, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan, 
                      dbo.m_satuan.nama AS satuan, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, dbo.m_barang.keterangan AS keterangan_barang, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.jenis, 
                      dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0) * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty AS subtotal, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.point1, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.point2
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_detail INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai

VIEW.name: v_t_penjualan_detail_1
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_penjualan_detail_1
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi, dbo.m_barang.nama AS barang, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty, 
                      dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS pegawai, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS satuan, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, 
                      dbo.m_barang.keterangan AS keterangan_barang, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.jenis, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty AS subtotal, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_detail INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai

VIEW.name: v_t_penjualan_detail_5
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_penjualan_detail_5
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, dbo.GetInfoBarang(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang) 
                      AS barang, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS pegawai, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan, 
                      dbo.m_satuan.nama AS satuan, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, dbo.m_barang.keterangan AS keterangan_barang, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.jenis, 
                      dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0) * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty AS subtotal, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.point1, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.point2
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_detail INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai

VIEW.name: v_t_penjualan_jasa
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_penjualan_jasa
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi, dbo.m_customer.nama AS customer, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.tanggal_pesan, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.pajak, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.other, dbo.m_voucher.nominal AS nominal_voucher, dbo.m_voucher.nama AS voucher, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.status, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_bukti, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.diskon AS diskon_total, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.keterangan, 
                      dbo.m_bank.nama AS kas, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS jenis_bayar, dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi) 
                      AS total_penjualan, dbo.GetTotalPajakPenjualanJasa(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi) AS nominal_pajak, dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas
FROM         dbo.m_voucher INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer ON 
                      dbo.m_voucher.kd_voucher = dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_voucher INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user

VIEW.name: v_t_penjualan_jasa_detail
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_penjualan_jasa_detail
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.no_transaksi, dbo.m_jasa.nama AS barang, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.qty, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.harga, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.diskon AS diskon_item, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.harga, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.diskon, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0) * dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.qty AS subtotal
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa = dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa_kategori ON dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = dbo.m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai
WHERE     (dbo.m_jasa_kategori.status = '2')

VIEW.name: v_t_penjualan_new
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_penjualan_new
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer, dbo.m_customer.nama AS customer, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS keterangan_divisi, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_kas, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal_jatuh_tempo, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_jenis, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS pembayaran, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.kd_voucher, dbo.m_voucher.nama AS voucher, dbo.t_penjualan.no_bukti, dbo.t_penjualan.status, dbo.t_penjualan.pajak, 
                      dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.status) AS total_cicilan, dbo.t_penjualan.keterangan, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_user, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal_server, dbo.m_userx.nama AS petugas, dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) AS grand_total, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon_uang, 
                      dbo.GetTotalPajakPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) AS total_pajak, dbo.m_kota.nama AS kota, 
                      dbo.m_voucher.nominal AS nominal_voucher
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_voucher ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_voucher = dbo.m_voucher.kd_voucher INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_customer.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota
where dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal)=dbo.GetFormatTanggal(GETDATE())

VIEW.name: v_t_penjualan_nota
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW v_t_penjualan_nota
AS
SELECT j.no_transaksi, c.nama as keterangan
FROM t_penjualan j, m_customer c
WHERE j.kd_customer = c.kd_customer

UNION ALL

SELECT no_transaksi, keterangan
FROM t_penjualan_nota_kosong

VIEW.name: v_t_penjualan_nota_kosong
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_penjualan_nota_kosong
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan_nota_kosong.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan_nota_kosong.keterangan, dbo.t_penjualan_nota_kosong.kd_user, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_nota_kosong.tanggal_server, dbo.m_userx.nama
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_nota_kosong INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_penjualan_nota_kosong.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user

VIEW.name: v_t_penjualan_nota_kosong_belum_terdaftar
VIEW.definition: CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_penjualan_nota_kosong_belum_terdaftar AS SELECT Nota AS [No. Transaksi], '' AS [Keterangan], KepalaNota FROM dbo.getSemuaNotaKosong() UNION SELECT no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], Keterangan, '-' FROM t_penjualan_nota_kosong

VIEW.name: v_t_penjualan_order
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[v_t_penjualan_order]
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan_order.no_order, dbo.t_penjualan_order.kd_divisi, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi, dbo.t_penjualan_order.kd_customer, 
                      dbo.m_customer.nama AS customer, dbo.t_penjualan_order.tanggal, dbo.t_penjualan_order.tanggal_terima, dbo.t_penjualan_order.keterangan, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_order.status, dbo.t_penjualan_order.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_order.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan_order.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_order.diskon4, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_order.jaminan, dbo.t_penjualan_order.pajak, dbo.t_penjualan_order.kd_user, dbo.t_penjualan_order.tanggal_server, dbo.m_userx.nama AS [user], 
                      dbo.m_kota.nama AS kota, dbo.m_customer.alamat, dbo.m_customer.telepon, dbo.m_customer.hp
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_order INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan_order.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan_order.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_penjualan_order.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_customer.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota

VIEW.name: v_t_penjualan_order_detail
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[v_t_penjualan_order_detail]
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.no_order, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.kd_barang, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.kd_satuan, dbo.m_barang.nama AS barang, 
                      dbo.m_satuan.nama AS satuan, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.qty, dbo.m_barang_satuan.jumlah, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.harga_jual, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.diskon4, 
                      dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.harga_jual, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_penjualan_order.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_order.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_order.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_order.diskon4, dbo.t_penjualan_order.pajak, 0) AS subtotal, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.jenis, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS pegawai
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_satuan ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_barang AND dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan = dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_order ON dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.no_order = dbo.t_penjualan_order.no_order INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai
GROUP BY dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.no_order, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.kd_barang, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.kd_satuan, dbo.m_barang.nama, 
                      dbo.m_satuan.nama, dbo.m_barang_satuan.jumlah, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.qty, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.harga_jual, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.diskon4, 
                      dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.harga_jual, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_penjualan_order.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_order.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_order.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_order.diskon4, dbo.t_penjualan_order.pajak, 0), dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.jenis, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_order_detail.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama

VIEW.name: v_t_penjualan_pajak
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_penjualan_pajak
AS
SELECT     dbo.g_info_perusahaan.nama, dbo.g_info_perusahaan.alamat, dbo.g_info_perusahaan.npwp, dbo.g_info_perusahaan.direktur, 
                      dbo.m_customer.npwp_nama, dbo.m_customer.npwp_alamat, dbo.m_customer.npwp_no, dbo.m_customer.nppkp_no, dbo.m_barang.nama AS barang, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS satuan, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal, dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, 
                      dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0) * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty AS total_kotor, 
                      dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4, 0, 0) * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty AS total_bersih
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan CROSS JOIN
                      dbo.g_info_perusahaan

VIEW.name: v_t_penjualan_per_tanggal
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_penjualan_per_tanggal
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT jual.tanggal AS Tanggal, dtl.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, SUM(dbo.GetMaxSatuan(dtl.kd_barang, 
                      dtl.kd_satuan, dtl.qty)) AS Kuantum
FROM         dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan jual INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail dtl ON jual.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dtl.kd_barang
GROUP BY dtl.kd_barang, dbo.m_barang.nama, jual.tanggal

VIEW.name: v_t_penjualan_retur
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_penjualan_retur
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan_retur.no_retur, dbo.t_penjualan_retur.tanggal, dbo.t_penjualan_retur.kd_divisi, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi, 
                      dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS keterangan_divisi, dbo.t_penjualan_retur.kd_customer, dbo.m_customer.nama AS customer, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_retur.kd_jenis, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS jenis_bayar, 
                      SUM(dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail.harga_jual * dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail.qty) AS total_retur, dbo.t_penjualan_retur.no_bukti, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_retur.keterangan, dbo.t_penjualan_retur.kd_user, dbo.t_penjualan_retur.tanggal_server, dbo.m_userx.nama AS petugas, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_retur.kd_kas, dbo.v_m_kas.kd_bank, dbo.v_m_kas.bank, dbo.v_m_kas.kd_index, dbo.v_m_kas.no_rekening, dbo.v_m_kas.kota, 
                      dbo.v_m_kas.kontak, dbo.v_m_kas.cabang
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_retur INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan_retur.no_retur = dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail.no_retur INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_penjualan_retur.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_penjualan_retur.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.v_m_kas ON dbo.t_penjualan_retur.kd_kas = dbo.v_m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan_retur.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan_retur.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang
GROUP BY dbo.t_penjualan_retur.no_retur, dbo.t_penjualan_retur.tanggal, dbo.t_penjualan_retur.kd_divisi, dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_retur.kd_customer, dbo.m_customer.nama, dbo.t_penjualan_retur.kd_jenis, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama, dbo.t_penjualan_retur.no_bukti, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_retur.keterangan, dbo.t_penjualan_retur.kd_user, dbo.t_penjualan_retur.tanggal_server, dbo.m_userx.nama, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_retur.kd_kas, dbo.v_m_kas.kd_bank, dbo.v_m_kas.bank, dbo.v_m_kas.kd_index, dbo.v_m_kas.no_rekening, dbo.v_m_kas.kota, 
                      dbo.v_m_kas.kontak, dbo.v_m_kas.cabang

VIEW.name: v_t_penjualan_retur_detail
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_penjualan_retur_detail
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan_retur.no_retur, dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail.kd_barang, dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS pegawai, 
                      dbo.GetInfoBarang(dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail.kd_barang) AS barang, dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail.kd_satuan, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS satuan, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail.harga_jual, dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail.qty, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail.harga_jual * dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail.qty AS total
FROM         dbo.m_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_retur INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan_retur.no_retur = dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail.no_retur ON 
                      dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan = dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan_retur.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_penjualan_retur_detail.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai

VIEW.name: v_t_penjualan_subtotal
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_penjualan_subtotal
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS pegawai, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa, dbo.m_jasa.nama AS jasa, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.qty, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.harga, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.diskon, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.harga * dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.qty - dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.diskon AS subtotal
FROM         dbo.m_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail ON dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa = dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai

VIEW.name: v_t_persewaan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_persewaan
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi, dbo.m_customer.nama AS customer, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.tanggal_pesan, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.pajak, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.other, dbo.m_voucher.nominal AS nominal_voucher, dbo.m_voucher.nama AS voucher, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS divisi, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.status, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_bukti, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.diskon AS diskon_total, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.keterangan, 
                      dbo.m_bank.nama AS kas, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS jenis_bayar, dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi) 
                      AS total_penjualan, dbo.GetTotalPajakPenjualanJasa(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi) AS nominal_pajak, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.services, 
                      dbo.GetTotalServicesPenjualanJasa(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi) AS nominal_service, dbo.m_userx.nama AS Petugas
FROM         dbo.m_voucher INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer ON 
                      dbo.m_voucher.kd_voucher = dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_voucher INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user

VIEW.name: v_t_persewaan_detail
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_persewaan_detail
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.no_transaksi, dbo.m_jasa.nama AS Jasa, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.qty AS Night, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.harga, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.diskon AS diskon_item, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS pegawai, dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.harga, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.diskon, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0) * dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.qty AS subtotal
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa = dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jasa_kategori ON dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = dbo.m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai

VIEW.name: v_t_persewaan_jasa
VIEW.definition: CREATE VIEW v_t_persewaan_jasa AS SELECT dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi, dbo.m_customer.nama, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.tanggal_pesan, dbo.m_jasa.nama AS Jasa, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.qty, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.harga, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.diskon FROM dbo.t_penjualan_jasa INNER JOIN dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN dbo.m_jasa ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa = dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa INNER JOIN dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN dbo.m_jasa_kategori ON dbo.m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = dbo.m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori WHERE (dbo.m_jasa_kategori.status = '1')

VIEW.name: v_t_piutang_cicilan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_piutang_cicilan
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_cicilan, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.tanggal, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.kd_jenis, 
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS jenis_bayar, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.nominal, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_bukti, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.keterangan, 
                      dbo.m_userx.nama AS [user], dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Penagih, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer, 
                      dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.m_divisi.keterangan AS Keterangan_Divisi
FROM         dbo.t_piutang_cicilan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan ON dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi

VIEW.name: v_t_piutang_jasa_cicilan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_piutang_jasa_cicilan
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.no_cicilan, dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.tanggal, 
                      dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.kd_jenis, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS jenis_bayar, dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.nominal, 
                      dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.no_bukti, dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.keterangan, dbo.m_userx.nama AS [user], dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.kd_pegawai, 
                      dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Penagih, dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.other
FROM         dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user

VIEW.name: v_t_piutang_terbayar
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_piutang_terbayar
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_tagihan, dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_transaksi, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_cicilan, dbo.t_tagihan.kd_pegawai, 
                      dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer, dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_customer.kd_kota, 
                      dbo.m_kota.nama AS Kota, dbo.t_tagihan.keluar, dbo.t_tagihan.kembali, dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal AS tgl_trx, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.kd_jenis, 
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS [Jenis Bayar], dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.kd_kas, dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.nominal, 
                      dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) - dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.status) AS sisa_piutang, 
                      dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_bukti, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.tanggal AS tgl_piutang
FROM         dbo.t_tagihan_detail INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_tagihan ON dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_tagihan = dbo.t_tagihan.no_tagihan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_piutang_cicilan ON dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_transaksi = dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_transaksi AND 
                      dbo.t_tagihan_detail.kembali = dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.tanggal INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_tagihan.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan ON dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_customer.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_jenis = dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank
WHERE     (dbo.t_tagihan_detail.status = 2)

VIEW.name: v_t_piutang_total
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_piutang_total
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.tanggal_server, dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi) 
                      AS Total_penjualan, ISNULL(SUM(dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.nominal), 0) AS total_cicilan, 
                      dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi) - ISNULL(SUM(dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.nominal), 0) AS sisa_piutang, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.status, dbo.m_customer.nama
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_jasa LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer
WHERE     (dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.status = 0)
GROUP BY dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.tanggal_server, dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi), 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.status, dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.awal, dbo.m_customer.nama
HAVING      (dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(dbo.t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi) - ISNULL(SUM(dbo.t_piutang_jasa_cicilan.nominal), 0) > 0)

VIEW.name: v_t_prive
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_prive
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_prive.no_transaksi, dbo.t_prive.tanggal, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, dbo.m_bank.nama AS bank, dbo.t_prive.nominal, dbo.t_prive.keterangan
FROM         dbo.m_kas INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_prive ON dbo.m_kas.kd_kas = dbo.t_prive.kd_kas

VIEW.name: v_t_surat
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_surat
AS
SELECT     dbo.m_surat.kd_surat, dbo.m_surat.kd_jenis_surat, dbo.m_jenis_surat.nama AS [Jenis Surat], dbo.m_surat.prihal, dbo.m_surat.lampiran, 
                      dbo.m_surat.tanggal_buat, dbo.m_surat.tanggal_perpanjangan, dbo.m_surat.instansi, dbo.m_surat.biaya, dbo.m_surat.keterangan, 
                      dbo.m_userx.nama AS UserName, dbo.m_surat.tanggal_server
FROM         dbo.m_jenis_surat INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_surat ON dbo.m_jenis_surat.kd_jenis_surat = dbo.m_surat.kd_jenis_surat INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.m_surat.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user
WHERE     (dbo.m_jenis_surat.status <> 0) AND (dbo.m_surat.status <> 0)

VIEW.name: v_t_surat_berharga
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_surat_berharga
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_surat_berharga.no_surat_berharga, dbo.t_surat_berharga.tanggal_terima, dbo.t_surat_berharga.status_asal, dbo.t_surat_berharga.nominal, 
                      dbo.v_m_pihak_lain.nama AS pihak_lain, dbo.v_m_pihak_lain.kontak, dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_pihak_lain, dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_bank, 
                      dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_jenis, dbo.t_surat_berharga.tanggal_jatuh_tempo, dbo.t_surat_berharga.tanggal_setor, dbo.t_surat_berharga.tanggal_cair, 
                      dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_kas_setor, dbo.t_surat_berharga.status_blong, dbo.t_surat_berharga.keterangan, dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_user, 
                      dbo.t_surat_berharga.tanggal_server, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, dbo.m_kas.cabang, m_bank_1.nama AS bank_setor, dbo.m_userx.nama AS [user], 
                      m_bank_1.nama AS bank_kas, m_bank_2.nama AS bank_penerbit, dbo.GetJumlahTerpakaiSuratBerharga(dbo.t_surat_berharga.no_surat_berharga) 
                      AS terpakai, dbo.t_surat_berharga.nominal - dbo.GetJumlahTerpakaiSuratBerharga(dbo.t_surat_berharga.no_surat_berharga) AS sisa
FROM         dbo.m_bank m_bank_1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON m_bank_1.kd_bank = dbo.m_kas.kd_bank RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.t_surat_berharga INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank m_bank_2 ON dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_bank = m_bank_2.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.v_m_pihak_lain ON dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_pihak_lain = dbo.v_m_pihak_lain.kd_pihak_lain INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user ON dbo.m_kas.kd_kas = dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_kas_setor
GROUP BY dbo.t_surat_berharga.no_surat_berharga, m_bank_1.nama, dbo.t_surat_berharga.tanggal_terima, dbo.t_surat_berharga.status_asal, 
                      dbo.t_surat_berharga.nominal, dbo.v_m_pihak_lain.nama, dbo.v_m_pihak_lain.kontak, dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_pihak_lain, 
                      dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_bank, dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_jenis, dbo.t_surat_berharga.tanggal_jatuh_tempo, dbo.t_surat_berharga.tanggal_setor, 
                      dbo.t_surat_berharga.tanggal_cair, dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_kas_setor, dbo.t_surat_berharga.status_blong, dbo.t_surat_berharga.keterangan, 
                      dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_user, dbo.t_surat_berharga.tanggal_server, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, dbo.m_kas.cabang, m_bank_1.nama, 
                      dbo.m_userx.nama, m_bank_2.nama, dbo.t_surat_berharga.nominal - dbo.GetJumlahTerpakaiSuratBerharga(dbo.t_surat_berharga.no_surat_berharga)

VIEW.name: v_t_surat_berharga_union_dari_transaksi
VIEW.definition:
CREATE     VIEW [dbo].[v_t_surat_berharga_union_dari_transaksi]
AS
-- no_transaksi, kd_kas, tanggal, debet, kredit, kd_user
--transaksi biaya operasional
--di kredit
SELECT 'Biaya Operasional' as transaksi, t.no_transaksi, t.no_bukti, k.no_rekening, b.nama as bank, t.tanggal, t.nominal, u.nama, 0 as status
FROM t_biaya_operasional t, m_kas k, m_userx u, m_bank b, m_jenis_bayar j
WHERE t.kd_kas = k.kd_kas AND t.kd_user = u.kd_user AND k.kd_bank = b.kd_bank AND t.kd_jenis = j.kd_jenis AND j.status = 2

UNION ALL
--cicilan hutang biaya angkut pembelian
--di kredit
SELECT 'Cicilan Hutang Ekspedisi' as transaksi, t.no_cicilan, t.no_bukti, k.no_rekening, b.nama as bank, t.tanggal, t.nominal, u.nama, 0 as status
FROM t_hutang_biaya_angkut_cicilan t, m_kas k, m_userx u, m_bank b, m_jenis_bayar j
WHERE t.kd_kas = k.kd_kas AND t.kd_user = u.kd_user AND k.kd_bank = b.kd_bank AND t.kd_jenis = j.kd_jenis AND j.status = 2

UNION ALL
--cicilan hutang pembelian
--di kredit
SELECT 'Cicilan Hutang Pembelian Barang' as transaksi, t.no_cicilan, t.no_bukti, k.no_rekening, b.nama as bank, t.tanggal, t.nominal, u.nama, 0 as status
FROM t_hutang_cicilan t, m_kas k, m_userx u, m_bank b, m_jenis_bayar j
WHERE t.kd_kas = k.kd_kas AND t.kd_user = u.kd_user AND k.kd_bank = b.kd_bank AND t.kd_jenis = j.kd_jenis AND j.status = 2

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Cicilan Hutang Pembelian Aset' AS transaksi, cast( t .no_cicilan as varchar), t .no_bukti, k.no_rekening, b.nama AS bank, t .tanggal, t .nominal, u.nama, 0 AS status
FROM t_hutang_aset_cicilan t, m_kas k, m_userx u, m_bank b, m_jenis_bayar j
WHERE     t .kd_kas = k.kd_kas AND t .kd_user = u.kd_user AND k.kd_bank = b.kd_bank AND t .kd_jenis = j.kd_jenis AND j.status = 2

UNION ALL
--hutang pegawai (kas bon)
--di kredit
SELECT 'Hutang / Kas Bon Pegawai' as transaksi, t.no_transaksi, t.no_bukti, k.no_rekening, b.nama as bank, t.tanggal, t.nominal, u.nama, 0 as status
FROM t_hutang_pegawai t, m_kas k, m_userx u, m_bank b, m_jenis_bayar j
WHERE t.kd_kas = k.kd_kas AND t.kd_user = u.kd_user AND k.kd_bank = b.kd_bank AND t.kd_jenis = j.kd_jenis AND j.status = 2

UNION ALL
--cicilan hutang pegawai (cicilan kas bon)
--di debet
SELECT 'Cicilan Hutang Pegawai' as transaksi, CAST(t.no_cicilan AS VARCHAR), t.no_bukti, k.no_rekening, b.nama as bank, t.tanggal, t.nominal as debet, u.nama, 1 as status
FROM t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan t, m_kas k, m_userx u, m_bank b, m_jenis_bayar j
WHERE t.kd_kas = k.kd_kas AND t.kd_user = u.kd_user AND k.kd_bank = b.kd_bank AND t.kd_jenis = j.kd_jenis AND j.status = 2

UNION ALL 
--jaminan / uang muka order pembelian
--di debet
SELECT 'Jaminan Order Pembelian' as transaksi, t_pembelian_order.no_order, t_pembelian_order.no_bukti, m_kas.no_rekening, m_bank.nama, t_pembelian_order.tanggal,
	t_pembelian_order.jaminan, m_userx.nama, 1
FROM t_pembelian_order INNER JOIN m_kas ON t_pembelian_order.kd_kas = m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN m_userx ON t_pembelian_order.kd_user = m_userx.kd_user 
	INNER JOIN m_bank on m_kas.kd_bank = m_bank.kd_bank INNER JOIN m_jenis_bayar ON t_pembelian_order.kd_jenis_bayar = m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis 
WHERE t_pembelian_order.status = 1

UNION ALL
--retur pembelian barang
--di debet
SELECT 'Retur Pembelian Barang' as transaksi, rd.no_retur, r.no_bukti, k.no_rekening, b.nama as bank, r.tanggal,
	SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(DBO.GetHargaBersih(rd.harga, rd.diskon1, rd.diskon2, rd.diskon3, rd.diskon2, 0, 0), r.diskon1, r.diskon2, r.diskon3, r.diskon4, r.pajak, r.ppnbm)* rd.qty) as grand_total, u.nama, 1 as status
FROM t_pembelian_retur r, t_pembelian_retur_detail rd, m_kas k, m_userx u, m_bank b, m_jenis_bayar jenis
WHERE r.kd_kas = k.kd_kas AND r.kd_user = u.kd_user AND k.kd_bank = b.kd_bank AND jenis.status = 2 AND rd.no_retur = r.no_retur
GROUP BY rd.no_retur, r.no_bukti, k.no_rekening, b.nama, r.tanggal, u.nama

UNION ALL
--pendapatan
--di debet
SELECT 'Pendapatan Lain-Lain' as transaksi, t.no_transaksi, t.no_bukti, k.no_rekening, b.nama as bank, t.tanggal, t.nominal as debet, u.nama, 1 as status
FROM t_pendapatan t, m_kas k, m_userx u, m_bank b, m_jenis_bayar j
WHERE t.kd_kas = k.kd_kas AND t.kd_user = u.kd_user AND k.kd_bank = b.kd_bank AND t.kd_jenis = j.kd_jenis AND j.status = 2

UNION ALL
--retur penjualan per nota di semua divisi
--di kredit
SELECT 'Retur Penjualan Barang' as transaksi, rd.no_retur, r.no_bukti, k.no_rekening, b.nama as bank, r.tanggal, 
	SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(DBO.GetHargaBersih(rd.harga_jual, rd.diskon1, rd.diskon2, rd.diskon3, rd.diskon2, 0, 0), r.diskon1, r.diskon2, r.diskon3, r.diskon4, r.pajak, 0)* rd.qty)  as grand_total, u.nama, 0 as status
FROM t_penjualan_retur r, t_penjualan_retur_detail rd, m_kas k, m_userx u, m_bank b, m_jenis_bayar jenis
WHERE r.kd_kas = k.kd_kas AND r.kd_user = u.kd_user AND k.kd_bank = b.kd_bank AND jenis.status = 2 AND rd.no_retur = r.no_retur 
GROUP BY rd.no_retur, r.no_bukti, k.no_rekening, b.nama, r.tanggal, u.nama

UNION ALL
--cicilan piutang usaha
--di debet
SELECT 'Cicilan Piutang Usaha' as transaksi, t.no_cicilan, t.no_bukti, k.no_rekening, b.nama as bank, t.tanggal, t.nominal as debet, u.nama, 1 as status
FROM t_piutang_cicilan t, m_kas k, m_userx u, m_bank b, m_jenis_bayar j
WHERE t.kd_kas = k.kd_kas AND t.kd_user = u.kd_user AND k.kd_bank = b.kd_bank AND t.kd_jenis = j.kd_jenis AND j.status = 2

VIEW.name: v_t_surat_berharga1
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_surat_berharga1
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_surat_berharga.no_surat_berharga, dbo.t_surat_berharga.tanggal_terima, dbo.t_surat_berharga.status_asal, dbo.t_surat_berharga.nominal, 
                      dbo.v_m_pihak_lain.nama AS pihak_lain, dbo.v_m_pihak_lain.kontak, dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_pihak_lain, dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_bank, 
                      dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_jenis, dbo.t_surat_berharga.tanggal_jatuh_tempo, dbo.t_surat_berharga.tanggal_setor, dbo.t_surat_berharga.tanggal_cair, 
                      dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_kas_setor, dbo.t_surat_berharga.status_blong, dbo.t_surat_berharga.keterangan, dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_user, 
                      dbo.t_surat_berharga.tanggal_server, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, dbo.m_kas.cabang, m_bank_1.nama AS bank_setor, dbo.m_userx.nama AS [user], 
                      m_bank_1.nama AS bank_kas, m_bank_2.nama AS bank_penerbit, dbo.GetJumlahTerpakaiSuratBerharga(dbo.t_surat_berharga.no_surat_berharga) 
                      AS terpakai, dbo.t_surat_berharga.nominal - dbo.GetJumlahTerpakaiSuratBerharga(dbo.t_surat_berharga.no_surat_berharga) AS sisa
FROM         dbo.m_bank m_bank_1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON m_bank_1.kd_bank = dbo.m_kas.kd_bank RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.t_surat_berharga INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank m_bank_2 ON dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_bank = m_bank_2.kd_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.v_m_pihak_lain ON dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_pihak_lain = dbo.v_m_pihak_lain.kd_pihak_lain INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user ON dbo.m_kas.kd_kas = dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_kas_setor
GROUP BY dbo.t_surat_berharga.no_surat_berharga, m_bank_1.nama, dbo.t_surat_berharga.tanggal_terima, dbo.t_surat_berharga.status_asal, 
                      dbo.t_surat_berharga.nominal, dbo.v_m_pihak_lain.nama, dbo.v_m_pihak_lain.kontak, dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_pihak_lain, 
                      dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_bank, dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_jenis, dbo.t_surat_berharga.tanggal_jatuh_tempo, dbo.t_surat_berharga.tanggal_setor, 
                      dbo.t_surat_berharga.tanggal_cair, dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_kas_setor, dbo.t_surat_berharga.status_blong, dbo.t_surat_berharga.keterangan, 
                      dbo.t_surat_berharga.kd_user, dbo.t_surat_berharga.tanggal_server, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, dbo.m_kas.cabang, m_bank_1.nama, 
                      dbo.m_userx.nama, m_bank_2.nama, dbo.t_surat_berharga.nominal - dbo.GetJumlahTerpakaiSuratBerharga(dbo.t_surat_berharga.no_surat_berharga)

VIEW.name: v_t_system_table
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_system_table
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.sysobjects.name AS SysObjects_name, dbo.sysobjects.id AS SysObjects_id, dbo.sysobjects.xtype AS SysObjects_xtype, 
                      dbo.syscolumns.name AS SysColumns_name, dbo.syscolumns.xtype AS SysColumns_xtype, dbo.syscolumns.colid AS SysColumns_colID
FROM         dbo.sysobjects INNER JOIN
                      dbo.syscolumns ON dbo.sysobjects.id = dbo.syscolumns.id
WHERE     (dbo.sysobjects.xtype IN ('FN', 'IF', 'TF','V'))
ORDER BY dbo.sysobjects.name, dbo.syscolumns.colid

VIEW.name: v_t_tagihan
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_tagihan
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.t_tagihan.no_tagihan AS [No Tagihan], dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_transaksi AS [No Transaksi], dbo.t_tagihan_detail.status, 
                      ket_status = CASE dbo.t_tagihan_detail.status WHEN 0 THEN 'SEDANG DITAGIH' WHEN 1 THEN 'KEMBALI' ELSE 'TERBAYAR' END, 
                      dbo.m_userx.nama AS [User], dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal_jatuh_tempo AS [Jatuh Tempo], dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, 
                      dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.m_kota.nama AS Kota, dbo.t_tagihan_detail.kembali, dbo.m_jenis_bayar.nama AS [Jenis Bayar], 
                      dbo.m_bank.nama AS Bank, dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_bukti AS [No Bukti], dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.nominal, 
                      dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) - dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.status) AS [Sisa Piutang], 
                      Status_Cicilan = CASE WHEN ((dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) - dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.status)) > 0) THEN 'CICIL' ELSE 'LUNAS' END, dbo.t_tagihan.keluar
FROM         dbo.t_tagihan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_tagihan_detail ON dbo.t_tagihan.no_tagihan = dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_tagihan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_tagihan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan ON dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_tagihan.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_customer.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_piutang_cicilan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_bank INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.m_bank.kd_bank = dbo.m_kas.kd_bank ON dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas ON 
                      dbo.m_jenis_bayar.kd_jenis = dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.kd_jenis ON dbo.t_tagihan_detail.kembali = dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.tanggal AND 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_transaksi
ORDER BY dbo.t_tagihan_detail.status DESC

VIEW.name: v_t_tagihan_piutang
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_tagihan_piutang
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.t_tagihan.no_tagihan, dbo.t_tagihan.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama, dbo.m_customer.kd_kota, dbo.m_kota.nama AS Kota, 
                      dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_transaksi, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal_jatuh_tempo) AS Tanggal, dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer, 
                      dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) - dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.status) AS sisa_piutang, dbo.t_tagihan_detail.status, dbo.t_tagihan.keluar, dbo.m_userx.nama AS [User]
FROM         dbo.m_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_tagihan ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = dbo.t_tagihan.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_tagihan_detail ON dbo.t_tagihan.no_tagihan = dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_tagihan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan ON dbo.t_tagihan_detail.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kota ON dbo.m_customer.kd_kota = dbo.m_kota.kd_kota INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_tagihan.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user
WHERE     (dbo.t_tagihan_detail.status = 0)
ORDER BY dbo.m_pegawai.nama

VIEW.name: v_t_transaksi_barang
VIEW.definition:
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_t_transaksi_barang
AS
SELECT     dbo.t_transaksi_barang.no_transaksi, dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.t_transaksi_barang.tanggal, dbo.t_transaksi_barang.keterangan, 
                      dbo.t_transaksi_barang.no_nota, dbo.t_transaksi_barang.penerima, dbo.t_transaksi_barang.gudang, dbo.m_userx.nama AS petugas, 
                      dbo.t_transaksi_barang.jenis, dbo.m_barang.nama AS barang, dbo.m_satuan.nama AS satuan, dbo.t_transaksi_barang_detail.qty
FROM         dbo.t_transaksi_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_transaksi_barang_detail ON dbo.t_transaksi_barang.no_transaksi = dbo.t_transaksi_barang_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_transaksi_barang_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.t_transaksi_barang_detail.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.t_transaksi_barang.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_userx ON dbo.t_transaksi_barang.kd_user = dbo.m_userx.kd_user

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: ConvertBarang
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
/****** Object:  User Defined Function dbo.ConvertBarang    Script Date: 05/09/2006 15:50:08 ******/
CREATE   FUNCTION ConvertBarang (@kd_barang varchar(18), @stok float)
RETURNS varchar(200) AS
BEGIN 

DECLARE @tsatuan varchar(40), @tjumlah float, @str varchar(200),@tqty float

DECLARE authors_cursor CURSOR FOR
SELECT satuan,jumlah FROM v_m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang=@kd_barang AND status <> 0 ORDER BY jumlah DESC
OPEN authors_cursor
FETCH NEXT FROM authors_cursor
INTO @tsatuan, @tjumlah

set @str=''
set @tqty=@stok
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
BEGIN
   	
   if @tqty / @tjumlah >= 1
   begin
      if @str<>'' 
	set @str=@str+', '
      set @str=@str+ltrim(rtrim(str(round((@tqty / @tjumlah),0,1))))+' '+ltrim(rtrim(@tsatuan))
      set @tqty=@tqty - (round(@tqty / @tjumlah,0,1)*@tjumlah)
   end 

   FETCH NEXT FROM authors_cursor
   INTO @tsatuan, @tjumlah
END
if @str='' 
   set @str='0 ' + @tsatuan
CLOSE authors_cursor
DEALLOCATE authors_cursor
	RETURN(@str)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: ConvertKdPegawai
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
-- Digunakan untuk konversi kode pegawai absensi pabrik menjadi format absensi kantor pusat
-- FORMAT PAAxxx

CREATE FUNCTION ConvertKdPegawai (@UserID AS varchar(10))  
RETURNS varchar(10) AS  
BEGIN 
	RETURN (
		(CASE LEN(@UserID)
		 WHEN 1 THEN 'PAA00' + @UserID
		 WHEN 2 THEN 'PAA0'  + @UserID
		 WHEN 3 THEN 'PAA'   + @UserID
		 ELSE @UserID
		 END
		)
	)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: ConvertStatus
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION ConvertStatus (@status TINYINT)
RETURNS VARCHAR(20) AS
BEGIN 
	RETURN (CASE @status WHEN 1 THEN 'TUNAI' WHEN 0 THEN 'KREDIT' END)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: ConvertToDetik
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
-- Konversi Jam : Menit : Detik ke satuan Detik, untuk mempermudah perhitungan
-- Input berupa data jam bertipe varchar Dengan format :   00:00:00
-- Create By : I-One

CREATE FUNCTION ConvertToDetik (@Jam varchar(10))
RETURNS BIGINT AS
BEGIN 
	DECLARE @Tjam as BIGINT, @Tmenit as BIGINT, @Tdetik as BIGINT

	SET @Tjam	= cast(substring(@Jam,1,2) as BIGINT) * 3600 	
	SET @Tmenit	= cast(substring(@Jam,4,2) as BIGINT) * 60	
	SET @Tdetik	= cast(substring(@Jam,7,2) as BIGINT)  	

	RETURN (@Tjam + @Tmenit + @Tdetik)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: ConvertToJam
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
-- Konversi DETIK ke tipe data Jam:Menit:Detik
-- Input berupa data bertipe BIGINT (jam dalam satuan DETIK)
-- Create By : I-One

CREATE FUNCTION ConvertToJam (@Dat BIGINT)
RETURNS VARCHAR(10) AS
BEGIN 
	DECLARE @Sjam as VARCHAR(2), @Smenit as VARCHAR(2), @Sdetik as VARCHAR(2)
	DECLARE @Hasil as VARCHAR(10)
	
	IF (@Dat >= 0) 
	BEGIN
		SET @Sjam 	= CAST((@Dat / 3600) as VARCHAR(2))
		SET @Dat 	= @Dat % 3600
		
		SET @Smenit	= CAST((@Dat / 60) as VARCHAR(2))
		SET @Sdetik	= CAST((@Dat % 60) as VARCHAR(2))
	
		IF (LEN(@Sjam) = 1) 	SET @Sjam = '0' + @Sjam 
		IF (LEN(@Smenit) = 1) 	SET @Smenit = '0' + @Smenit
		IF (LEN(@SDetik) = 1) 	SET @SDetik = '0' + @SDetik

		SET @Hasil = (@Sjam + ':' + @Smenit + ':' + @Sdetik)
	END
	ELSE		
		SET @Hasil = NULL				

	RETURN (@Hasil)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: CRekursif
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION CRekursif (@pId as varchar(10))  
RETURNS varchar(10) AS  
BEGIN 
	declare @tmp as varchar(10), @hasil as varchar(10)
	set @tmp = '0'
	set @hasil = 'x'

	select @tmp = id_parent from xx_master where [id] = @pid
	
	if @tmp <> '1' 	
		set @hasil = @tmp + (dbo.CRekursif(@tmp))
	else
		set @hasil =  @tmp + ('-')	

	return (@hasil)
/*	if @tmp <> '0'

--		select @hasil
	--	return 
	
	return(@hasil)	
*/
/*	if (@tmp<> '0') 
	begin
		set @hasil = dbo.CRekursif (@tmp)		
		return('-' + @pid)
	end
	return('+' + @pid) */
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: fn_diagramobjects
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION dbo.fn_diagramobjects() 
	RETURNS int
	WITH EXECUTE AS N'dbo'
	AS
	BEGIN
		declare @id_upgraddiagrams		int
		declare @id_sysdiagrams			int
		declare @id_helpdiagrams		int
		declare @id_helpdiagramdefinition	int
		declare @id_creatediagram	int
		declare @id_renamediagram	int
		declare @id_alterdiagram 	int 
		declare @id_dropdiagram		int
		declare @InstalledObjects	int

		select @InstalledObjects = 0

		select 	@id_upgraddiagrams = object_id(N'dbo.sp_upgraddiagrams'),
			@id_sysdiagrams = object_id(N'dbo.sysdiagrams'),
			@id_helpdiagrams = object_id(N'dbo.sp_helpdiagrams'),
			@id_helpdiagramdefinition = object_id(N'dbo.sp_helpdiagramdefinition'),
			@id_creatediagram = object_id(N'dbo.sp_creatediagram'),
			@id_renamediagram = object_id(N'dbo.sp_renamediagram'),
			@id_alterdiagram = object_id(N'dbo.sp_alterdiagram'), 
			@id_dropdiagram = object_id(N'dbo.sp_dropdiagram')

		if @id_upgraddiagrams is not null
			select @InstalledObjects = @InstalledObjects + 1
		if @id_sysdiagrams is not null
			select @InstalledObjects = @InstalledObjects + 2
		if @id_helpdiagrams is not null
			select @InstalledObjects = @InstalledObjects + 4
		if @id_helpdiagramdefinition is not null
			select @InstalledObjects = @InstalledObjects + 8
		if @id_creatediagram is not null
			select @InstalledObjects = @InstalledObjects + 16
		if @id_renamediagram is not null
			select @InstalledObjects = @InstalledObjects + 32
		if @id_alterdiagram  is not null
			select @InstalledObjects = @InstalledObjects + 64
		if @id_dropdiagram is not null
			select @InstalledObjects = @InstalledObjects + 128
		
		return @InstalledObjects 
	END

CREATE FUNCTION GabungString1
	(@tablePKValue varchar(50)) 

RETURNS varchar(255)
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE 
		@hasil varchar(255),
		@tmp varchar(255)
	
		set @hasil = ''		
		select @hasil = @hasil + cast(qty as varchar(255)) + ' ' + satuan + ' + '   from v_t_ongkos_kendaraan_kwantum where no_cicilan = @tablePKValue
		set @tmp = substring(@hasil,1,len(@hasil)-1)

	RETURN(@tmp)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetAbsensiAkhirIstirahat
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
-- Ambil Record kedua dari record terakhir dari return function GetAbsensiDalamDetik
-- @Tanggal_masuk harus dalam format Dbo.GetFormatTanggal
-- Create By I-one

CREATE FUNCTION GetAbsensiAkhirIstirahat (@kd_pegawai as VARCHAR(10), @tanggal_masuk as DATETIME)  
RETURNS BIGINT AS  
BEGIN 
	DECLARE @Dat as BIGINT, @Jml as INT
	-- Periksa jumlah record return dari function GetAbsensiDalamDetik :
	-- Jika Lebih dari 2 record maka pegawai yang bersangkutan telah melakukan absensi istirahat

	DECLARE @Divisi as VARCHAR(10)
	-- Pisahkan divisi kantor dan divisi pabrik
	
	SET @Divisi = ''
	SET @Dat = 0

	SELECT @Divisi =  kd_divisi FROM m_pegawai WHERE kd_pegawai = @kd_pegawai
	IF @Divisi = 'DAA000' 												-- DIVISI Pabrik
		SELECT @Jml = ISNULL(COUNT(Detik),0) FROM dbo.GetAbsensiDalamDetikPabrik (@kd_pegawai, @tanggal_masuk) 
	ELSE
		SELECT @Jml = ISNULL(COUNT(Detik),0) FROM dbo.GetAbsensiDalamDetik (@kd_pegawai, @tanggal_masuk) 


	IF (@Jml > 2)
	BEGIN
		IF @Divisi = 'DAA000'	-- Divisi Pabrik
		BEGIN
			DECLARE KURSOR CURSOR FOR
				SELECT Detik FROM dbo.GetAbsensiDalamDetikPabrik (@kd_pegawai, @tanggal_masuk) ORDER BY Detik DESC
		END
		ELSE
		BEGIN
			DECLARE KURSOR CURSOR FOR
				SELECT Detik FROM dbo.GetAbsensiDalamDetik (@kd_pegawai, @tanggal_masuk) ORDER BY Detik DESC
		END


		OPEN KURSOR
			
		FETCH NEXT FROM KURSOR INTO @Dat
		IF (@@fetch_status = 0) AND (@@fetch_status <> -1)
		BEGIN
			FETCH NEXT FROM KURSOR INTO @Dat
			IF NOT((@@fetch_status = 0) AND (@@fetch_status <> -1))
				SET @Dat = 0			
		END
	
		CLOSE KURSOR
		DEALLOCATE KURSOR	
	END
	RETURN (@Dat)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetAbsensiAwalIstirahat
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
-- Ambil Record kedua dari record pertama dari return function GetAbsensiDalamDetik
-- @Tanggal_masuk harus dalam format Dbo.GetFormatTanggal
-- Create By I-one

CREATE FUNCTION GetAbsensiAwalIstirahat (@kd_pegawai as VARCHAR(10), @tanggal_masuk as DATETIME)  
RETURNS BIGINT AS  
BEGIN 
	DECLARE @Dat as BIGINT, @Jml as INT
	-- Periksa jumlah record return dari function GetAbsensiDalamDetik :
	-- Jika Lebih dari 2 record maka pegawai yang bersangkutan telah melakukan absensi istirahat
	
	DECLARE @Divisi as VARCHAR(10)
	-- Pisahkan divisi kantor dan divisi pabrik
	
	SET @Divisi = ''
	SET @Dat = 0

	SELECT @Divisi =  kd_divisi FROM m_pegawai WHERE kd_pegawai = @kd_pegawai
	IF @Divisi = 'DAA000' 												-- DIVISI Pabrik
		SELECT @Jml = ISNULL(COUNT(Detik),0) FROM dbo.GetAbsensiDalamDetikPabrik (@kd_pegawai, @tanggal_masuk) 
	ELSE
		SELECT @Jml = ISNULL(COUNT(Detik),0) FROM dbo.GetAbsensiDalamDetik (@kd_pegawai, @tanggal_masuk) 


	IF (@Jml > 2)
	BEGIN
		IF @Divisi = 'DAA000'
		BEGIN
			DECLARE KURSOR CURSOR FOR
				SELECT Detik FROM dbo.GetAbsensiDalamDetikPabrik (@kd_pegawai, @tanggal_masuk) ORDER BY Detik ASC
		END
		ELSE
		BEGIN
			DECLARE KURSOR CURSOR FOR
				SELECT Detik FROM dbo.GetAbsensiDalamDetik (@kd_pegawai, @tanggal_masuk) ORDER BY Detik ASC
		END


		OPEN KURSOR
	
		FETCH NEXT FROM KURSOR INTO @Dat
		IF (@@fetch_status = 0) AND (@@fetch_status <> -1)
		BEGIN
			FETCH NEXT FROM KURSOR INTO @Dat
			IF NOT((@@fetch_status = 0) AND (@@fetch_status <> -1))
				SET @Dat = 0			
		END
	
		CLOSE KURSOR
		DEALLOCATE KURSOR	
	END
	RETURN (@Dat)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetAbsensiMasuk
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
-- Ambil Record pertama dari return function GetAbsensiDalamDetik
-- @Tanggal_masuk harus dalam format Dbo.GetFormatTanggal
-- Create By I-one

CREATE FUNCTION GetAbsensiMasuk (@kd_pegawai as VARCHAR(10), @tanggal_masuk as DATETIME)  
RETURNS BIGINT AS  
BEGIN 
	DECLARE @Dat as BIGINT
	DECLARE @Divisi as VARCHAR(10)

	-- Pisahkan divisi kantor dan divisi pabrik
	
	SET @Divisi = ''
	SELECT @Divisi =  kd_divisi FROM m_pegawai WHERE kd_pegawai = @kd_pegawai
	IF @Divisi = 'DAA000' 												-- DIVISI Pabrik
		SELECT TOP 1 @Dat = Detik FROM dbo.GetAbsensiDalamDetikPabrik (@kd_pegawai, @tanggal_masuk)
		ORDER BY Detik ASC
	ELSE														-- Selain Pabrik
		SELECT TOP 1 @Dat = Detik FROM dbo.GetAbsensiDalamDetik (@kd_pegawai, @tanggal_masuk)
		ORDER BY Detik ASC

	IF (@Dat = NULL)  SET @Dat = 0
	RETURN (@Dat)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetAbsensiPulang
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
-- Ambil Record terakhir dari return function GetAbsensiDalamDetik
-- @Tanggal_masuk harus dalam format Dbo.GetFormatTanggal
-- Create By I-one

CREATE FUNCTION GetAbsensiPulang (@kd_pegawai as VARCHAR(10), @tanggal_masuk as DATETIME)  
RETURNS BIGINT AS  
BEGIN 
	DECLARE @Dat as BIGINT
	DECLARE @Divisi as VARCHAR(10)

	-- Pisahkan divisi kantor dan divisi pabrik
	
	SET @Divisi = ''
	SELECT @Divisi =  kd_divisi FROM m_pegawai WHERE kd_pegawai = @kd_pegawai
	IF @Divisi = 'DAA000' 	
		SELECT TOP 1 @Dat = Detik FROM dbo.GetAbsensiDalamDetikPabrik (@kd_pegawai, @tanggal_masuk)
		ORDER BY Detik DESC
	ELSE
		SELECT TOP 1 @Dat = Detik FROM dbo.GetAbsensiDalamDetik (@kd_pegawai, @tanggal_masuk)
		ORDER BY Detik DESC
	
	IF (@Dat = NULL) SET @Dat = 0
	RETURN (@Dat)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetConvertStatus
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION GetConvertStatus(@status TINYINT)
RETURNS VARCHAR(10) AS  
BEGIN 
	DECLARE 
		@temp VARCHAR(10)
	IF @status = 0 
		SET @temp = 'Kredit'
	ELSE IF @status = 1	
		SET @temp = 'Tunai'
	ELSE IF @status = 2
		SET @temp = 'Lunas'
	
	RETURN (@temp)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetConverttStatusBiaya
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION GetConverttStatusBiaya(@status TINYINT)
RETURNS VARCHAR(50) AS  
BEGIN 
	DECLARE 
		@temp VARCHAR(50)
	IF @status = 0 
		SET @temp = 'NON AKTIF'
	ELSE IF @status = 1	
		SET @temp = 'BIAYA OPERASIONAL PENJUALAN'
	ELSE IF @status = 2
		SET @temp = 'BIAYA OPERASIONAL (ADM. DAN UMUM)'
	ELSE IF @status = 3
		SET @temp = 'BIAYA LANGSUNG'
	ELSE IF @status = 4
		SET @temp = 'BIAYA TIDAK LANGSUNG'
	RETURN (@temp)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetDivisiDariNotaKosong
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION GetDivisiDariNotaKosong (@kdNota as VARCHAR(10), @KepalaNota as VARCHAR(3))
RETURNS VARCHAR(100) AS
BEGIN 
		
	DECLARE @Kode1 as varchar(6), @Nama1 as varchar(20), @Keterangan1 as varchar(30)
	DECLARE @Kode2 as varchar(6), @Nama2 as varchar(20), @Keterangan2 as varchar(30)
	DECLARE @Hasil as varchar(100)

	select @Kode1 = m_divisi.kd_divisi, @Nama1 = m_divisi.nama, @Keterangan1 = m_divisi.keterangan from t_penjualan inner join m_divisi 
	on (t_penjualan.kd_divisi=m_divisi.kd_divisi)
	where t_penjualan.no_transaksi = (
		SELECT MAX(no_transaksi) FROM t_penjualan WHERE
		no_transaksi BETWEEN  (@KepalaNota + '.00001') AND @kdNota
	)
	
	select @Kode2 = m_divisi.kd_divisi, @Nama2 = m_divisi.nama, @Keterangan2 = m_divisi.keterangan from t_penjualan inner join m_divisi 
	on (t_penjualan.kd_divisi=m_divisi.kd_divisi)
	where t_penjualan.no_transaksi = (
		SELECT MIN(no_transaksi) FROM t_penjualan WHERE
		no_transaksi BETWEEN @kdNota AND (@KepalaNota + '.99999')
	)
	
	IF @Kode1 = @Kode2 
		set @Hasil = (@Nama1 + ' (' + lower(@Keterangan1) + ')')
	ELSE
		set @Hasil = (@Nama1 + ' (' + lower(@Keterangan1) + ')  ATAU  ' + @Nama2 + ' (' + lower(@Keterangan2) + ')') 	

	RETURN @Hasil		
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetFormatJam
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION GetFormatJam (@tanggal DATETIME)
RETURNS varchar(10) AS-- VARCHAR(10) AS  
BEGIN 
	declare @jam as varchar(2), @menit as varchar(2), @detik as varchar(2)

	set @jam = CAST(DATEPART(hour, @tanggal) AS VARCHAR(2))
	set @menit = CAST(DATEPART(minute, @tanggal) AS VARCHAR(2))
	set @detik = CAST(DATEPART(second, @tanggal) AS VARCHAR(2))

	if (len(@jam)=1)  set @jam = '0' + @jam	
	if len(@menit)=1 set @menit = '0' + @menit	
	if len(@detik)=1 set @detik = '0' + @detik
	return (@jam + ':' + @menit + ':' + @detik)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetFormatTanggal
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION GetFormatTanggal (@tanggal DATETIME)
RETURNS DATETIME AS-- VARCHAR(10) AS  
BEGIN 
	RETURN 
	(
		CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, @tanggal) AS VARCHAR(4)) + '/' + 
		CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, @tanggal) AS VARCHAR(2)) + '/' + 
		CAST(DATEPART(DAY, @tanggal) AS VARCHAR(2)) -- + ' 00:00:00'
	)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetHargaAverage
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE  FUNCTION GetHargaAverage (@tanggal DATETIME)
RETURNS MONEY
AS
BEGIN
--purpose	: mencari nilai dari persediaan awal bahan baku di periode tertentu
--created by	: roy
--created date	: 18-12-2007

	
	DECLARE @total_stok_awal FLOAT
	DECLARE @tmpJumlah FLOAT, @tmpStok FLOAT, @tmpRecordAkhir INT, @tmpNo INT
	DECLARE @barang JR_KODE_BARANG, @stok FLOAT 
	DECLARE @qty FLOAT, @harga_beli MONEY
	DECLARE @tanggal_awal DATETIME
	
	SET @total_stok_awal = 0

	SET @tanggal_awal =
	CASE 
	WHEN @tanggal < dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() THEN 
		 dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() 
	ELSE 
		@tanggal 
	END	

	--get stok awal dari histori barang
	DECLARE cursor_stok CURSOR FOR

	SELECT bh.kd_barang, ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(bh.kd_barang, bh.kd_satuan) * bh.debet), 0) -
		ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(bh.kd_barang, bh.kd_satuan) * bh.kredit), 0) AS stok_awal
	FROM v_g_barang_histori_detail bh, m_barang b
	WHERE bh.kd_barang = b.kd_barang AND b.kd_jenis_bahan = 'JAA001' AND bh.tanggal >= dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
		AND bh.tanggal <= @tanggal_awal
	GROUP BY bh.kd_barang
	HAVING ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(bh.kd_barang, bh.kd_satuan) * bh.debet), 0) -
		ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(bh.kd_barang, bh.kd_satuan) * bh.kredit), 0) > 0
	
	OPEN cursor_stok
	
	FETCH NEXT FROM cursor_stok INTO @barang, @stok
	WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
	BEGIN
		IF (@@FETCH_STATUS <> -1)	
		BEGIN
			--mencari harga beli dari pembelian yang paling akhir, dengan membandingkan stok akhir dengan qty pembelian terakhir
			--jika stok <= qty pembelian terakhir, maka stok tsb menggunakan harga pembelian paling akhir
			--jika stok > qty pembelian terakhir, maka coba ambil lagi qty pembelian yang ke-2, jika masih tidak mencukupi lanjutkan terus
			--stok akan dikalikan dgn harga yang terakhir di temukan di pembelian, dilanjutkan lagi dengan harga dari pembelian selanjutnya
			DECLARE cursor_pembelian CURSOR FOR
	
			SELECT dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(kd_barang, kd_satuan) * debet AS Qty, harga / dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(kd_barang, kd_satuan) as harga_beli
			FROM v_g_barang_histori_detail
			WHERE transaksi IN ('Pembelian', 'Stok Awal') AND kd_barang = @barang AND tanggal >= dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
				AND tanggal <= @tanggal_awal
			ORDER BY tanggal DESC
			
			OPEN cursor_pembelian
	
			SET @tmpJumlah = 0
			SET @tmpRecordAkhir = 0
	  
			FETCH NEXT FROM cursor_pembelian INTO @qty, @harga_beli
			WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
			BEGIN
				IF (@@FETCH_STATUS <> -1)	
				BEGIN
					SET @tmpJumlah = @tmpJumlah + @qty
					SET @tmpRecordAkhir = @tmpRecordAkhir + 1
					IF @stok <= @tmpJumlah
					BEGIN
	StokLebihBesarDariPembelian:					
						CLOSE cursor_pembelian
						DEALLOCATE cursor_pembelian
	
						DECLARE cursor_pembelian CURSOR FOR
						
						SELECT dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(kd_barang, kd_satuan) * debet AS Qty, harga / dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(kd_barang, kd_satuan) as harga_beli
						FROM v_g_barang_histori_detail
						WHERE transaksi IN ('Pembelian', 'Stok Awal') AND kd_barang = @barang AND tanggal >= dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
							AND tanggal <= @tanggal_awal
						ORDER BY tanggal DESC
						
						OPEN cursor_pembelian
	
						FETCH NEXT FROM cursor_pembelian INTO @qty, @harga_beli
						SET @tmpJumlah = @stok
						SET @tmpNo = 1
						WHILE @tmpNo <= @tmpRecordAkhir
						BEGIN
							IF @tmpJumlah >= @qty
								SET @total_stok_awal = @total_stok_awal + (@qty * @harga_beli)
	                         			ELSE
			         			BEGIN
								SET @total_stok_awal = @total_stok_awal + (@tmpJumlah * @harga_beli)
								GoTo NextStokBarang
							END
	                         
							SET @tmpJumlah = @tmpJumlah - @qty
							SET @tmpNo = @tmpNo + 1
							
							IF @tmpNo > @tmpRecordAkhir And @tmpJumlah > 0 
							BEGIN
								SET @total_stok_awal = @total_stok_awal + (@tmpJumlah * @harga_beli)
								GoTo NextStokBarang
							END
							ELSE IF @tmpNo > @tmpRecordAkhir
								GoTo NextStokBarang
	                         
	                         
	               				FETCH NEXT FROM cursor_pembelian INTO @qty, @harga_beli
	          				END
					END

		                	FETCH NEXT FROM cursor_pembelian INTO @qty, @harga_beli
		                	IF (@@FETCH_STATUS <> -1)	 
			        	BEGIN
		             			GoTo StokLebihBesarDariPembelian
		        		END
	
				END
			END
			FETCH NEXT FROM cursor_pembelian INTO @qty, @harga_beli
		END
		NextStokBarang:	
		CLOSE cursor_pembelian
		DEALLOCATE cursor_pembelian
	
		FETCH NEXT FROM cursor_stok INTO @barang, @stok
		--kosongkan cursor pembelian
	END
	
	CLOSE cursor_stok
	DEALLOCATE cursor_stok
	
	RETURN ISNULL(@total_stok_awal, 0)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetHargaAVGStokAwal
