CREATE FUNCTION GetHargaAVGStokAwal (@Barang VARCHAR(50))
		RETURNS MONEY
		AS
		BEGIN
			RETURN(
				SELECT ISNULL(AVG(harga_beli_awal), 0)
				FROM m_barang_divisi
				WHERE kd_barang = @barang AND stok_awal > 0
			)
		END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetHargaBeliTerakhir
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION GetHargaBeliTerakhir (@tanggal DATETIME, @barang VARCHAR(50))
RETURNS MONEY
AS 
BEGIN
RETURN (
	SELECT TOP 1 dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_beli, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), beli.diskon1, beli.diskon2, beli.diskon3, 
                      beli.diskon4, beli.pajak, beli.ppnbm)
	FROM t_pembelian_detail dtl INNER JOIN t_pembelian beli ON dtl.no_transaksi = beli.no_transaksi
	WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) <= @tanggal  AND kd_barang = @barang 
	ORDER BY tanggal DESC
	)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetHargaBersih
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE   FUNCTION GetHargaBersih (@harga MONEY, @diskon1 FLOAT, @diskon2 FLOAT, @diskon3 FLOAT,  @diskon4 FLOAT, @pajak1 FLOAT, @ppnbm FLOAT = 0)
RETURNS MONEY AS  
BEGIN 
	DECLARE 
		@harga_bersih MONEY 

	SET @harga_bersih = @harga
--jika harga lebih dari 0 baru diproses, jika tidak langsung return harga bersih menjadi 0
	IF @harga_bersih > 0
		BEGIN
		--DISKON PERTAMA
			IF @diskon1 >-1 AND @diskon1 < 1
				SET @harga_bersih = @harga_bersih - (@harga_bersih * @diskon1)
			ELSE IF @diskon1 >= 1 OR @diskon1 <= -1
				SET @harga_bersih = @harga_bersih - @diskon1
			
		--DISKON KEDUA
			IF @diskon2 > -1 AND @diskon2 < 1
				SET @harga_bersih = @harga_bersih - (@harga_bersih * @diskon2)
			ELSE IF @diskon2 >=1 OR @diskon2 <= -1
				SET @harga_bersih = @harga_bersih - @diskon2
		
		--DISKON KETIGA
			IF @diskon3 > -1 AND @diskon3 < 1
				SET @harga_bersih = @harga_bersih - (@harga_bersih * @diskon3)
			ELSE IF @diskon3 >=1 OR @diskon3 <= -1
				SET @harga_bersih = @harga_bersih - @diskon3
		
		--DISKON KEEMPAT
			IF @diskon4 > -1 AND @diskon4 < 1
				SET @harga_bersih = @harga_bersih - (@harga_bersih * @diskon4)
			ELSE IF @diskon4 >=1 OR @diskon4 <= -1
				SET @harga_bersih = @harga_bersih - @diskon4
					
		--PAJAK
			SET @harga_bersih = @harga_bersih + (@harga_bersih * @pajak1)

	 	--PPNBM
			SET @harga_bersih = @harga_bersih + (@harga_bersih * @ppnbm)
		END

	RETURN (@harga_bersih)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetJamKerjaPegawaiPerHari
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION GetJamKerjaPegawaiPerHari(@pegawai CHAR(6), @tanggal DATETIME)
RETURNS FLOAT AS
BEGIN
DECLARE @result FLOAT
SET @result = ''

IF DATEPART(WEEKDAY, @tanggal) = 1
	BEGIN 
	IF (SELECT TOP 1 kd_shift 
	    FROM t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail INNER JOIN t_pegawai_ganti_shift ON t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.no_transaksi = t_pegawai_ganti_shift.no_transaksi 
	    WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal) >= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@tanggal) AND t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_pegawai = @pegawai
	    ORDER BY t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal) IS NULL

		BEGIN
		SELECT @result = DATEDIFF(MINUTE, m_jam_kerja.masuk_minggu, m_jam_kerja.pulang_minggu)
		FROM m_jam_kerja INNER JOIN m_pegawai ON m_pegawai.kd_shift = m_jam_kerja.kd_shift
		WHERE m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = @pegawai
		END

	ELSE
		BEGIN
		SELECT  @result = DATEDIFF(MINUTE, m_jam_kerja.masuk_minggu, m_jam_kerja.pulang_minggu)
		FROM m_jam_kerja INNER JOIN t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail ON t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_shift = m_jam_kerja.kd_shift 
			INNER JOIN t_pegawai_ganti_shift ON  t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.no_transaksi = t_pegawai_ganti_shift.no_transaksi
		WHERE t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal >= @tanggal AND t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_pegawai = @pegawai  
		ORDER BY t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal 
		END

	END

ELSE IF DATEPART(WEEKDAY, @tanggal) = 2
	BEGIN 
	IF (SELECT TOP 1 kd_shift 
	    FROM t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail INNER JOIN t_pegawai_ganti_shift ON t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.no_transaksi = t_pegawai_ganti_shift.no_transaksi 
	    WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal) >= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@tanggal) AND t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_pegawai = @pegawai
	    ORDER BY t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal) IS NULL

		BEGIN
		SELECT @result = DATEDIFF(MINUTE, m_jam_kerja.masuk_senin, m_jam_kerja.pulang_senin)
		FROM m_jam_kerja INNER JOIN m_pegawai ON m_pegawai.kd_shift = m_jam_kerja.kd_shift
		WHERE m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = @pegawai
		END

	ELSE
		BEGIN
		SELECT  @result = DATEDIFF(MINUTE, m_jam_kerja.masuk_senin, m_jam_kerja.pulang_senin)
		FROM m_jam_kerja INNER JOIN t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail ON t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_shift = m_jam_kerja.kd_shift 
			INNER JOIN t_pegawai_ganti_shift ON  t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.no_transaksi = t_pegawai_ganti_shift.no_transaksi
		WHERE t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal >= @tanggal AND t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_pegawai = @pegawai  
		ORDER BY t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal 
		END

	END

ELSE IF DATEPART(WEEKDAY, @tanggal) = 3
	BEGIN 
	IF (SELECT TOP 1 kd_shift 
	    FROM t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail INNER JOIN t_pegawai_ganti_shift ON t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.no_transaksi = t_pegawai_ganti_shift.no_transaksi 
	    WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal) >= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@tanggal) AND t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_pegawai = @pegawai
	    ORDER BY t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal) IS NULL

		BEGIN
		SELECT @result = DATEDIFF(MINUTE, m_jam_kerja.masuk_selasa, m_jam_kerja.pulang_selasa)
		FROM m_jam_kerja INNER JOIN m_pegawai ON m_pegawai.kd_shift = m_jam_kerja.kd_shift
		WHERE m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = @pegawai
		END

	ELSE
		BEGIN
		SELECT  @result = DATEDIFF(MINUTE, m_jam_kerja.masuk_selasa, m_jam_kerja.pulang_selasa)
		FROM m_jam_kerja INNER JOIN t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail ON t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_shift = m_jam_kerja.kd_shift 
			INNER JOIN t_pegawai_ganti_shift ON  t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.no_transaksi = t_pegawai_ganti_shift.no_transaksi
		WHERE t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal >= @tanggal AND t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_pegawai = @pegawai  
		ORDER BY t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal 
		END

	END

ELSE IF DATEPART(WEEKDAY, @tanggal) = 4
	BEGIN 
	IF (SELECT TOP 1 kd_shift 
	    FROM t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail INNER JOIN t_pegawai_ganti_shift ON t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.no_transaksi = t_pegawai_ganti_shift.no_transaksi 
	    WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal) >= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@tanggal) AND t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_pegawai = @pegawai
	    ORDER BY t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal) IS NULL

		BEGIN
		SELECT @result = DATEDIFF(MINUTE, m_jam_kerja.masuk_rabu, m_jam_kerja.pulang_rabu)
		FROM m_jam_kerja INNER JOIN m_pegawai ON m_pegawai.kd_shift = m_jam_kerja.kd_shift
		WHERE m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = @pegawai
		END

	ELSE
		BEGIN
		SELECT  @result = DATEDIFF(MINUTE, m_jam_kerja.masuk_rabu, m_jam_kerja.pulang_rabu)
		FROM m_jam_kerja INNER JOIN t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail ON t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_shift = m_jam_kerja.kd_shift 
			INNER JOIN t_pegawai_ganti_shift ON  t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.no_transaksi = t_pegawai_ganti_shift.no_transaksi
		WHERE t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal >= @tanggal AND t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_pegawai = @pegawai  
		ORDER BY t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal 
		END
	END

ELSE IF DATEPART(WEEKDAY, @tanggal) = 5
	BEGIN 
	IF (SELECT TOP 1 kd_shift 
	    FROM t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail INNER JOIN t_pegawai_ganti_shift ON t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.no_transaksi = t_pegawai_ganti_shift.no_transaksi 
	    WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal) >= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@tanggal) AND t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_pegawai = @pegawai
	    ORDER BY t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal) IS NULL

		BEGIN
		SELECT @result = DATEDIFF(MINUTE, m_jam_kerja.masuk_kamis, m_jam_kerja.pulang_kamis)
		FROM m_jam_kerja INNER JOIN m_pegawai ON m_pegawai.kd_shift = m_jam_kerja.kd_shift
		WHERE m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = @pegawai
		END

	ELSE
		BEGIN
		SELECT  @result = DATEDIFF(MINUTE, m_jam_kerja.masuk_kamis, m_jam_kerja.pulang_kamis)
		FROM m_jam_kerja INNER JOIN t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail ON t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_shift = m_jam_kerja.kd_shift 
			INNER JOIN t_pegawai_ganti_shift ON  t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.no_transaksi = t_pegawai_ganti_shift.no_transaksi
		WHERE t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal >= @tanggal AND t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_pegawai = @pegawai  
		ORDER BY t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal 
		END

	END

ELSE IF DATEPART(WEEKDAY, @tanggal) = 6 
	BEGIN 
	IF (SELECT TOP 1 kd_shift 
	    FROM t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail INNER JOIN t_pegawai_ganti_shift ON t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.no_transaksi = t_pegawai_ganti_shift.no_transaksi 
	    WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal) >= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@tanggal) AND t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_pegawai = @pegawai
	    ORDER BY t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal) IS NULL

		BEGIN
		SELECT @result = DATEDIFF(MINUTE, m_jam_kerja.masuk_jumat, m_jam_kerja.pulang_jumat)
		FROM m_jam_kerja INNER JOIN m_pegawai ON m_pegawai.kd_shift = m_jam_kerja.kd_shift
		WHERE m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = @pegawai
		END

	ELSE
		BEGIN
		SELECT  @result = DATEDIFF(MINUTE, m_jam_kerja.masuk_jumat, m_jam_kerja.pulang_jumat)
		FROM m_jam_kerja INNER JOIN t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail ON t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_shift = m_jam_kerja.kd_shift 
			INNER JOIN t_pegawai_ganti_shift ON  t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.no_transaksi = t_pegawai_ganti_shift.no_transaksi
		WHERE t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal >= @tanggal AND t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_pegawai = @pegawai  
		ORDER BY t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal 
		END

	END

ELSE IF DATEPART(WEEKDAY, @tanggal) = 7 
	BEGIN 
	IF (SELECT TOP 1 kd_shift 
	    FROM t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail INNER JOIN t_pegawai_ganti_shift ON t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.no_transaksi = t_pegawai_ganti_shift.no_transaksi 
	    WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal) >= dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@tanggal) AND t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_pegawai = @pegawai
	    ORDER BY t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal) IS NULL

		BEGIN
		SELECT @result = DATEDIFF(MINUTE, m_jam_kerja.masuk_sabtu, m_jam_kerja.pulang_sabtu)
		FROM m_jam_kerja INNER JOIN m_pegawai ON m_pegawai.kd_shift = m_jam_kerja.kd_shift
		WHERE m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = @pegawai
		END

	ELSE
		BEGIN
		SELECT  @result = DATEDIFF(MINUTE, m_jam_kerja.masuk_sabtu, m_jam_kerja.pulang_sabtu)
		FROM m_jam_kerja INNER JOIN t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail ON t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_shift = m_jam_kerja.kd_shift 
			INNER JOIN t_pegawai_ganti_shift ON  t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.no_transaksi = t_pegawai_ganti_shift.no_transaksi
		WHERE t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal >= @tanggal AND t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_pegawai = @pegawai  
		ORDER BY t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal 
		END

	END
RETURN @result
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetJumlahHariCuti
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
create function GetJumlahHariCuti(@tglAwal as datetime, @tglAkhir as datetime)
returns float as begin

declare @hasil as float
set @hasil = 0

SELECT @hasil = count(Tgl) FROM dbo.GetSemuaTanggalAktif() 
WHERE (Tgl BETWEEN  @TglAwal AND @TglAkhir)
AND (tgl not in (SELECT dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) FROM m_hari_libur))	-- filter dengan hari libur

return @hasil
end

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetKendaraanJarakTempuh
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION GetKendaraanJarakTempuh (@pNoSTNK as varchar(20), @pTanggal as datetime)  
RETURNS BIGINT  AS  
BEGIN 
--	RETURN (
/*		SELECT isiKM.KM -- ISNULL(MAX(isiKM.KM)-MIN(isiKM.KM),0)
		FROM t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm isiBBM INNER JOIN t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh isiKM
		ON (isiBBM.kd_pengisian_bbm = isiKM.kd_pengisian_bbm)
		WHERE isiBBM.kd_pengisian_bbm = '536'
*/
	declare @KMAwal as float
	declare @KMAkhir as float

	SET @KMAwal = 0
	SET @KMAkhir = 0

	SELECT	TOP 1 PERCENT @KMAkhir = ISNULL(dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.KM,0)
	FROM         
		dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh INNER JOIN
		dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm ON 
		dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.kd_pengisian_bbm = dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.kd_pengisian_bbm
	WHERE     
		(dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.no_STNK = @pNoSTNK) AND 	
		(dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.tanggal) <= @pTanggal)
	ORDER BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.tanggal) DESC
	
	SELECT	TOP 1 PERCENT @KMAwal = ISNULL(dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.KM,0)
	FROM         
		dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh INNER JOIN
		dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm ON 
		dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.kd_pengisian_bbm = dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.kd_pengisian_bbm
	WHERE     
		(dbo.t_kendaraan_pengisian_bbm.no_STNK = @pNoSTNK) AND 	
		(dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.tanggal) < @pTanggal)
	ORDER BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_kendaraan_jarak_tempuh.tanggal) DESC
	
	return(@KMAkhir - @KMAwal)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetKendaraanTanggungJawab
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE function GetKendaraanTanggungJawab(@stnk as varchar(20))
returns varchar(50)
as begin


declare @hasil as varchar(50)
set @hasil = ''

select top 1 
 	@hasil = m_pegawai.nama from 
	t_kendaraan_tanggung_jawab inner join m_pegawai on 
	(t_kendaraan_tanggung_jawab.kd_pegawai = m_pegawai.kd_pegawai)
where t_kendaraan_tanggung_jawab.no_stnk =  @stnk
order by t_kendaraan_tanggung_jawab.tanggal desc

return @hasil

end

--group by no_stnk

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetKodeShiftPegawai
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE function GetKodeShiftPegawai(@kd_pegawai as varchar(20), @options as integer)
returns varchar(20) as
begin
/*
declare @kd_pegawai as varchar(20), @options as integer
	set @kd_pegawai ='PAA001'
	set @options = 1
*/
declare @jumlah as integer
declare @hasil1 as varchar(20),
	@hasil2 as varchar(20),
	@hasil  as varchar(20)


set @hasil1 = ''
set @hasil2 = ''
set @jumlah = 0

SELECT  
	@jumlah = count(dbo.t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.no_transaksi)
FROM    dbo.t_pegawai_ganti_shift INNER JOIN
	dbo.t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail ON dbo.t_pegawai_ganti_shift.no_transaksi = dbo.t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.no_transaksi
WHERE  (dbo.t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_pegawai = @kd_pegawai) 

IF @jumlah > 0
BEGIN
	SELECT  TOP 1
		@hasil1 = dbo.t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_shift,
		@hasil2 = dbo.m_jam_kerja.nama
	FROM    dbo.t_pegawai_ganti_shift INNER JOIN
		dbo.t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail ON dbo.t_pegawai_ganti_shift.no_transaksi = dbo.t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
		dbo.m_jam_kerja on (dbo.t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_shift=dbo.m_jam_kerja.kd_shift)
	WHERE  (dbo.t_pegawai_ganti_shift_detail.kd_pegawai = @kd_pegawai) 
	AND (dbo.m_jam_kerja.status <> 0) 
	order by dbo.t_pegawai_ganti_shift.tanggal desc
END
ELSE
BEGIN
	SELECT     
		@hasil1 = dbo.m_jam_kerja.kd_shift,
		@hasil2 = dbo.m_jam_kerja.nama
	FROM         dbo.m_pegawai INNER JOIN
	                      dbo.m_jam_kerja ON dbo.m_pegawai.kd_shift = dbo.m_jam_kerja.kd_shift 
	WHERE (dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = @kd_pegawai) AND  
		(dbo.m_jam_kerja.status <> 0)AND 
	          (dbo.m_pegawai.status <> 0)	
END

SET @hasil = ''
if @options = 0
	SET @hasil = @hasil1
else
	SET @hasil = @hasil2

--select @hasil
RETURN (@hasil)
end

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
-- =============================================

-- =============================================

CREATE FUNCTION GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil
	(@kd_barang JR_KODE_BARANG, @kd_satuan JR_KODE_MASTER)
RETURNS FLOAT
AS
BEGIN
DECLARE
	@jumlah FLOAT

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetLamaKerja
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION GetLamaKerja (@TanggalMasuk DATETIME, @TanggalSekarang DATETIME)
RETURNS VARCHAR(50) AS  
BEGIN 
	DECLARE 
		@result VARCHAR(50),
		@temp BIGINT

	SET @result = ''

	SET @temp = DATEDIFF(MONTH, @TanggalMasuk,  @TanggalSekarang)
	IF @temp /12 > 0
		SET @result = CAST(@temp / 12  AS VARCHAR) + ' Tahun '		

	IF @temp % 12 > 0
		SET @result = @result + CAST(@temp % 12 AS VARCHAR) + ' Bulan'

	RETURN(@result)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetMaxSatuan
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION GetMaxSatuan(@KodeBarang JR_KODE_BARANG, @KodeSatuan JR_KODE_MASTER, @Qty FLOAT)
RETURNS FLOAT AS  
BEGIN 
	DECLARE 
		@MaxSatuanValue FLOAT, 
		@Result FLOAT

	SET @Result = 0
	SET @MaxSatuanValue = 0	

	--1.ambil jumlah di m_barang_satuan berdasarkan barang dan satuan
	SELECT @Result = jumlah FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang = @KodeBarang AND kd_satuan = @KodeSatuan

	--2.ambil jumlah terbesar di tabel m_barang_satuan berdasarkan barang dan satuan
	SELECT @MaxSatuanValue = MAX(jumlah) FROM m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang = @KodeBarang AND status = 1

	--3. (qty * jumlah) / max(jumlah)
	SET @Result = (@Qty * @Result) / @MaxSatuanValue

	--4. Return @Result
	RETURN(@Result)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetMaxSatuanString
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
/*
CREATE FUNCTION GetMaxSatuanString(@KodeBarang JR_KODE_BARANG, @KodeSatuan JR_KODE_MASTER)
RETURNS VARCHAR(25) AS  
BEGIN 
	DECLARE 
		@Result VARCHAR(25)
	
	--2.ambil jumlah terbesar di tabel m_barang_satuan berdasarkan barang dan satuan
	SELECT @Result = s.nama 
	FROM m_barang_satuan bs, m_satuan s 
	WHERE bs.kd_satuan = s.kd_satuan AND bs.kd_barang = @KodeBarang AND bs.kd_satuan = @KodeSatuan AND bs.status = 1 
	ORDER BY bs.jumlah DESC

	--4. Return @Result
	RETURN(@Result)
END
*/

CREATE FUNCTION GetMaxSatuanString(@KodeBarang JR_KODE_BARANG, @KodeSatuan JR_KODE_MASTER)
RETURNS VARCHAR(25) AS  
BEGIN 
	DECLARE 
		@Result VARCHAR(25)
	
	--2.ambil jumlah terbesar di tabel m_barang_satuan berdasarkan barang dan satuan
	--SELECT @Result = s.nama FROM m_barang_satuan bs, m_satuan s WHERE bs.kd_satuan = s.kd_satuan AND bs.kd_barang = @KodeBarang AND bs.kd_satuan = @KodeSatuan AND bs.status = 1 ORDER BY bs.jumlah DESC
	SELECT TOP 1 @result = m_satuan.nama
		FROM m_barang_satuan INNER JOIN m_satuan ON m_barang_satuan.kd_satuan  = m_satuan.kd_satuan 
		WHERE m_barang_satuan.kd_barang = @KodeBarang
		ORDER BY m_barang_satuan.jumlah DESC

	--4. Return @Result
	RETURN(@Result)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetNamaHari
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION GetNamaHari (@Tanggal  datetime)  
RETURNS varchar(20)   AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE @Hasil AS VARCHAR(20)
	IF (@@DATEFIRST  = 7)		-- Hari pertama dalam seminggu adalah hari Minggu
		SET @Hasil =
		CASE DATEPART(dw,@Tanggal) 
			WHEN 1 THEN 'Minggu' 
			WHEN 2 THEN 'Senin' 
			WHEN 3 THEN 'Selasa'
			WHEN 4 THEN 'Rabu'
			WHEN 5 THEN 'Kamis'
			WHEN 6 THEN 'Jumat'
			WHEN 7 THEN 'Sabtu'
			ELSE ''
		END

	ELSE
		SET @Hasil = ''

	RETURN (@Hasil)	
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetParentTransaksi
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
/****** Object:  User Defined Function dbo.GetParentTransaksi    Script Date: 05/09/2006 15:50:08 ******/
CREATE  FUNCTION GetParentTransaksi
	(@no_transaksi char(12))
RETURNS varchar(50)
AS
BEGIN
DECLARE @result varchar(50)	
	RETURN
	(
	CASE LEFT(@no_transaksi, 2)
	WHEN 'BB' THEN 'PEMBELIAN BARANG'
	WHEN 'RB' THEN 'RETUR BELI BARANG'
	WHEN 'BA' THEN 'PEMBELIAN ASET'
	WHEN 'BP' THEN 'PEMBELIAN PERLENGKAPAN'
	WHEN 'JB' THEN 'PENJUALAN BARANG'
	WHEN 'JD' THEN 'PENJUALAN BARANG DIVISI'
	WHEN 'RJ' THEN 'RETUR JUAL BARANG'
	WHEN 'RD' THEN 'RETUR JUAL BARANG DIVISI'
	WHEN 'JA' THEN 'PENJUALAN ASET'
	WHEN 'JP' THEN 'PENJUALAN PERLENGKAPAN'
	WHEN 'HB' THEN 'CICILAN HUTANG BARANG'
	WHEN 'PB' THEN 'CICILAN PIUTANG BARANG'
	WHEN 'HA' THEN 'CICILAN HUTANG ASET'
	WHEN 'PA' THEN 'CICILAN PIUTANG ASET'
	WHEN 'HP' THEN 'CICILAN HUTANG PERLENGKAPAN'	
	WHEN 'TP' THEN 'PENDAPATAN LAIN'
	WHEN 'TO' THEN 'BIAYA OPERASIONAL'
	WHEN 'TG' THEN 'BAYAR GAJI'
	WHEN 'MB' THEN 'MUTASI BARANG'
	WHEN 'MK' THEN 'MUTASI KAS'
	WHEN 'TC' THEN 'PENCAIRAN SURAT BERHARGA'
	WHEN 'TS' THEN 'PENYETORAN SURAT BERHARGA'
	WHEN 'PP' THEN 'PEMAKAIAN PERLENGKAPAN'
	WHEN 'OS' THEN 'OPNAME STOK'
	WHEN 'TM'    THEN 'SETOR MODAL'
	WHEN 'TT'  THEN 'PIUTANG PIHAK KETIGA'
	WHEN '1'    THEN 'PENYESUAIAN TUTUP BUKU'
	WHEN 'DN' THEN 'DEBIT NOTA CUSTOMER'
	WHEN 'KN' THEN 'KREDIT NOTA SUPPLIER'
	WHEN 'AWAL' THEN 'STOK AWAL'
	ELSE 'TIDAK DIKETAHUI'		
	END
	)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetPegawaiAlasanTidakMasuk
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
-- Ambil alasan pegawai tidak masuk pada tanggal tertentu

CREATE FUNCTION GetPegawaiAlasanTidakMasuk (@TglTidakMasuk as datetime, @kdPegawai as varchar(10))  
RETURNS varchar(50) AS  
BEGIN 
	declare @ket as varchar(50)

	select @ket = 
	m_jenis_izin.nama
	from 
	t_pegawai_izin inner join m_jenis_izin on (t_pegawai_izin.kd_izin = m_jenis_izin.kd_izin)
	where dbo.getformatTanggal(@TglTidakMasuk) between dbo.getFormatTanggal(awal) and dbo.getFormatTanggal(akhir)
	and t_pegawai_izin.kd_pegawai = @kdPegawai

	return (@ket)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetPegawaiPerNota
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE    FUNCTION GetPegawaiPerNota
	(@pNoNota JR_NO_TRANSAKSI)
RETURNS VARCHAR(100)
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE 
		@pegawai VARCHAR(100)

	SET @pegawai = ''

	/* old version from badboy, diganti karena untuk filterisasi pegawai yang ada dididalam divisi dan yang masuk
		di rasakan lambat*/
	
	SELECT  @pegawai = @pegawai +  '[' + p.nama + '] - ' 
	FROM t_penjualan_detail_pegawai d, m_pegawai p, t_penjualan j 
	WHERE j.no_transaksi = @pNoNota AND d.no_transaksi = j.no_transaksi AND d.kd_pegawai = p.kd_pegawai 
		/*AND d.kd_pegawai IN 
		(	
			SELECT kd_pegawai 
			FROM t_absensi 
			WHERE kd_pegawai = d.kd_pegawai AND 
				dbo.GetFormatTanggal(masuk) = dbo.GetFormatTanggal(j.tanggal)
		)*/
	
	/*SELECT  @pegawai = @pegawai +  '[' + p.nama + '] - ' 
	FROM t_penjualan_detail_pegawai d, m_pegawai p, t_penjualan j, t_absensi a
	WHERE j.no_transaksi = @pNoNota AND d.no_transaksi = j.no_transaksi AND d.kd_pegawai = p.kd_pegawai 
		AND d.kd_pegawai = a.kd_pegawai AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(a.masuk) = dbo.GetFormatTanggal(j.tanggal) */

	SET @pegawai = CASE LEN(@pegawai) 
		WHEN 0 THEN 
			@pegawai 
		ELSE 	
			LEFT(@pegawai, LEN(@pegawai) - 2)
		END

	SELECT @pegawai = @pegawai + ' (' + d.keterangan + ')'  FROM t_penjualan j, m_divisi d 
		WHERE j.kd_divisi = d.kd_divisi AND j.no_transaksi = @pNoNota
	RETURN(@pegawai)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetPenyusutanAset
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION GetPenyusutanAset (@kd_aset VARCHAR(6), @tanggal_awal DATETIME, @tanggal_akhir DATETIME)
RETURNS MONEY
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE @tanggal_beli DATETIME, @tanggal_jual DATETIME
	DECLARE @harga_beli MONEY, @nilai_residu MONEY
	DECLARE @penyusutan FLOAT
	
	DECLARE @total_penyusutan MONEY
	DECLARE @harga MONEY
	DECLARE @penyusutan_per_hari FLOAT
	DECLARE @selisih_dgn_tanggal_awal INT
	DECLARE @selisih_dgn_tanggal_akhir INT
	
	SELECT @tanggal_beli = dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_beli), @tanggal_jual = dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_jual), @harga_beli = harga_beli, 
		@nilai_residu = nilai_residu, @penyusutan = penyusutan
	FROM m_aset
	WHERE kd_aset = @kd_aset
	
	SET @total_penyusutan = 0
	SET @harga = @harga_beli - @nilai_residu
	SET @penyusutan_per_hari = (@penyusutan / (365 * 100))

	IF @tanggal_akhir >= @tanggal_beli
	BEGIN
		IF @tanggal_jual >= @tanggal_beli  
			BEGIN
				IF @tanggal_akhir < @tanggal_jual					
					SET @tanggal_akhir = DATEADD(DAY, -1, @tanggal_jual)

				SET @tanggal_akhir = DATEADD(DAY, -1, @tanggal_jual)

				SET @selisih_dgn_tanggal_awal =
					(DATEDIFF(DAY, @tanggal_beli, 
					(CASE WHEN dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@tanggal_awal) < dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@tanggal_beli) THEN @tanggal_beli ELSE @tanggal_awal END)))
				
				SET @selisih_dgn_tanggal_akhir = 
					(DATEDIFF(DAY, @tanggal_beli, @tanggal_akhir)) 	
				
				
				IF ((@harga * @penyusutan_per_hari) * (@selisih_dgn_tanggal_awal + 1)) > @harga 
					SET @total_penyusutan = 0
				ELSE
					IF ((@harga * @penyusutan_per_hari) * (@selisih_dgn_tanggal_akhir + 1)) > @harga
						SET @total_penyusutan = @harga 
					ELSE
						SET @total_penyusutan = @harga * @penyusutan_per_hari * (@selisih_dgn_tanggal_akhir - @selisih_dgn_tanggal_awal + 1)
			END
		ELSE
			BEGIN
				SET @selisih_dgn_tanggal_awal =
					(DATEDIFF(DAY, @tanggal_beli, 
					(CASE WHEN dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@tanggal_awal) < dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@tanggal_beli) THEN @tanggal_beli ELSE @tanggal_awal END)))
				
				SET @selisih_dgn_tanggal_akhir = 
					(DATEDIFF(DAY, @tanggal_beli, @tanggal_akhir)) 	
				
				
				IF ((@harga * @penyusutan_per_hari) * (@selisih_dgn_tanggal_awal + 1)) > @harga 
					SET @total_penyusutan = @harga
				ELSE
					IF ((@harga * @penyusutan_per_hari) * (@selisih_dgn_tanggal_akhir + 1)) > @harga
						SET @total_penyusutan = @harga 
					ELSE
						SET @total_penyusutan = @harga * @penyusutan_per_hari * (@selisih_dgn_tanggal_akhir - @selisih_dgn_tanggal_awal + 1)
			END
	END

	RETURN (@total_penyusutan)	
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetRoot
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE   FUNCTION GetRoot (@id VARCHAR(50))
RETURNS VARCHAR(50)
BEGIN
	DECLARE @parent VARCHAR(50)
	DECLARE @root_id VARCHAR(50)
	
	--SET @root_id = '-1'
	SELECT @root_id = [id], @parent = id_parent FROM xx_master WHERE [id] = @id
	
	IF @parent <> '1'
	BEGIN
		SET @root_id = dbo.GetRoot(@parent)
	END
	
	RETURN(@root_id)	
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetSelisihKetepatanWaktu
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
-- Untuk menghitung Pegawai yang datang lebih awal (Pegawai Teladan)

CREATE FUNCTION GetSelisihKetepatanWaktu (@tanggal varchar(10))
RETURNS varchar(10) AS
BEGIN 
	declare @jam as BIGINT, @menit as BIGINT, @detik as BIGINT, @tmp as BIGINT
	declare	@H1 as  varchar(2)
	declare @M1 as  varchar(2), @S1 as  varchar(2)

	set @jam =    cast(substring(@tanggal,1,2) as int) * 3600 	-- Jam Masuk 08
	set @menit = cast(substring(@tanggal,4,2) as int) * 60		-- Toleransi keterlambatan 15 menit
	set @detik =  cast(substring(@tanggal,7,2) as int)  	-- detik  = 00


	set @tmp = (8 * 3600 + 15 * 60)	-(@jam + @menit + @detik) 
	
	set @H1 = cast((@tmp / 3600) as varchar(2))
	set @tmp = (@tmp % 3600)
	set @M1 = cast((@tmp / 60) as varchar(2))
	set @tmp = @tmp % 60
	set @S1 = cast(@tmp as varchar(2))
		
	if (len(@H1)=1)  set @H1 = '0' + @H1	
	if len(@M1)=1 set @M1 = '0' + @M1	
	if len(@S1)=1 set @S1 = '0' + @S1
	return (@H1 + ':' + @M1 + ':' + @S1)

END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetSelisihKeterlambatan
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION GetSelisihKeterlambatan (@tanggal varchar(10))
RETURNS varchar(10) AS
BEGIN 
	declare @jam as BIGINT, @menit as BIGINT, @detik as BIGINT, @tmp as BIGINT
	declare	@H1 as  varchar(2)
	declare @M1 as  varchar(2), @S1 as  varchar(2)

	set @jam =    cast(substring(@tanggal,1,2) as int) * 3600 	-- Jam Masuk 08
	set @menit = cast(substring(@tanggal,4,2) as int) * 60		-- Toleransi keterlambatan 15 menit
	set @detik =  cast(substring(@tanggal,7,2) as int)  	-- detik  = 00

	set @tmp = 	(@jam + @menit + @detik) - (8 * 3600 + 15 * 60)	
	
	set @H1 = cast((@tmp / 3600) as varchar(2))
	set @tmp = (@tmp % 3600)
	set @M1 = cast((@tmp / 60) as varchar(2))
	set @tmp = @tmp % 60
	set @S1 = cast(@tmp as varchar(2))
		
	if (len(@H1)=1)  set @H1 = '0' + @H1	
	if len(@M1)=1 set @M1 = '0' + @M1	
	if len(@S1)=1 set @S1 = '0' + @S1
	return (@H1 + ':' + @M1 + ':' + @S1)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetStatusPenjualan
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION GetStatusPenjualan
	(@Status TINYINT, @GrandTotal Money, @TotalCicilan MONEY, @TotalRetur MONEY)
RETURNS TINYINT
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE 
		@retval TINYINT
	IF @status = 1 
		SET @retval = 1
	ELSE
		IF @GrandTotal <= @TotalCicilan + @TotalRetur
			SET @retval = 2
		ELSE
			SET @retval = 0

	RETURN (@retval)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetStokPerUkuran
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
--Note		: Fungsi ini langsung di panggil dari VB, jadi kalau ada penambahan kolom kerja keras lagi ! OK
--Purpose	: Menampilkan semua pegawai yang tidak masuk (absen), DENGAN SYARAT TANGGAL AWAL DAN TANGGAL AKHIR PERIODE
--Created by	: I-ONE

CREATE   FUNCTION GetStokPerUkuran(@supplier JR_KODE_MASTER, @divisi JR_KODE_MASTER, @merk JR_KODE_MASTER, @model JR_KODE_MASTER, @warna JR_KODE_MASTER)
RETURNS VARCHAR(200)
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE @result VARCHAR(200)
	DECLARE @ukuran FLOAT
	DECLARE @stok INT

	SET @result = ''
	SET @stok = 0
	SET @ukuran = 0.0

	DECLARE CStokBarang CURSOR FOR
		SELECT b.ukuran, SUM(dbo.GetStokAkhir(@divisi, b.kd_barang)) AS stok
		FROM m_barang b INNER JOIN m_barang_supplier bs ON b.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND bs.status <> 0 
			INNER JOIN m_barang_divisi bd ON b.kd_barang = bd.kd_barang AND bd.status <> 0 AND
			bd.kd_divisi = @Divisi AND bs.kd_supplier = @supplier AND b.kd_merk = @merk  AND b.kd_model = @model AND b.kd_warna = @warna
		GROUP BY b.ukuran
		ORDER BY b.ukuran
	
	OPEN CStokBarang
	
	FETCH NEXT FROM CStokBarang INTO @ukuran, @stok
	WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
	BEGIN
		IF (@stok <> 0)
		BEGIN	
			IF @result <> ''
				SET @result = @result + ' '
			SET @result = @result + CAST(@ukuran AS VARCHAR(6))+ '/' + CAST(@stok AS VARCHAR(6)) 
		END
		FETCH NEXT FROM CStokBarang INTO @ukuran, @stok
	END
	
	CLOSE CStokBarang
	DEALLOCATE CStokBarang	
	RETURN @result
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetStokPerUkuranNew
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
--Note		: Fungsi ini langsung di panggil dari VB, jadi kalau ada penambahan kolom kerja keras lagi ! OK
--Purpose	: Menampilkan semua pegawai yang tidak masuk (absen), DENGAN SYARAT TANGGAL AWAL DAN TANGGAL AKHIR PERIODE
--Created by	: I-ONE

CREATE    FUNCTION GetStokPerUkuranNew(@supplier JR_KODE_MASTER, @merk JR_KODE_MASTER, @model JR_KODE_MASTER, @warna JR_KODE_MASTER)
RETURNS VARCHAR(200)
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE @result VARCHAR(200)
	DECLARE @ukuran FLOAT
	DECLARE @stok INT

	SET @result = ''
	SET @stok = 0
	SET @ukuran = 0.0

	DECLARE CStokBarang CURSOR FOR
		SELECT b.ukuran, SUM(mbs.stok_akhir) AS stok
		FROM m_barang b INNER JOIN m_barang_stok_akhir mbs ON b.kd_barang = mbs.kd_barang INNER JOIN m_barang_supplier bs ON b.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND bs.status <> 0 AND
			bs.kd_supplier = @supplier AND b.kd_merk = @merk  AND b.kd_model = @model AND b.kd_warna = @warna
		GROUP BY b.ukuran
		ORDER BY b.ukuran
	
	OPEN CStokBarang
	
	FETCH NEXT FROM CStokBarang INTO @ukuran, @stok
	WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
	BEGIN
		IF (@stok <> 0)
		BEGIN	
			IF @result <> ''
				SET @result = @result + ' '
			SET @result = @result + CAST(@ukuran AS VARCHAR(6))+ '/' + CAST(@stok AS VARCHAR(6)) 
		END
		FETCH NEXT FROM CStokBarang INTO @ukuran, @stok
	END
	
	CLOSE CStokBarang
	DEALLOCATE CStokBarang	
	RETURN @result
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetStokPerUkuranTotal
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE   FUNCTION GetStokPerUkuranTotal(@supplier JR_KODE_MASTER, @merk JR_KODE_MASTER, @model JR_KODE_MASTER, @warna JR_KODE_MASTER)
RETURNS VARCHAR(200)
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE @result VARCHAR(200)
	DECLARE @ukuran FLOAT
	DECLARE @stok INT

	SET @result = ''
	SET @stok = 0
	SET @ukuran = 0.0

	DECLARE CStokBarang CURSOR FOR
		SELECT b.ukuran, SUM(dbo.GetStokAkhir(bd.kd_divisi, b.kd_barang)) AS stok
		FROM m_barang b INNER JOIN m_barang_supplier bs ON b.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND bs.status <> 0 
			INNER JOIN m_barang_divisi bd ON b.kd_barang = bd.kd_barang AND bd.status <> 0  AND bs.kd_supplier = @supplier 
				AND b.kd_merk = @merk  AND b.kd_model = @model AND b.kd_warna = @warna 
		GROUP BY b.ukuran
		ORDER BY b.ukuran
	
	OPEN CStokBarang
	
	FETCH NEXT FROM CStokBarang INTO @ukuran, @stok
	WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
	BEGIN
		IF (@stok <> 0)
		BEGIN	
			IF @result <> ''
				SET @result = @result + ' '
			SET @result = @result + CAST(@ukuran AS VARCHAR(6))+ '/' + CAST(@stok AS VARCHAR(6)) 
		END
		FETCH NEXT FROM CStokBarang INTO @ukuran, @stok
	END
	
	CLOSE CStokBarang
	DEALLOCATE CStokBarang	
	RETURN @result
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetSupplierBarang
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION GetSupplierBarang	(@barang JR_KODE_BARANG) 

RETURNS VARCHAR(50)
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE @supplier VARCHAR(30)
	DECLARE @result VARCHAR(50)
	
	SET @result = ''
	DECLARE cur_supplier CURSOR FOR 
		SELECT m_supplier.nama 
		FROM m_barang_supplier INNER JOIN m_supplier ON m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier = m_supplier.kd_supplier AND m_barang_supplier.kd_barang = @barang AND m_barang_supplier.status <> 0 
		ORDER BY m_supplier.nama
	OPEN cur_supplier

	FETCH NEXT FROM cur_supplier INTO @supplier
	
	WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
	BEGIN
		IF @result <> ''
			SET @result = @result + ', '
		   SET @result = @result + @supplier 
		
		FETCH NEXT FROM cur_supplier INTO @supplier
	END
	
	IF @result = ''
		SET @result = '[supplier tidak valid]'
	
	CLOSE cur_supplier
	DEALLOCATE cur_supplier
	RETURN (@result)

END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetTanggal
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION GetTanggal (@letak BIT,  @tanggal DATETIME)
RETURNS DATETIME AS  
BEGIN 
	DECLARE @res DATETIME

	SET @res = 	CAST(
				'01/' + 
				CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, @tanggal) AS VARCHAR(2)) + '/' + 
				CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, @tanggal) AS VARCHAR(4)) 
			AS DATETIME)
	IF @letak = 1
	BEGIN
		SET @res = DATEADD (MONTH, 1,  @res)		-- (+) tambah => 1 bulan
		SET @res = DATEADD (DAY, -1,  @res)			-- (-) kurang => 1 hari
	END

	RETURN (@res)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetTanggalMasuk
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
/*
 Mengembalikan tanggal masuk lengkap sesuai dengan kd_pegawai dan tanggal masuk

	param :
		kd_pegawai = kode pegawai
		@masuk = dbo.GetFormatTanggal (masuk) // abaikan jam
		@row = jika terdapat 2 baris recordreturn baris ke 1 atau ke 2


	26 Maret 08 : IONE

*/

create function GetTanggalMasuk(@kd_pegawai as varchar(20), @masuk as datetime, @row as integer)
returns datetime as 
begin
	declare @hasil as datetime

	SET @hasil = ''

	if @row = 1 
		select top 1 @hasil = masuk from t_absensi 
		where 
			dbo.getFormatTanggal(masuk) = dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@masuk)
			and kd_pegawai = @kd_pegawai
		order by masuk ASC

	else if @row = 2 	
		select top 1 @hasil = masuk from t_absensi 
		where 
			dbo.getFormatTanggal(masuk) = dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@masuk)
			and kd_pegawai = @kd_pegawai
		order by masuk DESC

	return(@hasil)
end

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetTotalDiskonPenjualan
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE  FUNCTION GetTotalDiskonPenjualan(@no_transaksi JR_NO_TRANSAKSI)
RETURNS MONEY
BEGIN
RETURN 
(
	SELECT SUM(t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual * t_penjualan_detail.qty)  - 
	(SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, t_penjualan_detail.diskon1,  t_penjualan_detail.diskon2,  t_penjualan_detail.diskon3,  t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), 
		t_penjualan.diskon1,  t_penjualan.diskon2,  t_penjualan.diskon3, t_penjualan.diskon4,  0, 0) * t_penjualan_detail.qty)) + t_penjualan.diskon_uang
	FROM t_penjualan, t_penjualan_detail
	WHERE t_penjualan.no_transaksi = t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi AND t_penjualan.no_transaksi = @no_transaksi
	GROUP BY t_penjualan.diskon_uang
)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetTotalIzinYangMemotongCuti
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
-- Ambil semua izin pegawai yang memotong cuti
-- Yang masih dalam range TanggalAktif

CREATE FUNCTION GetTotalIzinYangMemotongCuti (@kdPegawai as varchar(10),@status as int)  
RETURNS INT AS  
BEGIN 
	DECLARE @jumlah as BIGINT
	DECLARE @TglAwal DATETIME, @TglAkhir DATETIME

	SELECT @TglAwal = MIN(tgl), @TglAkhir = MAX(tgl) 
	FROM dbo.GetSemuaTanggalAktif()

	SELECT @jumlah = isnull(sum(day(dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_pegawai_izin.akhir) - dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_pegawai_izin.awal))),0)
	FROM
	t_pegawai_izin inner join m_jenis_izin on (t_pegawai_izin.kd_izin = m_jenis_izin.kd_izin)
	WHERE 
	(m_jenis_izin.status = 2) 							-- (2)=alpha yang mengurangi cuti atau gaji
	AND (t_pegawai_izin.status = @status)						-- 0 = belum konfirmasi, Potong cuti  -- otomatis
	AND (t_pegawai_izin.kd_pegawai  = @kdPegawai)			
	AND (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(Awal) BETWEEN @TglAwal AND @TglAkhir)
	AND (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(Akhir) BETWEEN @TglAwal AND @TglAkhir)	

	RETURN (@jumlah)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetTotalIzinYangTidakMemotongCuti
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
-- Ambil semua izin pegawai yang tidak memotong cuti
-- Yang masih dalam range TanggalAktif

CREATE FUNCTION GetTotalIzinYangTidakMemotongCuti (@kdPegawai as varchar(10))  
RETURNS INT AS  
BEGIN 
	DECLARE @jumlah as BIGINT
	DECLARE @TglAwal DATETIME, @TglAkhir DATETIME

	SELECT @TglAwal = MIN(tgl), @TglAkhir = MAX(tgl) 
	FROM dbo.GetSemuaTanggalAktif()

	SELECT @jumlah = isnull(sum(day(dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_pegawai_izin.akhir) - dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_pegawai_izin.awal))),0)
	FROM
	t_pegawai_izin inner join m_jenis_izin on (t_pegawai_izin.kd_izin = m_jenis_izin.kd_izin)
	WHERE 
	(m_jenis_izin.status = 1) 							-- (1)=izin tanpa mengurangi cuti dan bukan alpha;
	AND (t_pegawai_izin.kd_pegawai  = @kdPegawai)			
	AND (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(Awal) BETWEEN @TglAwal AND @TglAkhir)
	AND (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(Akhir) BETWEEN @TglAwal AND @TglAkhir)	

	RETURN (@jumlah)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetTotalJamKerjaPerHari
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
-- Hitung Total Jam kerja pegawai per hari

CREATE FUNCTION GetTotalJamKerjaPerHari (@kdPegawai as varchar(10), @Tanggal as DATETIME)  
RETURNS varchar(10) AS  
BEGIN 
	declare @Mjam as bigint, @Mmenit as bigint, @Mdetik as bigint
	declare @Pjam as bigint, @Pmenit as bigint, @Pdetik as bigint
	declare @Hjam as varchar(2), @Hmenit as varchar(2), @Hdetik as varchar(2)

	declare @tmp as bigint
	declare @masuk as varchar(10), @pulang as varchar(10)

	select @masuk = dbo.getformatjam(min(masuk)) , @pulang = dbo.getformatjam(max (keluar)) from t_absensi
	where kd_pegawai = @kdPegawai
	group by dbo.getformattanggal(masuk)
	having  
	 dbo.getformattanggal(masuk)  = @Tanggal
	and  min(masuk) is not null and  max (keluar) is not null
	
	
	set @Mjam = cast(substring(@masuk,1,2) as bigint) * 3600
	set @Mmenit = cast(substring(@masuk,4,2) as bigint) * 60
	set @MDetik = cast(substring(@masuk,7,2) as bigint)

	
	set @Pjam = cast(substring(@pulang,1,2) as bigint) * 3600
	set @Pmenit = cast(substring(@pulang,4,2) as bigint) * 60
	set @PDetik = cast(substring(@pulang,7,2) as bigint)

	
	set @tmp = (@Pjam + @Pmenit + @Pdetik) - (@Mjam + @Mmenit + @Mdetik) 
	set @hJam = cast ((@tmp / 3600 ) as varchar(2))
	set @tmp = @tmp % 3600
	set @hMenit = cast ( (@tmp / 60) as varchar(2))
	set @tmp = @tmp % 60			
	set @hdetik = cast ( (@tmp ) as varchar(2))

	if len(@hJam) = 1 set @hjam = '0' + @hjam 
	if len(@hmenit) = 1 set @hmenit = '0' + @hmenit 
	if len(@hdetik) = 1 set @hdetik = '0' + @hdetik
	return (@hjam + ':' + @hmenit + ':' + @hdetik)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetTotalPajakPembelian
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE  FUNCTION GetTotalPajakPembelian (@no_transaksi JR_NO_TRANSAKSI)
RETURNS MONEY
BEGIN

	RETURN 
	(
		SELECT t_pembelian.pajak * SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(t_pembelian_detail.harga_beli, t_pembelian_detail.diskon1,  t_pembelian_detail.diskon2,  t_pembelian_detail.diskon3,  t_pembelian_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), t_pembelian.diskon1,  t_pembelian.diskon2,  t_pembelian.diskon3, t_pembelian.diskon4,  0, 0) * t_pembelian_detail.qty)
		FROM t_pembelian, t_pembelian_detail
		WHERE t_pembelian.no_transaksi = t_pembelian_detail.no_transaksi AND t_pembelian.no_transaksi = @no_transaksi
		GROUP BY t_pembelian.pajak
	)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetTotalPajakPenjualan
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE  FUNCTION GetTotalPajakPenjualan (@no_transaksi JR_NO_TRANSAKSI)
RETURNS MONEY
BEGIN

	RETURN 
	(
		SELECT case   
		when t_penjualan.pajak = 0 then 0
		else
			t_penjualan.pajak * SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, t_penjualan_detail.diskon1,  t_penjualan_detail.diskon2,  t_penjualan_detail.diskon3,  t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), t_penjualan.diskon1,  t_penjualan.diskon2,  t_penjualan.diskon3, t_penjualan.diskon4,  0, 0) * t_penjualan_detail.qty)
		end
		FROM t_penjualan, t_penjualan_detail
		WHERE t_penjualan.no_transaksi = t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi AND t_penjualan.no_transaksi = @no_transaksi
		GROUP BY t_penjualan.pajak
	)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetTotalPajakPenjualanJasa

RETURNS MONEY

		FROM t_penjualan_jasa, t_penjualan_jasa_detail
		WHERE t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = t_penjualan_jasa_detail.no_transaksi AND t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = @no_transaksi

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetTotalPembelian
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE  FUNCTION GetTotalPembelian(@no_transaksi VARCHAR(20))
RETURNS MONEY AS  
BEGIN 
	RETURN
	(
		SELECT ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga_beli, d.diskon1, d.diskon2, d.diskon3, d.diskon4, 0, 0), b.diskon1, b.diskon2, b.diskon3, b.diskon4, b.pajak, b.ppnbm) * d.qty), 0)
		FROM t_pembelian b, t_pembelian_detail d
		WHERE d.no_transaksi = b.no_transaksi AND b.no_transaksi = @no_transaksi
	)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetTotalPenjualan
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE   FUNCTION GetTotalPenjualan(@no_transaksi VARCHAR(20))
RETURNS MONEY AS  
BEGIN 
	RETURN
	(
		--SELECT ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga_jual, d.diskon, j.diskon, 0, 0, j.pajak, 0) * d.qty), 0)

		SELECT ISNULL(SUM
			(
			dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga_jual, d.diskon1, d.diskon2, d.diskon3, d.diskon4, 0, 0), j.diskon1, j.diskon2, j.diskon3, j.diskon4, j.pajak, 0)* d.qty
			)
			, 0) -  v.nominal - j.diskon_uang

		FROM t_penjualan j, t_penjualan_detail d, m_voucher v
		WHERE d.no_transaksi = j.no_transaksi AND j.kd_voucher = v.kd_voucher AND j.no_transaksi = @no_transaksi
		GROUP BY v.nominal, j.diskon_uang
	)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetTotalPenjualanJasa
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE   FUNCTION GetTotalPenjualanJasa(@no_transaksi VARCHAR(20))
RETURNS MONEY AS  
BEGIN 
	RETURN
	(
		--SELECT ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga_jual, d.diskon, j.diskon, 0, 0, j.pajak, 0) * d.qty), 0)

		SELECT ISNULL(SUM
			(
			dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga, d.diskon,0, 0,0,0,0), j.diskon, 0,0,0,(j.pajak+j.services), 0)* d.qty
			)
			, 0) -  v.nominal
		FROM t_penjualan_jasa j, t_penjualan_jasa_detail d, m_voucher v
		WHERE d.no_transaksi = j.no_transaksi AND j.kd_voucher = v.kd_voucher AND j.no_transaksi = @no_transaksi
		GROUP BY v.nominal
	)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetTotalPenyusutanAset
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE     FUNCTION GetTotalPenyusutanAset ( @tanggal_awal DATETIME, @tanggal_akhir DATETIME, @kode_kategori BIGINT)
RETURNS MONEY
AS 
BEGIN
	DECLARE @total MONEY
	SET @total = 0


	SELECT @total = 
		SUM
		(
			CASE  
			WHEN penyusutan = 0 THEN
				0
			ELSE 
				CASE
				WHEN (((harga_beli - nilai_residu) * (penyusutan / (365 * 100))) * (DATEDIFF(DAY, tanggal_beli, (CASE WHEN dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@tanggal_awal) < dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_beli) THEN tanggal_beli ELSE @tanggal_awal END) ) + 1)) > (harga_beli - nilai_residu) THEN
					--jika total penyusutan sampai tanggal awal > nilai aset
					0
				ELSE
					--jika total penyusutan sampai tanggal awal < nilai aset
					CASE
					WHEN (((harga_beli - nilai_residu) * (penyusutan / (365 * 100))) * (DATEDIFF(DAY, tanggal_beli, @tanggal_akhir) + 1)) > (harga_beli - nilai_residu) THEN
						--jika total penyusutan sampai tanggal akhir > nilai aset
						--maka : nilai aset - (penyusutan sampai tanggal awal)
						(harga_beli - nilai_residu) - (((harga_beli - nilai_residu) * (penyusutan / (365 * 100))) * (DATEDIFF(DAY, tanggal_beli, (CASE WHEN dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@tanggal_awal) < dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_beli) THEN tanggal_beli ELSE @tanggal_awal END)) + 1))
					ELSE
						--jika total penyusutan sampai tanggal awal > nilai aset	
						--maka total penyusutan sampai tanggal akhir - total penyusutan sampai tanggal awal
						((DATEDIFF(DAY, tanggal_beli, @tanggal_akhir) - DATEDIFF(DAY, tanggal_beli, (CASE WHEN dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@tanggal_awal) < dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_beli) THEN tanggal_beli ELSE @tanggal_awal END) )) + 1) *
						((harga_beli - nilai_residu) * (penyusutan / (365 * 100)))
					END
				END
			END
		)
	FROM m_aset
	WHERE status = 3 AND kd_kategori_aset = @kode_kategori AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_beli) <= @tanggal_akhir
	
	RETURN ISNULL(@total, 0)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetTotalReturPenjualanTest
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE    FUNCTION GetTotalReturPenjualanTest
	(@no_retur VARCHAR(20), @diskonRetur float)
RETURNS money
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE 
		@retval MONEY, @subtotal MONEY, @diskon FLOAT
	set @diskon=@diskonRetur
	SELECT @subtotal = SUM((d.harga_jual * d.qty))
	    FROM  t_penjualan_retur_detail d
	    WHERE @no_retur = d.no_retur 
	    

	IF @diskon < 1 
		SET @retval = @subtotal - (@subtotal * @diskon)
--		SET @retval = (SELECT ISNULL(SUM(d.harga_jual * d.qty)- (SUM(d.harga_jual * d.qty) * r.diskon) ,0)
--			    FROM t_penjualan_retur r, t_penjualan_retur_detail d
--			    WHERE r.no_retur = d.no_retur AND r.no_transaksi=@no_transaksi
--			    GROUP BY r.diskon)
	ELSE
		SET @retval = @subtotal - @diskon
--		SET @retval = (SELECT ISNULL(SUM(d.harga_jual * d.qty)- r.diskon ,0)
--			    FROM t_penjualan_retur r, t_penjualan_retur_detail d
--			    WHERE r.no_retur = d.no_retur AND r.no_transaksi = @no_transaksi
--			    GROUP BY r.diskon)

	RETURN(ISNULL(@retval, 0))
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetTotalServicesPenjualanJasa
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE  FUNCTION dbo.GetTotalServicesPenjualanJasa (@no_transaksi JR_NO_TRANSAKSI)
RETURNS MONEY
BEGIN

	RETURN 
	(
		SELECT t_penjualan_jasa.services * SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(t_penjualan_jasa_detail.harga, t_penjualan_jasa_detail.diskon,  0, 0, 0, 0, 0), t_penjualan_jasa.diskon,  0, 0, 0,  0, 0) * t_penjualan_jasa_detail.qty)
		FROM t_penjualan_jasa, t_penjualan_jasa_detail
		WHERE t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = t_penjualan_jasa_detail.no_transaksi AND t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = @no_transaksi
		GROUP BY t_penjualan_jasa.services
	)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: GetUrutanSatuan
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE  FUNCTION GetUrutanSatuan(@KodeBarang JR_KODE_BARANG)
RETURNS  VARCHAR(255) AS  
BEGIN 
	DECLARE @Result VARCHAR(255), @jumlah VARCHAR(50)
	SET @Result = ''
	SET @jumlah = ''
	
	DECLARE cur_satuan CURSOR FOR
		SELECT CAST(jumlah AS VARCHAR(50))
		FROM m_barang_satuan 
		WHERE kd_barang = @KodeBarang AND status <> 0
		ORDER BY jumlah ASC
	OPEN cur_satuan
	FETCH NEXT FROM cur_satuan INTO @jumlah
	WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
	BEGIN
		IF @Result <> '' 
			SET @Result = @Result + ' x '
		SET @Result = @Result + @jumlah 
		FETCH NEXT FROM cur_satuan INTO @jumlah
	END
	

	RETURN (@Result)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: HargaJualDivisiDiskon
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE    FUNCTION dbo.HargaJualDivisiDiskon (@kd_divisi varchar(18), @kd_barang varchar(18), @kd_satuan varchar(18))
RETURNS varchar(200) AS
BEGIN 

DECLARE @tqtymin float, @tharga float, @str varchar(200)

DECLARE authors_cursor CURSOR FOR
SELECT     ISNULL(dbo.m_barang_divisi_diskon.qty_minim, 0) AS qtymin, dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.m_barang_satuan.harga_jual, 
                      dbo.m_barang_divisi_diskon.diskon1, dbo.m_barang_divisi_diskon.diskon2, dbo.m_barang_divisi_diskon.diskon3, 
                      dbo.m_barang_divisi_diskon.diskon4, 0, 0) AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.m_barang_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_satuan ON dbo.m_barang_divisi.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_barang LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_divisi_diskon ON dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_satuan = dbo.m_barang_divisi_diskon.kd_satuan AND 
                      dbo.m_barang_divisi.kd_divisi = dbo.m_barang_divisi_diskon.kd_divisi AND 
                      dbo.m_barang_divisi.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_divisi_diskon.kd_barang
WHERE     (dbo.m_barang_divisi.kd_divisi = @kd_divisi)AND (dbo.m_barang_divisi.kd_barang = @kd_barang) AND (dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_satuan = @kd_satuan)
OPEN authors_cursor
FETCH NEXT FROM authors_cursor
INTO @tqtymin, @tharga

set @str=''
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
BEGIN	
	IF @tqtymin <> 0
	BEGIN
		IF @str <> ''
			SET @str = @str + '; '
		SET  @str=@str + '(' + (ltrim(rtrim(str(@tqtymin)))) + ')' + (ltrim(rtrim(str(@tharga))))
	END
	ELSE		
		SET @str='(1)'+(ltrim(rtrim(str(@tharga))))
  

   FETCH NEXT FROM authors_cursor
   INTO @tqtymin, @tharga
END

--   if @str='' 
--   set @str='(1)'+(ltrim(rtrim(str(@tharga))))
CLOSE authors_cursor
DEALLOCATE authors_cursor
	RETURN(@str)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: HitungDiskon
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
/****** Object:  User Defined Function dbo.HitungDiskon   Script Date: 25/07/2007 15:50:08 ******/

CREATE FUNCTION HitungDiskon
	(@harga money, @d_diskon1 float) 

RETURNS money
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE 
		@diskon money
	BEGIN
		IF @d_diskon1 > 0 
 			BEGIN 
				IF @d_diskon1 > 0 AND @d_diskon1 <= 1
					set @diskon = @harga * @d_diskon1
				else	
					set @diskon =  @d_diskon1
			END
		ELSE
			SET @diskon=0
	END
	
	
	RETURN(@diskon)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: IsPegawaiMasuk
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
-- =============================================
-- Create inline function (IF)
-- =============================================
CREATE FUNCTION IsPegawaiMasuk
	(@pegawai AS VARCHAR(6),  @tanggal DATETIME)
RETURNS BIT
AS	
BEGIN
DECLARE 
	@masuk BIT
	SET @masuk = 0

	SELECT  @masuk = CASE kd_pegawai WHEN '' THEN 0 ELSE -1 END
	FROM t_absensi
	WHERE kd_pegawai = @pegawai AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(masuk) BETWEEN @tanggal AND @tanggal 

	RETURN @masuk
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: JumlahTahunPenyusutanAset
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
-- =============================================
-- Create inline function (IF)
-- =============================================

CREATE FUNCTION JumlahTahunPenyusutanAset
	(@Aset JR_KODE_MASTER, @SampaiTahun DATETIME)
RETURNS INT
AS
BEGIN
DECLARE @TanggalBeli DATETIME, @JumlahTahun INT, @Penyusutan INT, @ret INT

	SELECT @penyusutan = penyusutan, @TanggalBeli = tanggal_beli FROM m_aset WHERE kd_aset = @Aset
	SET @JumlahTahun = CAST(YEAR(@SampaiTahun) - YEAR(@Tanggalbeli) AS INT)
	IF @penyusutan > 0 
		IF 100 / @Penyusutan >= @JumlahTahun
			SET @ret = @JumlahTahun
		ELSE
			SET @ret = 100 / @Penyusutan
	ELSE
		SET @ret = 0
	
	RETURN @ret
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: KeteranganConvertBarang
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
/****** Object:  User Defined Function dbo.ConvertBarang    Script Date: 05/09/2006 15:50:08 ******/
CREATE   FUNCTION KeteranganConvertBarang (@kd_barang JR_KODE_BARANG, @stok float)
RETURNS varchar(200) AS
BEGIN 

DECLARE @tsatuan varchar(40), @tjumlah float, @str varchar(200),@tqty float

DECLARE authors_cursor CURSOR FOR
SELECT satuan,jumlah FROM v_m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang=@kd_barang AND status = 1 ORDER BY jumlah DESC
OPEN authors_cursor
FETCH NEXT FROM authors_cursor
INTO @tsatuan, @tjumlah

set @str=''
set @tqty=@stok
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
BEGIN
   	
   if @tqty / @tjumlah >= 1
   begin
      if @str<>'' 
	set @str=@str+', '
      set @str=@str+ltrim(rtrim(str(round((@tqty / @tjumlah),0,1))))+' '+ltrim(rtrim(@tsatuan))
      set @tqty=@tqty - (round(@tqty / @tjumlah,0,1)*@tjumlah)
   end 

   FETCH NEXT FROM authors_cursor
   INTO @tsatuan, @tjumlah
END
if @str='' 
   set @str='0 ' + @tsatuan
CLOSE authors_cursor
DEALLOCATE authors_cursor
	RETURN(@str)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: KeteranganConvertBarangPersamaan
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
/****** Object:  User Defined Function dbo.ConvertBarang    Script Date: 05/09/2006 15:50:08 ******/
CREATE    FUNCTION KeteranganConvertBarangPersamaan (@kd_barang JR_KODE_BARANG, @stok float)
RETURNS varchar(200) AS
BEGIN 

DECLARE @tsatuan varchar(40), @tjumlah float, @str varchar(200),@tqty float

DECLARE authors_cursor CURSOR FOR
SELECT satuan,jumlah FROM v_m_barang_satuan WHERE kd_barang=@kd_barang AND status = 1 ORDER BY jumlah DESC
OPEN authors_cursor
FETCH NEXT FROM authors_cursor
INTO @tsatuan, @tjumlah

set @str=''
set @tqty=@stok
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
BEGIN
   	
      if @str<>'' 
	set @str=@str+', '
      set @str=@str+ltrim(rtrim(str(round((@tqty / @tjumlah),2))))+' '+ltrim(rtrim(@tsatuan))

   FETCH NEXT FROM authors_cursor
   INTO @tsatuan, @tjumlah
END
if @str='' 
   set @str='0 ' + @tsatuan
CLOSE authors_cursor
DEALLOCATE authors_cursor
	RETURN(@str)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: PenyusutanTahunIni
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION PenyusutanTahunIni
	(@Aset JR_KODE_MASTER, @Tanggal DATETIME)
RETURNS MONEY
AS
BEGIN
DECLARE @TanggalBeli DATETIME, @JumlahTahun INT, @Penyusutan INT, @HargaBeli MONEY, @RV MONEY, @ret MONEY
	SELECT @penyusutan = penyusutan, @TanggalBeli = tanggal_beli, @HargaBeli = harga_beli,
		@RV = nilai_residu
	FROM m_aset WHERE kd_aset = @Aset
	
	SET @JumlahTahun = CAST(YEAR(@Tanggal) - YEAR(@TanggalBeli)  AS INT)
	IF @penyusutan > 0 
		IF 100 / @Penyusutan >= @JumlahTahun		
			SET @ret = @JumlahTahun * (@HargaBeli - @RV)
		ELSE
			SET @ret = 0
	ELSE
		SET @ret = 0
	
	RETURN @ret
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: terbilang
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION [dbo].[terbilang] (@angka as decimal(19,2))  
RETURNS varchar (200) AS  
BEGIN 
Declare @b Decimal, @r Decimal, @J Decimal, @M Decimal, @T1 Decimal, @koma1 Decimal, @koma2 Integer, @hasil varchar(200), @z varchar(20)
Declare @s_t varchar(200), @ribu varchar(200), @Juta varchar(200), @Miliar varchar(200), @tx varchar(200), @angka1 varchar(200), @tx1 varchar(200)

set @s_t = case	when Len(rTrim(cast(cast(@Angka as bigint) as varchar(20)))) < 15 
			then replicate('0',15 - Len(rTrim(cast(cast(@Angka as bigint) as varchar(20))))) + rTrim(cast(cast(@Angka as bigint) as varchar(20))) 
		else rTrim(cast(cast(@Angka as bigint) as varchar(20))) 
		end

set @z = cast(15 - Len(rTrim(cast(cast(@Angka as integer) as varchar(20)))) as varchar(20)) + rTrim(cast(cast(@Angka as integer) as varchar(20))) 
set @r = cast(Right(@s_t, 3) as integer)
set @b = cast(substring(@s_t, 10, 3)  as integer)
set @J = cast(substring(@s_t, 7, 3)  as integer)
set @M = cast(substring(@s_t, 4, 3)  as integer)
set @T1 = cast(Left(@s_t, 3)  as integer)
set @ribu = case when @b = 0 then ' ' else case when @b = 1 then 'Seribu' else [dbo].TerbilangDetil(@b) + 'Ribu' end end
set @Juta = case when @J = 0 then ' ' else [dbo].TerbilangDetil(@J) + 'Juta ' end
set @Miliar = case when @M = 0 then ' ' else [dbo].TerbilangDetil(@M) + 'Miliar' end
set @tx = Case 
    when @Angka < 1000 --- Ratusan
                then [dbo].TerbilangDetil(@r)
        when @Angka < 1000000 --& Ribuan
                then @ribu + ' ' + [dbo].TerbilangDetil(@r)
        when @Angka < 1000000000 --& Jutaan
                then [dbo].TerbilangDetil(@J) + '' + rTrim('Juta ' + @ribu) + ' ' + [dbo].TerbilangDetil(@r)
    when @Angka < 1000000000000 --& Miliaran
                then [dbo].TerbilangDetil(@M) + '' + rTrim('Miliar ' + @Juta + @ribu) + ' ' + [dbo].TerbilangDetil(@r)
        when @Angka >= 1000000000000 --& Trilliun
                then [dbo].TerbilangDetil(@T1) + '' + rTrim('Trilliun ' + @Miliar + @Juta + @ribu) + ' ' + [dbo].TerbilangDetil(@r)
End
set @angka1 = rTrim(cast(@Angka as varchar(20)))
set @koma1 = case when charindex('.', @angka1) = 0 then 0 else cast(rTrim(substring(@angka1, charindex('.',@angka1) + 1, 2)) as integer) end
set @koma2 = Len(case when charindex('.',@angka1) = 0 then '0' else rTrim(substring(@angka1, charindex('.',@angka1) + 1, 2)) end)
If @koma1 > 0
begin
    If @koma1 < 10 And @koma2 = 1
    set @koma1 = @koma1 * 10
    set @tx1 = [dbo].TerbilangDetil(@koma1)
    set @hasil = @tx + 'Rupiah ' + @tx1 + 'Sen'
end
Else
    set @hasil = @tx + 'Rupiah'
return (@hasil)
END

SCALAR_FUNCTION.name: TerbilangDetil
SCALAR_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION [DBO].[TerbilangDetil] (@Nilai as decimal)  
RETURNS varchar(200) AS  
BEGIN 
declare @TS varchar(200), @ST varchar(200), @S integer, @p integer, @r1 integer, @Bil varchar(200), @TP varchar(200), @hasil varchar(200)
    set @ST = Right(rTrim(Str(@Nilai + 1000)), 3)
    set @S = cast(Right(@ST, 1) as integer)
    set @p = cast(substring(@ST, 2, 1) as integer)
    set @r1 = cast(Left(@ST, 1) as integer)
    set @Bil = 'Satu    Dua     Tiga    Empat   Lima    '
    set @Bil = @Bil + 'Enam    Tujuh   Delapan Sembilan'
    
    If @S = 0 
        set @TS = ''
    Else
        set @TS = rTrim(substring(@Bil, @S * 8 - 7, 8)) + ' '
        
    If @p = 0 
        set @TP = @TS
    Else
        If @p = 1 
            If @S = 0 
                set @TP = 'Sepuluh '
            Else
                If @S = 1 
                    set @TP = 'Sebelas '
                Else
                    set @TP = rTrim(substring(@Bil, @S * 8 - 7, 8)) + ' Belas '
        Else
            set @TP = rTrim(substring(@Bil, @p * 8 - 7, 8)) + ' Puluh ' + @TS
        
    If @r1 = 0 
        set @hasil = @TP
    Else
        If @r1 = 1 
            set @hasil = 'Seratus ' + @TP
        Else
            set @hasil = rTrim(substring(@Bil, @r1 * 8 - 7, 8)) + ' Ratus ' + @TP
return @hasil
END

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: GetKomisiPegawai
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE      FUNCTION GetKomisiPegawai (@awal DATETIME, @akhir DATETIME)
RETURNS TABLE AS  
RETURN 

SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai AS [Kode Pegawai], dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, 
                      SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan) 
                      * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty * dbo.m_barang.ukuran) AS [Total Komisi]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_detail INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi
WHERE     (dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal BETWEEN dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@awal) AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@akhir))
GROUP BY dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: GetKomisiPegawaiDetail
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE      FUNCTION GetKomisiPegawaiDetail (@awal DATETIME, @akhir DATETIME)
RETURNS TABLE AS  
RETURN 

SELECT     dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai AS [Kode Pegawai], dbo.m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], 
                      dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan) 
                      * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty AS Qty,
                          (SELECT     nama
                            FROM          m_satuan
                            WHERE      kd_satuan = dbo.GetSatuanTerkecil(t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang)) AS [Satuan Terkecil], dbo.m_barang.ukuran AS Komisi, 
                      dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan) 
                      * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty * dbo.m_barang.ukuran AS [Total Komisi]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan_detail INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_pegawai ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai = dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi
WHERE     (dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal BETWEEN dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@awal) AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@akhir))

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: GetPegawai
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION GetPegawai
	(@divisi CHAR(6))
RETURNS TABLE 
AS
	RETURN SELECT   kd_pegawai, nama FROM m_pegawai where kd_divisi = @divisi

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: GetPenjualanPerCustomer
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE      FUNCTION dbo.GetPenjualanPerCustomer (@awal DATETIME, @akhir DATETIME)
RETURNS TABLE AS  
RETURN 

SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.m_customer.nama, COUNT(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) AS [Jumlah Nota], 
                      SUM(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty) AS [Total Kotor], 
                      SUM(dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1 + dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2 + dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3 + dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4) AS Diskon, 
                      SUM(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty * dbo.t_penjualan.pajak) AS Pajak, 
                      SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4, dbo.t_penjualan.pajak, 0) * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty) AS [Total Bersih]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi
WHERE     (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal) BETWEEN (@awal) AND (@akhir))
GROUP BY dbo.m_customer.nama

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: GetStokBarangPerSupplier
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION GetStokBarangPerSupplier(@supplier JR_KODE_MASTER)
RETURNS TABLE 
AS  
RETURN
SELECT     dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dbo.m_barang_satuan.harga_jual AS [Harga Jual], 
                      dbo.m_barang_stok_akhir.stok_akhir AS [Stok Akhir], dbo.m_satuan.nama AS Stn, dbo.ConvertBarang(dbo.m_barang_stok_akhir.kd_barang, 
                      dbo.m_barang_stok_akhir.stok_akhir) AS [Stok Konversi]
FROM         dbo.m_barang_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_stok_akhir ON dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_stok_akhir.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_divisi ON dbo.m_barang_stok_akhir.kd_divisi = dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_satuan ON dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_satuan = dbo.m_satuan.kd_satuan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_supplier ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_supplier ON dbo.m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier = dbo.m_supplier.kd_supplier
WHERE     (dbo.m_barang_satuan.jumlah = 1) AND (dbo.m_barang.status <> 0) AND m_supplier.nama LIKE '%' +  RTRIM(@supplier) + '%'
GROUP BY dbo.m_barang.nama, dbo.m_divisi.nama, dbo.m_kategori.status, dbo.m_barang_satuan.harga_jual, dbo.m_barang_stok_akhir.stok_akhir, 
                      dbo.m_satuan.nama, dbo.ConvertBarang(dbo.m_barang_stok_akhir.kd_barang, dbo.m_barang_stok_akhir.stok_akhir), dbo.m_supplier.nama
HAVING      (dbo.m_kategori.status <> 2)

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: GetTanggalAktif
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
-- =============================================
-- Create inline function (IF)
-- =============================================
CREATE FUNCTION GetTanggalAktif
	(@periode_awal DATETIME, @periode_akhir DATETIME)
RETURNS TABLE 
AS
	RETURN
		SELECT dbo.GetFormatTanggal(masuk) AS  tanggal
		FROM t_absensi 
		WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal (masuk) BETWEEN @periode_awal AND @periode_akhir
		GROUP BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(masuk)

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: GetTanggalMasukPegawai
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
-- =============================================
-- Create inline function (IF)
-- =============================================
CREATE FUNCTION GetTanggalMasukPegawai
	(@pegawai AS VARCHAR(6), @periode_awal DATETIME, @periode_akhir DATETIME)
RETURNS TABLE 
AS
	RETURN
		SELECT tanggal
		FROM dbo.GetTanggalAktif(@periode_awal, @periode_akhir)
		WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal (tanggal) IN
		(	
			SELECT dbo.GetFormatTanggal(masuk) AS tanggal_masuk
			FROM t_absensi abs 
			WHERE kd_pegawai = @pegawai AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal (masuk) BETWEEN @periode_awal AND @periode_akhir
		)

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: GetTanggalTidakMasukPegawai
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
-- =============================================
-- Create inline function (IF)
-- =============================================
CREATE FUNCTION GetTanggalTidakMasukPegawai
	(@pegawai AS VARCHAR(6), @periode_awal DATETIME, @periode_akhir DATETIME)
RETURNS TABLE 
AS
	RETURN
		
		SELECT dbo.GetFormatTanggal (tanggal) as tanggal
		FROM dbo.GetTanggalAktif(@periode_awal, @periode_akhir)
		WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal (tanggal) NOT IN 
		(
			SELECT dbo.GetFormatTanggal (masuk) AS tanggal
			FROM t_absensi abs 
			WHERE kd_pegawai = @pegawai AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(masuk) BETWEEN @periode_awal AND @periode_akhir
			GROUP BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(masuk)
		)

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: mon_GetFMIRekapPenjualan
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE  FUNCTION dbo.mon_GetFMIRekapPenjualan(@Tanggal DATETIME, @Divisi VARCHAR(100),  @JumlahPeriode INT )
RETURNS TABLE
AS
RETURN
SELECT     dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal) AS Tanggal, 
       SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, 
      dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty) AS Total
	, fs.[Total FMI], fs.[Total FMI Kosong], fs.[FMI Kosong(%)], fs.[Total SMI], fs.[Total SMI Kosong],
	fs.[SMI Kosong(%)],
	COUNT(DISTINCT jual.no_transaksi) AS Transaksi,

	SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, 
      		dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty) 
		/ COUNT(DISTINCT jual.no_transaksi) as [Average Basket]

FROM         dbo.t_penjualan jual 
	INNER JOIN dbo.t_penjualan_detail dtl ON jual.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi
	INNER JOIN m_divisi dv ON jual.kd_divisi = dv.kd_divisi
	CROSS JOIN 
	(SELECT  SUM(FMI) as [Total FMI],  
		SUM([FMI Kosong]) as [Total FMI Kosong],  
			(CASE WHEN SUM([FMI]) = 0 THEN 
				SUM([FMI Kosong]) * 100 
			ELSE
				(SUM([FMI Kosong]) * 100 ) / SUM(FMI) 
			END) as [FMI Kosong(%)],
		SUM(SMI) as [Total SMI],
		SUM([SMI Kosong]) as [Total SMI Kosong],
			(CASE WHEN SUM(FMI) > 0 THEN 
				(SUM([SMI Kosong])* 100) / SUM(SMI) 
			ELSE
				SUM([SMI Kosong]) * 100
			END) as [SMI Kosong(%)]
	FROM 	dbo.mon_GetFMIStok(@Tanggal, @Divisi, @JumlahPeriode)) fs

WHERE jenis = 1 AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal) =  @Tanggal AND dv.nama = @Divisi
GROUP BY dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal), fs.[Total FMI], fs.[Total FMI Kosong], fs.[FMI Kosong(%)], fs.[Total SMI], fs.[Total SMI Kosong],
	fs.[SMI Kosong(%)]

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: mon_GetKasAkhirPerTanggal
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION mon_GetKasAkhirPerTanggal(@tanggal DATETIME)
RETURNS TABLE AS  
RETURN 
	SELECT     dbo.m_kas.kd_kas, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, dbo.m_bank.nama, SUM(dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.debet) - SUM(dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.kredit) 
	                      AS saldo_akhir
	FROM         dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail INNER JOIN
	                      dbo.m_kas ON dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.kd_kas = dbo.m_kas.kd_kas INNER JOIN
	                      dbo.m_bank ON dbo.m_kas.kd_bank = dbo.m_bank.kd_bank
	WHERE dbo.v_g_kas_histori_detail.tanggal < @tanggal
	GROUP BY dbo.m_kas.kd_kas, dbo.m_kas.no_rekening, dbo.m_bank.nama

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: mon_GetPenjualanPerBarangReq1
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION [dbo].[mon_GetPenjualanPerBarangReq1] (@supplier VARCHAR(50), @kategori VARCHAR(50), @kota VARCHAR(50), @awal DATETIME, @akhir DATETIME)
RETURNS TABLE 
AS
RETURN
SELECT TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, m_kategori.nama AS Kategori, m_kota.nama AS Kota, m_barang.nama AS Barang, 
      m_customer.nama AS Customer, SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan) 
      * t_penjualan_detail.qty) AS Kwantum, SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, 
      t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), t_penjualan.diskon1, 
      t_penjualan.diskon2, t_penjualan.diskon3, t_penjualan.diskon4, t_penjualan.pajak, 0) * t_penjualan_detail.qty) AS [Total (Rp)]
FROM m_barang LEFT OUTER JOIN
      m_kategori ON m_barang.kd_kategori = m_kategori.kd_kategori LEFT OUTER JOIN
      m_barang_supplier INNER JOIN
      m_supplier ON m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier = m_supplier.kd_supplier ON 
      m_barang.kd_barang = m_barang_supplier.kd_barang RIGHT OUTER JOIN
      m_kota INNER JOIN
      t_penjualan INNER JOIN
      m_customer ON t_penjualan.kd_customer = m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
      t_penjualan_detail ON t_penjualan.no_transaksi = t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi ON m_kota.kd_kota = m_customer.kd_kota ON 
      m_barang.kd_barang = t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang
WHERE m_supplier.nama LIKE @supplier AND m_kategori.nama = @kategori AND m_kota.nama = @kota 
	AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_penjualan.tanggal) BETWEEN dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@awal) AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(DATEADD(DAY, 1, @akhir))
GROUP BY m_supplier.nama, m_kategori.nama, m_kota.nama, m_barang.nama, m_customer.nama
ORDER BY m_barang.nama

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: mon_GetPenjualanPerBarangReq2
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION mon_GetPenjualanPerBarangReq2 (@supplier VARCHAR(50),@pegawai VARCHAR(30), @awal DATETIME, @akhir DATETIME)
RETURNS TABLE 
AS
RETURN
SELECT TOP 100 PERCENT m_supplier.nama AS Supplier, m_barang.nama AS Barang, m_pegawai.nama AS Pegawai, 
      SUM(ISNULL(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan) * t_penjualan_detail.qty, 0)) AS Kwantum, 
      SUM(ISNULL(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, 
      t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), t_penjualan.diskon1, t_penjualan.diskon2, t_penjualan.diskon3, t_penjualan.diskon4, t_penjualan.pajak, 0) 
      * t_penjualan_detail.qty, 0)) AS [Total (Rp)]
FROM         m_pegawai INNER JOIN
      m_kota INNER JOIN
      t_penjualan INNER JOIN
      m_customer ON t_penjualan.kd_customer = m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
      t_penjualan_detail ON t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi = t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi ON m_kota.kd_kota = m_customer.kd_kota ON 
      m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = t_penjualan_detail.kd_pegawai RIGHT OUTER JOIN
      m_barang LEFT OUTER JOIN
      m_barang_supplier INNER JOIN
      m_supplier ON m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier = m_supplier.kd_supplier ON 
      m_barang.kd_barang = m_barang_supplier.kd_barang ON t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang = m_barang.kd_barang
WHERE m_supplier.nama LIKE @supplier + '%' AND m_pegawai.nama LIKE @pegawai + '%'
	AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_penjualan.tanggal) BETWEEN dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@awal) AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(DATEADD(DAY, 1, @akhir))
GROUP BY m_supplier.nama, m_barang.nama, m_pegawai.nama
ORDER BY m_barang.nama

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: mon_GetPenjualanWithHPP
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE       FUNCTION mon_GetPenjualanWithHPP(@awal DATETIME, @akhir DATETIME)
RETURNS TABLE
AS 
RETURN
(
	SELECT     m_divisi.nama as Divisi, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal) AS Tanggal, dtl.no_transaksi as Nomor, 
		dtl.kd_barang AS Kode, dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, 
		dtl.qty  as Jumlah, stn.nama as Satuan, 

		dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, 
		dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) as [Harga Nett], 

		(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, 
		dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty) AS [Total Penjualan], 
		
		ha.harga_average as [Modal Terkecil],

		isnull((ha.harga_average * dtl.qty * bs.jumlah), 0) AS [Total Modal],
		
		((dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, 
		dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty) 
			-isnull((ha.harga_average * dtl.qty * bs.jumlah), 0) ) as Laba,

		(((dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, 
		dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty) 
			- isnull((ha.harga_average * dtl.qty * bs.jumlah), 0) ) 
		/


		(case when isnull(ha.harga_average * dtl.qty * bs.jumlah, 1)  = 0 then 1
		else	
			isnull(ha.harga_average * dtl.qty * bs.jumlah, 1) 
		end))
		* 100 as Margin	

	FROM         dbo.m_barang INNER JOIN
		dbo.t_penjualan jual INNER JOIN
		dbo.t_penjualan_detail dtl ON jual.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi ON dbo.m_barang.kd_barang = dtl.kd_barang INNER JOIN
		m_divisi ON jual.kd_divisi = m_divisi.kd_divisi INNER JOIN dbo.GetHargaAverageBarangPerTanggal(@akhir) ha 
		ON dtl.kd_barang = ha.kd_barang INNER JOIN m_barang_satuan bs ON dtl.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND dtl.kd_satuan = bs.kd_satuan
		INNER JOIN m_satuan stn ON dtl.kd_satuan = stn.kd_satuan
	WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal) BETWEEN @awal AND @akhir
	--GROUP BY m_divisi.nama, dtl.kd_barang, dbo.m_barang.nama, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal), ha.harga_average
)

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: mon_GetPiutangAktifPerTanggal
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION mon_GetPiutangAktifPerTanggal (@tanggal DATETIME)
RETURNS TABLE AS  
RETURN (SELECT     dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi AS [No. Transaksi], dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal AS Tanggal, 
                      dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) AS [Total Penjualan], dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.status) AS [Total Cicilan], dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) - dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.status) AS [Sisa Piutang]
FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.t_piutang_cicilan ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_piutang_cicilan.no_transaksi
WHERE     (dbo.t_penjualan.status = 0) AND 
	(
		(dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi) - 
		dbo.GetCicilanPiutang(dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi, dbo.t_penjualan.status)) > 0
	)
	
	AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_penjualan.tanggal) <= @tanggal AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_piutang_cicilan.tanggal) <= @tanggal)

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: mon_GetSaldoPiutangPerTanggal
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE  FUNCTION mon_GetSaldoPiutangPerTanggal(@tanggal DATETIME)
RETURNS TABLE AS  
	RETURN 
	SELECT 
		(SELECT SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(
			dbo.GetHargaBersih(t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0)
			, t_penjualan.diskon1, t_penjualan.diskon2, t_penjualan.diskon3, t_penjualan.diskon4, t_penjualan.pajak, 0) * t_penjualan_detail.qty) 
		FROM t_penjualan INNER JOIN t_penjualan_detail ON t_penjualan.no_transaksi = t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi
		WHERE t_penjualan.status = 0  AND t_penjualan.tanggal <= @tanggal) -
		(SELECT SUM(diskon_uang) FROM t_penjualan WHERE t_penjualan.status = 0  AND t_penjualan.tanggal <= @tanggal) -
		(SELECT SUM(nominal) FROM t_penjualan INNER JOIN m_voucher ON t_penjualan.kd_voucher = m_voucher.kd_voucher WHERE t_penjualan.status = 0  AND t_penjualan.tanggal <= @tanggal) -
		(SELECT SUM(nominal) FROM t_piutang_cicilan WHERE t_piutang_cicilan.tanggal <= @tanggal) AS sisa_piutang

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: mon_GetStokAkhiritem
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE        FUNCTION mon_GetStokAkhirItem(@tanggal DATETIME)
RETURNS TABLE AS  
RETURN 

SELECT     dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_divisi AS [Kode Divisi], dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], 
                      dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dbo.m_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dbo.m_merk.nama AS Merk, dbo.m_model.nama AS Model, 
                      dbo.m_warna.nama AS Warna, dbo.m_barang.ukuran AS Ukuran, SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang, 
                      dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_satuan) * (dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.Debet - dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.Kredit)) AS [Stok Akhir], 
                      HA.harga_average AS [Harga Average], dbo.m_barang_satuan.harga_jual AS [Harga Jual], 
                      SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang, dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_satuan) 
                      * (dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.Debet - dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.Kredit)) * HA.harga_average AS Nominal
                          
FROM         dbo.m_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail ON dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi = dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.GetHargaAverageBarangPerTanggal(@tanggal) HA ON HA.kd_barang = dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_satuan ON dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_model ON dbo.m_barang.kd_model = dbo.m_model.kd_model INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_merk ON dbo.m_barang.kd_merk = dbo.m_merk.kd_merk INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_warna ON dbo.m_barang.kd_warna = dbo.m_warna.kd_warna
WHERE     (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.tanggal) < DATEADD(DAY, 1, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@tanggal))) AND 
                      (dbo.m_barang_satuan.jumlah = 1) AND (dbo.m_barang_satuan.status <> 0) AND (dbo.m_kategori.status <> 2)
GROUP BY dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_divisi, dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang, dbo.m_barang.nama, dbo.m_divisi.nama, HA.harga_average, 
                      dbo.m_kategori.nama, dbo.m_barang_satuan.harga_jual, dbo.m_warna.nama, dbo.m_model.nama, dbo.m_merk.nama, dbo.m_barang.ukuran

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: mon_GetStokAkhirPerTanggal
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE      FUNCTION mon_GetStokAkhirPerTanggal(@tanggal DATETIME)
RETURNS TABLE AS  
RETURN 

SELECT     dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_divisi AS [Kode Divisi], dbo.m_divisi.nama AS Divisi, dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang],
