                      dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dbo.m_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dbo.m_merk.nama AS Merk, dbo.m_model.nama AS Model, 
                      dbo.m_warna.nama AS Warna, dbo.m_barang.ukuran AS Ukuran, SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang, 
                      dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_satuan) * (dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.Debet - dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.Kredit)) AS [Stok Akhir], 
                      HA.harga_average AS [Harga Average], dbo.m_barang_satuan.harga_jual AS [Harga Jual], 
                      SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang, dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_satuan) 
                      * (dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.Debet - dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.Kredit)) * HA.harga_average AS Nominal, ISNULL
                          ((SELECT     TOP 1 harga_beli
                              FROM         t_pembelian_detail INNER JOIN
                                                    t_pembelian ON t_pembelian_detail.no_Transaksi = t_pembelian.no_transaksi
                              WHERE     kd_barang = v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang
                              ORDER BY t_pembelian.tanggal DESC),
                          (SELECT     TOP 1 harga_beli_awal
                            FROM          m_barang_divisi
                            WHERE      kd_barang = v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang
                            ORDER BY harga_beli_awal DESC)) AS [Harga Beli Akhir]
FROM         dbo.m_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail ON dbo.m_divisi.kd_divisi = dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.GetHargaAverageBarangPerTanggal(@tanggal) HA ON HA.kd_barang = dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang_satuan ON dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang_satuan.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_model ON dbo.m_barang.kd_model = dbo.m_model.kd_model INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_merk ON dbo.m_barang.kd_merk = dbo.m_merk.kd_merk INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_warna ON dbo.m_barang.kd_warna = dbo.m_warna.kd_warna
WHERE     (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.tanggal) < DATEADD(DAY, 1, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@tanggal))) AND 
                      (dbo.m_barang_satuan.jumlah = 1) AND (dbo.m_barang_satuan.status <> 0) AND (dbo.m_kategori.status <> 2)
GROUP BY dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_divisi, dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang, dbo.m_barang.nama, dbo.m_divisi.nama, HA.harga_average, 
                      dbo.m_kategori.nama, dbo.m_barang_satuan.harga_jual, dbo.m_warna.nama, dbo.m_model.nama, dbo.m_merk.nama, dbo.m_barang.ukuran

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: mon_GetTotalPenjualanBulananPerKategori
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE      FUNCTION dbo.mon_GetTotalPenjualanBulananPerKategori(@TanggalAwal DATETIME, @TanggalAkhir DATETIME)
RETURNS TABLE AS  
RETURN 
	/*SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.m_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, 
                      SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4, dbo.t_penjualan.pajak, 0) * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty) AS Total, SUM(dbo.GetMaxSatuan(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty)) AS Qty, dbo.GetMaxSatuanString(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, 
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan) AS Satuan
	FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori
	WHERE dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal BETWEEN @TanggalAwal AND @TanggalAkhir
	GROUP BY dbo.m_kategori.nama, dbo.m_barang.nama, dbo.GetMaxSatuanString(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan)
	ORDER BY dbo.m_kategori.nama, dbo.m_barang.nama */
	SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT m_supplier.nama as Supplier, dbo.m_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, 
	                      SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.harga_jual, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon2, 
	                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon3, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.diskon4, 0, 0), dbo.t_penjualan.diskon1, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon2, dbo.t_penjualan.diskon3, 
	                      dbo.t_penjualan.diskon4, dbo.t_penjualan.pajak, 0) * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty) AS Total, SUM(dbo.GetMaxSatuan(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, 
	                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty)) AS Qty,
	                          (SELECT     TOP 1 m_satuan.nama
	                            FROM          m_barang_satuan INNER JOIN
	                                                   m_satuan ON m_barang_satuan.kd_satuan = m_satuan.kd_satuan
	                            WHERE      m_barang_satuan.kd_barang = m_barang.kd_barang
	                            ORDER BY jumlah DESC) AS Satuan
	FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
	                      dbo.t_penjualan_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
	                      dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
	                      dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori INNER JOIN m_barang_supplier ON 
			m_barang_supplier.kd_barang = m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN m_supplier ON m_barang_supplier.kd_supplier = m_supplier.kd_supplier
	WHERE dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal BETWEEN @TanggalAwal AND @TanggalAkhir
	GROUP BY dbo.m_kategori.nama, dbo.m_barang.nama, dbo.m_barang.kd_barang, m_supplier.nama
	ORDER BY dbo.m_kategori.nama, dbo.m_barang.nama


--===========================================================
--===========================================================

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: mon_GetTotalPenjualanKuantum
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE  FUNCTION mon_GetTotalPenjualanKuantum(@TanggalAwal DATETIME, @TanggalAkhir DATETIME)
RETURNS TABLE AS  
RETURN 
	SELECT     dbo.m_kategori.nama AS Kategori, dbo.m_barang.nama AS Barang, dbo.m_customer.nama AS Customer, 
              SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan) * dbo.t_penjualan_detail.qty) 
              AS Jumlah
	FROM         dbo.t_penjualan INNER JOIN
              dbo.t_penjualan_detail ON dbo.t_penjualan.no_transaksi = dbo.t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
              dbo.m_barang ON dbo.t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang = dbo.m_barang.kd_barang INNER JOIN
              dbo.m_customer ON dbo.t_penjualan.kd_customer = dbo.m_customer.kd_customer INNER JOIN
              dbo.m_kategori ON dbo.m_barang.kd_kategori = dbo.m_kategori.kd_kategori
	WHERE dbo.t_penjualan.tanggal BETWEEN @TanggalAwal AND @TanggalAkhir
	GROUP BY dbo.m_customer.nama, dbo.m_barang.nama, dbo.m_kategori.nama

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: mon_rugi_laba_hpp
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE  FUNCTION mon_rugi_laba_hpp(@TanggalAwal DATETIME, @TanggalAkhir DATETIME)
RETURNS TABLE
AS
RETURN
	SELECT TOP 100 PERCENT d.kd_barang, b.nama as Barang, SUM(d.qty) as Kwantum, ha.harga As HPP, SUM(d.qty * ha.harga) AS Total
	FROM t_penjualan j INNER JOIN t_penjualan_detail d ON d.no_transaksi = j.no_transaksi 
		INNER JOIN dbo.GetHargaAverageBarang(@TanggalAkhir) ha ON d.kd_barang = ha.kd_barang 
		INNER JOIN m_barang b ON ha.kd_barang = b.kd_barang
	WHERE (j.tanggal >= dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()) AND (j.tanggal BETWEEN @TanggalAwal AND @TanggalAkhir)
	GROUP BY d.kd_barang, b.nama, ha.harga
	ORDER BY b.nama

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: mon_rugi_laba_piutang_pegawai_per_tanggal
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE  FUNCTION dbo.mon_rugi_laba_piutang_pegawai_per_tanggal(@tanggal DATETIME)
RETURNS TABLE AS  
	RETURN 
	SELECT (ISNULL(SUM(nominal), 0) - (SELECT ISNULL(SUM(nominal), 0) FROM t_hutang_pegawai_cicilan WHERE tanggal < @tanggal)) AS piutang_pegawai
	FROM t_hutang_pegawai
	WHERE tanggal < @tanggal

INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: mon_t_penjualan_per_barang_harga_pokok_vd
INLINE_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION [dbo].[mon_t_penjualan_per_barang_harga_pokok_vd](@tanggal DATE)
RETURNS TABLE AS RETURN
SELECT no_transaksi as [No. Transaksi],CONVERT(DATE,tanggal) AS Tanggal,
(SELECT nama FROM m_customer WHERE kd_customer=sales.kd_customer) AS Customer,
(SELECT nama FROM m_kategori WHERE kd_kategori=sales.kd_kategori) AS Kategori,
sales.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], nama AS Barang,bersih AS Harga,
ISNULL(harga_pokok,harga_beli) AS harga_pokok,total_bersih AS [Total Bersih],
isnull(harga_pokok, mdiv.harga_beli) * qty * jumlah as [Total harga pokok],
total_bersih-(isnull(harga_pokok, mdiv.harga_beli)*qty*jumlah) AS laba,
(total_bersih-(isnull(harga_pokok, mdiv.harga_beli)*qty*jumlah))/
((CASE WHEN (isnull(harga_pokok, harga_beli) * qty * jumlah)= 0 THEN 1 ELSE (isnull(harga_pokok, harga_beli) * qty * jumlah)END)) * 100 as Margin,
(SELECT nama FROM m_userx WHERE kd_user=sales.kd_user) AS Petugas
FROM
(
	SELECT jl.no_transaksi,tanggal,kd_customer,kd_kategori,jl_dt.kd_barang,nama,
	dbo.GetHargaBersih
	(
		dbo.GetHargaBersih(jl_dt.harga_jual,jl_dt.diskon1,jl_dt.diskon2,jl_dt.diskon3,jl_dt.diskon4,0,0),
		jl.diskon1,jl.diskon2,jl.diskon3,jl.diskon4,pajak,0
	) /jumlah AS bersih,
	dbo.GetHargaBersih
	(
		dbo.GetHargaBersih(jl_dt.harga_jual,jl_dt.diskon1,jl_dt.diskon2,jl_dt.diskon3,jl_dt.diskon4,0,0),
		jl.diskon1,jl.diskon2,jl.diskon3,jl.diskon4,pajak,0
	) *qty AS total_bersih,qty,jumlah,kd_user

	FROM
	(
		SELECT * FROM t_penjualan WHERE CONVERT(DATE,tanggal)=@tanggal
	) jl 
	INNER JOIN t_penjualan_detail jl_dt ON jl.no_transaksi=jl_dt.no_transaksi
	INNER JOIN m_barang ON m_barang.kd_barang=jl_dt.kd_barang
	INNER JOIN m_barang_satuan mbs ON jl_dt.kd_barang=mbs.kd_barang AND jl_dt.kd_satuan=mbs.kd_satuan
) sales
INNER JOIN 
(
	SELECT kd_barang, MAX(harga_beli_awal) AS harga_beli FROM m_barang_divisi GROUP BY kd_barang
) mdiv
ON sales.kd_barang=mdiv.kd_barang
LEFT JOIN

(
	SELECT bl_dt.kd_barang AS kd_barang, 
				dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(bl_dt.harga_beli, bl_dt.diskon1, bl_dt.diskon2, bl_dt.diskon3, bl_dt.diskon4, 0, 0), bl.diskon1, 
					bl.diskon2, bl.diskon3, bl.diskon4, bl.pajak, bl.ppnbm) / mbs.jumlah AS harga_pokok 
	FROM t_pembelian bl INNER JOIN t_pembelian_detail bl_dt ON bl.no_transaksi=bl_dt.no_transaksi
	INNER JOIN m_barang_satuan mbs ON bl_dt.kd_barang=mbs.kd_barang AND bl_dt.kd_satuan=mbs.kd_satuan
	INNER JOIN
	(
		SELECT kd_barang,MAX(tanggal) AS last_date_purchase FROM 
		(
			SELECT no_transaksi,tanggal FROM t_pembelian WHERE CONVERT(date,tanggal)<=@tanggal
		) bl INNER JOIN t_pembelian_detail bl_dt ON bl.no_transaksi=bl_dt.no_transaksi
		GROUP BY kd_barang
	) last
	ON bl.tanggal=last.last_date_purchase AND bl_dt.kd_barang=last.kd_barang
) purchase
ON sales.kd_barang=purchase.kd_barang

MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: BukuOrder
MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION BukuOrder(@awal DATETIME, @akhir DATETIME)
RETURNS  @tabel_hasil TABLE (kd_jasa VARCHAR(12), tanggal DATETIME, kd_customer VARCHAR(12))
AS 
BEGIN
DECLARE @temp_tanggal DATETIME
DECLARE @kode_jasa VARCHAR(12), @kode_customer VARCHAR(12)

SET @temp_tanggal = @awal
SET @kode_jasa = ''
SET @kode_customer = ''

WHILE @akhir >= @temp_tanggal
BEGIN
		
	DECLARE cur_jasa_persewaan CURSOR FOR
		SELECT m_jasa.kd_jasa
		FROM m_jasa INNER JOIN m_jasa_kategori ON m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori= m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori 
		WHERE m_jasa.status = 1 AND m_jasa_kategori.status = 1
	OPEN cur_jasa_persewaan

	FETCH NEXT FROM cur_jasa_persewaan INTO @kode_jasa
	WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
	BEGIN
		IF (@@FETCH_STATUS <> -1)	
		BEGIN
			SET @kode_customer = ''
			SELECT @kode_customer = t_penjualan_jasa.kd_customer
			FROM t_penjualan_jasa INNER JOIN t_penjualan_jasa_detail 
				ON t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = t_penjualan_jasa_detail.no_transaksi
			WHERE kd_jasa = @kode_jasa 
				AND t_penjualan_jasa.status<>3 AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@temp_tanggal) BETWEEN  dbo.GetFormatTanggal(awal) AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(akhir)
			
			INSERT INTO @tabel_hasil
			SELECT @kode_jasa, @temp_tanggal, @kode_customer
		END
		FETCH NEXT FROM cur_jasa_persewaan INTO @kode_jasa
	END
	
	CLOSE cur_jasa_persewaan
	DEALLOCATE cur_jasa_persewaan
	SET @temp_tanggal = DATEADD(DAY, 1, @temp_tanggal)
END
	RETURN
END

MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: GetAbsenCakarMas
MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE       FUNCTION GetAbsenCakarMas(@awal DATETIME, @akhir DATETIME)
RETURNS @tabel_absen TABLE (Awal DATETIME, Akhir DATETIME, Kode VARCHAR(6), Nama VARCHAR(50), [Total Jam] FLOAT, [Jumlah Hari] INT, [Total Jam Biasa] FLOAT, [Jumlah Hari Biasa] INT, [Total Jam Minggu] FLOAT, [Jumlah Hari Minggu] INT, Keterangan VARCHAR(100))
BEGIN

--DECLARE @tabel_absen TABLE 
--	(kd_pegawai VARCHAR(6), total_jam BIGINT, total_hari INT, jam_biasa BIGINT, jumlah_biasa INT, jam_minggu BIGINT, jumlah_minggu INT)
DECLARE @jam_biasa FLOAT, @jumlah_biasa INT, @jam_minggu FLOAT, @jumlah_minggu INT, @total_jam FLOAT, @total_hari INT, @tanggal_sebelumnya DATETIME
DECLARE @masuk DATETIME, @keluar DATETIME, @pegawai VARCHAR(6), @keterangan VARCHAR(200)

SET @pegawai  = NULL
set @keterangan = ''

INSERT INTO @tabel_absen
	SELECT @awal, @akhir, t_absensi.kd_pegawai, m_pegawai.nama, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, ''
	FROM t_absensi INNER JOIN m_pegawai ON t_absensi.kd_pegawai = m_pegawai.kd_pegawai 
	WHERE t_absensi.masuk BETWEEN @awal AND @akhir
	GROUP BY t_absensi.kd_pegawai, m_pegawai.nama
	ORDER BY t_absensi.kd_pegawai

DECLARE cur_pegawai  CURSOR FOR
	SELECT Kode
	FROM @tabel_absen
OPEN cur_pegawai

FETCH NEXT FROM cur_pegawai INTO @pegawai
WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
BEGIN
	IF (@@FETCH_STATUS <> -1)
	BEGIN		
	
		DECLARE cur_absen CURSOR FOR
			SELECT masuk, keluar
			FROM t_absensi
			WHERE kd_pegawai = @pegawai AND (masuk BETWEEN @awal AND @akhir)
			ORDER BY masuk
		OPEN cur_absen
		FETCH NEXT FROM cur_absen INTO @masuk, @keluar
		
		SET @jam_biasa = 0 
		SET @jumlah_biasa = 0 
		SET @jam_minggu = 0
		SET @jumlah_minggu = 0
		SET @total_jam = 0
		SET @total_hari = 0
		SET @tanggal_sebelumnya = DATEADD(DAY, -1, @awal)
		SET @keterangan = ''

		WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
		BEGIN
			SET @total_jam = @total_jam + ISNULL((DATEDIFF(SECOND, @masuk, @keluar)), 0)
			IF (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@tanggal_sebelumnya) <> dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@masuk)) 
			BEGIN 
				IF @keluar IS NOT NULL
				SET @total_hari = @total_hari + 1
			END
	
			
			IF (DATENAME(WEEKDAY, @masuk) = 'SUNDAY')
				BEGIN
					SET @jam_minggu = @jam_minggu + ISNULL((DATEDIFF(SECOND, @masuk, @keluar)), 0)
					IF (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@tanggal_sebelumnya) <> dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@masuk)) 
					BEGIN
						SET @jumlah_minggu = @jumlah_minggu + 1
						SET @tanggal_sebelumnya = @masuk
					END
					IF @keluar IS NOT NULL
					BEGIN
						IF (ISNULL(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @masuk, @keluar), 0) / 3600) <= 4.5
						BEGIN
							IF @keterangan <> ''
								SET @keterangan = @keterangan + ', '
							SET @keterangan = @keterangan + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, @masuk) AS VARCHAR(2)) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, @masuk) AS VARCHAR(2)) + '(' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @masuk, @keluar) / 3600 AS VARCHAR(50)) + ')'
						END
					END
					ELSE 
					BEGIN
						IF @keterangan <> ''
							SET @keterangan = @keterangan + ', '
						SET @keterangan = @keterangan + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, @masuk) AS VARCHAR(2)) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, @masuk) AS VARCHAR(2)) + '(' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @masuk, @keluar) / 3600 AS VARCHAR(50)) + ')'
					END
				END
	
			ELSE
				BEGIN
					SET @jam_biasa = @jam_biasa + ISNULL((DATEDIFF(SECOND, @masuk, @keluar)), 0)
					IF (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@tanggal_sebelumnya) <> dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@masuk))  
					BEGIN 
						SET @jumlah_biasa = @jumlah_biasa + 1
					END
					IF @keluar IS NOT NULL
					BEGIN
						IF (ISNULL(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @masuk, @keluar), 0) / 3600) <= 6.5
						BEGIN
							IF @keterangan <> ''
								SET @keterangan = @keterangan + ', '
							SET @keterangan = @keterangan + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, @masuk) AS VARCHAR(2)) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, @masuk) AS VARCHAR(2)) + '(' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @masuk, @keluar) / 3600 AS VARCHAR(50)) + ')'
						END
					END
					ELSE
					BEGIN
						IF @keterangan <> ''
							SET @keterangan = @keterangan + ', '
						SET @keterangan = @keterangan + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, @masuk) AS VARCHAR(2)) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, @masuk) AS VARCHAR(2)) + '(' + CAST(DATEDIFF(SECOND, @masuk, @keluar) / 3600 AS VARCHAR(50)) + ')'
					END
				END
	
			FETCH NEXT FROM cur_absen INTO @masuk, @keluar	
		END
		
		CLOSE cur_absen
		DEALLOCATE cur_absen
	
		UPDATE @tabel_absen 
		SET [Total Jam] = @total_jam, [Jumlah Hari] = @total_hari, [Total Jam Biasa] = @jam_biasa, [Jumlah Hari Biasa] = @jumlah_biasa, [Total Jam Minggu] = @jam_minggu, [Jumlah Hari Minggu] = @jumlah_minggu, Keterangan = @keterangan
		WHERE Kode = @pegawai
		
		FETCH NEXT FROM cur_pegawai INTO @pegawai
	END
END

CLOSE cur_pegawai
DEALLOCATE cur_pegawai

UPDATE @tabel_absen
SET [Total Jam] = ROUND([Total Jam] / 3600, 2), [Total Jam Biasa] = ROUND([Total Jam Biasa] / 3600, 2), [Total Jam Minggu] = ROUND([Total Jam Minggu] / 3600, 2)

RETURN 
END

MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: GetAbsenSemuaPegawai
MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
--purpose	: menampilkan semua pegawai yang tidak masuk (absen), tak syarat
--created by	: iwan(Cak)
CREATE FUNCTION GetAbsenSemuaPegawai ()
RETURNS @ret TABLE (kd_pegawai VARCHAR(6), tanggal DATETIME, alasan varchar(50)) AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE @tmpTable TABLE (kd_pegawai VARCHAR(6), tanggal DATETIME, alasan varchar(50))
	DECLARE @tmp DATETIME

--	DECLARE @awal DATETIME, @akhir DATETIME, @tmp DATETIME	
--	SELECT @awal = DBO.GetFormatTanggal(MIN(masuk)), @akhir = DBO.GetFormatTanggal(MAX(masuk)) FROM t_absensi
--	SET @tmp = @awal

	DECLARE C_Tanggal_Aktif CURSOR FOR
	SELECT * FROM dbo.GetSemuaTanggalAktif()
	OPEN C_Tanggal_Aktif

	FETCH NEXT FROM C_Tanggal_aktif INTO @tmp
	WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
	BEGIN
		IF (@@FETCH_STATUS <> -1)	
		BEGIN
			INSERT @tmpTable
				SELECT kd_pegawai, @tmp , dbo.GetPegawaiAlasanTidakMasuk(@tmp,kd_pegawai)
				FROM m_pegawai
				WHERE status <> 0 AND kd_divisi <> 'DAA000' AND kd_pegawai 
					NOT IN (SELECT kd_pegawai FROM t_absensi WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(masuk) = @tmp)
		END
		FETCH NEXT FROM C_Tanggal_aktif INTO @tmp
	  END
	
	 CLOSE C_Tanggal_Aktif
	 DEALLOCATE C_Tanggal_aktif

	 INSERT @ret 
		SELECT * FROM @tmpTable

	 RETURN
END

MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: GetAbsenSemuaPegawai2
MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
--Note		: Fungsi ini langsung di panggil dari VB, jadi kalau ada penambahan kolom kerja keras lagi ! OK
--Purpose	: Menampilkan semua pegawai yang tidak masuk (absen), DENGAN SYARAT TANGGAL AWAL DAN TANGGAL AKHIR PERIODE
--Created by	: I-ONE

CREATE FUNCTION GetAbsenSemuaPegawai2(@TglAwal as DATETIME, @TglAkhir as DATETIME)
RETURNS 
	@TmpTable TABLE (
	Hari VARCHAR(10), 
	Tanggal DATETIME, 
	TanggalAwal DateTime,
	TanggalAkhir DateTime,
	JumlahHari float,
	kd_pegawai VARCHAR(6), 
	Pegawai VARCHAR(30), 
	Divisi VARCHAR(30), 
	Kepala_Nota VARCHAR(30), 
	Keterangan VARCHAR(50)) 
AS
BEGIN

declare
	@TmpTable2 TABLE (
	Hari VARCHAR(10), 
	Tanggal DATETIME, 
	TanggalAwal DateTime,
	TanggalAkhir DateTime,
	JumlahHari float,
	kd_pegawai VARCHAR(6), 
	Pegawai VARCHAR(30), 
	Divisi VARCHAR(30), 
	Kepala_Nota VARCHAR(30), 
	Keterangan VARCHAR(50)) 

DECLARE @Tmp DATETIME
DECLARE C_Tanggal_Aktif CURSOR FOR
	SELECT Tgl FROM dbo.GetSemuaTanggalAktif() 
	WHERE (Tgl BETWEEN  @TglAwal AND @TglAkhir)
	AND (tgl not in (SELECT dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) FROM m_hari_libur))	-- filter dengan hari libur

OPEN C_Tanggal_Aktif

FETCH NEXT FROM C_Tanggal_aktif INTO @Tmp
WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
BEGIN
	INSERT @TmpTable2
		SELECT 
		dbo.GetNamaHari(@Tmp),
		@Tmp as tanggal, 
		@tmp as tanggalAwal,
		@tmp as tanggalAkhir,
		1 as JumlahHari,
		m_pegawai.kd_pegawai, 
		m_pegawai.nama,
		m_divisi.nama,
		m_divisi.kepala_nota,
		'TIDAK ADA IZIN' as keterangan

		--m_divisi.keterangan --,			
		--dbo.GetPegawaiAlasanTidakMasuk(@tmp,m_pegawai.kd_pegawai)
		FROM m_pegawai INNER JOIN m_divisi ON (m_pegawai.kd_divisi=m_divisi.kd_divisi)
		WHERE (m_divisi.kd_divisi <> 'DAA000') AND (m_pegawai.status <> 0) AND (m_divisi.status <> 0)
		--AND m_pegawai.kd_pegawai = @kdPegawai
	
		-- tambahan 26 maret 08
		and dbo.GetPegawaiAlasanTidakMasuk(@tmp,m_pegawai.kd_pegawai) is null
		and m_pegawai.kd_jabatan <> 'JAA042' -- distributor
		and m_pegawai.kd_jabatan <> 'JAA043' -- direktur
		and m_pegawai.kd_jabatan <> 'JAA044' -- komisaris
		and m_pegawai.kd_jabatan <> 'JAA038' -- coba
		and m_pegawai.kd_divisi <> 'DAA001'  -- Divisi FUSO-ANTOK	(1 orang)
		and m_pegawai.kd_divisi <> 'DAA002'  -- Divisi FUSO-SAYUTI	(1 orang)
	
		AND (@tmp > m_pegawai.tgl_masuk)  -- tanggal lebih besar dari tanggal masuk
		AND kd_pegawai 
			NOT IN (SELECT kd_pegawai FROM t_absensi WHERE (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(masuk) = @Tmp) AND t_absensi.kd_pegawai = m_pegawai.kd_pegawai) 

	FETCH NEXT FROM C_Tanggal_aktif INTO @tmp
END

CLOSE C_Tanggal_Aktif
DEALLOCATE C_Tanggal_aktif

	insert @tmpTable2
		select 
		dbo.GetNamaHari(tanggal),
		tanggal,
		t_pegawai_izin.awal,
		t_pegawai_izin.akhir,
		dbo.GetJumlahHariCuti(t_pegawai_izin.awal,t_pegawai_izin.akhir)+1,
		m_pegawai.kd_pegawai,
		m_pegawai.nama,
		m_divisi.nama,
		m_divisi.kepala_nota,
		t_pegawai_izin.keterangan as keterangan
		from t_pegawai_izin INNER JOIN m_pegawai on (t_pegawai_izin.kd_pegawai = m_pegawai.kd_pegawai)
		INNER JOIN m_divisi on (m_pegawai.kd_divisi=m_divisi.kd_divisi)
		where (m_divisi.kd_divisi <> 'DAA000') AND (m_pegawai.status <> 0) AND (m_divisi.status <> 0)
		AND (awal >= @tglAwal AND akhir <= @tglAkhir)

INSERT @tmpTable
	SELECT TOP 100 PERCENT * FROM @tmpTable2 ORDER by kd_pegawai, tanggal
	
RETURN  
END

MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: GetHargaAverageBarang
MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
--MENCARI HARGA AVERAGE
--	0 	=> 	stok awal					[v] harga = sesuai harga
--	3 	=> 	opname masuk					[v] harga = 0
--	5	=> 	pembelian - retur 				[v] harga = sesuai harga	
CREATE     FUNCTION GetHargaAverageBarang(@tanggal DATETIME)
RETURNS @tabel_harga_barang TABLE (kd_barang varchar(50), stok FLOAT, harga MONEY)  
BEGIN
	DECLARE @jumlah FLOAT, @harga_baru MONEY, @kd_barang VARCHAR(50)
	SET @jumlah = 0
	SET @harga_baru = 0

	--DECLARE  @tanggal DATETIME
	--DECLARE @tabel_harga_barang TABLE (kd_barang VARCHAR(20), stok FLOAT, harga MONEY)
	
	--masukkan semua barang yang ada di perusahaan ke tabel harga barang
	INSERT INTO @tabel_harga_barang
		SELECT kd_barang, 0, 0
		FROM m_barang 
	
	--UPDATE STOK DAN HARGA RATA-RATA
	--===============================
	--STOK AWAL
	UPDATE @tabel_harga_barang
	SET stok = stok + jumlah_stok_awal ,
		harga = ((harga * stok) + (harga_average * jumlah_stok_awal)) / (stok + jumlah_stok_awal)
	FROM @tabel_harga_barang bh, v_g_barang_stok_awal_average
	WHERE bh.kd_barang = v_g_barang_stok_awal_average.kd_barang AND  v_g_barang_stok_awal_average.jumlah_stok_awal > 0 
	

	
	--OPNAME STOK
	IF @tanggal IS NOT NULL
	BEGIN
		DECLARE cur_transaksi CURSOR FOR
			SELECT kd_barang, dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(kd_barang, kd_satuan) *  qty , 0
			FROM t_opname_stok 
			WHERE status = 2 AND tanggal BETWEEN dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND @tanggal
		OPEN cur_transaksi
		FETCH NEXT FROM cur_transaksi INTO @kd_barang, @jumlah, @harga_baru
		WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
		BEGIN
			UPDATE @tabel_harga_barang
			SET stok = stok + @jumlah ,
				harga = ((harga * stok) + (@jumlah * @harga_baru)) / (stok + @jumlah)
			WHERE kd_barang = @kd_barang
			
			FETCH NEXT FROM cur_transaksi INTO @kd_barang, @jumlah, @harga_baru
		END
		CLOSE cur_transaksi
		DEALLOCATE cur_transaksi
	END	
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		DECLARE cur_transaksi CURSOR FOR
			SELECT kd_barang, dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(kd_barang, kd_satuan) *  qty, 0
			FROM t_opname_stok 
			WHERE status = 2 AND tanggal >= dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
		OPEN cur_transaksi
		FETCH NEXT FROM cur_transaksi INTO @kd_barang, @jumlah, @harga_baru
		WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
		BEGIN
			UPDATE @tabel_harga_barang
			SET stok = stok + @jumlah ,
				harga = ((harga * stok) + (@jumlah * @harga_baru)) / (stok + @jumlah)
			WHERE kd_barang = @kd_barang
			
			FETCH NEXT FROM cur_transaksi INTO @kd_barang, @jumlah, @harga_baru
		END
		CLOSE cur_transaksi
		DEALLOCATE cur_transaksi
	END	
	
	--PEMBELIAN 
	IF @tanggal IS NOT NULL
	BEGIN
		DECLARE cur_transaksi CURSOR FOR
			SELECT d.kd_barang, (dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan) * d.qty),
		    		dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga_beli, d.diskon1, d.diskon2, d.diskon3, d.diskon4, 0, 0), b.diskon1, b.diskon2, b.diskon3, b.diskon4, b.pajak, b.ppnbm) / 
					dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan) 				
			FROM t_pembelian b INNER JOIN t_pembelian_detail d ON b.no_transaksi = d.no_transaksi
			WHERE b.tanggal BETWEEN dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND @tanggal
		OPEN cur_transaksi
		FETCH NEXT FROM cur_transaksi INTO @kd_barang, @jumlah, @harga_baru
		WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
		BEGIN
			UPDATE @tabel_harga_barang
			SET stok = stok + @jumlah ,
				harga = ((harga * stok) + (@jumlah * @harga_baru)) / (stok + @jumlah)
			WHERE kd_barang = @kd_barang
			
			FETCH NEXT FROM cur_transaksi INTO @kd_barang, @jumlah, @harga_baru
		END
		CLOSE cur_transaksi
		DEALLOCATE cur_transaksi
	END		
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		DECLARE cur_transaksi CURSOR FOR
			SELECT d.kd_barang, (dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan) * d.qty),
		    		dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga_beli, d.diskon1, d.diskon2, d.diskon3, d.diskon4, 0, 0), b.diskon1, b.diskon2, b.diskon3, b.diskon4, b.pajak, b.ppnbm) / 
					dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan) 				
			FROM t_pembelian b INNER JOIN t_pembelian_detail d ON b.no_transaksi = d.no_transaksi
			WHERE b.tanggal >= dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
		OPEN cur_transaksi
		FETCH NEXT FROM cur_transaksi INTO @kd_barang, @jumlah, @harga_baru
		WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
		BEGIN
			UPDATE @tabel_harga_barang
			SET stok = stok + @jumlah ,
				harga = ((harga * stok) + (@jumlah * @harga_baru)) / (stok + @jumlah)
			WHERE kd_barang = @kd_barang
			
			FETCH NEXT FROM cur_transaksi INTO @kd_barang, @jumlah, @harga_baru
		END
		CLOSE cur_transaksi
		DEALLOCATE cur_transaksi
	END

	--RETUR PEMBELIAN 
	IF @tanggal IS NOT NULL
	BEGIN
		DECLARE cur_transaksi CURSOR FOR
			SELECT d.kd_barang, (dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan) * d.qty),
				dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga, d.diskon1, d.diskon2, d.diskon3, d.diskon4, 0, 0), b.diskon1, b.diskon2, b.diskon3, b.diskon4, b.pajak, b.ppnbm) / 
					dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan) 
			FROM t_pembelian_retur b INNER JOIN t_pembelian_retur_detail d ON b.no_retur = d.no_retur
			WHERE b.tanggal BETWEEN dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND @tanggal
		OPEN cur_transaksi
		FETCH NEXT FROM cur_transaksi INTO @kd_barang, @jumlah, @harga_baru
		WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
		BEGIN
			UPDATE @tabel_harga_barang
			SET stok = stok + @jumlah ,
				harga = ((harga * stok) + (@jumlah * @harga_baru)) / (stok + @jumlah)
			WHERE kd_barang = @kd_barang
			
			FETCH NEXT FROM cur_transaksi INTO @kd_barang, @jumlah, @harga_baru
		END
		CLOSE cur_transaksi
		DEALLOCATE cur_transaksi
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		DECLARE cur_transaksi CURSOR FOR
			SELECT d.kd_barang, (dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan) * d.qty),
				dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga, d.diskon1, d.diskon2, d.diskon3, d.diskon4, 0, 0), b.diskon1, b.diskon2, b.diskon3, b.diskon4, b.pajak, b.ppnbm) / 
					dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan) 
			FROM t_pembelian_retur b INNER JOIN t_pembelian_retur_detail d ON b.no_retur = d.no_retur
			WHERE b.tanggal >= dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
		OPEN cur_transaksi
		FETCH NEXT FROM cur_transaksi INTO @kd_barang, @jumlah, @harga_baru
		WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
		BEGIN
			UPDATE @tabel_harga_barang
			SET stok = stok + @jumlah ,
				harga = ((harga * stok) + (@jumlah * @harga_baru)) / (stok + @jumlah)
			WHERE kd_barang = @kd_barang
			
			FETCH NEXT FROM cur_transaksi INTO @jumlah, @harga_baru
		END
		CLOSE cur_transaksi
		DEALLOCATE cur_transaksi
	END
	RETURN
END

MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: GetHargaAverageBarangPerTanggal
MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE            FUNCTION [dbo].[GetHargaAverageBarangPerTanggal](@tanggal DATETIME)
RETURNS @result TABLE (kd_barang VARCHAR(50),  harga_average MONEY, harga_akhir MONEY)
BEGIN	

	DECLARE @temp  TABLE (kd_barang VARCHAR(50), tanggal DATETIME, transaksi VARCHAR(200), qty FLOAT, harga MONEY)

	INSERT INTO @temp
		--STOK AWAL
		SELECT kd_barang, dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku(), 'STOK AWAL', 
			ISNULL(SUM(ISNULL(stok_awal, 0)), 0), ISNULL(SUM(ISNULL(abs(stok_awal) * abs(harga_beli_awal), 0)), 0) / 
				(CASE WHEN ISNULL(SUM(ISNULL(stok_awal, 0)), 0) = 0 THEN 1 
				ELSE ISNULL(SUM(ISNULL(stok_awal, 0)), 0)
				END)
		FROM m_barang_divisi
		GROUP BY kd_barang 
		
		UNION ALL
	
		--PEMBELIAN 
		SELECT d.kd_barang, b.tanggal, 'PEMBELIAN', (bs.jumlah * d.qty),
				dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga_beli, d.diskon1, d.diskon2, d.diskon3, d.diskon4, 0, 0), b.diskon1, b.diskon2, b.diskon3, b.diskon4, b.pajak, b.ppnbm) / 
				ISNULL(bs.jumlah, 0)
		FROM t_pembelian b INNER JOIN t_pembelian_detail d ON b.no_transaksi = d.no_transaksi 
			INNER JOIN m_barang_satuan bs ON d.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND d.kd_satuan = bs.kd_satuan
		WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(b.tanggal) BETWEEN  dateadd(day, 1, dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()) AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@tanggal)
	

	INSERT INTO @result
		SELECT bh.kd_barang as kd_barang, 
			 --(SELECT TOP 1 harga FROM @temp WHERE kd_barang = bh.kd_barang ORDER BY tanggal DESC),
			ISNULL(SUM(bh.qty * bh.harga), 0) / 
				(CASE WHEN ISNULL(SUM(bh.qty), 0) = 0 THEN 1 
				ELSE 
					ISNULL(SUM(bh.qty), 0) 
				END) as harga_average, 0
		FROM @temp bh 
		-- WHERE bh.qty > 0 --AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND @tanggal	
		GROUP BY bh.kd_barang	

	
	/*
	UPDATE @result 
	SET stok_akhir = bd.stok
	FROM @result rs INNER JOIN 
		(SELECT     bh.kd_barang,  bh.harga / (CASE WHEN bs.jumlah = 0 THEN  1 ELSE bs.jumlah END)
		FROM         @temp bh INNER JOIN m_barang_satuan bs ON
			bh.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND bh.kd_satuan = bs.kd_satuan
		WHERE     dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) <= @tanggal
		GROUP BY bh.kd_barang) AS bd ON rs.kd_barang = bd.kd_barang
	

	UPDATE @result 
	SET harga_akhir = bnor.harga
	FROM @result rs INNER JOIN @temp bnor ON rs.kd_barang = bnor.kd_barang INNER JOIN 
		(SELECT kd_barang, MAX(tanggal) tgl
		FROM @temp 
		GROUP BY kd_barang) bmax ON bmax.kd_barang = bnor.kd_barang 
	WHERE bnor.tanggal = bmax.tgl	
*/
	
	RETURN
	
END

MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: GetHargaAverageBarangPerTanggal_ORI
MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE       FUNCTION GetHargaAverageBarangPerTanggal_ORI(@tanggal DATETIME)
	RETURNS @stok_barang TABLE (kd_barang VARCHAR(30), stok_akhir FLOAT, harga_average MONEY)
	BEGIN	
	
		DECLARE @histori_barang TABLE (kd_barang VARCHAR(30), tanggal DATETIME, keterangan VARCHAR(50), stok FLOAT, harga MONEY)
		--UPDATE HISTORI BARANG PER TANGGAL
		--============================================================================================================================
		--STOK AWAL
		INSERT INTO @histori_barang
			SELECT kd_barang, dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku(), 'STOK AWAL', 
				ISNULL(SUM(ISNULL(stok_awal, 0)), 0), dbo.GetHargaAVGStokAwal(kd_barang)
			FROM m_barang_divisi
			GROUP BY kd_barang 
	
		--OPNAME STOK
		INSERT INTO @histori_barang
			SELECT kd_barang, tanggal, 'OPNAME STOK', dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(kd_barang, kd_satuan) *  qty, 0
			FROM t_opname_stok 
			WHERE status = 2 AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND @tanggal
	
		--PEMBELIAN 
		INSERT INTO @histori_barang
			SELECT d.kd_barang, b.tanggal, 'PEMBELIAN', (dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan) * d.qty),
		    		dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga_beli, d.diskon1, d.diskon2, d.diskon3, d.diskon4, 0, 0), b.diskon1, b.diskon2, b.diskon3, b.diskon4, b.pajak, b.ppnbm) / 
					dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(d.kd_barang, d.kd_satuan)
			FROM t_pembelian b INNER JOIN t_pembelian_detail d ON b.no_transaksi = d.no_transaksi
			WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(b.tanggal) BETWEEN dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND @tanggal
	
		--============================================================================================================================
		--CARI STOK AKHIR DARI MASING-MASING BARANG
		--============================================================================================================================
		--KEPERLUAN CURSOR
		DECLARE @kd_barang VARCHAR(30), @stok_akhir FLOAT, @stok FLOAT, @harga MONEY
		DECLARE @temp_stok FLOAT
		SET @temp_stok = 0
	
		DECLARE CUR_STOK_BARANG	CURSOR FOR
			SELECT     kd_barang, SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(kd_barang, kd_satuan) * (Debet - Kredit)) 
			FROM         v_g_barang_histori_detail 
			WHERE     dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) <= @tanggal
			GROUP BY kd_barang
		OPEN CUR_STOK_BARANG
		FETCH NEXT FROM CUR_STOK_BARANG INTO @kd_barang, @stok_akhir
		WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
		BEGIN
			
			IF @stok_akhir > 0 
			--JIKA STOK AKHIR > 0
			BEGIN
				INSERT INTO @stok_barang
				SELECT @kd_barang, 0, 0
	
				SET @temp_stok = @stok_akhir
	
				--LOOPING DARI HISTORI HARGA MASUK
				DECLARE CUR_HISTORI_BARANG CURSOR FOR
					SELECT stok, harga
					FROM @histori_barang
					WHERE kd_barang = @kd_barang
					ORDER BY tanggal DESC
				OPEN CUR_HISTORI_BARANG
				FETCH NEXT FROM CUR_HISTORI_BARANG INTO @stok, @harga
				WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
				BEGIN
					IF @temp_stok <= @stok
					--JIKA STOK AKHIR <= STOK (HISTORI)
					BEGIN
							UPDATE @stok_barang
							SET stok_akhir = stok_akhir + @temp_stok, 	
								harga_average = ((stok_akhir * harga_average) + (@temp_stok * @harga)) /  (CASE WHEN stok_akhir + @temp_stok = 0 THEN 1 ELSE ISNULL((stok_akhir + @temp_stok),  1) END)
							WHERE kd_barang = @kd_barang
						
						GOTO NEXT_BARANG
					END
	
					ELSE IF @temp_stok > @stok	
					BEGIN
					--JIKA STOK AKHIR > STOK (HISTORI)	
							UPDATE @stok_barang
							SET stok_akhir = stok_akhir + @stok, 
								harga_average = ((stok_akhir * harga_average) + (@stok * @harga)) /   (CASE WHEN stok_akhir + @stok = 0 THEN 1 ELSE ISNULL((stok_akhir + @stok),  1) END)
							WHERE kd_barang = @kd_barang			
	
						SET @temp_stok = @temp_stok - @stok	
					END
	
					FETCH NEXT FROM CUR_HISTORI_BARANG INTO @stok, @harga
				END
				NEXT_BARANG:
				CLOSE CUR_HISTORI_BARANG
				DEALLOCATE CUR_HISTORI_BARANG
				
			END
	
			ELSE
			-- JIKA STOK AKHIR <= 0 
				INSERT INTO @stok_barang
				SELECT @kd_barang, @stok_akhir, 0
			
	
			FETCH NEXT FROM CUR_STOK_BARANG INTO @kd_barang, @stok_akhir
		END
	
		CLOSE CUR_STOK_BARANG
		DEALLOCATE CUR_STOK_BARANG
	
	RETURN
	END

MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: GetHargaBeliAkhirPerTanggal
MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition: CREATE FUNCTION GetHargaBeliAkhirPerTanggal(@tanggal DATETIME)  RETURNS @result TABLE (kd_barang VARCHAR(50),  harga_akhir MONEY)   BEGIN   DECLARE @temp  TABLE (kd_barang VARCHAR(50), tanggal DATETIME, transaksi VARCHAR(200), qty FLOAT, harga MONEY)  INSERT INTO @temp  SELECT kd_barang, dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() as tanggal, 'STOK AWAL' as transaksi,   ISNULL(SUM(ISNULL(stok_awal, 0)), 0) AS Qty,  ISNULL(SUM(ISNULL(stok_awal * harga_beli_awal, 0)), 0) /   (CASE WHEN ISNULL(SUM(ISNULL(stok_awal, 0)), 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE ISNULL(SUM(ISNULL(stok_awal, 0)), 0) END) as Harga FROM m_barang_divisi GROUP BY kd_barang   UNION ALL  SELECT d.kd_barang, b.tanggal, 'PEMBELIAN', (bs.jumlah * d.qty),   dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(d.harga_beli, d.diskon1, d.diskon2, d.diskon3, d.diskon4, 0, 0), b.diskon1, b.diskon2, b.diskon3, b.diskon4, b.pajak, b.ppnbm) / ISNULL(bs.jumlah, 0)  FROM t_pembelian b INNER JOIN t_pembelian_detail d ON b.no_transaksi = d.no_transaksi INNER JOIN m_barang_satuan bs ON d.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND d.kd_satuan = bs.kd_satuan  WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(b.tanggal) BETWEEN  dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() AND @tanggal  INSERT INTO @result SELECT bnor.kd_barang, bnor.harga FROM  @temp bnor INNER JOIN    (SELECT kd_barang, MAX(tanggal) tgl     FROM @temp     GROUP BY kd_barang) bmax ON bmax.kd_barang = bnor.kd_barang WHERE bnor.tanggal = bmax.tgl   RETURN  END

MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: GetPegawaiTidakMasuk
MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
-- =============================================
-- Fungsi Untuk mengembalikan daftar pegawai yang tidak masuk
-- =============================================

CREATE FUNCTION  GetPegawaiTidakMasuk()
RETURNS @RetTmpPegawai TABLE (kd_pegawai varchar(6), nama varchar(50), Tgl datetime)
AS
begin
	DECLARE @TmpPegawai TABLE (kd_pegawai varchar(6), nama varchar(50), Tgl datetime)
	DECLARE @M_kd_pegawai varchar(6)
	DECLARE @M_nama varchar(50)
	DECLARE @JmlPegawai as int
	DECLARE @TglSementara as datetime

	DECLARE C_Tanggal_Aktif CURSOR FOR
	select dbo.getformattanggal(dbo.t_absensi.masuk) from dbo.t_absensi
	group by dbo.getformattanggal(dbo.t_absensi.masuk)
	order by dbo.getformattanggal(dbo.t_absensi.masuk)
	OPEN C_Tanggal_Aktif


	FETCH NEXT FROM C_Tanggal_aktif INTO @TglSementara
	WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
	begin
		IF (@@FETCH_STATUS <> -1)	
		begin
			DECLARE C_pegawai CURSOR FOR
			SELECT dbo.m_pegawai.kd_pegawai, dbo.m_pegawai.nama 
			from dbo.m_pegawai where (dbo.m_pegawai.kd_divisi <> 'DAA000') AND(dbo.m_pegawai.status <> 0)   -- Ambil semua pegawai yang selain divisi pabrik
			OPEN C_pegawai

			set @JmlPegawai = 0
			Fetch NEXT  from C_pegawai into @M_kd_pegawai, @M_nama
				-- masukkan variabel M_kd_pegawai, M_nama ke kondisi dibawah ini
				select @JmlPegawai = isnull(count(dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai),0)  --, dbo.getformattanggal(dbo.t_absensi.masuk) as Tanggal, min(dbo.t_absensi.masuk) as Masuk, max(dbo.t_absensi.keluar) as Keluar  
				from dbo.t_absensi 
				where (dbo.getformattanggal(dbo.t_absensi.masuk)  =  @TglSementara) and  (dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai = @M_kd_pegawai)
				group by dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai, dbo.getformattanggal(dbo.t_absensi.masuk) 
				order by  dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai ,dbo.getformattanggal(dbo.t_absensi.masuk) 
	
			IF (@JmlPegawai = 0)
				insert into @TmpPegawai values (@M_kd_pegawai,@M_nama,@TglSementara)		-- insert pegawai yang tidak ada
			
			-- Fetch Lagi untuk data lainnya sampai semua data habis
	
			while (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
			begin	
				set @JmlPegawai  = 0
				Fetch next from C_pegawai into @M_kd_pegawai, @M_nama
				if (@@fetch_status <> -1) 
				begin
					-- masukkan variabel M_kd_pegawai, M_nama ke kondisi dibawah ini
					select @JmlPegawai = isnull(count(dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai),0)  --, dbo.getformattanggal(dbo.t_absensi.masuk) as Tanggal, min(dbo.t_absensi.masuk) as Masuk, max(dbo.t_absensi.keluar) as Keluar  
					from dbo.t_absensi 
					where (dbo.getformattanggal(dbo.t_absensi.masuk)  =  @TglSementara) and  (dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai = @M_kd_pegawai)
					group by dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai, dbo.getformattanggal(dbo.t_absensi.masuk) 
					order by  dbo.t_absensi.kd_pegawai ,dbo.getformattanggal(dbo.t_absensi.masuk) 
	
					IF (@JmlPegawai = 0)
						insert into @TmpPegawai values (@M_kd_pegawai,@M_nama,@TglSementara)		-- insert pegawai yang tidak ada
				end		
			end	-- while
			
			close C_pegawai
			deallocate C_pegawai
			
		end -- IF FETCH_STATUS <> -1
		FETCH NEXT FROM C_Tanggal_aktif INTO @TglSementara
	end -- while tanggal awal <> tanggal akhir

	close C_Tanggal_Aktif
	deallocate C_Tanggal_Aktif

	insert @RetTmpPegawai
	select * from @TmpPegawai order by kd_pegawai, Tgl
	RETURN	
end

MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: GetRekapHarian
MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE     FUNCTION GetRekapHarian (@awal DATETIME, @akhir DATETIME)
RETURNS @result_table TABLE (Keterangan VARCHAR(50), Nominal MONEY)
AS
BEGIN		
	DECLARE @persediaan_awal MONEY, @pembelian MONEY, @retur_pembelian MONEY, @siap_dijual MONEY, 
		@penjualan_bruto MONEY, @penjualan_netto MONEY, @potongan MONEY, @retur_penjualan MONEY, @penjualan_tunai MONEY, @penjualan_kredit MONEY, 
		@persediaan_akhir MONEY, @harga_pokok_penjualan MONEY, @rugi_laba_penjualan MONEY, @rasio_kontribusi FLOAT,
		@biaya MONEY, @pendapatan MONEY, @tagihan_piutang MONEY, @penjualan_jasa MONEY, @persewaan MONEY, @pendapatan_surcharge MONEY, @rugi_laba_bersih MONEY,
		@rasio_kontribusi_bersih FLOAT
	
	SET @persediaan_awal = 0 
	SET @pembelian = 0 
	SET @retur_pembelian = 0 
	
	SET @siap_dijual = 0
	SET @penjualan_bruto = 0 
	SET @penjualan_netto = 0
	SET @potongan = 0 
	SET @retur_penjualan = 0 
	
	SET @penjualan_tunai = 0
	SET @penjualan_kredit = 0
	SET @persediaan_akhir = 0 
	SET @harga_pokok_penjualan = 0 
	SET @rugi_laba_penjualan = 0 
	SET @rasio_kontribusi = 0
	
	SET @biaya = 0 
	SET @pendapatan = 0 
	SET @tagihan_piutang = 0
	SET @penjualan_jasa = 0
	SET @persewaan = 0
	SET @pendapatan_surcharge = 0
	
	SET @rugi_laba_bersih = 0 
	SET @rasio_kontribusi_bersih = 0
	
	DECLARE @awal1 DATETIME		--jika parameter tanggal awal lebih kecil dari pada tanggal tutup buku terakhir
	SET @awal1 = @awal
	IF @awal1 < dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
		SET @awal1 = DATEADD(DAY, 1, dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku())

	DECLARE @awal2 DATETIME		--untuk mengambil stok akhir per tanggal perlu dikurangi dengan tanggal terakhir
	SET @awal2 = DATEADD(DAY, -1, @awal1)
	
	--PERSEDIAAN AWAL
	SELECT     @persediaan_awal = SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang, dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_satuan) 
	      * (dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.Debet - dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.Kredit) * HA.harga_average )
	FROM         dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail INNER JOIN dbo.GetHargaAverageBarangPerTanggal(@awal2) as ha ON ha.kd_barang = v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang
	WHERE     (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.tanggal) < dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@awal1))
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Persediaan Awal', @persediaan_awal
	
	--PEMBELIAN
	SELECT @pembelian = ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetTotalPembelian(no_transaksi)), 0)
	FROM t_pembelian 
	WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Pembelian', @pembelian
	
	--RETUR PEMBELIAN
	SELECT @retur_pembelian =  ISNULL(SUM(qty * harga), 0)
	FROM t_pembelian_retur INNER JOIN t_pembelian_retur_detail ON
		t_pembelian_retur_detail.no_retur = t_pembelian_retur.no_retur
	WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir 
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Retur Pembelian', @retur_pembelian
	
	--SPACE
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT '',0
	
	--SIAP DIJUAL
	SET  @siap_dijual = @persediaan_awal + @pembelian - @retur_pembelian
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Stok Yang Tersedia', @siap_dijual
	
	--PENJUALAN BRUTO
	SELECT @penjualan_bruto = SUM(qty * harga_jual)
	FROM t_penjualan INNER JOIN t_penjualan_detail ON t_penjualan.no_transaksi = t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi
	WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir 
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Penjualan Bruto', @penjualan_bruto
	
	--POTONGAN PENJUALAN
	SELECT @potongan = ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetTotalDiskonPenjualan(no_transaksi)), 0)
	FROM t_penjualan
	WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Potongan', @potongan
	
	--RETUR PENJUALAN
	SELECT @retur_penjualan = ISNULL(SUM(harga_jual * qty), 0)
	FROM t_penjualan_retur INNER JOIN t_penjualan_retur_detail ON 
		t_penjualan_retur.no_retur = t_penjualan_retur_detail.no_retur
	WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Retur Penjualan', @retur_penjualan
	
	--SPACE
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT '',0
	
	--PENJUALAN NETTO
	SELECT @penjualan_netto = ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(no_transaksi)), 0) - @retur_penjualan
	FROM t_penjualan 
	WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir 
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Penjualan Netto', @penjualan_netto
	
	--PENJUALAN TUNAI
	SELECT @penjualan_tunai = ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(no_transaksi)), 0)
	FROM t_penjualan 
	WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir AND status = 1
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Penjualan Tunai', @penjualan_tunai
	
	
	--PENJUALAN KREDIT
	SELECT @penjualan_kredit = ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(no_transaksi)), 0)
	FROM t_penjualan 
	WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir AND status = 0 
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Penjualan Kredit', @penjualan_kredit
	
	--PERSEDIAAN AKHIR
	SELECT     @persediaan_akhir = SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang, dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_satuan) 
	      * (dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.Debet - dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.Kredit) * HA.harga_average )
	FROM         dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail INNER JOIN dbo.GetHargaAverageBarangPerTanggal(@akhir) as ha ON ha.kd_barang = v_g_barang_histori_detail.kd_barang
	WHERE     (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(dbo.v_g_barang_histori_detail.tanggal) < DATEADD(DAY, 1, dbo.GetFormatTanggal(@akhir)))
	
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Persediaan Akhir', @persediaan_akhir
	
	--HARGA POKOK PENJUALAN
	SET @harga_pokok_penjualan = @siap_dijual - @persediaan_akhir
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Harga Pokok Penjualan', @harga_pokok_penjualan
	
	--LABA KOTOR
	SET @rugi_laba_penjualan = @penjualan_netto - @harga_pokok_penjualan  
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Rugi Laba Penjualan Barang', @rugi_laba_penjualan
	
	--RASIO KONTRIBUSI
	IF @harga_pokok_penjualan = 0 
		SET @harga_pokok_penjualan = 1
	SET @rasio_kontribusi = @rugi_laba_penjualan / @harga_pokok_penjualan 
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Rasio Kontribusi Kotor (%)' , @rasio_kontribusi* 100
	
	--SPACE
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT '',0
	
	--PENJUALAN JASA
	SELECT @penjualan_jasa = ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi)), 0)
	FROM t_penjualan_jasa INNER JOIN t_penjualan_jasa_detail ON  t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi INNER JOIN m_jasa ON t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa = m_jasa.kd_jasa
		INNER JOIN m_jasa_kategori ON m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori
	WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_pesan) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir AND m_jasa_kategori.status = 2
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Penjualan Jasa', @penjualan_jasa
	
	--PERSEWAAN 
	SELECT @persewaan = ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi)), 0)
	FROM t_penjualan_jasa INNER JOIN t_penjualan_jasa_detail ON  t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi INNER JOIN m_jasa ON t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa = m_jasa.kd_jasa
		INNER JOIN m_jasa_kategori ON m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori
	WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_pesan) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir AND m_jasa_kategori.status = 1
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Persewaan', @persewaan
	
	
	--PENDAPATAN KARTU KREDIT
	SELECT @pendapatan_surcharge = ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi) * t_penjualan_jasa.other), 0)
	FROM t_penjualan_jasa INNER JOIN t_penjualan_jasa_detail ON  t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi INNER JOIN m_jasa ON t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa = m_jasa.kd_jasa
		INNER JOIN m_jasa_kategori ON m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori
	WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_pesan) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir 
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Pendapatan Surcharge', @pendapatan_surcharge
	
	--SPACE
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT '',0
	
	--BIAYA 
	SELECT @biaya = ISNULL(SUM(nominal), 0)
	FROM t_biaya_operasional
	WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir 
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Biaya Operasional', @biaya
	
	--PENDAPATAN
	SELECT @pendapatan = ISNULL(SUM(nominal), 0)
	FROM t_pendapatan 
	WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir 
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Pendapatan', @pendapatan
	
	--LABA BERSIH
	SET @rugi_laba_bersih = @rugi_laba_penjualan - @biaya + @pendapatan   + @penjualan_jasa + @persewaan + @pendapatan_surcharge
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Rugi Laba Bersih', @rugi_laba_bersih
	
	--RASIO KONTRIBUSI
	IF @harga_pokok_penjualan = 0 
		SET @harga_pokok_penjualan = 1
	SET @rasio_kontribusi_bersih = @rugi_laba_bersih / @harga_pokok_penjualan 
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Rasio Kontribusi Bersih (%)', @rasio_kontribusi_bersih * 100
	
	--TAGIHAN PIUTANG
	SELECT @tagihan_piutang = ISNULL(SUM(nominal), 0)
	FROM t_piutang_cicilan 
	WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir 
	
	--SPACE
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT '',0
	
	INSERT INTO @result_table
	SELECT 'Tagihan Piutang', @tagihan_piutang
	
	RETURN
END

MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: GetRekapHarianPerDivisi
MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE  FUNCTION GetRekapHarianPerDivisi (@awal DATETIME, @akhir DATETIME, @divisi VARCHAR(50))
		RETURNS @result_table TABLE (Keterangan VARCHAR(50), Nominal MONEY)
		AS
		BEGIN		
		DECLARE @penjualan_bruto MONEY, @penjualan_netto MONEY, @potongan MONEY, @retur_penjualan MONEY, @penjualan_tunai MONEY, @penjualan_kredit MONEY, 
			@harga_pokok_penjualan MONEY, @rugi_laba_penjualan MONEY, @rasio_kontribusi FLOAT,
			@biaya MONEY, @pendapatan MONEY, @tagihan_piutang MONEY, @penjualan_jasa MONEY, @persewaan MONEY, @pendapatan_surcharge MONEY, @rugi_laba_bersih MONEY,
			@rasio_kontribusi_bersih FLOAT
		
		SET @penjualan_bruto = 0 
		SET @penjualan_netto = 0
		SET @potongan = 0 
		SET @retur_penjualan = 0 
		
		SET @penjualan_tunai = 0
		SET @penjualan_kredit = 0
		SET @harga_pokok_penjualan = 0 
		SET @rugi_laba_penjualan = 0 
		SET @rasio_kontribusi = 0
		
		SET @biaya = 0 
		SET @pendapatan = 0 
		SET @tagihan_piutang = 0
		SET @penjualan_jasa = 0
		SET @persewaan = 0
		SET @pendapatan_surcharge = 0
		
		SET @rugi_laba_bersih = 0 
		SET @rasio_kontribusi_bersih = 0
		
		DECLARE @awal1 DATETIME		--jika parameter tanggal awal lebih kecil dari pada tanggal tutup buku terakhir
		SET @awal1 = @awal
		IF @awal1 < dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
			SET @awal1 = DATEADD(DAY, 1, dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku())

		DECLARE @awal2 DATETIME		--untuk mengambil stok akhir per tanggal perlu dikurangi dengan tanggal terakhir
		SET @awal2 = DATEADD(DAY, -1, @awal1)
		
		--PENJUALAN BRUTO
		SELECT @penjualan_bruto = SUM(qty * harga_jual)
		FROM t_penjualan INNER JOIN t_penjualan_detail ON t_penjualan.no_transaksi = t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi
			INNER JOIN m_divisi ON t_penjualan.kd_divisi = m_divisi.kd_divisi 
		WHERE m_divisi.nama LIKE @divisi + '%' AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir 
		
		INSERT INTO @result_table
		SELECT 'Penjualan Bruto', @penjualan_bruto
		
		--POTONGAN PENJUALAN
		SELECT @potongan = ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetTotalDiskonPenjualan(no_transaksi)), 0)
		FROM t_penjualan INNER JOIN m_divisi ON t_penjualan.kd_divisi = m_divisi.kd_divisi
		WHERE m_divisi.nama LIKE @divisi + '%' AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir
		
		INSERT INTO @result_table
		SELECT 'Potongan', @potongan
		
		--RETUR PENJUALAN
		SELECT @retur_penjualan = ISNULL(SUM(harga_jual * qty), 0)
		FROM t_penjualan_retur INNER JOIN t_penjualan_retur_detail ON 
			t_penjualan_retur.no_retur = t_penjualan_retur_detail.no_retur
			INNER JOIN m_divisi ON t_penjualan_retur.kd_divisi = m_divisi.kd_divisi
		WHERE m_divisi.nama LIKE @divisi + '%' AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir
		
		INSERT INTO @result_table
		SELECT 'Retur Penjualan', @retur_penjualan
		
		--SPACE
		INSERT INTO @result_table
		SELECT '',0
		
		--PENJUALAN NETTO
		SELECT @penjualan_netto = ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(no_transaksi)), 0) - @retur_penjualan
		FROM t_penjualan INNER JOIN m_divisi ON t_penjualan.kd_divisi = m_divisi.kd_divisi
		WHERE m_divisi.nama LIKE @divisi + '%' AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir 
		
		INSERT INTO @result_table
		SELECT 'Penjualan Netto', @penjualan_netto
		
		--PENJUALAN TUNAI
		SELECT @penjualan_tunai = ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(no_transaksi)), 0)
		FROM t_penjualan INNER JOIN m_divisi ON t_penjualan.kd_divisi = m_divisi.kd_divisi
		WHERE m_divisi.nama LIKE @divisi + '%' AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir AND t_penjualan.status = 1
		
		INSERT INTO @result_table
		SELECT 'Penjualan Tunai', @penjualan_tunai
		
		
		--PENJUALAN KREDIT
		SELECT @penjualan_kredit = ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(no_transaksi)), 0)
		FROM t_penjualan INNER JOIN m_divisi ON t_penjualan.kd_divisi = m_divisi.kd_divisi
		WHERE m_divisi.nama LIKE @divisi + '%' AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir AND t_penjualan.status = 0 
		
		INSERT INTO @result_table
		SELECT 'Penjualan Kredit', @penjualan_kredit
		
		--HARGA POKOK PENJUALAN
		SELECT     @harga_pokok_penjualan = ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetKuantitasSatuanTerkecil(t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang, t_penjualan_detail.kd_satuan) 
			* t_penjualan_detail.qty * brg.harga_average ), 0)
		FROM         t_penjualan INNER JOIN
			t_penjualan_detail ON t_penjualan.no_transaksi = t_penjualan_detail.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
			dbo.GetHargaAverageBarangPerTanggal(@awal2) brg ON t_penjualan_detail.kd_barang = brg.kd_barang
			INNER JOIN m_divisi ON t_penjualan.kd_divisi = m_divisi.kd_divisi
		WHERE m_divisi.nama LIKE @divisi + '%' AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir 
		
		INSERT INTO @result_table
		SELECT 'Harga Pokok Penjualan', @harga_pokok_penjualan
		
		--LABA KOTOR
		SET @rugi_laba_penjualan = @penjualan_netto - @harga_pokok_penjualan  
		
		INSERT INTO @result_table
		SELECT 'Rugi Laba Penjualan Barang', @rugi_laba_penjualan
		
		--RASIO KONTRIBUSI
		IF @harga_pokok_penjualan = 0 
			SET @harga_pokok_penjualan = 1
		SET @rasio_kontribusi = @rugi_laba_penjualan / @harga_pokok_penjualan 
		
		INSERT INTO @result_table
		SELECT 'Rasio Kontribusi Kotor (%)' , @rasio_kontribusi* 100
		
		--SPACE
		INSERT INTO @result_table
		SELECT '',0
		
		--PENJUALAN JASA
		SELECT @penjualan_jasa = ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi)), 0)
		FROM t_penjualan_jasa INNER JOIN t_penjualan_jasa_detail ON  t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi INNER JOIN m_jasa ON t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa = m_jasa.kd_jasa
			INNER JOIN m_jasa_kategori ON m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori
			INNER JOIN m_divisi ON t_penjualan_jasa.kd_divisi = m_divisi.kd_divisi
		WHERE m_divisi.nama LIKE @divisi + '%' AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_pesan) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir AND m_jasa_kategori.status = 2
		
		INSERT INTO @result_table
		SELECT 'Penjualan Jasa', @penjualan_jasa
		
		--PERSEWAAN 
		SELECT @persewaan = ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi)), 0)
		FROM t_penjualan_jasa INNER JOIN t_penjualan_jasa_detail ON  t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi INNER JOIN m_jasa ON t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa = m_jasa.kd_jasa
			INNER JOIN m_jasa_kategori ON m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori
			INNER JOIN m_divisi ON t_penjualan_jasa.kd_divisi = m_divisi.kd_divisi
		WHERE m_divisi.nama LIKE @divisi + '%' AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_pesan) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir AND m_jasa_kategori.status = 1
		
		INSERT INTO @result_table
		SELECT 'Persewaan', @persewaan
		
		
		--PENDAPATAN KARTU KREDIT
		SELECT @pendapatan_surcharge = ISNULL(SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualanJasa(t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi) * t_penjualan_jasa.other), 0)
		FROM t_penjualan_jasa INNER JOIN t_penjualan_jasa_detail ON  t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi = t_penjualan_jasa.no_transaksi INNER JOIN m_jasa ON t_penjualan_jasa_detail.kd_jasa = m_jasa.kd_jasa
			INNER JOIN m_jasa_kategori ON m_jasa.kd_jasa_kategori = m_jasa_kategori.kd_jasa_kategori
			INNER JOIN m_divisi ON t_penjualan_jasa.kd_divisi = m_divisi.kd_divisi
		WHERE m_divisi.nama LIKE @divisi + '%' AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal_pesan) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir 
		
		INSERT INTO @result_table
		SELECT 'Pendapatan Surcharge', @pendapatan_surcharge
		
		--SPACE
		INSERT INTO @result_table
		SELECT '',0
		
		--BIAYA 
		SELECT @biaya = ISNULL(SUM(nominal), 0)
		FROM t_biaya_operasional
			INNER JOIN m_divisi ON t_biaya_operasional.kd_divisi = m_divisi.kd_divisi
		WHERE m_divisi.nama LIKE @divisi + '%' AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir 
		
		INSERT INTO @result_table
		SELECT 'Biaya Operasional', @biaya
		
		--PENDAPATAN
		SELECT @pendapatan = ISNULL(SUM(nominal), 0)
		FROM t_pendapatan INNER JOIN m_divisi ON t_pendapatan.kd_divisi = m_divisi.kd_divisi
		WHERE m_divisi.nama LIKE @divisi + '%'  AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir 
		
		INSERT INTO @result_table
		SELECT 'Pendapatan', @pendapatan
		
		--LABA BERSIH
		SET @rugi_laba_bersih = @rugi_laba_penjualan - @biaya + @pendapatan   + @penjualan_jasa + @persewaan + @pendapatan_surcharge
		
		INSERT INTO @result_table
		SELECT 'Rugi Laba Bersih', @rugi_laba_bersih
		
		--RASIO KONTRIBUSI
		IF @harga_pokok_penjualan = 0 
			SET @harga_pokok_penjualan = 1
		SET @rasio_kontribusi_bersih = @rugi_laba_bersih / @harga_pokok_penjualan 
		
		INSERT INTO @result_table
		SELECT 'Rasio Kontribusi Bersih (%)', @rasio_kontribusi_bersih * 100
		
		--TAGIHAN PIUTANG
		SELECT @tagihan_piutang = ISNULL(SUM(nominal), 0)
		FROM t_piutang_cicilan INNER JOIN t_penjualan ON t_piutang_cicilan.no_transaksi = t_piutang_cicilan.no_transaksi
			INNER JOIN m_divisi ON t_penjualan.kd_divisi = m_divisi.kd_divisi
		WHERE  m_divisi.nama LIKE @divisi + '%' AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t_piutang_cicilan.tanggal) BETWEEN @awal1 AND @akhir 
		
		--SPACE
		INSERT INTO @result_table
		SELECT '',0
		
		INSERT INTO @result_table
		SELECT 'Tagihan Piutang', @tagihan_piutang
		
		RETURN
	END

MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: GetSemuaNotaKosong
MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
--- Ambil Semua nota kosong pada tiap-tiap kepala nota
-- Date  : 23 Nop 07

CREATE FUNCTION GetSemuaNotaKosong ()  
RETURNS @TmpNotaKosong TABLE (nota VARCHAR(10), kepalaNota VARCHAR(3)) AS  
BEGIN 
	DECLARE @min as BIGINT, @max as BIGINT, @KepalaNota as INT
		
	DECLARE c_KepalaNota CURSOR FOR
		SELECT  RIGHT(MIN(no_transaksi),5) as awal, RIGHT(MAX(no_transaksi),5) as akhir, 
		--(LEFT(no_transaksi, LEN(no_transaksi) - 6)) AS kepala_nota
		SUBSTRING(no_transaksi,CHARINDEX(')',no_transaksi)+1,CHARINDEX('.',no_transaksi) - CHARINDEX(')',no_transaksi) -1) as Kepala_nota
		FROM  dbo.t_penjualan 		
		GROUP BY 
		--(LEFT(no_transaksi, LEN(no_transaksi) - 6)) Revisi 09 08 2008
		SUBSTRING(no_transaksi,CHARINDEX(')',no_transaksi)+1,CHARINDEX('.',no_transaksi) - CHARINDEX(')',no_transaksi) -1)
	
	OPEN  c_KepalaNota
	
	FETCH NEXT FROM c_KepalaNota INTO @min, @max, @kepalaNota
	
	WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
	BEGIN
		IF (@@FETCH_STATUS <> -1)
		BEGIN
			INSERT @TmpNotaKosong 
			SELECT (CAST(@KepalaNota as VARCHAR(2)) + '.' + nomor), @KepalaNota
			FROM g_nomor 
			WHERE nomor BETWEEN  @min AND @max
			AND nomor NOT IN  (
					SELECT RIGHT(no_transaksi,5)  FROM t_penjualan 
					WHERE --(LEFT(no_transaksi, LEN(no_transaksi) - 6)) = @KepalaNota
					SUBSTRING(no_transaksi,CHARINDEX(')',no_transaksi)+1,CHARINDEX('.',no_transaksi) - CHARINDEX(')',no_transaksi) -1) = @KepalaNota

					UNION
					
					SELECT RIGHT(no_transaksi,5)  FROM t_penjualan_nota_kosong 
					WHERE --(LEFT(no_transaksi, LEN(no_transaksi) - 6)) = @KepalaNota
					SUBSTRING(no_transaksi,CHARINDEX(')',no_transaksi)+1,CHARINDEX('.',no_transaksi) - CHARINDEX(')',no_transaksi) -1) = @KepalaNota
					)
		END
		FETCH NEXT FROM c_KepalaNota INTO @min, @max, @KepalaNota
	END
	
	CLOSE c_KepalaNota
	DEALLOCATE c_KepalaNota
	
	RETURN
END

MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: GetSemuaTanggalAktif
MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
-- Ambil Semua Tanggal Aktif
-- Return berupa tabel dengan format jam di abaikan

CREATE FUNCTION GetSemuaTanggalAktif()
RETURNS @TanggalAktif TABLE (Tgl  DATETIME) AS  
BEGIN 
	INSERT @TanggalAktif 
		SELECT dbo.getformattanggal(masuk) FROM t_absensi
		GROUP BY  dbo.getformattanggal(masuk) 
		ORDER BY  dbo.getformattanggal(masuk)
	RETURN
END

MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: GetTotalPenjualanPerKasir
MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE  FUNCTION GetTotalPenjualanPerKasir(@kode_user JR_KODE_MASTER)
RETURNS @result  TABLE (keterangan VARCHAR(30), nominal FLOAT)
AS 
BEGIN

--JUMLAH NOTA			xxx
--TOTAL PENJUALAN		xxx
--JENIS PEMBAYARAN	
	--CASH			xxx
	--KARTU DEBET		xxx
	--KARTU KREDIT		xxx
--CUSTOMER			xxx
--VOUCHER
	--25.000		xxx
	--50.000		xxx

INSERT INTO @result
	SELECT 'JUMLAH NOTA' AS Keterangan, COUNT(j.no_transaksi) as Nominal
	FROM t_penjualan j
	WHERE j.tanggal_setor < j.tanggal AND j.kd_user =@kode_user
	
	UNION ALL
	
	SELECT 'TOT. PENJUALAN' AS Keterangan, SUM(jd.qty * dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(jd.harga_jual, jd.diskon1, jd.diskon2, jd.diskon3, jd.diskon4, 0, 0 ), j.diskon1, j.diskon2, j.diskon3, j.diskon4, 0, 0) ) as Nominal
	FROM t_penjualan_detail jd, t_penjualan j
	WHERE jd.no_transaksi = j.no_transaksi AND j.tanggal_setor <= j.tanggal AND j.kd_user =@kode_user
	
	UNION ALL
	
	SELECT  '------', 0
	
	UNION ALL
	
	SELECT jb.nama as Keterangan, SUM(dbo.GetTotalPenjualan(j.no_transaksi)) AS nominal
	FROM t_penjualan j, m_jenis_bayar jb
	WHERE j.kd_jenis = jb.kd_jenis AND j.tanggal_setor <= j.tanggal AND j.kd_user = @kode_user
	GROUP BY j.kd_jenis, jb.nama
	
	UNION ALL
	
	SELECT 'DISKON Rp' as Keterangan, ISNULL(SUM(j.diskon_uang), 0) AS nominal
	FROM t_penjualan j
	WHERE j.tanggal_setor <= j.tanggal AND j.kd_user = @kode_user
	
	UNION ALL
	
	SELECT v.nama as Keterangan, SUM(v.nominal) AS Nominal
	FROM t_penjualan j, m_voucher v
	WHERE j.kd_voucher = v.kd_voucher AND j.tanggal_setor <= j.tanggal AND j.kd_user =@kode_user
	GROUP BY v.nama
	HAVING SUM(v.nominal) <> 0
	
	UNION ALL
	
	SELECT  '------', 0
	
	UNION ALL
	
	SELECT 'LANTAI ' + CAST(LEFT(jd.kd_barang, 1) AS VARCHAR(1)), SUM(jd.qty)
	FROM t_penjualan_detail jd, t_penjualan j
	WHERE jd.no_transaksi = j.no_transaksi AND j.tanggal_setor <= j.tanggal AND j.kd_user = @kode_user AND LEFT(jd.kd_barang, 1) IN ('1', '2', '3')
	GROUP BY 'LANTAI ' + CAST(LEFT(jd.kd_barang, 1) AS VARCHAR(1))
	
	UNION ALL
	
	SELECT  '------', 0
	/*
	UNION ALL
	
	SELECT 'BIAYA OPERASIONAL', 0
	
	UNION ALL

	SELECT  '------', 0
*/	
	UNION ALL
	
	SELECT jb.nama as Keterangan, SUM(b.nominal) AS nominal
	FROM t_biaya_operasional  b, m_jenis_bayar jb
	WHERE b.kd_jenis = jb.kd_jenis AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(b.tanggal) = (SELECT TOP 1 dbo.GetFormatTanggal(tanggal) FROM t_penjualan WHERE tanggal_setor <= tanggal) 
		AND b.kd_user = @kode_user
	GROUP BY b.kd_jenis, jb.nama 
RETURN
END

MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: mon_GetAbsenSemuaPegawai
MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
--Note		: Fungsi ini langsung di panggil dari VB, jadi kalau ada penambahan kolom kerja keras lagi ! OK
--Purpose	: Menampilkan semua pegawai yang tidak masuk (absen), DENGAN SYARAT TANGGAL AWAL DAN TANGGAL AKHIR PERIODE
--Created by	: I-ONE

CREATE FUNCTION mon_GetAbsenSemuaPegawai(@TglAwal as DATETIME, @TglAkhir as DATETIME)
RETURNS 
	@TmpTable TABLE (
	Hari VARCHAR(10), 
	Tanggal DATETIME, 
	Kode VARCHAR(6), 
	Pegawai VARCHAR(30), 
	Jabatan VARCHAR(30),
	Divisi VARCHAR(30), 
	Shift VARCHAR(30), 
	Keterangan VARCHAR(50), 
	Alasan varchar(50)) 
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE @Tmp DATETIME
	DECLARE C_Tanggal_Aktif CURSOR FOR
		SELECT Tgl FROM dbo.GetSemuaTanggalAktif() 
		WHERE (Tgl BETWEEN  @TglAwal AND @TglAkhir)
	
	OPEN C_Tanggal_Aktif
	
	FETCH NEXT FROM C_Tanggal_aktif INTO @Tmp
	WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
	BEGIN
		IF (@@FETCH_STATUS <> -1)	
		BEGIN
			INSERT @TmpTable
				SELECT 
				dbo.GetNamaHari(@Tmp),
				@Tmp, 
				m_pegawai.kd_pegawai, 
				m_pegawai.nama,
				m_jabatan.nama,
				m_divisi.nama,
				m_jam_kerja.nama,
				m_divisi.keterangan,			
				dbo.GetPegawaiAlasanTidakMasuk(@tmp,m_pegawai.kd_pegawai)
				FROM m_pegawai INNER JOIN m_divisi ON (m_pegawai.kd_divisi=m_divisi.kd_divisi)
					INNER JOIN m_jam_kerja ON (m_pegawai.kd_shift=m_jam_kerja.kd_shift) INNER JOIN m_jabatan ON m_pegawai.kd_jabatan = m_jabatan.kd_jabatan
				WHERE (m_divisi.kd_divisi <> 'DAA000') AND (m_pegawai.status <> 0) AND (m_divisi.status <> 0)
				AND (m_jam_kerja.status <> 0)
				AND kd_pegawai 
					NOT IN (SELECT kd_pegawai FROM t_absensi WHERE dbo.GetFormatTanggal(masuk) = @Tmp)

		END
		FETCH NEXT FROM C_Tanggal_aktif INTO @tmp
	END
	
	CLOSE C_Tanggal_Aktif
	DEALLOCATE C_Tanggal_aktif	
	RETURN
END

MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: mon_GetCustomerTidakAktif
MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION mon_GetCustomerTidakAktif(@jarak_tanggal INT, @dari_tanggal DATETIME)
RETURNS @tabel_customer TABLE (Kode VARCHAR(30), Alamat VARCHAR(100), Kota VARCHAR(50), Customer VARCHAR(50), tanggal DATETIME)
AS
BEGIN
/* CUSTOMER YANG TIDAK SELAMA "X" BULAN (BISA DI KATEGORI KAN PER SUPPLIER)
CUSTOMER	TRANSAKSI TERAKHIR	
========	==================
	*/
	
	/*
	DECLARE @jarak_tanggal INT
	
	SET @jarak_tanggal = 90
	*/
	DECLARE @temp TABLE (Kode VARCHAR(30), Alamat VARCHAR(100), Kota VARCHAR(50), Customer VARCHAR(50), tanggal DATETIME)
	
	INSERT INTO @temp
	SELECT kd_customer AS Kode, m_customer.nama AS Customer, Alamat, m_kota.nama as Kota,
		(SELECT TOP 1 tanggal 
		FROM t_penjualan 
		WHERE t_penjualan.kd_Customer = m_customer.kd_customer 
		ORDER BY tanggal DESC)
	FROM m_customer INNER JOIN m_kota ON m_customer.kd_kota = m_kota.kd_kota
	ORDER BY m_customer.nama
	
	
	INSERT INTO @tabel_customer
	SELECT *
	FROM @temp
	WHERE tanggal IS NOT NULL AND DATEDIFF(DAY, tanggal, @dari_tanggal) > @jarak_tanggal
	
	RETURN
END

MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: mon_GetFMIPenjualan
MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION dbo.mon_GetFMIPenjualan(@PeriodeAwal DATETIME, @PeriodeAkhir DATETIME, @Divisi VARCHAR(100))
RETURNS @result TABLE (Awal DATETIME, Akhir DATETIME, Divisi VARCHAR(100), 
	Nomor BIGINT, [Kode] VARCHAR(100), Barang VARCHAR(100), 
	DivisiBarang VARCHAR(100), Departemen VARCHAR(100), Kategori VARCHAR(100), SubKategori VARCHAR(100),
	Qty FLOAT, Total FLOAT, Saldo FLOAT,
	FMI INT, SMI INT)	
AS 
BEGIN
/*
DECLARE @PeriodeAwal DATETIME, @PeriodeAkhir DATETIME
SET @PeriodeAwal = '2019/02/01'
SET @PeriodeAkhir = '2019/02/28'

DECLARE @Divisi VARCHAR(100)
SET @Divisi = 'HM'

	SET @PeriodeAwal = dbo.GetTanggalServer()
	SET @PeriodeAwal =  CAST(YEAR(DATEADD(month, -1, @PeriodeAwal)) AS VARCHAR(4)) + '/' + CAST(MONTH(DATEADD(month, -1, @PeriodeAwal)) AS VARCHAR(2)) + '/1'
	SET @PeriodeAkhir = dbo.GetTanggalServer()
	SET @PeriodeAkhir = CAST(YEAR(@PeriodeAkhir) AS VARCHAR(4)) + '/' + CAST(MONTH(@PeriodeAkhir) AS VARCHAR(2)) + '/1'
	SET @PeriodeAkhir = DATEADD(DAY, -1, @PeriodeAkhir)
*/

DECLARE @temp TABLE(Awal DATETIME, Akhir DATETIME, Divisi VARCHAR(100), 
	Nomor BIGINT, kd_barang VARCHAR(100), qty FLOAT, Total FLOAT, Saldo FLOAT,
	FMI INT, SMI INT)

INSERT INTO @temp
	SELECT   @PeriodeAwal, @PeriodeAkhir, @Divisi,  0,
		dtl.kd_barang AS [Kode Barang], SUM(dtl.qty * bstn.jumlah) AS Jumlah, 
		SUM(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dbo.GetHargaBersih(dtl.harga_jual, dtl.diskon1, dtl.diskon2, dtl.diskon3, dtl.diskon4, 0, 0), jual.diskon1, jual.diskon2, 
		jual.diskon3, jual.diskon4, jual.pajak, 0) * dtl.qty) AS Total, 0, 0, 0
	FROM         t_penjualan jual INNER JOIN
		t_penjualan_detail dtl ON jual.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi INNER JOIN
		m_barang brg ON dtl.kd_barang = brg.kd_barang INNER JOIN
		m_divisi dv ON jual.kd_divisi = dv.kd_divisi INNER JOIN
		m_barang_satuan bstn ON dtl.kd_barang = bstn.kd_barang AND dtl.kd_satuan = bstn.kd_satuan
	WHERE     (dtl.jenis = 1) AND dv.nama = @Divisi AND (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal) BETWEEN @PeriodeAwal AND @PeriodeAkhir)
	GROUP BY dtl.kd_barang
	ORDER BY total DESC


DECLARE @TotalPenjualan FLOAT
SELECT @TotalPenjualan = SUM(total) FROM @temp

DECLARE @kd_barang VARCHAR(100), @jumlah FLOAT, @total FLOAT
DECLARE @saldo_temp FLOAT, @nomor_temp BIGINT

DECLARE @FMI INT, @SMI INT
SET @FMI = 1 
SET @SMI = 0

SET @saldo_temp = 0
SET @nomor_temp = 0

DECLARE cur_transaksi CURSOR FOR
	SELECT kd_barang, qty, total 
	FROM @temp
	
OPEN cur_transaksi
FETCH NEXT FROM cur_transaksi INTO @kd_barang, @jumlah, @total
WHILE (@@FETCH_STATUS = 0)
BEGIN
	SET @nomor_temp = @nomor_temp + 1
	SET @saldo_temp = @saldo_temp + @total
	
	UPDATE @temp 
	SET nomor = @nomor_temp, saldo = @saldo_temp, FMI = @FMI, SMI = @SMI
	WHERE kd_barang = @kd_barang

	IF @saldo_temp > (@TotalPenjualan * 0.8)
	BEGIN
		SET @FMI = 0
		SET @SMI = 1 
	END
	
	FETCH NEXT FROM cur_transaksi INTO @kd_barang, @jumlah, @total
END
CLOSE cur_transaksi
DEALLOCATE cur_transaksi

INSERT INTO @result 
	SELECT Awal, Akhir, Divisi, 
		Nomor, tm.kd_barang, br.nama, mr.nama, mdl.nama, kt.nama, wrn.nama,
		Qty, Total, Saldo, FMI, SMI 
	FROM @temp tm INNER JOIN m_barang br ON tm.kd_barang = br.kd_barang 
	INNER JOIN m_kategori kt ON br.kd_kategori = kt.kd_kategori
	INNER JOIN m_merk mr ON br.kd_merk = mr.kd_merk
	INNER JOIN m_model mdl ON br.kd_model = mdl.kd_model
	INNER JOIN m_warna wrn ON br.kd_warna = wrn.kd_warna
	ORDER BY nomor
RETURN

END

MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: mon_GetFMIStok
MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE   FUNCTION [dbo].[mon_GetFMIStok](@Tanggal DATETIME, @Divisi VARCHAR(100), @JumlahPeriode INT )
RETURNS @result TABLE 
	(Tanggal DATETIME, Divisi VARCHAR(100), Kode VARCHAR(100), Barang VARCHAR(100), 
	DivisiBarang VARCHAR(100), Departemen VARCHAR(100), Kategori VARCHAR(100), SubKategori VARCHAR(100),
	Stok FLOAT, Satuan VARCHAR(100), FMI INT, SMI INT, [FMI Kosong] INT, [SMI Kosong] INT)
AS
BEGIN
/*
DECLARE @Tanggal DATETIME, @Divisi VARCHAR(100)
SET @Tanggal = '2019/03/05'
SET @Divisi = 'HM'
*/

DECLARE @KodeDivisi VARCHAR(100)
SET @KodeDivisi = ''
SET @KodeDivisi = (SELECT  TOP 1  kd_divisi FROM m_divisi WHERE nama = @Divisi)
	

DECLARE @Awal DATETIME, @Akhir DATETIME
SET @Awal =  CAST(YEAR(DATEADD(month, @JumlahPeriode * -1, @Tanggal)) AS VARCHAR(4)) + '/' + CAST(MONTH(DATEADD(month, @JumlahPeriode * -1, @Tanggal)) AS VARCHAR(2)) + '/1'
SET @Akhir = CAST(YEAR(@Tanggal) AS VARCHAR(4)) + '/' + CAST(MONTH(@Tanggal) AS VARCHAR(2)) + '/1'
SET @Akhir = DATEADD(DAY, -1, @Akhir)

DECLARE @temp_barang TABLE (kode VARCHAR(100), stok FLOAT)
DECLARE @temp_histori TABLE (kode VARCHAR(100), debet FLOAT, kredit FLOAT)

INSERT INTO @temp_barang
	SELECT kd_barang, 0
	FROM t_penjualan jual INNER JOIN t_penjualan_detail dtl ON jual.no_transaksi = dtl.no_transaksi
	WHERE (dbo.GetFormatTanggal(jual.tanggal) BETWEEN @Awal AND @Akhir) AND dtl.jenis = 1 AND jual.kd_divisi = @KodeDivisi
	GROUP BY kd_barang

--stok awal dari barang divisi
INSERT INTO @temp_histori
SELECT  bd.kd_barang, bd.stok_awal AS Debet, 0 AS Kredit
FROM m_barang_divisi bd, m_barang_satuan bs, m_barang b, m_kategori k, @temp_barang tm
WHERE bd.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND bs.jumlah = 1 
	AND bd.kd_barang = b.kd_barang AND b.kd_kategori = k.kd_kategori AND k.status <> 2 
	AND tm.kode = bd.kd_barang 
	AND bd.kd_divisi = @KodeDivisi

--pengirim mutasi stok 
INSERT INTO @temp_histori
SELECT d.kd_barang, 0 AS Debet, SUM(d.qty * bs.jumlah) AS Kredit
FROM t_mutasi_stok_detail d, t_mutasi_stok t, m_barang_satuan bs, @temp_barang tm
WHERE d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku() 
	AND d.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND d.kd_satuan = bs.kd_satuan
	AND tm.kode = d.kd_barang AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t.tanggal) <= @Tanggal
	AND t.kd_divisi_asal = @KodeDivisi
GROUP BY d.kd_barang

--penerima mutasi stok
INSERT INTO @temp_histori
SELECT d.kd_barang, SUM(d.qty * bs.jumlah) AS DEBET, 0 AS KREDIT
FROM t_mutasi_stok_detail d, t_mutasi_stok t, m_barang_satuan bs, @temp_barang tm
WHERE d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
	AND d.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND d.kd_satuan = bs.kd_satuan
	AND tm.kode = d.kd_barang AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t.tanggal) <= @Tanggal
	AND t.kd_divisi_tujuan = @KodeDivisi
GROUP BY d.kd_barang

--opname stok yang menambahkan stok
INSERT INTO @temp_histori
SELECT os.kd_barang, SUM(os.QTY* bs.jumlah) AS DEBET, 0 AS KREDIT
FROM t_opname_stok os, m_barang_satuan bs, @temp_barang tm
WHERE os.status = 2 AND os.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
	AND os.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND os.kd_satuan = bs.kd_satuan
	AND tm.kode = os.kd_barang AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(os.tanggal) <= @Tanggal
	AND os.kd_divisi = @KodeDivisi
GROUP BY os.kd_barang

--opname stok yang mengurangkan stok dibedakan dari status
INSERT INTO @temp_histori
SELECT os.kd_barang, 0 AS DEBET, SUM(os.qty* bs.jumlah) AS KREDIT
FROM t_opname_stok os, m_barang_satuan bs, @temp_barang tm
WHERE os.status <> 2 AND tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
	AND os.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND os.kd_satuan = bs.kd_satuan
	AND tm.kode = os.kd_barang AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(os.tanggal) <= @Tanggal
	AND os.kd_divisi = @KodeDivisi
GROUP BY os.kd_barang

--pembelian barang
INSERT INTO @temp_histori
SELECT d.kd_barang, SUM(d.qty * bs.jumlah) AS DEBET, 0 AS KREDIT
FROM t_pembelian_detail d, t_pembelian t, m_barang_satuan bs, @temp_barang tm
WHERE d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
	AND d.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND d.kd_satuan = bs.kd_satuan
	AND tm.kode = d.kd_barang AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t.tanggal) <= @Tanggal
	AND t.kd_divisi = @KodeDivisi
GROUP BY d.kd_barang

--retur pembelian, mengurangi stok
INSERT INTO @temp_histori
SELECT d.kd_barang, 0 AS DEBET, SUM(d.qty * bs.jumlah) AS KREDIT
FROM t_pembelian_retur_detail d, t_pembelian_retur t, m_barang_satuan bs, @temp_barang tm
WHERE d.no_retur = t.no_retur AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
	AND d.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND d.kd_satuan = bs.kd_satuan
	AND tm.kode = d.kd_barang AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t.tanggal) <= @Tanggal
	AND t.kd_divisi = @KodeDivisi
GROUP BY d.kd_barang

--penjualan, mengurangi stok
INSERT INTO @temp_histori
SELECT d.kd_barang, 0 AS DEBET, SUM(d.qty * bs.jumlah) AS KREDIT
FROM t_penjualan_detail d, t_penjualan t, m_barang b, m_kategori k, m_barang_satuan bs, @temp_barang tm
WHERE d.no_transaksi = t.no_transaksi AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
	AND d.kd_barang = b.kd_barang AND b.kd_kategori = k.kd_kategori AND k.status <> 2
	AND d.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND d.kd_satuan = bs.kd_satuan
	AND tm.kode = d.kd_barang AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t.tanggal) <= @Tanggal
	AND t.kd_divisi = @KodeDivisi
GROUP BY d.kd_barang

--retur penjualan barang, menambah stok 
INSERT INTO @temp_histori
SELECT d.kd_barang, SUM(d.qty * bs.jumlah) AS DEBET, 0 AS KREDIT
FROM t_penjualan_retur_detail d, t_penjualan_retur t, m_barang_satuan bs, @temp_barang tm
WHERE d.no_retur = t.no_retur AND t.tanggal > dbo.GetTanggalTerakhirTutupBuku()
	AND d.kd_barang = bs.kd_barang AND d.kd_satuan = bs.kd_satuan
	AND tm.kode = d.kd_barang AND dbo.GetFormatTanggal(t.tanggal) <= @Tanggal
	AND t.kd_divisi = @KodeDivisi
GROUP BY d.kd_barang

UPDATE @temp_barang
SET stok = tmp.total
FROM @temp_barang tb INNER JOIN 
	(SELECT th.kode as kd_barang, SUM(th.debet-th.kredit) AS Total
	FROM @temp_histori th 
	GROUP BY th.kode) tmp ON tmp.kd_barang = tb.kode

INSERT INTO @result
SELECT @tanggal, @Divisi, tm.kode, br.nama, mrk.nama, mdl.nama, kt.nama, wrn.nama, tm.stok, st.nama, fj.FMI, fj.SMI, 0, 0
FROM @temp_barang tm INNER JOIN m_barang br on tm.kode = br.kd_barang
	INNER JOIN m_barang_satuan bs ON tm.kode = bs.kd_barang
	INNER JOIN m_satuan st ON bs.kd_satuan = st.kd_satuan
	INNER JOIN m_kategori kt ON br.kd_kategori = kt.kd_kategori
	INNER JOIN m_merk mrk ON br.kd_merk = mrk.kd_merk
	INNER JOIN m_model mdl ON br.kd_model = mdl.kd_model
	INNER JOIN m_warna wrn ON br.kd_warna = wrn.kd_warna
	INNER JOIN dbo.mon_GetFMIPenjualan(@Awal, @Akhir, @Divisi) fj ON fj.[Kode] = tm.kode
WHERE bs.jumlah = 1

UPDATE @result
SET [FMI Kosong] = 1 
WHERE stok<= 0 AND FMI=1


UPDATE @result
SET [SMI Kosong] = 1 
WHERE stok<= 0 AND SMI=1

RETURN
END

MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.name: mon_GetKehadiranPegawaiHorizontal
MULTI_STATEMENT_TABLE_FUNCTION.definition:
CREATE FUNCTION mon_GetKehadiranPegawaiHorizontal(@awal DATETIME, @akhir DATETIME)
RETURNS @result_table TABLE (kd_pegawai CHAR(6), nama VARCHAR(50), kelompok INT, keterangan VARCHAR(200), masuk VARCHAR(200), absen VARCHAR(200))
BEGIN
/*DECLARE @awal DATETIME, @akhir DATETIME
SET @awal  = '2009/05/01'
SET @akhir = '2009/05/31'*/

DECLARE @kd_pegawai CHAR(6), @nama VARCHAR(50), @kelompok INT, @keterangan VARCHAR(200), @hadir VARCHAR(200), @absen VARCHAR(200)
DECLARE @jumlah INT

DECLARE @flag_tanggal DATETIME

--DECLARE @result_table TABLE (kd_pegawai CHAR(6), nama VARCHAR(50), kelompok INT, keterangan VARCHAR(200), masuk VARCHAR(200), absen VARCHAR(200))


DECLARE cur_pegawai CURSOR FOR
	SELECT kd_pegawai , nama, kelompok
